Review:
It was a great experience to have all different kinds of palate tickling & tongue teasing delicacies under one  roof. The discount scheme of 50%. was a very good idea to attract food lovers.
Please continue for long if possible.

Disappointing Experience at Pol21. A Multi-Cuisine Misfire
Pol21 promises a world of culinary delights with its extensive menu featuring Gujarati, North Indian, South Indian, Italian, Mexican, Chinese, and Continental options. Unfortunately, my recent experience fell far short of expectations. Food quality and test was OK. That wasn't give feel at all of sitting 4-star hotel.

Only good part is ambiance. And the worst part is Air Condition was not working. We didn't expect this at all. Service was very poor. Very loud and noisy atmosphere.

The buffet itself, though offering variety, seems to be the weak link here. With such a broad range of cuisines, it's difficult to achieve excellence in any one.

Overall, Pol21 fails to deliver on its promise.  If you're looking for a focused and enjoyable dining experience, I would recommend looking elsewhere.

Indulging in a recent buffet dinner was an absolute treat for the taste buds. The spread was nothing short of spectacular, offering a diverse range of culinary delights that catered to every palate.

The live counters were a particular highlight, with the panipuri station being a crowd-pleaser. The freshly prepared, flavorful pani puri, bursting with tangy and spicy flavors, was simply irresistible.

From the appetizers to the main course and desserts, every dish was meticulously crafted, showcasing the chef's culinary expertise. The flavors were bold and authentic, and the presentation was visually appealing.

The service was impeccable, with attentive staff ensuring a seamless dining experience. Overall, the buffet dinner was a memorable affair, leaving us thoroughly satisfied and eager to return for another gastronomic adventure.

Calling this a 4-star hotel is a big joke.
I would have given it a 1 star but still giving it 2 considering the sweet staff.
Here is an in depth review mentioning the pros and cons-

Pros-
1. Sweet and friendly staff.
2. Good parking area.
3. Close to big malls.
4. Outside food is allowed

Cons-
1. Dirty bedrooms, walls have all sorts of things written on them with pencils and are cracked too, stained curtains, dirty windows, unfinished bathroom flooring, broken and stained cutlery.
2. The staff is courteous but very uneducated and desi
3. No pool or gym present despite the claims online.

Overall, go here only for single night stay or when you are looking for transit hotels.

Excellent food excellent stay. Spacious rooms and good location. Mr. Nitin was excellent at Pol 21 restaurant his hospitality was admirable. Whole team is energetic and welcoming. Thank you for good time here.

The Binori Hotel impresses with its exceptional service, luxurious accommodations, and a welcoming ambiance. The attentive and polite staff ensures a pleasant stay for all guests, catering to the needs of every visitor. Had a wedding organised at Binori hotel. Feedback -
1. Bliss Events(Harsh Shah) tie up with Binori for event and decor - Bad experience. Charged us thrice the amount for everything. Promised us for real flowers and put up artificial ones. The lights for the stage weren't working. Had so much attitude that even after complaining they dint care.
2. Room Management - Despite of giving them the whole list, type of room and cot type for extra bed, things weren't organised as expected. Had a chaotic experience due to that.
3. Cleaniness - Some guests complained about the cleaniness in some rooms.
4. Food - Food at Binori was pretty good.
5. Room checkin experience - Pretty bad. Had requested them to clean certain floors and room asap, but the management dint agree until i asked the GM to help me out there. I have no idea why they act so helpless.
6. Had promised us certain floors and rooms at the time of booking, the day before we get to know that they changed all of it  as they had got another wedding booking for the same day. The strange part is we had 60 rooms and they had taken up only 9 rooms, still they were given preference over us.

My experiences at Binori Hotel during our BNI meetings have consistently exceeded expectations. The venue provides an ideal setting for professional gatherings, with spacious and well-equipped meeting facilities ensuring a productive environment.

One of the highlights of these meetings has undoubtedly been the culinary offerings at Binori Hotel. The food consistently impresses with its delicious flavors and impeccable presentation. From appetizers to desserts, each dish is a testament to the culinary expertise of the hotel's kitchen staff.

Moreover, the attentive service adds to the overall dining experience. The staff goes above and beyond to cater to guests' needs, ensuring that every aspect of the meal is perfect.

Beyond the gastronomic delights, Binori Hotel also excels in hospitality and ambiance. The welcoming atmosphere and attention to detail create a memorable experience for attendees, making every BNI meeting a pleasure to attend.

In conclusion, Binori Hotel stands out as a premier choice for hosting BNI meetings, offering not only excellent facilities but also exquisite cuisine and top-notch service. I highly recommend Binori Hotel to anyone seeking a seamless blend of professionalism and culinary indulgence.

After 11 years, I was in India alone for my cousin's wedding. Despite of a big family in Ahmedabad,  I decided to stay in a hotel for a month for comfort and especially for "ME" time. I was a bit nervous and a little scared to live by myself for a month. But this was the best decision ever.  I had an amazing experience here. Binori has the most polite and trustworthy staff. Their reception staff always greeted me with a lovely smile. Having my daily breakfast at the restaurant was my
most favorite time.  Their chef and thier team are sooo nice. Their food is so delicious and so much to choose from. I can tell, they love what they do. As in U.S. we believe in self service,  but Binori spoiled me so much for a month, that now I am back home, and miss my time at Binori. By the way, it has a very convenient location close to the newest mall. I highly recommend this place, even for the long stay. For my next visit,   I will surely stay there.  And I really thank my uncle Mr. Desai for suggesting Binori.
My stay ,it's was very good, l happy for all service. Internet Well. Thanks for that. Ms.sucharita gave us very good assistance during stay.

A 2-star hotel or less, definitely not a 4-star hotel.

Despite the high charges we pay thinking it’s a premium hotel, all we get is a 2-star experience or even worse. Let me explain a bit in detail.

1. Flooring - “cheap 2x2tiles” instead of the normal marble or wooden flooring you see in Good hotels. Really Binori? What were you’ll thinking ?

2. Cleanliness -0 points. There’s stains everywhere, dust on so many items. The taps are so dirty around the corners. (Ewwwww x multiple times)

3. Leakages - the tap in the basin ran through entire time we were there. A silent ambience is all we want, but all you get is nuisance. You’re disturbed by the noise of the tap or people around in the lobby’s. No proper soundproofing of doors either. You get a feel of those 1000/- rs hotel lobbies when you’re inside.

4. Design failure - they gave us a double bed room which was converted from twin beds. So the side tables are Far away from you when the bed is joined. Also, there’s a big gap between the bed and headboard (in area of two beds separated) and my phone dropped in it accidentally. Thankfully, the gap was so big that I could easily put my two hands and get my phone 😅.

5. Placement of hand shower -who places a hand shower above the tap? At a length, an average Indian person finds it difficult to access? Isn’t the idea of handshower at one-hand accessible distance?

A sincere request, please don’t believe the fake comments you see here. I believe, they are all paid. For your reference, I am attaching pictures so you don’t waste your money here.

There are plenty of good hotels in the city which give you amazing experience in the same price.

Hope this helps save someone from the trouble we went through.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at Hotel Binori,Ahmedabad and I must say, it was an outstanding experience from start to finish. The hotel itself is impeccable, boasting fantastic amenities and a cozy ambiance that made my stay truly memorable.

However, what truly set this stay apart was the exceptional service provided by Miss Bhoomi Rajput, a member of the hotel staff. Her dedication to ensuring every guest felt welcomed and attended to was commendable. From the moment I checked in to the day of my departure, Miss Bhoomi Rajput went above and beyond to ensure my comfort. Her professionalism, friendliness, and attention to detail were truly remarkable and greatly contributed to the overall positive experience

Binori is a Boutique hotel and on the first look it looks very serene. The lobby area is simple but has some interesting art & decor going around it.  The hotel has a
great location and is bang on SG highway. The check-in process was quick but  reception staff were very cold, that left me feeling completely unwelcomed!

Rooms are quite spacious and well maintained. The bright color decor instantly add freshness to the room. Room service is quick and efficient.

They have a beautifully designed restaurant...lots of  design elements to catch your attention. The breakfast spread was quite basic.
Their service however is not up to the mark...they seemed short staffed and that clearly shows in their service level, definitely needs improvement.

So finally- Will I stay here again?
Mostly No...the unwelcoming attitude of the staff left a bad taste in my mouth!
Good Food. Good Ambience. Nice Staff

When told I only ordered one coffee, he said that once punched he can’t cancel it as the manager was not on site. Ended up paying for two coffee and has to finish the drink forcefully. This is a beautiful hotel, the buffet here provides very good quality food, taste is awesome. Food give a real taste, also the staff is very friendly.

Beautiful place, in such a hot city you won't realise how hot it is outside once you check in. Their wedding halls are small and sweet for family weddings and food service was awesome. Review about Restaurant Pol-21

Pol 21- An amazing place for having delicious food. It has very beautiful ambience. Visited this place during an event named " Sindh Se Punjab- The lost recipe Food Fest".
Loved the food and the effort they took to presenting lost recipes of Sindhi and Punjabi food. I had many different items and all of them was so good.

Starting from Gulab aur Chandan ka sarbat which gives you cool refreshment in this hot weather. Dal Bhukhpari- as they told before many years it was made for the king of Patiala as pre-meal soup. It was really good in taste. As they also served Makhmali chole Tikki and Sanna Pakoda as a starter which was also having a very amazing taste. Loved the main course portion as they served it in authentic taste. Especially I liked Patiala shahi Bharta, Sindhi Kadhi and Sai bhaji. In Dessert, they served Kadah Prasad, Roh di kheer & Singar ji mithai(must try).  Apart from this lost recipe they also served wonderful dessert like Chocolate Brownie, Linger crumble tart etc and some food items which they served in a regular menu.

Must visit this place you will not disappointed for sure.

"Binori A Boutique Hotel" – Implements Gujarat’s Saga Culture & Tradition in a modern way. We promises to provide personalized service with genuine compassion & warmth which makes you feel that your stay has plus value for the money. Cafe Patio (Coffee Shop), Pol 21 (Multi-Cuisine Restaurant), Sachi (Grand Banquet Hall), Sarvam (Banquet Hall) & Board Room (For Conference) open for all guests. We have the perfect room to suit your needs – whether you are a business traveler who needs effortless luxury and impeccable round the clock service or a leisure visitor looking for a sense of tradition and timeless cultural indulgence. All the guest rooms are elegant and spacious that radiates luxury and feature large picture windows which frame the unmatched views of the city. A blend of Indian charm and modern understatement awaits you here. The hotel has 69 luxurious boutique rooms and suits inspired by the culture of Gujarat with modern neutral furnishings that are beautifully incorporated to showcase Ahmedabad regional culture and offer guests exceptional peace and harmony during their stay..
There are 2 places where you can eat. One is cafe it is located in 1st floor and restuarant is located at 3rd floor. I explore cafe and item was amazing try once.

My name is Mr Savio Fernandes and myself and my wife Mrs Helen Fernandes have been staying at Binori Hotel for at least 28 nights in total by the time we will be leaving.
We have enjoyed our stay in all honesty.
The staff have been courteous and kind at all times.
We enjoyed the sumptous breakfast. Please keep it up!
However, I would like to share a few areas for improvement:-
1. The staff doing the cleaning should maintain consistency in cleaning be it the same regular cleaner or a different cleaner, who is on duty;
2. Improvement in terms of consistent service by the staff at the restaurant, tables should be arranged back with all necessary cutlery, sugar etc once the table has been used,
3. Please look into separating smoking rooms to non smoking rooms, as we ended up getting smell of cigarette smoke in our room, from probably guests who were smokers,
4. Also the smell of food being cooked came through our room at odd hours.
5. Personally I also found the cost of the ala carte menu dishes as being expensive.

Our special thanks go to Madam Chaya for ensuring our stay was comfortable and the regular cleaner, who did up our room to attention to detail and without any misconsistence! Server Pritam thanks for your warm hospitable service in the restaurant.

Thank you!
Mr & Mrs Savio Fernandes
Dar es Salaam - Tanzania

Courtyard by Marriott, Ahmedabad - A Stellar Stay ExperienceI recently had the pleasure of staying at the Courtyard by Marriott in Ahmedabad, and I must say, it was an exceptional experience from start to finish.Location and Ambiance: The hotel is conveniently located in the bustling city of Ahmedabad, providing easy access to key business hubs and tourist attractions. The ambiance is modern yet warm, offering a perfect blend of comfort and luxury. The lobby is spacious and welcoming, setting a positive tone for the stay.
Dining: The dining options at the hotel are outstanding. MoMo Café, the all-day dining restaurant, offers a diverse menu with both international and local Gujarati delicacies. The breakfast buffet was particularly noteworthy, with a wide array of choices that cater to all tastes. I also enjoyed the fine dining experience at Bayleaf, which serves delectable Indian cuisine in an elegant setting.Service: The service at Courtyard by Marriott Ahmedabad is truly top-notch. Every staff member I encountered was courteous, attentive, and eager to assist. Check-in and check-out were swift and efficient, and the concierge provided excellent recommendations for exploring the cit

I highly recommend this hotel, I stayed here over the weekend of June 7 to June 9, 2024 and had a very enjoyable and delightful experience. The reception staff were genuinely nice, courteous and made my stay warm and welcoming. Sufiyan at the reception was so attentive to me and my friends and made sure our every need was met over the weekend.
The breakfast buffet was scrumptious with a good range of food and the staff were efficient and attentive as well. Shantanu was exceptionally kind, I was unwell on the last day of my trip and needed some extras and he went out of his way to be helpful.
The hotel is well located in a high-end area of Ahmedabad which is safe and easy to reach. I would say 10/10 for my experience as a solo female traveller.

I had the opportunity to enjoy some snacks at the hotel, and I was impressed by the quality and variety of the offerings. The menu boasted a selection of delectable treats, each dish crafted with care and precision. The flavors were rich and satisfying, making it a delightful culinary experience. The staff at Courtyard by Marriott deserves commendation for their exceptional service. They were attentive, friendly, and went above and beyond to ensure that my visit was enjoyable. Their professionalism and genuine hospitality added to the overall positive impression of the hotel. My time at Courtyard by Marriott was marked by a wonderful ambiance, a positive vibe, and delicious snacks. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone seeking a combination of comfort, style, and excellent service. Whether for a casual visit or a longer stay, Courtyard by Marriott offers a truly pleasant and memorable experience.

Excellent ambience. Staff sometimes behaves little rude. They forget to smile in front of customers. Otherwise its a nice place to be with friends and family. Some Food options are good but select carefully.

We went for brunch along with the whole family n especially with the newly wedded couple. The food was really very nice. As usual multiple options from starter to dessert. We all age gp starting from 2 yrs to 82 yrs have food to satisfy their tongue taste. Slight negative part was very less staff n behavior of one of the person. Otherwise worth to visit.
It is a good option to satisfy your late night hungers. However, the service was very slow. Ambiance is also average.

We are attending the wedding which was outside
But the next door room was vacant and the AC was not not turned on because the wedding was outside. I understand that the wedding was outside but does that mean when you walk in the reception area that you may be told you only paid for the room that’s why the AC is only turned on in the room but not to the reception area, now would that be acceptable to the guests. I bet not

I had the pleasure of dining at this hotel for dinner, and I must say the experience was exceptional. The food was not only delicious but also beautifully presented. The atmosphere was warm and inviting, making it the perfect setting for a relaxing evening. I highly recommend this hotel for a memorable dining experience.
I like serving, cleanliness, and especially the SPA and indoor swimming pool

Our family stay was exceptional, with Aura Restaurant’s complimentary kid-friendly meals stealing the show. The staff’s warmth and the restaurant’s ambiance made our dining experiences truly memorable. Highly recommended for families seeking both comfort and culinary delights.
Good property with great ambience and courteous staff..food is good in taste
Outdated rooms with chipped paint and torn seats. Food was excruciatingly expensive. Contaminated food, and when I sent it back, they just used their dirty hands to scrape off the contaminant.
Excellent Properties. With Good service. Little bit expensive.

Unpleasant experience during my friend's auspicious wedding. Disappointed with the lack of amenities and unfortunate incidents during the event. A lot could have been avoided with a more courteous hotel staff, which also didnt happen. Overall, a lot needs to change immediately to retain its reputation

Had a wonderful stay at this hotel. The rooms were exceptionally spacious, well-maintained, and equipped with all necessary amenities. The service was commendable, with attentive and courteous staff. The food was delicious with wide variety of options. The rates were reasonable and provided good value for money. Big thanks to Bhagirath amd Shubham Sharma for their excellent approach.

Very disappointed.
While check in, gentleman at reception (3:15pm on 21st January 2024) handed over keyless room card. When I enquired about dinner timings, he told me "Sir you will have to pay extra for Dinner, only breakfast is included in your package"

I was shocked by this reply. I just enquired timing and never asked any confusing question.

Then I politely asked him, I have booked package with one meal (Lunch or Dinner) and breakfast. So please double check with your system.

He double checked and apologized for his mistake and said sorry.

I was under impression that he will update the system accordingly.

While I went for dinner, the gentleman at the entrance of restaurant, told me I will get 10% discount on dinner.

This was again shocking to me.

I again showed him my booking copy and told him I have booked full package, please make it sure you have updated hard copy of your guests.

He didn't believe me, he went to main booking clerk and confirmed that I have full package booked.

This was something we never expected from Marriott.

Very Unfortunate and disgusting.
We book 5 star properties for happiness and comfortable stay. This experience made me unhappy infront of other guests at restaurant.

Management should give exhaustive training to the staff in such a 5 Star ⭐ hotels. I think they are appointing less qualified staff to reduce expenses on the staff salary.

I will never go to this place again.

Very bad experience.

Thanks for patiently reading my lengthy review.
Adv J PRADEEP

Check in process was very lazy I was transferred from one counter to another counter a lot of time this process was completed and after check in process I had to wait a long time standing with family for room key, after I checked in I gave them the room key  was given  But gave me room key several times.  The reception staff appeared to be careless

I will consider this property only 2 stars, rooms are below average in size, bathroom is too small. It doesn't include anything which we can expect from 5 star properties. Service is also below average. I have wasted my money on this property.

Also they are not providing any basic kits like tooth kit, shaving etc, we need to ask for it externally to the service desk.

NO VALUE FOR MONEY.
Should be 1* hotel . There was no water in the bathroom during morning and no apology for that inconvenience.very unprofessional staff.

This is a decent hotel with nice spa by Meghavi Spa chain ... Aura restaurant is also nice , although buffet spread is not that elaborate,  service is quite good. However preparation especially of Veg items were not that great ... but live music was very nice and kept the ambience alive ...

It’s worst service ever I seen. They took 25 min for one person checkin. We are three people to check in and team was standing their and no one bother to make it, only one person helping us but he was also struggling. I can’t expect such poor service from hotel like Marriott.

Service is very very good . Food at Aura is decent . Rooms are also decent . I checked in on 9th Jan and in the way to the hotel from the airport I started reading the older reviews and most of them were bad . I kept saying in my mind that the e cannot go wrong with Marriot . I mentioned this at the front desk at the time of checking in . I can say that the the hotel is not absolutely perfect but it is decent enough for a business stay . Everything is good . Service is exceptionally very very good . I will say 7 stars . Rooms needs some tune up . The bathroom door at Room No 319 was getting stuck . The bathroom lock in not working . But when everything else is ok these matters can always be sorted out / overlooked . I would request Marriot to have a through check of the infrastructure so that in future they can be eliminated .

They do not provide basic facilities like towels , dental kit, hair dryer in the room. Iron stands are broken. lights are not working.  bathroom locks are not working. Even though we paid for triple sharing they provided only two towels. the staff at front desk is completely mannerless. Though the hotel manager Kamakshi Ma’am was very cooperative but this cannot be called a 5* for sure. Food is good. Rooms are clean. Location is very good.

Horrible experience at the hotel. There was construction noise till 2am in the night and the hotel did absolutely nothing. They only informed after calling multiple times that the noise will continue. Apparently the site has permission to do construction all night which was never informed on checking in. The manager Imran Khan had nothing else but to apologise. I insisted to waive off room charges for that night and what I was offered was to remove laundry charges.

If you are looking for good staying experience for your elder one stay away from Courtyard specially this location. They don't keep their promises.
Negative:
1. No wheelchair services available.
2. Bathroom area is very very small.
3. Same and repetitive breakfast everyday. Limited menu of desert.
Advantages:
1. Location is accessible and prime.
2. Ground staff other than reception is well behaved.
3. Open terrace garden for breakfast feels relaxed.

It has been a pleasure staying here for the past few days. The room was impeccable, well-designed and bright. We would like to specifically commend the great service provided by Rakesh from housekeeping who ensured that the room was thoroughly prepared every day. We also wish to thank the staff at the restaurant for their attentive service, in particular Dushyant, Saurav, Mohini and Rajat for taking care of our needs.

Enjoying our stay at this place... The ambience is awesome, the staff is very helpful and well mannered.
Shantanu took very good care of us and was always there for any assistance.
Best wishes..
Stay and Rooms are ok.  Restaurants & service  not upto mark. Parking space very limited.

My family and I were very happy with our stay!  Great location and very helpful staff! Tanveer at the front desk went above and beyond, Manish, Rajat and their team made sure our breakfast was perfect, Birsa took care our rooms and laundry in a timely manner, Mukesh Rathod was very helpful with our bags as the bellboy and Sunita was amazing at the security desk! The staff got to know us personally and we will definitely return soon! Thank you Marriot team for a memorable stay.

Rooms are fine. Food is average. But worst is the construction noise from the site next door. It went on till 1am and surprisingly construction is allowed till 12 midnight as informed by hotel reception.

I've recently attended a manager training program at the Marriott location. Unfortunately, my experience was far from satisfactory. The training room setup was scheduled for 9 AM, but even at 9:45 AM, the Marriott team was struggling to get things organized. This delay disrupted our program and left a negative impression.

I must say that this level of service was disappointing and far from what I expected from Marriott. Timeliness and preparedness are essential when hosting events like these, and this experience fell short in those regards. I hope Marriott can improve its services to ensure a more seamless and punctual experience for future Guests.

Very disappointing experience. The service falls well below average. The staff seem untrained, and there's a persistent unpleasant odor throughout the hotel, resembling a rodent infestation. When we raised these concerns with the front desk, their response was simply, "Thank you for the feedback," showing a lack of concern. The front desk staff appears disinterested and more focused on socializing with each other.

The food at the third-floor restaurant and breakfast are both subpar. The managers, clad in blazers, appear preoccupied with their phones and disconnected from their responsibilities. We followed staff recommendations for food, only to be disappointed with the quality and the taste.

The only positive aspect of our stay was the exceptional service provided by Simran and Dushyant at the restaurant, as well as the commendable housekeeping staff.

I recently stayed at Marriott SBR, and unfortunately, my experience was not very positive. While the room itself was fine, I found the hospitality to be lacking and not very welcoming. Additionally, I felt that the property was more like an airport hotel and did not have the feel of a true Marriott property. Overall, I was not very happy with my stay at Marriott SBR.

I loved my mini(1.00am to 8 am) stay here..it was satisfying from a sleep/shower etc perspective as the rooms were well laid out and stocked with everyday needs that we as travellers cannot carry on board flights due to restrictions)...as a follower of intermediate fasting, could not partake of the adequate breakfast spread but suffice me to say that it was adequate for those(accompanying me)who enjoyed their hearty breakfast?Veg and Non-veg folks.

Terrible hotel with lousy service. We were arriving post midnight after a long drive from Pune to Ahmedabad and famished. We wanted to order our dinner in advance, the lady at the reception wouldn’t take our order . They couldn’t even share the in-room dining menu. Aparently it’s not possible unless we check-in. Inroom dining food served without any serving spoon. The poultry was of poor quality and smelling. The breakfast menu is mediocre to poor. The security won’t let any delivery people enter the hotel and leave at the reception. Extremely lousy service and even upkeep of room is poor. Lamp shades stained and falling off. Stayed in room 621.

I recently stayed at a hotel for a business meeting, and the experience was exceptional. The staff was courteous, the room was well-maintained, and the overall atmosphere was conducive to a productive meeting. I highly recommend this hotel for both business and leisure stays.

The entrance and reception ambiance is good. In waiting lounge, only 8-10 people can sit. Restaurant for buffet is on high level, where you can go by spacious lift. Restaurant does not have proper lighting near the glass wall, so avoid booking a table near glass wall in evening, otherwise it will spoil your mood. Food taste is average, though starters and paneer dish are nice. Service is ok, you have to give orders repeatedly. Toilet is clean. You will not get any outside city view because surrounding is covered by hotel architecture.
Good team and cooperative, good food, value for money
No cleanliness no privacy are you even a 4 star hotel . Worst 5 star hotel bad smell in courtyard dirty carpets and no privacy . Ridiculous. Don't waste money

Amazing experience...staff was really helpful... They gone above and beyond to serve us... For dinner I had special requests and chef big only accomodated it but also sent complimentary desserts... Cannot ask for more..

Pretty clean property...  My kid loved indoor swimming pool...

Highly recommended
We were travelling with a child, they were really good at preparing her food etc. however they don't have a high chair for kids, they don't provide extra decoration/ celebration services.

This is my honest review as someone who has stayed at this hotel three times.

Right off the bat, this is not a five star hotel. Nothing wrong with that, but it definitely is misleading on Google. Not all Marriotts deserve five stars. I’d put this at a 3.5/4.

Also please be aware that a lot of the recent reviews are paid reviews. You can view the accounts and they only review hotels with the same wording. Take the 5 star reviews with a grain of salt.

We had some work in this city so the hotel was booked by a friend of ours as its near where we had our work. The first stay was pleasant. The rooms are all the same size and quite small. It’s well maintained, and simple. The washrooms were not very sensible, a box in the middle of the room. In my opinion, it’s a waste of space as they could have made it a regular room and made it bigger. But that is an architectural flaw, so nothing to do about that. The service was satisfactory, I guess as it was our first time, staff went above and beyond. Communication was easy, we were able to contact the concierge through whatsapp, so it was convenient. During the first two stays, they kept asking for reviews at the restaurant and that was quite annoying. I travel a lot and have never experienced staff straight up ask for reviews and hand me a piece of paper to write comments. I did so, because that is their career, but now I can say it ruins a dining experience to have 2-4 employees ask for a review. Seriously.

Bear in mind, that this hotel hosts a lot of events so it gets really busy and really packed at times, especially the weekends. During those times, guest needs are neglected due to most of the staff tending to the events. Either they need to limit the amount of events if the hotel is fairly booked or they need to hire more employees because it gets really annoying.

Secondly, their TVs are an issue. They mostly have Indian programming which is fair, but can be annoying if you are a foreign guest. If you’re an international hotel, have international channels. Our first two visits, they had 1 or 2 English channels, but they were gone during our third visit. We tried to order channels and they kept spinning the story. First they said, they got the channels, and then they said it will be available the next day, and then they said they couldn’t get any due to technical difficulties. At least they could have CNN or something! So if you’re a foreigner, that’s something to keep in mind.

Our third time staying here, we were beyond disappointed. There were several issues with the room, such as the bathroom door not locking and shower door not closing. We told concierge and then we left the hotel for 11 hours. When we came back, the issues were not even addressed. When we complained again, they finally sent maintenance around 10pm.
When it was time for us to leave, we asked for the bellboy three times within 15 minutes. They told us it was delayed because they were busy. Once again, if you’re so busy then maybe it’s time to hire more people. 3 people outdoors doing security check (which is done with a machine) and only 1 bellboy? Seriously. All the staff has to say is “we are sorry”. It is incredibly frustrating to hear that line over and over again. A concierge ensures that the hotel is running smoothly, the staff at the front desk always looked confused. Didn’t seem like the type to be in hotel management.

There were other issues too, and they were trivial but they did have an effect on our satisfaction and this rating. Once again, as someone who has stayed in Marriott hotels for over a decade, I was incredibly shocked with this hotel. The bare minimum service and disorganization left us bemused. And to see a Mariott hotel PAY for reviews?? Now that is just laughable. Funny enough, when expressing my complaints to the front desk, a person next to me was also there to complain.

The hotel is nice, but it needs serious improvement, starting with the staff. Please look into more hotel management courses. And please hire more people.
Nice room well maintained Good Breakfast and location is Great when u have work near by Bodakdev to SBR

Dressing mirror doesn't have lighting. Bathroom mirrors have very less lighting. Breakfast spread is wide but doesn't taste great. Rooms & beds are nice. For the price it's a good deal. The best part of the hotel is the courteous & friendly staff.

Location is good. They have limited space in their driveway, so if multiple guests are arriving, it can congested. Front desk staff was helpful. Staff in the ground floor coffee shop was a bit slow. Similar situation in the restaurant. Although the guest load was not too much, the service suffered. Rooms were nice, some housekeeping improvements can be made. Overall the hotel felt not fully upto speed.

Extremely Good. You feel like visiting the Marriott often. I am a vegan and food served was totally nonvegan  When I requested the manager he provided me excellent Vegan food instantly. Superb service.I thank the management and staff for responding to the customer 's request.
Hats off.

Mr sofiyan the duty manager treat very bad ,my room no was 803 by name of sandeep jain..my 2nd colleque joined ,i request sofiyan for welcome tea he denied. I feel bad as i paid 17000 for 2 nights then next 2 days i shift to taj.hotel

I recently went there for my friend's engagement ceremony.
Bathroom locks in most rooms were not working. The staff did not provide wheelchair for elderly inspite of prior agreement. The staff is not professional or courteous. Not a 5 star hotel for sure.
BEST HOTEL ON SINDHUBHAVAN ROAD, AHMEDABAD.  YOU ENJOY NIGHTLIFE OF AHMEDABAD CITY ON THIS LOCATION.  24 HOURS LIVE PLACE

Had a great stay in the hotel. Service and room was excellent. The location of the hotel was great.

Thanks to Ms. Sweta who managed the checkin and checkout smoothly. All the arrangements and requirements were fully met. Great location for business and many restaurants in the vicinity.

Must saw great value for money. Would highly recommend it.
Food is EXCELLENT HOSPITALITY is  Good  Staff service is good & very cooperative Everything is good
Rooms are modern, spacious with good ambience.  Breakfast was not great
Just 2 min away from SG Highway & located on the most happening road of Ahmedabad - Sindhubhavan road. This property of Marriott serves great services with clean rooms & excellent food.

My stay was comfortable. The rooms were nicely appointed. The cleaning staff was so sweet, the front staff very friendly, and the hotel was conveniently located for all my meetings. I also thought the breakfast was very flavorful. My only concern was the treatment and recognition as a lifetime titanium elite member, apart from the nice note and snacks in a jar in my room. My room preferences were not met. I had feather pillows in my room. In addition, I had to ask for a room upgrade instead of it automatically given to me based on my profile in the system. Unfortunately, the room upgrade was very basic and usually offered for someone with a lower elite status level. I was hoping for a suite upgrade at almost every property I stay at for my lifetime loyalty to the Marriott brand of hotels. That was a massive letdown for me.

Went there for buffet dinner. Food is good and staff is also friendly and very calm and swift in their services. Loved the ambiance and interior. Only one thing for those who brings kids here: they don't have high chairs for babies. We were there with 3 toddlers and it became too difficult for us to have dinner together. We had to dine in turns so that the others can take care of our babies.

Extremely unprofessional F & B staff. Calls at 2 am and knocks the door.

Basics are missing with their staff! Just don’t go with the Marriot name

Courtyard by Marriott Ahmedabad offers a pleasant stay with its comfortable rooms, attentive staff, and modern amenities. The hotel's convenient location makes it a great choice for both business and leisure travelers. With its well-equipped fitness center and inviting pool, guests can unwind after a day of exploring the city. The on-site dining options provide a range of culinary experiences, ensuring a satisfying stay overall.

We have done business meetings over here.

The interior was good, Will have to wait long if you have valet Parking. The food was not good enough compared to other courtyard marriot hotels.

The location and service of the hotel is great. Though the rooms quality was great but the few elements were not ok in the room. Like the plugs quality was weak and could not hold charger and the washroom knobs were broken. Being a new property amd that too of Marriott, the same was not expected.

Relatively new property, good location and great view from the room. One of the best bathroom walls (can be opened fully).

The food was amazing and the service was decent, could have been faster though, but I guess this was  because of lack of staff due to the pandemic.

They have a nice outdoor space for the cafe too where you can chill and enjoy the weather on a sunny day in winter.
Very unprofessional behaviour by hotel staff at my friend's engagement ceremony. Wheelchairs not provided for elderly, bathroom locks not working in almost every room, uncooperative staff

This hotel is on par, if not better, than some of the newer Marriott hotels found in the US, UK, and Japan. I stayed at this hotel for 5 nights while attending a wedding, which was also at the hotel. The rooms, staff, and catering were all fantastic - the rooms are very well appointed, the staff is tremendously helpful and attentive, the food selection (esp the breakfast) was excellent, and the gym is top notch. I would stay at this hotel again.

You can't find any glitch on this hotel. Spacious rooms, Superb food and staff trained with great hospitality.

Pros:-
- Rooms are very clean with complementary tea/coffe.
- Refridgerator is available in rooms
- All kind of accessories you need is already provided in room or you will get through room service if you need some extra.
- Must try buffet breakfast and dinner, You will get Gujarati, Punjabi,Maxican, Chinese,Italian,Mongolian, English breakfast, Salads etc.

Cons:-

- Location is very good but you will get bored with traffic.
The menu is the same for the buffet breakfast and dinner. Food quality can be improved. If you are staying a day or two , you may be ok
Needs some more attention to detail. Leaky faucet, minor niggles
We have stayed in most of the Marriott hotels in Ahmedabad and this is our favorite. Absolutely loved the service, food and the location. Definitely  recommend and would always prefer this hotel.

We stayed for two nights and two days, we loved it. The food we enjoyed a lot at the restaurant Aura. The staff is also very friendly and cordial. The range and variations in the buffet in breakfast and dinner is amazing (lunch we don't know, as we didn't have there). There is an indoor swimming pool on the second floor and spa and gym also. The interiors of the rooms are pretty decent. Amazing experience in all. Would suggest to stay atleast once.
Good property located off sindhu bhavan road. Good arrangement for valet parking. Has 2 banquet halls in 3rd floor, which is popular for various kinds of events.

I recently stayed at Courtyard by Marriott in Ahmedabad and had a great experience. The hotel has a lot to offer, including a fantastic indoor pool on level 2 that I enjoyed using during my stay. The breakfast buffet on level 3 was also a highlight, with a wide variety of delicious options that were well-prepared and presented.

My room was clean and comfortable, and the shower was especially nice. The staff at Courtyard by Marriott were incredibly warm and friendly throughout my stay, and I want to give a special shout out to Devendra from housekeeping. He went above and beyond to make sure everything was alright and even requested that I leave a review, which I'm more than happy to do.

Overall, I highly recommend Courtyard by Marriott in Ahmedabad to anyone looking for a great hotel experience. The facilities, food, rooms, and staff all met my expectations, and I look forward to staying there again in the future.

Visited for a reception cum dinner. Hotel Ambience was good but food was not at all tasty. Not a single item right from soup to dessert could satisfy my taste buds. I was part of a group and everyone else had the same opinion. It was a small function say not more than 125 pax were present, than too no item was prepared worth praising.
Rooms are spacious and very cleaned specifically washrooms. All services were nice. Staff is very attentive. Food is so tasteful.
We visited yesterday 15th April 2024 (Monday). Service was ok. Food was not upto the mark.

American here. Loved this place. The staff treated me like royalty, bringing me food to my table and asking if everything was okay. It was kind of weird at first, but I grew to love it. The food was authentic, and they helped me with any questions I had. So grateful to have stayed here! And the rooms were beautiful!

They also had a fresh Chai station at the 24/7 restaurant. Best chai I’ve ever had. So cool to be able to experience India through this hotel.

The hotel was good except for the non- cooperative staff. I ordered a parcel from zomato and called at help desk to collect the same as I was in a meeting. They kept on reassuring that they will do so however zomato guy kept waiting outside for more than half an hour. Further he left the food parcel at security which the hotel lost by some means. Entire staff didn’t care about it and they just left the matter. No one expressed apologies as well. I hope that they learn to own up their mistakes and take better care of customers

Minus points:
- Shower pressure in bathroom is very low because they don’t have pressure booster installed in it. It will take long-long time to take shower due to low pressure. That’s really sad considering a 5-star hotel charging almost Rs.7-10,000 a night :(

- Lot of noise (whole night) from marriage grounds infront of hotel. Window-sealing of rooms is not good. Seems like cheap quality windows with poor sound-proofing. That’s again bad considering a 5-star hotel :(

Good points -
- Food is excellent, both veg & non-veg items. Especially Indian cuisine veg items are a treat!
- Housekeeping & cleaning is good. Room design is fresh & new.
- Staff is responsive & quick in action (but only for matters that are in their control)

Super ride staff, they don't even tell you the room availability. Last month I stayed for 12 hours and they took one day charges. This time they are saying that the price of 2 days will be charged. Then staff said that it depends on availability and we will get back  And they never got back, done the same excercise twice and same thing happened. The staff should be polite and should give transparent communication. You have lost a regular customer and will spread this across my circle. Never ever stay at this hotel.
Keeping the reputation alive is something Courtyard has managed to do.

Front office team is really pathetic, they refused to provide gst bill when we booked from Make my trip. They were very rude and rigid and were not aware of their policies as well. I would never stay in that hotel again. They are spoiling Marriott's reputation.

Stayed here for two nights for a a corporate event.

Rooms are small, room service is very slow and pathetic, reception staff is not proactive. And in room food is very bad.

We had a conference and hotel staff never botherd to check what we needed. They didn't even change the empty water bottles from tables. They didn't assign a single attendent it waiter to a 50 people gathering.

Pathetic checkout process, poor coffee shop and , i never understand why do they take 20 minutest to get the car. The Parking area don't have directly access to the parking area and that the issue because every time I I want something my caar I whave to wait for 20 minutes for valet to bring my car ..

Overall it was a bad Experiance... Please avoid...Sindubhavan Courtyard property....

One of the best hotels to visit; in the city, Courtyard Marriott comes in the top of the mind for anyone suggesting a peaceful stay with all the best that life has to offer. For foodies it's a platter with all tasted (or yet to discover!) varieties from continental to mexican, chinese or just Indian masala food and for those with conscious diet choices, there are a plethora of salads too. Located amidst the best connected parts of Ahmedabad this place is a better home away from home for sure. Explore it!

I had a fantastic stay at Courtyard by Marriott Ahmedabad Sindhu Bhavan Road. The front desk team, particularly Mr. Mukesh, set a benchmark for great hospitality. The breakfast offered a variety of cuisine, including local dishes. Overall, it was a wonderful experience!

Rooms are good and spacious.  Staff behavior is good. However I found kokrach in toilet which is not expected from a hotel with 4/5 star rating.

Although they changed my room, however it doesn't relive them from being careless on hygiene and care of its guests.

Worst hotel ever.
Booking experience was very sad the only thing they were interested in was the payment. In spite of me trying to explain to them the situation they didn’t want to understand and said if I can’t do the payment it’s okay if I don’t come. Check in was so slow. I was waiting at the reception for 30 min. The hotel is understaffed. The staff doesn’t care. The GM heard all my problems and didn’t do anything about it. The worst Marriott I have been to.

Went there for breakfast!
- very helpful staff.
- Good variety of options in breakfast
- good amount of live counters as well.
- Bakery item needs a good overhaul. The muffins were very dry and only three four options in the sweet. ( Live pancakes were good though!)

Room No. 501
Had an wonderful experience @ Courtyard by Marriott Ahmedabad. Our Stay was very Comfortable and relaxing.
we forgot our whole day stress in a minute after reaching room due to its calm ambience. Also, staff was very good.
Taken breakfast in hotel and it was also very nice. Thanks!

I liked this place.....the coffee lounge as well as the restaurant. Pricing could have been a bit more competitive as against other Star Hotels. Also during weekend no ala carte is served and buffet becomes too much in case you are in a small group or alone. Staff and the complete team is absolutely courteous and helpful.

Decent modern hotel.
But I'm not a fan of hotels made in Comercial buildings. The rooms are quite small. Some of the lights didn't work and nobody came to attend.  The mattress was firm but comfortable.
The al a carte dinner was average.
But the buffet breakfast was good.

Excellent ambience and super clean environment. They have really taken utmost care of customers and their belongings. All walls n carpet looked sanitized and fragrance added.

Food was delicious enough to overeat...

A small issue in a music system wire due to which, some dance sequence in a function was a problem. Else everything was at par.

Wonderful stay.
Have been a guest for 45 days with nice services provided with in room all facilities available. Special thanks to sarthak, wonderful meals provided by him all times especially during late hours as well. Thank you Marriott family for betterment of services. Much obligated.

Excellent place for a memorable stay.  Very co-operative & supporting staff with smiling face always. Very good hygiene standard maintain by hotel in covid time. Lots of efforts from them to make their guest happy and comfortable. Very good food Very Excellent interior. Very good view of city from upper floors.

Rooms are neat ,nice location,excellent food.buffey had a very nice spread of continental with mix of indian and local cusines.
The acoustic of the rooms where that great as i still could here vehicles down the road. Spoon available for tea was unclean and dirty. I reported this to reception and immediate replacement was made. The staff was apologetic and considerate on the issue. Qudos to that.

The rooms are clean as per marriot standards, but the room service is not at all good. The staff at night has no clue and doesn’t respond service to make a basic chilli cheese toast. Breakfast is average, the restaurant at night doesn’t want to serve food

Fabulous Stay Experience in Ahmedabad!

The place oozes luxury and finesse in detail in every small thing that relates to having a comfortable stay at the hotel.

Great staff! Awesome Rooms! Scrumptious Food!

All in all a perfect destination for Family/Business Stays and also for hosting Events and Weddings.

Good location but a bad rough road and dimly lit area to the entrance makes your entry difficult if you are visiting at night. No proper signage or guiding by security for way to parking nor the staff much enthusiastic to guide you to parking space. A foul smell prevailed throughout my stay there. The food and catering staff were good. Overall , a lot of room for improvement.

Extremely bad experience from entry till exit with low or no appetite for feedback. This seems to be the new trend at Marriott.

Dining Experience: The breakfast and dinner buffets offered a wide variety of delicious options, with special mention of the gulab jamun. The staff were accommodating, even packing breakfast when needed.
Staff Service: Most staff members were attentive and friendly, with specific shout-outs to Ganesh from housekeeping and Shishupal for their exceptional service.
Safety and Cleanliness: Felt secure during your stay with strong safety measures in place. Rooms were kept clean, although some could use minor renovations.
Atmosphere: The hotel had a lovely ambiance, and staff were particularly good with families and children.

Essence restaurant at Crowne Plaza delivers an outstanding dining experience where food, ambience, and service harmonize to create a memorable evening. The moment you walk in, the elegant yet cozy atmosphere instantly makes you feel welcome. The contemporary decor, combined with subtle lighting and comfortable seating, provides the perfect setting for both casual dining and special occasions.

The culinary offerings at Essence are exceptional. Each dish on the menu is crafted with precision, showcasing fresh, high-quality ingredients. Whether it’s the succulent seafood or innovative vegetarian dishes, the flavors are rich and well-balanced. Special mention must be made of Chef Gautam, whose culinary expertise is evident in every bite. His creativity and passion for food shine through in every dish, making each meal a true delight.

Service at Essence is exemplary, with a team that is both attentive and genuinely caring. Anusha, in particular, deserves special recognition for her warm and professional approach. Her recommendations were spot-on, and she ensured that every detail was attended to, enhancing the overall dining experience. Essence at Crowne Plaza is a standout restaurant where superb food, a welcoming atmosphere, and exceptional service come together beautifully.

The Crowne Plaza Hotel in Ahmedabad offers a luxurious and comfortable stay, catering to both business and leisure travelers. Here’s a detailed review based on various aspects of the hotel:Location: Situated in the bustling area of S.G. Road, the hotel is conveniently located near major business hubs and shopping centers. Its proximity to the airport (approximately 17 km) and city attractions makes it an ideal choice for travelers.Rooms: The rooms at Crowne Plaza are spacious, well-appointed, and elegantly designed. They feature modern amenities such as comfortable beds, high-speed Wi-Fi, flat-screen TVs, and a dedicated work area, ensuring a pleasant and productive stay. The cleanliness and maintenance of the rooms are commendable.

I recently stayed at the Crowne Plaza Ahmedabad and had an overall pleasant experience. The hotel has a modern feel, and my room was clean, comfortable, and well-equipped with all the amenities I needed for my stay. The bed was particularly comfortable, and I appreciated the variety of pillows provided.

The staff were friendly and attentive, always ready to assist with a smile. I also enjoyed the breakfast buffet, which had a good selection of both Indian and Western dishes, catering to a wide range of tastes. The only drawback I encountered was some minor noise from the nearby traffic, but it didn't disrupt my sleep too much. Additionally, the Wi-Fi could be a bit faster, especially during peak hours.

Overall, I had a great stay at the Crowne Plaza Ahmedabad, and I would recommend it to others looking for a comfortable and convenient hotel in the area. The excellent service and amenities make it a solid choice for both business and leisure travelers.

A Five-Star Heaven for Affordable Excellence

I have frequented Crown Plaza numerous times, and it continues to impress with its winning combination of affordability, top-notch taste, and quality cuisine.

This culinary gem offers a diverse menu catering to both vegetarians and non-vegetarians. From the rich and flavorful Veg Sabji and Paneer Sabji to the aromatic Pulao Biryani, the vegetarian options are a delightful symphony of flavors. The array of rotis, salads, starters, and a tempting selection of desserts further elevate the dining experience.

What sets Crown Plaza apart is its commitment to providing a five-star experience at a reasonable price point. The restaurant seamlessly caters to various preferences, offering takeaway, dining, and efficient delivery services. The convenience factor, coupled with the consistently high-quality food, makes it a standout choice for any occasion.

For non-vegetarian enthusiasts, Crown Plaza doesn't disappoint. The menu boasts a tantalizing selection of non-vegetarian dishes that are sure to satisfy even the most discerning palate.

Whether you're a regular or a first-time visitor, Crown Plaza guarantees a gastronomic journey that is both accessible and indulgent. This is undoubtedly a five-star destination where affordability meets culinary excellence.

Crowne Plaza is a well-known international hotel chain that typically caters to business travelers and leisure guests. Here are some aspects often highlighted in Crowne Plaza hotel reviews:

Comfortable Accommodations: Many guests appreciate the comfortable and spacious rooms provided by Crowne Plaza hotels. They often offer amenities like high-quality bedding, ergonomic workspaces, and modern furnishings.

Business Facilities: Crowne Plaza hotels are often equipped with business amenities such as meeting rooms, conference spaces, and business centers, making them suitable for corporate events or meetings.

Dining Options: They usually have on-site restaurants and bars that offer a variety of cuisines and drinks, catering to different tastes and preferences.

Location: Crowne Plaza hotels are often strategically located in city centers or near airports, making them convenient for travelers. The location can greatly vary depending on the specific hotel's placement.

Customer Service: Many guests appreciate the professionalism and helpfulness of the staff at Crowne Plaza hotels, noting good customer service as a highlight of their stay.

However, experiences can differ from one location to another, and individual preferences can greatly influence perceptions. It's always a good idea to check recent reviews from multiple sources to get a well-rounded understanding of a specific Crowne Plaza hotel before making a reservation.

Lovely staff with great service and polite behaviour. Thanks to all the staff members for your great service. Overall it was a awesome experience staying in crowne plaza. And special thanks to Miss Bhavya for taking good care and making my stay comfortable.

Thank you

Keep up the good work.

I have Attended last week wedding ceremony , warm welcome by crowne plaza as well as best quality of food & apprentice vrajesh Bhatt’s helping nature & good knowledge of place to move around in Ahmedabad guided us explore many new places in Ahmedabad looking forward to visit  crowne plaza again  whenever in Ahmedabad

The staff are very customer friendly.
Food was just marvelous.
Room clearing was done on time.
Requested things were place according to the time allocated.
Hygiene was good.
Sanitizing place in a short duration.
Special thanks to the Hotel for making us feel good the hotel.
Would love to visit again very soon.
Trip typeHoliday · Friends
Rooms5.0Service5.0Locion5.0
The chefs were really good (i forgot their names but they managed the dinner buffets). They do play music loudly near the pool so please let the management know if noise bothers you.
My experience with crown plaza ahmedabad was superb. The staff is courteous. The rooms are comfortable. The pillows in the room were super soft. Rooms are big and spacious.

Clean, large, well maintained rooms. Good service, courteous staff. Located close to shopping malls, function halls of Ahmedabad.
Highway side rooms has better view.
Buffet brunch is very good. A variety of delicious menu.
Limited menu for lunch and dinner.
Check in time can be improved.

I have been there a few times. Twice to attend functions in its banquet which I must say is a very good space. It's perfectly lit and has great service. I also stayed there for a weekend. It has got some good rooms providing one with comfort and needed facilities. The only disappointment for me was the vegetarian buffet lunch. It was ok in terms of variety in food but I wasn't quite satisfied with the taste. All in all, it was a good experience.

Nice place to stay at in Ahemdabad. The staff is quite helpful & always smiling. The food needs an attention to. The quality is although good but needs lots of improvement to get to the heights of 5 star quality. The management needs to compare the food they serve with their counterparts in other similar category hotels. They need to improve upon the range of varieties food too in their buffe.

Good rooms. Good food. People around are courteous and professional. But had an awkward experience. Scheduled for early departure in the morning and despite the assurance for a request of packed breakfast (done in previous night), they failed to deliver the same in time.
Otherwise a very pleasant experience.

The experience was not bad! The food is good but there is a lack of variety. There are good non-veg options also. The lids for the buffet are very hot and hard to lift. Although, it is a good budget option!

Happy with the quality of service and the room amenities when compared with other hotels in the same category. Very useful having a spa and salon inside the hotel building. The dining staff (Anu and Saunvir) and Chef Manmohan made sure that our vegan and Jain diet was catered to. Will definitely book a stay here again.

I recently had the opportunity to use the steam bath, sauna, and Zakuzi facilities at the Crowne Plaza Hotel Ahmedabad, and I must say it was an amazing experience. The facilities were clean, well-maintained, and provided a relaxing and rejuvenating experience. Vijay Prajapati has given excellent service and information about all facilities and their usage. He is a very professional and experienced person. Serving guests with a smile and full dedication.He guided me and made my experience excellent. Kudos to Vijay.

The steam bath was particularly enjoyable, with the right temperature and humidity that helped me to relax and unwind. The sauna was also great, with a comfortable temperature and a relaxing atmosphere. The Zakuzi was also lovely, with warm water and different massage jets that helped to soothe my muscles and leave me feeling refreshed.

The staff at the spa were also exceptional. They were friendly, knowledgeable, and provided excellent service throughout my visit. They were happy to answer any questions I had about the facilities and provided me with clean towels and other essentials.

Overall, I had an amazing experience at this spa. The facilities were top-notch, and the staff were friendly and professional. I highly recommend this spa to anyone looking for a relaxing and rejuvenating experience.

Food here is very nice and tasty. Service is also nice. Chef Gautam, Priyanka, Sushmita, Aakash did a very good job and gave personal attention as well. Looking forward to come here again and enjoy the hospitality. Keep up the good work.

The overall experience of mine was great during my stay at crowne plaza.
Chef Manmohan Singh at breakfast time take order and serve us in a very polite way.
He is really amazing and many thanks for him.
We will come back soon with my whole family.

One of my favorite place in Ahmedabad.

It was a nice stay in the hotel. I stayed for 2 days and it was a pleasant experience for me.

Rooms were beautiful, well decorated and clean. Room service was good. The staffs were very helpful, very polite, very talented.

I look forward to visit the hotel in future, specially the cafe.

I stay 6 Nov to 7 Nov 1 night property and room r very neat and clean I take breakfast only in resturant staff r good and caring nature specially rashmi and sushmita all staff r good and helpful I recommended to stay this hotel

I have enjoyed my stay in crowne plaza . The service is excellent and I specially enjoyed buffet as they all wide varities of options and delicious food. I recommend everyone to try buffet and you should not miss it. Sushmita hospitality was appreciated during breakfast buffet.

Room required basic maintenance. Room service slow and cumbersome to order. Breakfast staff inattentive. Front desk staff pushed for positive review and demanded to know why rating was not 10. Seems they are measured on how many 10 ratings they get, not for actual good service.

The staff is very cooperative, Arghya and Tinku are great guys . For all our bni meetings they make seamless arrangements and serves best coffee to start with. Also the post meeting food spread is amazing, healthy and scrumptious
Mr.Himmat singh's hospitality and his driving is truely amazing, thanks himmat bhai for making me reach airport on time . And thankyou @CrownPlaza for lovely stay and tasty food 😊🙏

Good Location in Ahmedabad, bang on the SG Highway.
Parking is a pain with limited space available.
Ambience is nice and appealing.
Dinner Buffet does not have much to offer. Food was not warm enough, especially the soups.
Service was average and there's more than enough room for improvement. Have seen better times at the same hotel earlier.
Wonderful dinner buffet as usual😊 …

We have been hosting events regularly at this hotel. The staff is very courteous and ready to help with anything at all times.

I particularly have been well supported by Premchand, Rehan, Bikram in the banquet setup team.

Chef Kansingh’s food is very delicious and  well made and highly appreciated by our guests. He is always ready to take suggestions and make changes very quickly.

Located half an hour from the Airport approximately. Well trained staff but not necessarily warm. Check in and check out professionally handled. Very well appointed swank rooms ,which are well kept too. Decent gym and the swimming pool is clean. Food is of a decent standard in the buffets and also room service . Overall one of the better places to stay in ,in Ahmedabad.

It was comfortable stay but one off day for people in the kitchen as they served my both meals cold.

Pros
1) Spacious rooms.
2) Close to city center.
3) Hospitable staff
4) Clean & Hygienic environment.
5) Spacious bathroom.

Cons
1) Far off from airport so make plan accordingly so not to miss flight.
2) Since my meals were served cold instead of hot hence micro management required.

It was a pretty good stay there . I have been there recently everything was perfectly done . And specially Sandeep from IRD he was amazing I still remember his name because of his services . He took care of everything I needed from the time I
ordered my first meal till the last . It was perfect . Great work. We need more staff like these in hospitality industry.
Thankyou so much .

Visited for buffet lunch. Not so great not bad at all. But over priced considering the food options and variety. Main course options are very limited in Veg, Starters not so great, chat counter is good, desserts were worth of the amount spent at last. Hygiene:5*, Food quality 3*, Food freshness 5*, service 3*. Book a table if you want to visit on weekends. Good for family gatherings and parties. Need to improve menu items and need to include options like, mojitos, smoothies, other soft drinks. But overall nice place to visit, you won't spoil your tummy after eating here.
The room was spacious, comfortable, and impeccably clean. All services of hotel are very good. The staff such as Dhruvendra  is nice in nature and also polite.

Location of Hotel is good..staff is very cultured & well behaved..food quality & variety is not what you expect from a 5* hotel . There are not much options in breakfast , lunch & dinner..slocy foods are also bit sweeter. Seems a Gujarati chef is making north india foods. Still a good hotel in connectivity & location..

pleasant stay. friendly staff.excellent.
Mr narayan and Ms Puja were efficient and very friendly staff members
I had training there and the hall was great and so was the food.

This hotel is amazing from the beginning to the end .it provides a wow factor on arrival. Check in was easy and super friendly.room was beautiful, comfortable and well designed. Food was fantastic. Lovely staff with great service and polite behaviour. Special thanks to all the staff members for your great service .overall it was a awesome experience staying in crowne plaza.

As a Pilot I stayed many hotel around the country but taste of food made by chef. Gautam and his helpers and the hospitality  given by staf Reshmi, Kundan, Anu, Suryadev, Aakash, dipankar, PRIYANKA was Amazing. I really recommend people to visit and enjoy there wonderful service.

I had a very BAD experience with my stay at CROWN PlAZA hotel for my sister's marriage due to mis-management and less than required equipments (only 2 luggage trolley in such a big 5 star hotel) .
Firstly we were provided check-in at around 4:30pm as rooms were not ready (and staff asked us to co-operate). As per you policy checkout time was 12:00 noon and check-in time of 3:00 pm, so by any means it should be ready by 3:00 pm even if all checkouts were considered to be done at 12:00 noon.
Secondly hotels are known for hospitality and your staff really need to miss that. One of your staff member had talked with my guest very rudely which was not at all accepted.

Later, for room service we have to call 2-3 time to get our room clean.

Overall not at all happy with my stay at Crown Plaza and will not recommend to anyone.

We liked food,services,ambience,hospitality and specially would like to mention about miss Susmita, Staff at dinning section..she was very kind and soft spoken and took utmost care about our taste and preferences while serving us..!
We will definitely prefer Crown plaza when our we plan our visit to Ahmedabad.

We had a huge ceremony function over here. The service is good, and the buffet was satisfactory. According to what they charge, the buffet options are very very few.

It's almost like you're having food at home because of the very few and normal options, so I wouldn't prefer it for having a scrumptious meal.

We booked the hotel for the marriage of my son . All guests stayed in the hotel and all functions were planned in 2 days. Extremely good staff from room service to restaurant staff. Great service and excellent food. Special thanks to Nitin, Sales director banquet and Abhishek Lobby Manager for great planning and execution....Crown plaza hotel City centre is Lucky to have staff like we saw during our 4 days stay in the hotel and all wedding activities.

We had dinner at essence and the staff (SANDEEP AND DRASHTI ) were very helpful and friendly with us . They made the dinner experience more special for us. Food was great as well but the service surpasses our expectations

It was an amazing breakfast nook and this has all the options available you need to start your day the right way. Priyanka and Nidhi served us very nicely. Chef Manmohan was very courteous in getting us anything that we asked for. I recommend this place to anyone who wants to get good food.

Attended two functions in the place. Both were well organised ,  though we felt AC cooling wasn't good in the evening function. Had to complain about it. Morning wedding function was very good in the open terrace with good ambiance and spacious hall. Food was delicious and tasty. Service excellent. Sitting arrangement also was there .

We had 2 corporate event over there. One in 25 pax capacity Lily conference room with Hi Tea and another in Banquet with dinner whose capacity is 175 pax. Ambience of both the rooms were too good. Even food in the dinner was too good. I loved the whole event bcz of very well management.

The place and ambience is good. However I felt that the options in the food too less then theor competitors like Novotel, Double Tree by Hilton, Ramada etc... Service is ok ok. The food wasn't that hot like we wish to eat they have heated aome of items cause of multiple requests. Other then that whatever the fpod they have prepared was excellent in test and I have enjoyed the food and ambience a lot. In short Food test wise is excellent. Service was okay okay and I have expected a little more options.

We used the benquet for a function in family and the place is spacious and arrangements were good. They allowed us to decorate as per our choice as far as we don't damage the walls. It was over all a good experience. I have not had chance to eat at restaurants yet but I have heard that's also good.

Chef Manmohan is a good human being. He always speaks with guests during all three meals for advise & suggestions for his and hotel improvements. Even, he guides about food when someone guest not feel comfortable. May God bless him.

I along with my husband went to essence during lunch time for a birthday celebration and to our surprise we were very disappointed by the staff. The table we were offered was broken, the staff had no courtesy to atleast clear the table as and when required nor were they ready to fill up water in the glass. we ourself had to go and ask the staff to clear up the table which is just not expected from a 5 star tagged hotel. Very bad experience i must say in terms of staff courtesy otherwise, the food was great. We had complained about this matter to the reception as well as the assistant manager of essence. Hope to see better service for other visitors.

Excellent room service by Mr. Nishchay. Minute details were taken into consideration for our comfort.
Chef Manmohan is skilled with amazing cooking skills and served a real delicious breakfast, very polite and humble staff.
The rooms are spacious and well maintained. The breakfast spread is good even for guests that stay a few days. The staff such as Drashti is polite and proactive.

Disappointed very much… pathetic new year party.. third class DJ.. local Dj plays Dj much better than this.. we just spoiled our new year eve because we had opted crown plaza .. don’t go for new year eve in crown plaza..

Amazing 👏  experience

Well mannered and cooperative staff. Loved the service and ambience of the place.
Food was amazing with great taste. Also made apt arrangements for jain service

Thanks for the hospitality
Definitely would recommend to people worth the experience but charges the same.

Great experience, the service is outstanding. The staff is very helpful and understanding. The food is good and they have a lot of options in breakfast, they serve 24/7 in the rooms which is very good.

Truly a memorable and fabulous stay experience. My room was Neat and clean, the breakfast was delicious. Good Hospitality. Thank you so much crowne Plaze (Ahemdabad) for an experience worth the money I spent and hope to return very soon ! Bless you with many more years of success and glory. 💞❤️ …

Last night was all set for a haughty dinner at Crowne Plaza. It is basically a Star category hotel, with suites and rooms. It does have a restaurant as well which is buffet in style, more meant for the guests staying in the hotel. If one doesn't stay there, reservations are necessary. The atmosphere is highly ambient and the food is delicious. Quantity is unlimited.
I would be visiting here once again.

Food quality was very good and food choices were made according all age type of people which is very thoughtful. Staff service was excellent. Sandeep was very helpful with our need also he was very humble.
A perfect property - location wise and ambience wise. Spacious room, tasty food. Only they need to improve on bathroom accessories as same need maintenance and ignore clearly.

The room was very clean and the service was very polite. The rice was also very delicious.
While I was relaxing in my room, the staff came to clean the room and did a thorough job.
The staff member Ramdev was very helpful!

The room is spacious and the bathroom can be seen from the bed, which is very stylish.
Breakfast and dinner are buffet-style, but there are many kinds, so it's okay even if you're staying for a long time.The staff is very helpful.
This hotel has an elegant temperament and is very comfortable. There is a cafe and an Indian restaurant here, which is suitable for business meetings or dining.

I think this is a very luxurious hotel in the city. I recommend it to everyone because it is unique. You can eat delicious dinner in your room. The rooms are spacious and equipped with a shower and a bathtub. They have a bar and interestingly decorated rooms. I recommend for a stay. It's a really great hotel!
Good hotel for stay @ Ahemdabad

A clean, modern hotel where you can stay with peace of mind. The view from the window is not good though. There are world type outlets, free wifi, and USB outlets. Windows cannot be opened or closed. Air conditioner adjustable. No heating. Japanese bento delivery available. There is a safety box, iron, ironing board, tea set, and bathtub. It has a large amount of hot water and can be stored quickly. Use the buffet restaurant for dinner and breakfast. The main menu is Indian, but there is also a Western menu. Although the hotel doesn't have much of an Indian feel to it, I recommend it as it will help you relax and unwind. There are no shopping spots nearby.

The hotel where I took shelter as a liberated area in Ahmedabad is literally one of the places in the region where I can breathe. Hotel staff are very attentive and respectful. Cleanliness is a bit of a problem, and I think it varies depending on the floor you stay on. Although there was no problem on the other floors, there was a bad smell on the floor I stayed on (10th floor). If I go again, I would like to stay at this hotel.
The employees are friendly and respectful. The food is not very diverse. There is no international cuisine (except for a few dishes) room cleaning is 3 points. Fitness pool and sauna are clean.
The first 410 I was given had a musty smell and gave me a headache, so I had it replaced. 904 was fine.
Very friendly. Good service. Rooms very nicely furnished. I was able to sleep well. Gladly again next time.
The staff is friendly and professional. Especially the reception and restaurant team are very attentive and Mr. Thank you very much to Nishchey and friends
The rooms are a little lacking in cleanliness and construction finishes (tile joints, etc.), and the street side room is a little noisy despite the double glazing (the glazing joints are worn)
Spacious bedrooms and large reception area. Located on the side of the main road, the hotel is one of the few places where you can drink alcohol and eat chicken meat.

I often stay here when I go to Ahmedabad for business trips. There are quite a few Japanese business travelers staying here, so I feel safe. The facility is a little old, but the food is safe, so I recommend it.
The room is good. All the restaurant staff are bad. Forgetting, being slow, making mistakes, not getting the message across, not apologizing. It's called 5 stars, but it's only 4 stars at most.

These staff are very nice and professional:

Extremely good service, welcoming, friendly, excellent rooms even for smokers. Special praise from the waiter Vishal!
Great service by kaushik kundan surya and kimaya making our anniversary special
For a 5-star hotel, it has nothing expected. The restaurant fails me a little since it focuses more on the buffet
The room is clean, the staff is friendly. delicious food
