I liked the place to grab coffee.. peaceful place to go alone and sit for hours.

Coffee can be better else the croissant was superb. My all time favourite hotel.
Live music 👍👍❤️

Management were really prompt and friendly with good numbers of employees. It was near (not so near) some really good places to visit and shop. Building looks really cool from far. Gym was small but had everything for a small workout. Swimming wasn’t shallow nor deep and was on the terrace to watch pigeons drink water from it.

The DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad is truly a gem for culinary enthusiasts. With an inviting ambiance that combines elegance and warmth, it provides an exceptional dining experience. Their exquisite selection of dishes and beverages at Hope Café is a must-try, showcasing both creativity and quality. Whether you’re here for a casual outing or a special occasion, this venue sets the perfect tone. Highly recommended for anyone seeking the finest food and atmosphere in Ahmedabad.

Rooms could be little bigger, but there will always be something for everyone.
It was a fantastic stay, staff is super friendly,
Especially the front desk task, Kapil made my day with all the information I needed and was patient with whenever I wanted information.  I almost thought he was a manager judging on his maturity while dealing with guests.
The cafe is open 24*7. Staff is sweet and helpful. Cleanliness is top notch. Food quality and taste is good. On the pricier side but totally worth visiting.

Staff needs more training over how to handle a customer, be more gentle. Rather than being racist or discriminative. They look at you like you don’t have a class to stay there or be there. Didn’t like how they address or talk to you about an issue or help.

Undoubtedly the best hotel in town, this place excels in every aspect. The staff are exceptional, providing service that meets and exceeds expectations. The food is absolutely delicious, and the room sizes are generous, adding to the comfort of your stay. Highly recommended for anyone seeking a top-notch experience.

Stayed one night. . ..impressed by the hotel and people. Since it was a considerable gap since I last stayed in Hilton, seemed as if i forgot what hospitality was all about. Due to the schedule could not experience the breakfast otherwise would have received the same.

Went here to attend the Amazon Connect event recently, and a few times before that.

The location as well as the interior speaks for the brand value. I am particularly touched by their artistic pathways.

There were a few points where I connected with the staff at DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad and was greeted with warmth.

The food served during the event was delicious. We had snacks before and dinner after the event. We also got a few croissants packages from the restaurant named HOP which was good as well.

Looking forward to enjoying my stay there the next time.

DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad generally meets expectations with its high-quality facilities and welcoming atmosphere. The rooms are comfortable and well-maintained, and the amenities provided cater to both leisure and business travelers. The dining options are varied and offer a pleasant culinary experience, while the staff is polite and professional.

However, there is a notable area for improvement: the swimming pool lacks a lifeguard on duty, which is a significant safety concern. This oversight detracts from an otherwise excellent setup.

Additionally, the service, while good, did not fully meet the high standards expected from such a reputed brand, leading me to deduct one star. With improvements in service quality and pool safety, DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad could easily enhance the overall guest experience.

We stayed at this Hotel for 2 days on 21st August & 22nd August 24 to attend a family function held here. Lots of rooms were booked by the host. It is a Lovely & nice hotel with Lovely staff. Breakfast, Lunch and dinner were very tasty, enjoyable and had a good selection of food items with attentive staff. Received good recommendations for food also. Room was clean with the essentials. Hotel is centrally located. Everything we needed for a short visit to Ahmedabad were there. Lots of charging points to charge our gadgets was a plus point. Would like to come again. Thanks 👍
It's wow....starts from front office with a smile and patient attention, super rooms, excellent food.. throughly enjoyed the stay. 201% value for the money 💰

Service providers like cleaning staff are good and helping.
Pradip Kumar's service specially liked to me as he is so kind and helpful.
I appreciate the others staff as well for all the service provided.

A regular visitor to HOP, Double tree, Ahmedabad. Appreciate the sincerity and politeness of the staff, especially Shobit and Asmita. The Avocado toast is good, that I had upon the recommendation of Shobit. However, a few items could be added to the menu. Keep up the good work. Also, the washrooms are very well managed, always spotless.

I recently had lunch at Wave A La Carte in the Doubletree by Hilton Ahmedabad, and it was a great experience. The sweet section was especially delicious, with each item being a treat. They also have a live kitchen where you can order dishes on the spot. The staff was very friendly, and they were particularly good with the children in our group. If you’re a non-vegetarian, you’ll have a great time too, as they offer both veg and non-veg salad options. The seating area was clean, and the food overall was excellent.

I’d also like to specifically thank the parking management and the gentleman at the gate.
He greeted us with such warmth and was exceptionally kind, particularly in assisting a family member with a leg disability. We truly appreciate his help. Thank you! 😊

We visited this HOP with friends.. this open cafe has amazing ambience. On weekends they have live music as well.
Must try in drinks-Jasmine Peach Green Tea, Americano and Iced Mocha
Must try in food-paneer makhani pizza, garlic bread and penne in pink sauce.

Not to forget Pavan has served us very well. Very polite and soft spoken.

I was having much expectations from it being the 5-star hotel in the locality. I attended an event in their conference room.
Valet parking is available and very efficient.
Reception area is descent and staff was highly cooperative.
Auditorium was good and enough for the corporate events with 200-300 people.
Food management part is the area of improvement. There was only one person from staff managing whole counter which resulted to long queues. Food items were lacking management. Serving was poor by their staff. Ice cream was there but there were forks instead of small spoons. There were dishes instead of bowls to serve ice cream. Can anyone imagine? Later I complaint to one of the staff guy then he bought bowls and bigger spoons which we usually use in soup. The result was, we needed to drink the ice cream. I've attached the video as well. Apart from that, everything was descent.
Great food and amazing hospitality. The staff at this hotel were incredibly welcoming and helpful. Impressive service.I highly recommend this hotel for its excellent service and welcoming atmosphere.

This is a wondeful and amazing 5 star rated hotel to visit in India Ahmedabad. Food were delicious. Non Veg and Veg foods are available. Hotel is very clean nd neat. Sstaff also very friendly and they have warm welcomed us. They have provided us a valuable service for given value.

When you go to coffee shop and order food / coffee or bringing Client for a meeting. They don’t even give wifi, unlike almost all other Hilton properties who do. Whether you are gold or diamond member, that doesn’t matter either. This is something one should least expect from the property of this sort. Highly recommend courtyard Marriott and other surrounding properties who offer better assistance !

Did not stay here. Used their conference room and restaurant. Conference rooms are good. Ready supply of decent coffee is appreciated. Food was fine. For the whole group we opted for buffet lunch, veg options was just paneer, boring for a brand like Hilton. The music was too loud for lunch hours. We requested to turn it down a little, but they said they can't turn music down.

Extremely good staff! Neme 😍Rajni patiyal 😍We were truly impressed with the very hospitable staff at every point - reception, restuarants and housekeeping. Thank you for making our stay so comfortable and memorable. Special kudos to Chef Rana for the tastiest food!!☺️
It was a great experience staying here. The service was good and the food was yum. Was taken good care by Asmita!

I frequently visit Hilton Ahmedabad, Rooms are spacious and services are really excellent, They have good variety in Breakfast and Dinner, In Excutive lounge Nidhi is outstanding with her job. Really enjoyed my stay.

Not at all upto double tree Hilton expectations. Congusted room with damp smell..even after room freshners and something wrong with air regulation with AC.
I changed the 1st room I got. It was terrible..don't ever agree for corner rooms..very congusted and smelly and dingy. 2nd room was better area wise.. but the smell was still there..
Staff is good. However the experience I wanted to provide to my guest of a 5 star restaurant was not at all there..it did not have a wow factor as other double tree properties pan India.
Hilton should review their properties and accordingly keep the rating.. seriously
It is built in 2018 however looks like a very old property from inside.. howsoever good lights they have from outside...If the rooms have damp smell..no one would like it..
I cut short my stay from 2 days to 1 day. The staff is supportive. They did hear my feedbacks. Hoping for a good breakfast tomorrow morning.

I am a member of hilton honors.We recently stayed at the hotel.
Our stay was very comfortable.
Staff is really hospitable
Specially like to mention about Karishma,
Who was very hospitable and very kind.
She arranged a bday cake for my husband and sent a note to us.
Very compassionate,
Friendly.
Thankyou Karishma for making our stay really comfortable.
Wouldn't want to miss two more people,
Prakash from housekeeping and melody from front desk.
Equally good
Double tree has maintained thier standards.
Thankyou for giving us a memorable stay
Wave by DoubleTree Hilton is an excellent place to visit. The hotel staff is exceptional, providing brilliant hospitality. The food was absolutely delicious.

One of best food of ahmedabad. Being a foodie there come a time when you just want to enjoy the meal. Now when ever i and my family want to have good food we just go to waves at doubletree hilton. And badshah the service manager is always at the best of his service. Keep it up hilton ..

Try paneer tikka afgani its awsome and manuchurian dumplings are just just amazing ...

Just ask for badshah for recommendations he will help you out.

I recently stayed at this hotel and had a fantastic experience. The room was spacious, well-maintained, and offered a great view of the surrounding area. The location was perfect, with easy access to nearby attractions and transportation options.

The service was impeccable, with friendly and attentive staff who went above and beyond to ensure a comfortable stay. From check-in to check-out, everything was handled smoothly and professionally.

Overall, I highly recommend this hotel for its excellent rooms, convenient location, and top-notch services. A five-star experience all around!

I stayed in this property twice and will highly recommend others to go for it.
Excellent experience since check in to check out.
Rooms are well internally designed, well lit and spacious.
Staffs are very cordial.
Service is lightning fast.
Food quality and variety are praiseworthy.
Look forward to stay again.

Recently I have visited this hotel to celebrate my parents Anniversary and it turned to be awesome. From Pre Arrival to post departure the staff has take a good care of us. From Pre Arrival your AFOM Mr. Shubham Jain has taken the request for making arrangements and decoration for my parents special occasion. At checkin Kapil and along with Shub has made sure that room was alloted together and ready with a quick checkin procedure that made my checkin experience hassle free with signature warm choco chip cookie with other front desk and bell desk and concierge staff. The room has a good view with city and on high floor. The service was quick with room service and all housekeeping requests with careline teammember Karishma and Suman. The whole team made sure that our stay was comfortable and memorable one. At checkout Rajni Rishi and Ankush were very helpful with quick checkout procedure.
At restaurant the staff was very friendly and kind and taken great care of us including Akram, Pavan, Gagandeep, Nilu with other few team members whose name I can not remember. Keep up the good work!!
Cheers to Double Tree By Hilton Ahmedabad team!!
Hotel was good but cleanliness was an issue at banquet. So dusty

Rooms are ok but air conditioning was not working, we had to make repeated calls for the repairs. Also the room service is extremely slow, we had to call more than 3 times for one single food order and it took more than 1 hour for just simple bread butter. Do not visit this hotel during summer time their air conditioning sucks
One of best hotel experience i have. Compare to prices, this is very good hotel within city. Service was excellent.
We frequently bump into the open cafe with friends since the area is nice with cool breeze and quiet… best time for post dinner hangout
in HOP, i met a kind staff(Asmita and temsurela)...they give me  very comfortable and convience for drink and food. it's good feeling like getting as vip. so tomorrow i will come back here again.

DoubleTree Hilton in Ahmedabad provided an overall excellent experience during my 7-day stay. The staff members were extremely courteous and attentive, ensuring that all my needs were promptly addressed. The services offered were top-notch, from the room cleanliness to the quality of food at the restaurant. However, the only drawback was the air conditioning unit in my room, which didn't have sufficient cooling power. Despite having to call the service team three times during my stay to fix this issue, their response was quick, and they efficiently resolved the problem each time.

It is a nice new hotel.  Great security and very nice staff.  The in-room refrigerator did not work.  That was a little disappointing.  Good water pressure and temperature.  The maid service was excellent.  The bed was always made.

I enjoyed my stay at this place. Staff are very well mannered and polite. They are ready to serve guests in the best possible manner.
An outdoor coffee shop / sit out is good in the evening ..
Overall I would love to visit again..

we vist to wave resturant the food was very good and nice ambeince and very good service provided by mr akram
thank u so much akram for your best servic
Recently visited their Banquet for b'day party . Banquet is good and specious. Ambiance is good . Food and services are totally disappointing.

My head is spinning sitting here in the noisy Ahmedabad Airport lounge, thinking what were you expecting anyway and my mind saying -bro ! you’re comparing apples and oranges cos from the time I checked into the Hilton four days back to the time that I checked out today morning my stay here has been impeccable
It started with a very warm welcome by the sweet smiling faces of Neha & Shruti at the front desk who gave me a room of my preference
A room which was big enough well furnished cosy and comfortable
As most of the day I was at work my morning breakfast and dinner at the end of a tiring day were an important factor plus some new health restrictions meant I had to follow some strict diet requirements and here too Ashraf’s team at Wave were just awesome with Badshah and Pintu looking after me with sincere concern while the cherry on top was chef Akshay Naik who took special care balancing healthy cooking for the delectable meals that he whipped up, plus he also took care to brief his teammate Neeraj
As a property it is neat clean friendly and well maintained
For me the high point was the swimming pool on the top that I used every morning - 22ft and clear blue water and now luckily it’s time for me to get to my gate and time for me to say  - Aavjo !

Visited Ahmedabad after years, was amazed to see the changes the city has gone through. One of them being all major Hotel Operators opening their hotels in Ahmedabad. it's located at a very convenient location Ambli Bopal Road, Near SH Highway.l, most of the city is easily accessible from the hotel.

The property is very well done and has all the amenities that are required by the guests. The Staff is cordial and very well behaved and they serve with a smile.

The room where i stayed was spacious... Actually quite big, the bathroom was also good and stocked with all things required. Housekeeping and Room Service was also up to the mark.

The all day restaurant WAVE where we had breakfast was also good. It had a wide variety of delicacies for us... Enjoyed it...

Important : - For guests travelling from other States can apply for a Drinking Licence for the duration of their stay and then can purchase Alcohol from their Liquor shop legally, but can be consumed only in the room.

All in all a good experience... We enjoyed our stay...
The Rooms are so hygiene. I loved the rooms so much that I didn't want to come out itself. Wish to visit again

Convenient and relatively quiet location but room furnishings are relatively old and carpeting not sufficiently cleaned. Staff are slow to respond to guest requests. Room service food did not meet expectations even though it was relatively expensive. Hotel has hundreds of chirpy birds nesting along the hotel's facade and they are constantly releasing their droppings onto the side glass, which makes quite a mess.

The hotel is outstanding with its lovely setting and top-notch service.
The breakfast was tasty and satisfying. I loved staying here and can't wait to come back. The staff was very friendly and helpful, and the rooms was big and spotless.
Food was decent, not much variety in dessert though. Overall nice experience.
Had too travel back for medical care before time , could not finish my job  , because of an accident , where I went trough the floor board , because of bad construction/maintenance in the hotel.

The service is below average! It's shocking to see how long it takes for any of the staff to understand a instruction on what you need. I attended a event where lights would trip every now and then in the banquet and also the staff in spite of telling them a million times to not do whatever that they were doing when the couple has its Entry, they have still gotten in the way and ruined the pictures, they literally had to wait for 1 minute and nobody cared enough to listen for that!
The place was clean and good , and food was also hygienic and tasty.bit costlier than expected.

Parking is a problem here. Situated in d middle of high rise apartments n commercial complex, inspite of having valet parking facility, you need to wait for minimum 20-25 minutes for your car to be sent for parking or getting it back.

The Hilton Hotel in Ahmedabad offers a luxurious stay with its modern amenities and impeccable service. Conveniently located, it provides guests with easy access to the city's attractions and business hubs. Overall, it's a top choice for both leisure and business travelers seeking comfort and convenience.

Service was too bad 👎  manager's and other services staff was talking to rudely. This services didn't deserve 1star also better to stay in other hotels in ahmedabad. The room was smelling of smoke and towells were too bad to use. Food was worst full of masala. Elevator wasn't working properly. 😑 Recommend to book other hotel than this
Excellent  food,Rooms are small in size,No extra amenities but location is accessible
Excellent food and hospitality. Good service. Nice ambiance.
I was here for some business meet, so just had experience of the banquet only. It was good enough.

A reputed international hotel brand and a convenient location - that's the only two positive things to say abt this hotel. The staff is untrained and hence service in all areas is poor. Whether it's the security, valet ,front office, room service, coffee shop...everywhere the service needs improvement.

Visited the banquet hall for a cozy family gathering and it turned out to be a memorable evening...

Excellent decor and courteous service staff. Everything was upto the mark. Food serving area open to sky added value to the party. Food was authentic and delicious too...

Location is prime and so the property...
Best hotel experience, good managed and well supportive staff. Supportive Management and quick response. Must try.
Nice Restaurent. Buffet has good variety.

We lived in hotel from 26th Dec to 4th Jan with family. Our experience is not good and totally unexpected. Staff is okay but food had safety issues as we found hair in food multiple times and to our surprise we also found 🐛 in one of the food item. This was highlighted to staff verbally and also by writing an email with photos. But no response till date. Do expect this from 5 start hotel ?
Beautiful place, great experience, friendly professional staff, great taste, I loved it
Good room, good location, but service was lacking.
Service can be improved during managing crowds in conferences. Food supply and  service needs improvisation. The ambience is good, I tried veg food, and the quality is good.
Decent hotel and quality of rooms. Food experience can be better

We stayed just night. We were in a suite.  Restaurant food was upto mark. We had spaghetti for lunch and lemon fish for dinner. We didn't go for buffet though the spread was lavish. Prosonjeet was quick to take care. Rooms are well serviced
Not great, not terrible. The restaurant had unclean utensils and the rooms had uncleaned coiner tops.

Lovely service but average fare. The Chechen Masala was cold, Schezwan fish was soggy and the mixed veggies was absolutely bland . The pastries had dried to a crumble.
What saved the day was the chicken chilly, the Hara bhara kebabs and the veggies fingers. I personally enjoyed the sesame noodles.
All in all, you could give this one a miss!

Excellent location to stay with friends and family. The staff is polite, and the accommodations were well kept.   The area is tidy. The breakfast menu is tasty, and the crew is attentive. When given even the smallest bit of food criticism, they quickly prepare something new.
A perfect hotel for all kinds of guests.
I attended an Expo at GF banquet halls and it was amazing.
Good to stay with all amenities and luxury
Nice interiors. Nice Food. Overall Good.

Unfortunately, aside from the favorable location, my stay was unsatisfactory. The air conditioning was inoperative, the room locker malfunctioned, and the overall experience with the staff was unhelpful and unwelcoming.

Amazing hotel with beautiful ambience and very good service.. The breakfast was yummy n treat for stomach..so much loved with the hotel will surely visit again.. The staff very friendly n coperative n rooms are very spacious n clean..
We had great experience and hospitality by Snajiv and Kapil. Superb Environment

It was an amazing experience at DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad.

The staff was incredibly friendly and helpful.

The hotel's location was convenient, and the amenities provided added to the overall enjoyable experience.

I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious stay in Ahmedabad.

I recently visited at the Doubletree Hilton Ahmedabad and was extremely impressed with the quality of the hotel. The entire hotel was very well maintained and clean. The floors were spotless and I felt very comfortable during my stay. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious stay in Ahmedabad.
We have been there to celebrate family member’s birthday 🎂

*Worst*
My stay at the hotel in Double Tree by
Hilton Ahmedabad was a complete nightmare, and I feel compelled to share my experience as a negative review to warn others. To begin with, the hotel claimed to be a five-star establishment, but it fell far short of that status. The first major issue was with the staff's behavior. They were dishonest and displayed a clear intent to deceive guests.

Upon booking, I reserved a room for six people two different big rooms, but to my dismay, they allocated the smallest room available. The lack of consideration and transparency was evident from the start. Furthermore, the check-in process was delayed until 5 PM of one room and another room check in was done at 10pm, at 10pm also they din have room (if they don't have empty room why to take bookings) , which was quite inconvenient.

Later in the evening at around 10:30PM whn we checked in , we noticed issues with the room and decided to make a complaint. However, instead of addressing the matter promptly, the hotel staff seemed to ignore our concerns until 1 AM. Their disregard for our comfort and rest was appalling.

Adding to the frustration, my elderly parents were allotted a room on a different floor from ours. This decision was insensitive and made us worry about their safety and convenience throughout the stay.

When I finally tried discussing these problems with the reception, they responded with an unprofessional and rude attitude. They offered no solution to our predicament and even attempted to turn the situation against us, almost resulting in a heated argument.

The hotel staff's service was utterly abysmal, with zero regard for guests' comfort and satisfaction. When I requested to speak to the manager, they showed no interest in resolving the issues and even resorted to making threats.

To conclude, my experience at this hotel was nothing short of a disaster. I strongly urge everyone to steer clear of this establishment. The dishonest staff, lack of concern for guests, and poor management make it a place to avoid at all costs. There are far better options available in Ahmedabad that value their customers and provide a pleasant stay.

One big compliment which I would like to share is during my stay, I was always greeted by warm smiling faces, right from the security to every member of the hotel staff. Very good service and food. I had a comfortable and pleasant 3 day stay

Hop Cafe is a hidden gem! The ambience is delightful, creating the perfect atmosphere for a relaxing time. The staff, especially Munaf Ji, Karan Ji, and Chef Ashwathaman, are incredibly polite and go out of their way to make you feel at home. Their dedication to building lasting relationships with guests is truly commendable. I've made it a daily ritual to visit this cafe because of the staff and their exceptional hospitality. I highly recommend Hop Cafe to anyone looking for a great place to hang out and enjoy delicious food!
Nice place. Food and drink was above average but not too expensive and worth it for the quality.  Would recommend it as a solo business traveller
Not asked value of water also no proper Hospitality
Location is just far away from the main so  you have to book cab which is costke specially in ahemdabad

Location of the hotel is excellent but the service by the staff is pathetic. Also there's NO FEEDING Or mother's room Or children's room. Hence, localite who are coming here with babies, should think for that. While I was having my lunch, I saw a mom feeding her child there only as there was no feeding room. It was awkward for both of us.
I had brought my own car hee in d hotel and the security staff was not at all helpful and trained.
The food was good but pathetic service by the restaurant staff.

I always stay here whenever I a in AHD, rooms are spacious. They have a nice Cafe, both indoor & outdoor. Breakfast has a nice spread, something for everyone. Same for the Lunch & Dinner Buffet. Staff is very helpful, cordial, & Friendly. They do have rooftop pool, plus a Spa & a Gym.
Location is fantastic. Overall a great experience, Highly recommended!!

Stayed for 2 days at this hotel during my visit to ahmedabad, the location is quite far from Ahmedabad business area. I did not like the breakfast menu, the South Indian dishes were awfully.
Location 2/5
Service 5/5
Room 5/5
Food 2/5
Amazing atmosphere, supportive staff, great place to photo shoot

We really enjoyed our stay here. Ambiance is family-friendly and very attractive.

This hotel visited by most of foreigners. They like to stay here happily.

Food quality was very good and mild..Actually they prepared food taste according to foreigners.

Price for food menu is very costly. Even room space not that much impressive but you can stay peaceful.

Over all experience was good.. You can enjoy your stay once in while ..

Its new property with good glass structure. Good double height entrance lobby with customer desks on left and sitting area on right with wooden stair going up to Restaurant. Haven't explored hotel fully in two days, using only rooms, lobby, Restaurant and lifts. Rooms are good size well maintained with all modern facilities.

Used restaurant for buffet breakfast and dinner. Buffet spread was decent and sufficient options. While breakfast was decent, i didn't liked dinner as Indian dishes was little spicy (i am used to non spicy, non chilli food). They prepared non spicy fresh yellow dal and dry potato vegetable.
It's the best and well maintained hotel in Ahmedabad.

I recently stayed at DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad and had a great experience. The hotel is conveniently located near the city center and was easy to access. The room was spacious, comfortable, and had all the amenities I needed for a comfortable stay. The staff were friendly, attentive and provided exceptional service, making me feel welcomed from the moment I arrived. The hotel's restaurant offered delicious food with a great variety of options for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. One of the highlights of my stay was the warm cookie welcome, which was a nice touch after a long journey. Overall, I highly recommend DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad for anyone looking for a comfortable stay with excellent service.

Was in Ahmedabad to see the IPL finals, stayed here for 2 nights. Felt welcomed from the start. Great room, warm and helpful staff in all areas, great food quality and prompt dining experiences made my stay a pleasant one. Highly recommended for it's reasonable room pricing, clean rooms, efficient and warm staff and great food quality.

An absolutely amazing and relaxing 5 days. The hotel is beautiful with great welcoming interiors. The front desk staff is extremely courteous and efficient. Made checking in very easy.
High quality rooms and high quality service. The rooms were clean, very comfortable, and the staff was amazing. They went over and beyond to help make our stay enjoyable.
We had a wonderful experience . Every staff member we encountered, from the floor manager to the check- in to the cleaning staff were delightful and eager to help! They all go above and beyond to make your stay comfortable. The food is excellent and they went out of the way to make the food we wanted. The best hotel I’ve ever been privileged enough to stay at.
A special mention for Naveen who helped us with every query and was always alert to our every need.
All in all, Double Tree by Hilton, Ahmedabad is one place I would definitely recommend to family and friends. My kudos to the staff.

Awesome, fantastic, superb experience. The staff are humble and curious. The food is delicious, and the buffet spread is good. Rooms are spacious. Hygiene levels are well maintained.

Overall, excellent experience.

We have wonderful experience at DoubleTree by Hilton. Good place to stay specially for couple and family. The staff was co-operative. Food quality was awesome. Enjoyed quality time at top floor swimming pool.

I would love to stay again in future.

Good Excellent property with luxurious rooms, great food and delightful service. Recently spent a weekend there with extended family. Staff took excellent care of us from bringing umbrellas to accommodating a vegan in the group. Complimentary breakfast was very good.thank you
It was a great experience. The rooms, service and food was awesome

Very rude front desk and room service.  Also the freshener in the hotel has such a peculiar irritating smell like the ones used in toilets . We ordered for coffee and they served us cup without coffee.

It’s a pathetic hotel with the worst staff and services possible. Rishi the duty manager especially was the worst, failed to provide a basic service and still unapologetic about it. The food is stale too. Nobody should go here ever!

Had a small meal at HOP, service was great, food was even better. The staff was really humble, out to help at every turn and ask, and the place was extremely clean. I loved the cutlery and crockery as well. Being a non-guest at DoubleTree, We weren't felt like outsiders, we were in fact taken care of very well by our host and hostess. Great place to dine.
The staff nature was bit strange and want me to leave as soon as possible.

I was coming for visit meeting & dinner, on ૧૧-૭-૨૩ Tuesday, hall is very large, visibility is excellent 👌,mic 🎤 🎙️ is of high quality, a.c. is normal, & after wadrs dinner, is very delicious, menu is appropriate, no spicy, from 🍲 to desert 🏜️🏝️  everything is fine …

Good place to stay with family and friends. Staff are courteous and rooms were maintained well. No odour smell at any place in the room. Breakfast menu is good and staff takes utmost care. Even for slightest of feedback on food they prepare new and give it immediately
Great place, good comfortable rooms with great ambiente & good food but service needs to be picked up. The staff attitude tends to get casual.

Stayed here for 14 nights. Overall a great stay. Loved the approach of their team as they make you feel welcomed. Team in the restaurant Vishal, Karan, Sunita, Shruti, Gagandeep were great host and always welcomed with smile. Only issue I found was with live counter where i observed some delay a few times.

Pro - Good and spacious rooms, Easy access to cupboard from both room and washroom, Rain shower makes you feel like taking shower in heavy rain and it's soothing, Housekeeping staff is curtious. Every member in team greets and carries a smile which is a pleasure and their 24*7 coffee shop (Hop)

Cons - Brand name is not visible when you are approaching hotel so that gets little confusing if you are new to city.

Had a lovely experience staying here at Hilton Ahmedabad. The staff was just so warm & professional…specially mention to Gagandeep for making sure I felt at home…would definitely recommend staying here🤗❤️
The staff was very nice and helpful. Food has very good quality and taste. The location is very quiet and peaceful. A good place to relax. Worth the price.

The experience was extraordinary.

Rooms were clean, food was good and room service was excellent, especially from Atish.

Highly recommended.

Awesome ambience with class environment and yummy food with great service and suitable perfect venue for marriage or any kind of functions.. they almost fulfill all our needs regarding the arrangements and give us the desired results.. more than satisfactory.. Very Good 😊

Very Unprofessional staff
No respect towards customers
Careless and incompetent service

Did not meet our expectation of a Hilton property. First night 11 pm, the bathroom flush stops working after kid used it! Second night extra beds were made shabbily and soup served to the room in the most shabby manner (I have pic that I can share if requested). Staff at breakfast buffet refused to take my dosa order until and unless I shared my table number (which I had missed to note when I went to the live counter) ….overall it was unlike any other experience I’ve had at a Hilton property. Lots of room for improvement.

Loved they service and rooms. The staff was really friendly and courteous. Went there to celebrate special occasion with my wife. Check-in process was smooth. They provided me complementary room upgrade from Delux to executive and a couple of cookies at the time of check-in. They also provide 250gm cake and towel decoration. Rooms are great, spacious and comfortable with a nice view.
In-room dining service was great, the food was really tasty. The best part of my stay was the breakfast - includes fruits, cereals, juices, tea/coffee and a variety of options with live counters for eggs and South Indian food.
Outdoor swimming pool is also lovely. Has gym and spa facilities.

The rooms are amazing, beds are comfortable. Polite and helpful staff. Good infrastructure and amenities.
A very attractive ambience glazing your eyes.💕💕

We had gone for a professional meeting and had the buffet at the restaurant. The spread is unimpressive and lacks variety, very few options and nothing stood out in taste or presentation. Service is decent, but the overall experience is very lacklustre and disappointing.
Thank you Rajendra, Liohan, Gagandeep, Pratham, Bichitra, Himi, Neeraj, Padam, Prosenjit, Chef Rahul and Shubham at the front desk!! You guys really went out of your way to make our stay comfortable!

The manager at hotel in night shift Mr. RISHI is worst behaved person I've ever met in a five star property. His tone & language was not even suitable for a road side tea stall.
He was so arrogant and not as per the DOUBLE TREE standard.

I have been to wave twice now and the unlimited buffet is actually good but they can definitely add more non veg items.

The desert section is full of choices, but when it comes to main course the non-vegetarian section is not as much filled with choices as the vegetarian section is.

Being a Hilton Honors member, I straightaway booked this one for our vacation without even searching for any other hotels in the city :) .

We stayed in a 1 Bedroom suite and an executive room for a week and I must say that their suites are spacious and comfortable with all the necessities one would need. The view from the top floors is amazing. Housekeeping/room service was good and quite fast.

Buffet breakfast was good, however I felt the options were not very convincing and majority of the items were same everyday. Uttapam/Poori was too good from the live counters with a variety of juices, flavored yogurts and bakery items.

The executive lounge offered only a handful of dishes, not much variety in evening snacks and obviously no hard drinks. Gym and Pool available. Overall a nice and luxurious stay.
Very helpful staff 👏 nice to be with Prosenjit, Akram, Badsha, Nizamudin and Gagandeep.

The DoubleTree by Hilton in Ahmedabad offers a delightful stay with its modern amenities and comfortable rooms. The warm and welcoming staff ensure a pleasant experience from check-in to check-out. The hotel's central location makes it convenient for both business and leisure travelers to explore the city's attractions. The well-appointed rooms, elegant decor, and excellent dining options contribute to a memorable stay. Whether for a business trip or a leisure getaway, DoubleTree by Hilton Ahmedabad provides a relaxing and enjoyable environment.

Very spacious rooms, excellent breakfast menu not just it has everything but whatever they serve you is very very delicious. Staff is also  very helpful. The only lacking point was in extra bedding, they do not have ample amount of rollaway beds so we could not get one. But besides that  for sure it is a place where you can stay again and again

Absolutely knowledgeable, and courteous team of professionals ready to assist your to ensure your stay at the hotel is remarkable and memorable.  The team members’ proactive approach to everything made our visit much pleasant.  We are sure to return in future as our family and friends are dazzled by their hospitality.  Best hotel and ultimate service!

This is more of an appreciation post for Double tree Hilton’s Ahmedabad location executive chef Mr. Dalveer Singh…. He is an impeccable chef and has an art of cooking food which would meet all kind of taste buds. While designing the buffet menu he ensures there something for everyone. He has enhanced our experience of staying  at Hilton.
Also special mention to the chefs Rahul and Ravi who cook amazing food and are superb in their hospitality

Great hotel, lovely thoughtful staff. Made my stay here with family very comfortable.

Rooms are spacious and comfortable. Breakfast has a great variety of vegetarian options.

Mamta at front desk is extremely helpful!

Excellent service all around.  The staff is amazing. Shobit is amazing - he was extremely nice and attentive.

The food at breakfast is a great variety. The location is a quick taxi away to main shopping and eating areas.  The pool is small but very nice.  All around great stay!
One of the best hotels in Ahmedabad, overall the food and staff behaviour is so good. The hotel's main target is customer satisfaction,and has a home full nature with staff.

Rooms - 4/5
Hospitality - 4/5
Location - 4/5
Food - 4/5

This property lives up to the typical Hilton standards. The rooms are comfortable with a spacious bathroom & a seating area inside the room too. They have a nice restaurant called wave in the 1st floor of the hotel.

The pool is located on the rooftop & is quite narrow but good for doing laps. They also have a well equipped gym on the 12th floor.

In terms of location it’s quite well located & about 40 mins away from the airport. Would recommend this location for short business trips, I stayed here just for one night.

Rooms are spacious but tea kettle placed to be ear market.Hand wash needed.
AC is very poor
Should mark the room nos,to see once we come out of the lifts

Would totally recommend this hotel for your stay. Extremely professional and friendly staffs always ready to help the customers at any point of the day.

Right from Check-in to Check-out, the entire experience was nothing but superb. The food was delicious with wide variety of choices to chose from according to your tastebuds.

Overall, happy and impressed with my stay at the hotel. After all, I would expect nothing less from Hilton, one of the finest hotel brands in the world.

Was under quarantine here for almost 12 days and I must say they provide fantastic service. Firstly the room is very good. Secondly the food was good and healthy as a patient should have. The service was extraordinary. You get calls from doctors twice a day to ask about your health. I am already missing this place. Would definitely like to visit again some day. Overall if you are tested covid positive but you have no to mild symptoms, I would highly recommend this place.

Excellent Hotel With Great Rooms and Amazing Views. ROOM Service is a Bit Lousy and Not Upto the Mark. REST OF hotel is Amazing and Nearby to ISKON Cross Roads and Dev Arc Mall Having Croma. SG highway is walking distance.
Great service by Akram at Wave Restaurant.

The infrastructure was good, but the service was very poor.
Had to wait 15 minutes and call twice to get the in-room dining menu, had to wait 20 minutes and call three times to get extra water bottles.
There was no great variety in the dinner buffet, and everything tasted average. There was no one to take payments in the restaurant and we had to wait 10 minutes for someone to come at the front desk to pay.
They should serve a-la-carte in the restaurant, it's a very basic thing or should prepare good food in the buffet, if you're only concentrating on that, didn't feel like a 5 star hotel at all.

A new, well maintained hotel property in Satellite area of Ahmedabad.

Rooms are well done, and well lit, with a double bed and side tables. A round table with computer chair makes it convenient to work or use your computer. The bathroom is stocked with dental and shaving items, and with the usual body lotion, shampoo and conditioner.

The rooms offer temperature control, and a safe to store your valuables.

Depending on your negotiations, the room fare includes a complimentary breakfast too.

The restaurant offers an excellent variety of Indian and western food. South Indian, and north Indian food is available. But the live counter messed up the onion uttappa I ordered, by serving a dosa which had onion pieces inside!

Overall service is good. But I had a peculiar experience which I hope is one-off. When checking out, I was presented with a bill which included room service items I never ordered! When I pointed this out, the reception was unable to resolve it quickly and kept me waiting for 20 minutes. Then they ultimately set it right.

Apart from this, it was a good experience to stay in this particular hotel.
Worst experience by security guard  And staff don't go here

I did not like the service at all. Not even a single person wants to take the responsibility. I was not well and wanted to order food in room dining. They didn't understand and kept transfering the call and provide the wrong information. Not a good experience.

Wonderful location.... The welcome by Hotel staff was superb. Wheelchair was provided for my wife who recently had Total knee replacement surgery. Rooms and Toilets were sparkling clean and the ambience was very positive. I highly recommend to stay in the hotel.

Exactly how you expect a 4.5 star hotel to be. Had a conference meeting there and totally satisfied with the services. Helpful, friendly staff who go above and beyond to make sure you have the best time. Breakfast and lunch were substantial, and suited all tastes. The day was pleasant and comfortable. Will be visiting again for sure.

Not a great experience while travelling with family.
1. Concierge service not good. No body was picking the call at the concierge desk.

Conrad Hilton founded the hotel chain in 1919, when he bought his first property, the Mobley Hotel, in Cisco, Texas.[11]
The first hotel to bear the Hilton name was the Dallas Hilton, a high-rise that opened in Dallas, Texas, in 1925.[12]
In 1954, at the Caribe Hilton Hotel's Beachcomber Bar in San Juan, Puerto Rico, Ramon "Monchito" Marrero reportedly created the Piña Colada.[13]
In June 1955, Hilton opened the first post–World War II property in Istanbul, Turkey, and it is the longest operating Hilton Hotel outside the United States.[14][15]
The Conrad Hilton Hotel in Chicago figured prominently in the 1968 Democratic Convention police riot[16] that occurred on Michigan Avenue and across the street in Grant Park on August 28. During the riot the demonstrators took up the chant "The whole world is watching", and the hotel's doors were locked for the first time in its history. The hotel suffered minor damage as a result of the violence, and a couple of street-level windows gave way under the weight of dozens of protesters being pushed up against them by the police.
John Lennon and Yoko Ono held their first Bed-In for Peace between March 25 and 31, 1969, at the Amsterdam Hilton, in Room 902 (renumbered to Room 702 during renovation). This room became a popular tourist destination.[17]
In the London Hilton bombing of September 1975, a bomb exploded in the lobby of the London Hilton on Park Lane, killing two people and injuring 63.
With construction on the Beirut Hilton finished, the hotel was scheduled to open on April 14, 1975, but the Lebanese Civil War erupted exactly one day, the April 13 before the Grand Opening date. The hotel never opened and was severely damaged during the war, and the building was demolished in the late 1990s. However, a different hotel was established later, under the name "Hilton Beirut Grand Habtoor", in the nearby eastern suburb. Later on,[when?] the Hilton Chain bought the Metropolitan hotel directly facing the Grand Habtoor and renamed it "Hilton Metropolitan"

I would say they have world class worst staff seating on the bench, they were incorporative, even chotu on dabha is better than them.

The rooms are very small and the bed is almost like a single bed with pathetic cusions on it. Bathroom fittings are of most cheap quality and very small bath area . Service is very slow. Overall there is no experience kind of a thing here. No value for money. You will get better room in half of the price of this hotel.

Bad experience with this hotel , they don't have any clean room ,from mattress to comforter everything is full of stains,rooms  ac doesn't work,door locks were in bad condition and if you complain they come after 5-6 reminders ,overall very bad experience with this hotel
Very poor quality of staff. Tiny small rooms. Old furniture. Very unlike a Marriott property. Good for 1 N business travel if location near the airport is preferred but otherwise not recommended.

Sub standard rooms with big brand name. Too small bed & lack of breathing space around the room. Even the interiors looks old & basic compared to the market standard in similar price range. Food was also not to the mark.
Only positive was the location, safety & service.
Food is quit tasty and service is very good.Reception staff a quit efficient and professional.
Worst place, dont book it , no services available, they charged for extra bed , but bed are worst,, 3/11/24 … plz dont book , reviews are fake

Don't go on name mariott name.
This is just a ordinary cheap place with cheap staff and cheapest room. Highway rooms are better at 2000 bucks .. though even after paying a huge sum .. go third class room with no support from staff..
Other hotels like sarovar always make up but this is damn one.

Book any another place rather this. You'll get smallest room with no facility and cheap,broken bathroom and commode.

The rooms are good, the cleanliness of the floors needs improvement. check in and check out experience is good. The breakfast service needs to be improved, i have placed an order of aloo paratha at the live station, which i have not received. very good location and comfortable rooms. Overall the service is good.

Please do not go by the name of the hotel....I would have paid not more than 2k for the stay here...It is not equipped to provide a comfortable stay..it's unhygenic, stinky and hospitability is nowhere to be found...Food preparation is questionable...Overall the stay was very disappointing.

Good Property. Happened to visit a wedding reception. The hall and food were very good. Staff seemed to be responsive and cooperative. The decoration, seating arrangement, AC functioning were ofnhigh order. Dinning organizer outside hall. Well organized counters with good display of names of dishes. Food was very delicious.
I went there for dinner. It’s difficult to reach there in a pick hour. No valet parking available. Food was not up to the mark. Service was too slow
Rooms are too small and the corridors carpets on every floor leading to room are very badly soiled / stained giving a glimpse of village Dharamshala after marriage.

Was unfortunate enough to experience the pricy buffet at cafe 1 st story. Here's the summary

Overcrowded and understaffed
Not enough plates and cutlery
Clear the table on your own
No glasses, just a small bottle of plastic with water in it
Cold, stale dishes

Great stay and good food. The staff goes over and above to provide service. The housekeeping staff to be more courteous during service. The person delivering laundry was rude in behaviour... But still giving the best rating for other hotel staff who have gone over and above to make the stay comfortable.

Very bad.
Marriott must seriously check to offer their brand name usage for this hotel
Good location and service. Room are little small in size may need an upgrade. Entry exit are difficult for vehicles

This hotel is located in a popular area, and lot of transportation and eateries options are close by. The property is well maintained and in good condition. They have a good buffet breakfast. And snacking counters within the campus. They also have small food store at the lobby level. And wheelchair accessible washroom near the lobby.

Decent Hotel with clean rooms and good service. Their queen bed is a bit small for 2 adults in a room. Otherwise, the room is spacious and tidy. The location is strategic and central, so it is not a long drive from the airport and railway station.

Cannot believe Marriot hotels have such a worst service. Room AC stopped working abruptly in the night and even after complaining thrice , the issue wasn't resolved. Moreover ,room intercom isn't working - so to raise the issue we had to go down at the reception in the midnight.
Adding to this , they rarely pick the call dialed on the contact number provided on the website.
Please think and check before visiting especially if you are with the kid. Just don't jump into it by its name.
I think that's the reason why they are offering 40-60% discount on room charges on their sites!

Certainly! Here's a glowing review for a hotel with an exceptional breakfast:

"I recently stayed at this hotel and was blown away by their breakfast offerings. The variety and quality of the breakfast spread were impressive. From fresh fruits to an array of pastries and hot and cold options, everything was delicious and meticulously prepared. The staff was attentive and ensured a pleasant dining experience. I looked forward to breakfast every morning of my stay, and it certainly set a positive tone for the rest of the day. Highly recommend this hotel for a delightful breakfast experience!"

The only good thing about this hotel is the location to airport. It’s a 15 min drive.
Horrible rooms, bad spa and food is average in restaurants.

Near to Airport, Near to Railway Station ! Staff is courteous and polite. Breakfast is good and has a Gujarati special dish added to it. Overall food is very good. Cleanliness and hygiene and neatly maintained. Sabarmati Ashram is very nearby to visit.
Fabulous service. Extremely good quality of food. Very courteous staff.

I would highly advise to find a better hotel for the price they charge. Even Hyatt down the road was 7000 rupees cheaper. Rooms were ok, nothing great. Bathroom was small. Front desk staff was rude. The lady by the entrance and exit was not helpful. She was always on her phone. For the price you pay, it’s not worth it. They came and took the trash from the room but the room was made. I would highly recommend anyone to avoid this hotel

Property is no doubt good from service perspective. Staff are courteous,responsive and work with great sincerity. Quality of rooms are in expected lines. No second thoughts. Two drawbacks 1) room size not adequate for a family of 3 and more. Rooms are small and bathrooms are dingy.can fit only for a single business/ personal traveller 2) Dining / restaurant is small and experiences unmanageable crowd in peak hours.

We stayed in this hotel along with three other couples from 14th of December to 17 of December 2023. We all four couples are senior citizens. It was a nice stay in the hotel. Rooms, though some small in size, were neat and clean. Hotel staff is very courteous, well mannered,  and supportive. As for Restaurant is concerned food items in buffet both in breakfast and dinner were numerous and very delicious. Restaurant staff is very courteous, well behaved and very attentive. Besides rooms and room service restaurant is the main part which attracts the customers. That we found very good. We all were very satisfied with our stay in the hotel.

The hotel staff went above and beyond to ensure our comfort. They were attentive, responsive, and always had a welcoming demeanor. The cleanliness of the rooms and common areas was impressive. Overall, a fantastic stay that exceeded our expectations."
I always come to this hotel, it is very beautiful and nice, the staff here is also very good

Don't go on name, mariott.
This is just an ordinary cheap place with cheap staff and the cheapest room. Even after paying a huge sum .. got third class room with no support from staff. Book any place other than this.

On my onward and return journey to Somnath stayed at this hotel . I wanted a room upgrade and a late check-out, for which the front office executive readily obliged. Very near to the Airport hazzle free check-in and check-out, Nice breakfast with lots of Gujarati cuisine. Clean rooms with a nice view of the city and the sabarmati.  Overall a great experience.

My recent stay at the hotel was nothing short of delightful. From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with warmth and hospitality that made me feel right at home. The ambiance of the hotel was inviting, and the rooms were impeccably clean and comfortable, ensuring a restful night's sleep.

What truly set this experience apart was the exceptional service provided by the Hotel Manager, Mr. Vipin Panday. His attention to detail and genuine care for the guests' comfort was evident in every interaction. He went above and beyond to ensure that all my needs were met, making my stay memorable.

I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone seeking a place that offers not just a stay, but an experience enriched with care and excellence. Kudos to Mr. Panday and his team for their outstanding hospitality!

Also Ms Meena is another person deserving compliments who was at the breakfast counter and did quite a formidable job.

Rooms are decent, food is supremely delicious and hygiene standards are impressive!
My respect grew for the employers when I saw differently abled people also employed there. A great step by the management.  Would definitely like to visit again and recommend to my friends too.

They need to focus on their Security though which I found to be lax. Rest, it was a great experience.

The floor was really sticky. Could not walk without slippers.
Breakfast was ok service too slow
Went for a meeting. But really have to say there food quality and test is to awesome ❤️❤️
Attended a conference...staff didn't even care about exchanging empty water bottles in the conference room... pathetic

The customer service is good. The hotel rooms are outstanding. The staff was knowledgeable about the dishes and made excellent recommendations. The staff to accommodate our needs and ensure we had a pleasant stay. Location founding is good.

It's a well located, inviting and warm hotel, considering it is part of a chain. The management and staff are surprisingly young but efficient, kind, helpful and courteous. Samarth, Sachin, Saptaparna, to name a few, are outstanding in their ability to resolve problems and find solutions.
The restaurant has a great breakfast and a friendly and open atmosphere.
All in all, a very satisfactory stay so far and would gladly return to this hotel in the future.

one of the worst Mariott hotel i have ever seen. room service : time 1hour if you lucky
breakfast : always reuest for knife and spoon and napkin on table

room : bad smell and bathroom  are like normal 1 star.

we cant order any food in room and reception ask us to collect from reception

i dont recommend this hotel
so i will give 1 star
Worst hotel in my life no good service no management
I have been trying to call them on the number mentioned online but it’s either keeps ringing or the IVR says out of service. Wondering the service they can provide.

Great hotel with well facilitated rooms and ambience.
The view from the hotel is great.
The food and the gym area are well equipped.
Well Satisfied with the service of the staff.
Must visit and stay when you visit Ahmedabad.

As soon as we checked in we complained their staff about *small and uncomfortable bed* size (4ft5inch approx wide only)but they replied all bed sizes are same in our hotel. As we have two rooms and clearly bed size differ. Again in the evening we ask to resolve the same, they cant provide us separate bed room.
And now we have to get extra mattress and sleep on floor. Very bad experience, will clearly never advise anyone to stay here.

We four senior citizens couple stayed in this hotel from 14th December to 17 th December 2023 we found this hotel very decent. We enjoyed our stay very much Rooms are neat and clean with every facilities. Morning buffet / Dinner buffet are widely spread in Non veg / veg items Food is delicious. Staff is very nice and hospitable. I was highly impressed with the hospitality of Manager Mr Pravanjan
We went for brunch..not a single food item was  good ..and there is not enough variety of food ..very limited food items..all were so bad ..worst experience ever..!!!!

Amazing and greatfull hotel
Enjoy the best moments ❤️

Best one. I request others to visit once damn sure you will further love it.
Friendly service.
Best quality food.
Cleaned Rooms with all features.
Affordable rates.

I recently stayed in this hotel. The cleanliness of the hotel is pathetic and indeed it's unhygienic. The bed sheet were filthy, the furniture in dining area were philthy. The staff had no curtsey and even after complaining there was no sense of failure on their part. Many staff members were roaming around aimlessly rather than taking note of all the filth that seems to be present in various place. Don't stay, avoid this hotel.

I am extremely disappointed with my recent experience at Marriott. Despite having a confirmed reservation, my booking was abruptly canceled without a valid reason. It became apparent that my room was canceled solely because I had secured a lower rate, and there was a significant event happening in the area during my stay.

This practice not only demonstrates a lack of respect for loyal customers but also raises serious concerns about the hotel’s commitment to service integrity. Instead of honoring a confirmed reservation, it seems they chose to prioritize higher rates over customer loyalty. This experience has significantly tarnished my view of Marriott and has made me reconsider future stays with the chain.

Their lack of communication and proper resolution has left me stranded and inconvenienced. I expected much better service and professionalism from a reputed brand like Marriott.
Very nice experience...nice breakfast and staff

Front desk staff tried their best but given that the place was full the front desk began to resemble a zoo.

Floors in the room were dirty - hadn't been swept in a while.

Phone did not work requiring frequent trips to the front desk thereby contributing to the "zoo".

These things are unusual for a Marriott, and I've stayed for more than 1,000 nights in them worldwide with no complaints whatsoever.

Service was, in a word, sleepy!

Location is great - close to few things to see and experience in ahmedabad eg, the Gandhi ashram.

Like this hotel but for international traveler no WhatsApp number
Actually they have to provide
My stay at the 5-star hotel was incredible. The rooms were comfy, and the staff was really helpful. The hotel's amenities and service made it a standout experience. Highly recommended!

I wish I could give negative stars. We recently stayed at Fairfield Ahemdabad for 2 days.We have travelled all over the world but have not seen a Marriott worse than this. It is extremely filthy right from lobby to dining room to the rooms we stayed in. I am even hesitant to sit on the chairs which are stained heavily. The carpeted corridor is full of stains and it seems have never been shampood. The bedding on our beds were stained at multiple places and strands of hair were clearly visible. I will urge people reading this review to refrain from booking here and wasting your money and ruining your vacation. Never ever will I stay in this hotel again.

Let’s start

. I stayed in Mumbai Fairfield Airport and I m extremely happy so I booked in Ahmedabad.

My checked inn process was smooth and excellent.

Elevator and hallways are filthy.
We went to room .
Room is filthy. I think housekeeping don’t do dusting . Bathroom sink has body lotion and shampoo. No hand sops. We r 2 people but only one towel in the room no hand towel. Called manager he send another towel but no apology.

Next day morning went to gym .same thing filthy. All equipment has lot of dust. No hand towel in gym . Look like nobody did vacuum for weeks.

Breakfast
Table and chairs has stains. Food is ok but need to more organize and clean.

I  hope Marriott corporate do some kind of action to this hotel . This is not Marriott standard

Worst experience. We went for buffet dinner in their restaurant yesterday i.e. 06.11.2023 at around 9.25 p.m. We told the lady on the counter our room number as we were staying in the same hotel.  The lady on the cash counter was insisting that we pay for our food first and that they have to close the balance by 10.00 p.m. I told her we are staying here only and that she can always enter my room number and punch my bill.
I took the plate. She again came to me and said we will have to pay first. I told her let us eat and I will pay you afterwards. However, she kept standing there for me to pay first. I took out my credit card and paid the Bill.
I thought the worst is over and now I can enjoy my food.
I was so wrong.
I took a plate and went to the buffet plate. Most of the bowls were either empty or the food was cold. I asked the restaurant staff to fill the bowls. Nobody gave a hack about anything
Since I saw nobody budging, I took whatever leftover was there in the bowls and went to the table.
There was no cutlery on the table. I requested the staff for cutlery. The cutlery came after approx 5 mins. Ideally the cutlery should have been already placed on the table.
Thereafter I requested this lady to get some green salad. I waited for approx 20 mins and got it myself.
Then I asked them if I can have a glass on the table to drink water.
I got the glass in another 10 mins.
Finally I stood up and called the chef as restaurant manager (in-charge) was no where to be seen. I told him if you can't give food thn you should close this buffet.
You guys insist on paying first. And thn after one has paid, you treat them like rags. Other guests also were having similar issues.
If hotel staff has any doubt, they can always check the footage of the above said date and time.
My worst experience after having paid so much.
I recommend nobody to go to this hotel.
You enter the hotel and the misery would start.
Such unprofessional bunch of people.

Margarita PIZZA IS VERY BAD DON'T GO FOR Al Carta
BROWNIE  WAS VERY GOOD
Average rooms. Lack of clean toilets. Inexperienced staff
It's Buisness Hotel. Rooms are small but ample for atmost 2 people. Food was good. Spread was decent. Cleanliness can improve though.
One of best budget hotel in Ahmedabad. We enjoy our stay in Ahmedabad and it is at prime location.
I stayed there for couple of days and it was a wonderful experience. The food was mouthwatering and super delicious. Rooms were hygienic and staff was also polite..

The entire 7th floor of hotel feels like a smoking room. Not sure if they put me in a smoking section in spite of my Marriott profile being non smoking.

The smoke smell was so over powering that we could not sleep the night.

Stay away with a 10 foot pole if you have other options to consider in this area of Ahmedabad.

My husband reached Ahmedabad this morning from Bangalore and took a taxi to the hotel only to be told that they had no room because of some issues which they were vague about. The hotel room was booked two weeks ago and paid for this morning.
They then told him that they would put him up in Lemon tree when there are two Courtyard by Marriott in the city!!!!
Since my husband is new to the city, he took their word and moved to lemon tree, which is in a not so nice area and the room stinks of cigar smoke!!!
I am a Bonvoy member, if members are treated like this I can imagine others.
Very poor service and customer management.
Extremely disappointed!

We enjoyed a comfortable 2 days stay, enjoyed variety of food . Staff are very polite and soft spoken. Rooms are near and clean but carpets need more care. Ac operation and door lock systems have some trouble. Over all a good openion.

Rooms are not that well maintained and clean, there is scope for improvement. The bed was low. And bathroom seems old.
The buffet breakfast was very nice, the food options were plenty, live counter for eggs and stuffed Paratha was really nice.

This was previously managed by the Holiday Inn group which recently now have been transferred to the Marriott group. Staff is very polite and courteous and the room service one of the fastest. They have an elaborate spread of breakfast with live Paratha counter and live tea counter during my visit. The items in breakfast where a good mix of the local staples as well as other items! The sitting area is vast and even during the peak hours you can easily find in the place. If the rooms are available, they are courteous enough to provide you early check in as well without any mention of the any extra charge. The location of this hotel is very convenient and makes traveling around the city very easy. They have in hotel store as well for basic refreshments like cold beverages and snacks. You get an panoramic view of the city from the higher floors. The rooms are cozy, well lit and clean! They are spacious as well and the overall decor is very vibrant. Love the staff and the place!

This was my first experience of a Fairfield property under the Marriott hotel chain. While you get to experience the Marriott hospitality they are famous for, given Fairfield is a lower category, one can see the slight difference in the way the staff engages with customers and the room interiors. But for this pricing, I would always stay at this property. They even managed to give me an early check-in since my flight arrives very early in the morning

Worst place to stay with a family. Cleanliness is not that great and rooms are cramped. What really sucks is the service of staff at the hotel. They are least bothered about customer service. They handed over room key at 5:00 pm even though the check in time is 3:09 PM

The experience was awesome. Our room was upgraded by Mr  vipin, executive housekeeper on his own which gives better view of the city. The food was available even at odd hours in night. He also called before coming for any help needed for transportation and transfers m overall great stay. Staff is cordial and helpful.

Check in was ultra fast. Liked it.
Kettle was not cleaned. Did not serve purpose when needed.
Food is on the costlier side comparatively.
Carpet is absolutely stained and smelly.

It is located amazingly near to airport. This is a good place to stay. I liked their touch of colour inside the rooms and a gym is available too. And, if you want to try complimentary meals, there are many coffee shops nearby. The food for in room dining is a little high along with its service charge too.
So prefer going to their restaurant. And, if you want to go to nearby places, there are shopping areas nearby and south indian places like sankalp are also good to try. Overall good experience

I will never stay at this property unless there is no option. It's a poorly renovated property from an old hotel.
Staff is good at passing the buck to other person. Not at all helpful. Service is terrible.
Only reason one can stay there is the location and proximity to the airport. Rooms are bit tidy without any standard amenities except water bottle. Bathroom is too small and after repeated requests for hot water, they could do a little to rectify the issue.
Service is very poor.on the name of marriot they charged but in room services like poorer than dhaba on highway.  5 times i called for spoons but not gave

Worst experience, ACs done work in the rooms, when highlighted to staff, they send a tech guy to clean filters and then again ask to wait for it to cool just pathetic. When got my room changed, they gave room wit a smelly fridge, the smell was so foul i had to change the room again, when they shifted my luggage to new room, the staff broke the trolly handle of my expensive bag, it was definitely done purposely. The restaturant staff will not serve you water when you sit at the table, you have to call them out loud and ask for water, shameless people.
Very worst experience during check in. Almost wait for 3 hrs

great value for money business hotel. they value time of their customers. rooms are clean, functional and sufficient. comfortable bed and adequate lighting through window.

meal portions are just about sufficient albeit a little pricey compared to general food scenario in Ahmedabad

Rooms are good and  decent, food is supremely delicious and hygiene standards are impressive!
I  Would definitely like to visit again and recommend to my friends too.

Our Stay was not comfortable due to following reasons (1) Handwash and Body wash bottles were empty and were not filled even on request (2) The film on the Glass partition of bathroom was torn. Hence one person cannot use bathroom when other person is in the room. (3) We had to chase Housekeeping and Room Service Team (4) Even we had to put request to provide towels in the room.

If you booking this the Hotel for any function like a wedding or something my sincere advice to you is not to work with Mr.Rakesh Brahmbhatt  and a person called Nikil who is his team member who are the decorator out there .He and his team are completely cheat and fraud people after confirming the work and money and taking huge money as advance.
They  will just a day before the function  torture you for extra money and will hold you at Gun point saying they will not the work If extra money is not given to them rite now. Not only this they will abuse you and use words if you dnt agree to them.They have no respect for females and amd have a very bad outlook towards them and the hotel staff is in complete support of them in this matter.

Stayed overnight in a business trip .Check in was smooth and room allocated on higher floor as requested .All necessary toiletries available in bathroom . Bed are nice and cozy although double room need more space to fit in .

Located around 20 min from airport with good connectivity options .

Overall value for money 💰. Good for business guest / couple however family with kid may look for other options .

Points to improve - Lobby space is very limited probably covered under Cafe to increase space for dine -in ... Switching from using plastic water bottles / toothbrush to more sustainable options will be appreciated .

Lovely quiet and cosy place situated just outside the city area.
Great rooms but the menu is suitable for the locals.
Otherwise, all smiles around...
No direction for car parking when I entered. Disappointing experience. Location is odd.

The overall experience was not upto the mark. I remember staying in hotel during May. During that time the lady receptionist was very greedy. She needed money in every aspect she can get from me. The room which was provided had stains on my bedsheet. The room was superb and the toilet was upto the standards. The experience could be better. Not expected such a bad experience by Marriott.

Nice hotel. Nice breakfast. Good lunch. That kadai chicken was very well done but it was spicy. Butter milk was good. Rooms are nice and clean . Spacious enough. Staff is very helpful. Close to the airport . Just 15/20 min. Chicken sandwich was good ordered in room service. Overall very good stay if u r on a business trip.

It's been a long time since I had fish and chips cooked to such perfection. Not an ounce of extra oil on the coating of the fish, which had a crunchy texture, while the meat retained its softness. Fries done to a golden delight... many's the chef who can take a lesson from whoever created this delectable meal. Many thanks.

Would not recommend anyone to stay in this property. The staff is very lethargic and not at all attentive at the Front Desk. My husband is a Titanium Member of Marriott. And this is the kind of room we got (photos attached 👇). Being the 7 or 8-story building, we got room on the 2nd floor.
There were tissues wrapped around the sprinklers as someone smoked in the "NON SMOKING" 🚭 floor. The chair was filthy, and the room had a wired smell. It's really sad to be treated like this when some are so loyal to the brand. We don't  expect Marriott to give such kind of services.

It was a nice experience in staying in Marriott... I'm very thankful to you for providing the shelter in this harmful situation... All staff members are very kind and glad and even helpful too... Punctual cab service... I'm very glad to have such a good and peaceful experience..
Great stay with Excellent service from all the staff, good options of food..Reception peoples are vary polite and helpful always. Thanks to Mr Hitesh who taking care of transportation always ready to help.i will recommended this hotel to other peoples as well.
Very courteous staff, pleasant environment. And value for money pricing for food and rooms.
Nicely furnished room, with the regular amenities .

I stayed in the hotel for 3 nights, last week. My room was very spacious.

Was very impressed with the hotel's service. The staff was polite, warm, hospitable, and always smiling. Located in city center, easy access to transport.

As you would expect from a Marriott hotel brand, food quality is excellent.

There is a live chat counter for dinner & gathiya, fafda (local items) for breakfast.

My special thanks go out to Chef Manoj ji & Chef Anil ji for their kind courtesies regarding my dinner food. I was served local dinner i.e. dhokli nu saak during my stay at the hotel by them. I enjoyed trying local food, thanks to them.

I'd definitely stay here again. Those traveling to Ahmedabad and to this location will enjoy the hotel.

The service was good but the rooms weren't, especially when this hotel is minutes away from Fortune.
My observation was that this property employs freshers from hotel management institutes at the front desk. They aren't trained well to service those customers who choose this property expecting Marriott standards.

Pathetic service. Did not have food at the restaurant though breakfast was included, as they made me get up twice mentioning that tables were reserved, though there were many empty tables. Not worth the price. Power went off in room twice as plug points tripped while charging. Overall not worth the rates. Would not recommend stay in this particular Marriott hotel, if one is accustomed to Marriott level of service.

PATHETIC EXPERIENCE!👎👎👎👎 I won't suggest this to anyone.
If anyone is planning a family/ wedding/ engagement function with them, please don't. The manager there Mr. Tushar and his team is not at all trustworthy. I am repeating the name "TUSHAR". I was planning my wedding there, everything was decided, quotes, food, rooms. We were about to the payments but when we called these people gave the dates to some one else without even once calling and informing. The excuse they gave was that it was a technical glitch from the system, even after being in touch with them everyday. We didn't got a single call or message from these people. They are clearly running that hotel for business and not to build a customer relationship.

This is a very predictable property. No frills. Very expected rooms.

The property seemed to be very old now but still very functional. No complaints. Everything worked. Breakfast spread was ok and the staff was very helpful.

The rooms are predictable small and are designed for business travellers. The rooms are too small for a family.
