Hotel was comfortable  and clean. Room was above average for the size. Clean linen good AC. It can do with some updates but overall it was delightful to stay. Now the staffing. Well they made me feel so comfortable and pampered. Spending only 2 days and 1 night this place merits a longer stay. The experience of hospitality was amazing and I have stayed  at Marriott properties globally. The food took Indian cuisine to another level. Chai at breakfast OMG. Yes this is one for a return visit.

One of the poorly maintained and managed properties. Doesnt deem fit to be rated as a 3 star property.
1. Rooms: Extremely dingy, small and poorly decorated.
2. Bathrooms: almost non-existent, its a tight closet that would be difficult for some people to even use.
3. Check-In process: Average, but staff blames "technology" for key failures. Faced issues 6 times in a 2 day stay period. Responlse always was "tech issue, will get solved in a few months" @@@
4. Food: This was worse than a road-side dhaba where we get quality. Bland and completely tasteless food. Egg was claimed as non-vegetarian food. Chicken biryani seemed to be made as an after thought with chicken pieces put over pre-cooked rice. If there was a negative rating, the highest negative rating for food.
5. Service: Way behind in service levels. Case: A friend in the hotel walked into her room to find 5 people sitting on the bed and chair and chatting! This is a RED FLAG. She did not want to get into a hassle so she politely asked them to leave. Its a RISK.
6. Banquet: Attitude of Manager was over the top, customer last was his philosophy and on the second day at the banquet Tea and Coffee were served with sugar, on being asked for without sugar option, it was informed that its not available and you need to drink with sugar or avoid it.
7. Staff behaviour: pleasant and humble at Gate, Checkin, Check Out.
8. Room Service: can improve by 80% missed orders, refusing to put the tab to room and delays were some highlights.
9. Overall: I would say unless you are left with no alternative, avoid.

This was not a value for money stay.
#Poor #CustomerService #WorstExperience

I've just had a wonderful experience at this hotel. The staff were fabulous in understanding my disability and my gluten intolerance issues. The manager Raza, made sure that my physical situation was catered for. He even personally buttoned my sleeve buttons as my nerve damage prevents me from using single hand for this. The head chef, Lal Singh, not only fully understands gluten intolerance issues, but he went that extra mile to muster up some very tasty dishes for me. That was very much appreciated as was the smiling faces of restaurant staff in catering for the extra attention my physical situation demands. Thank you all. See you again in September.
Terrible service and most of the staff cannot communicate properly.  The worst part is they have kept fruits in the room and I found it rotten.

Highly Dissapointed with the service levels - checked in at 11pm and had to wait to get the room keys as   room was not ready , they are struggling with staff shortage and things taking longer den patience level . Bedsheet with stains all over , asked thrice to change it and the new one too was with stains only ( pic attached)  Refrigerator is kept as a show piece , not working and as a result my insulin ( life saving drug for diabetics) is out of whack . Highly recommend not to stay here as one can get enough options in this price range in the area . Extremly sad experience.

Hopeless staff, rooms are like OYO rooms and they are charging 5000… not even worth of 1500 rs….who asks for advance payment  even after booking through their sales team.. Restaurant Ac is not working, told the manager twice and he is not even bother… had to wait for Roti for 20 mins, no soup bowls on counter, no plates for deserts on counter…. No live food counter,  food quality is not good..1st room ac was not working…. No one is bother to come and check … they are giving false commitments and no one turned up even after 25 mins.. got second room at 11:15 pm even after doing the checkin at 8:50 pm

Very small rooms where one extra bed also doesn’t fit properly. They only provide mattress on the floor for extra bed which I have seen first time in any hotel till date.

Breakfast was of good quality and with many options.

The staff was too good and welcoming. As we were arriving late they even kept their restaurant open for us. But The ambience, the rooms at present are ridiculous. We changed our room twice. The carpets are dirty patched. Not worth a Marriott at all. We 4 families visited in August 2021 for a night stay. The basins were choked. Absolutely not good.

Definitely recommend a visit and stay here.
The food specially Tandoor, Chinese & dessert section is delicious.
Mr. Shivraj and team has always been on top of their toes to offer delicious food & also honour special requests.
Loved the stay.

The good thing about the hotel was that the staff were always trying to be accommodating.
But I have to mention things that they badly fell out for,
1. Absolutely no hot water in the toilets, left me and my husband scrambling and freezing by 4 AM before we left for a pilgrimage.
2. They were kind enough to step up and pack  a breakfast for the 2 of us, 1 mayonnaise sandwich cut into 4 for me and my husband.
Definitely never staying in this property, because of my experience!

Rooms are ok not too big not too small.

There's no valet parking facility, no bell boy to carry your luggage.

You need to inform prior whether you are travelling solo or a couple. Or else they will charge you extra if you fail to inform later.

In breakfast, items are limited as compared to other Marriott hotels.

Cafe staff are helpful and supportive.

Have a limited menu for dining in the room.

The five star rating is only because of the staff especially Mr. Subhrata and the lady at the reception.The property is not upto the level of Marriott standards.

The staff is polite, friendly and never said no and are very accommodating. Very very helpful. I did not remember the inclusions with my booking.  Rooms were upgraded without asking. When I asked about late check out, the lady at reception promptly replied that it was already part of package. No hassles whatsoever. A 500 rupees food voucher was already included although I did not remember it.  The breakfast spread was excellent. The coffee was excellent and I still feel I should have had one more cup. No problems at all with the variety or taste. I was skeptical reading previous reviews and I must say that they have really worked hard on their breakfast menu. Excellent.
The decor is minimalistic which works fine with me. But all my family members felt that the decor was just average, nothing like a Marriott property. But I must add that the room charges are also quite low compared to Marriott property. It's a steal deal.
The rooms sizes are good but the bed sizes are not. The bed sizes are not standard queen. We had 2 adults and small kid in 2 rooms and we did not fit the bed. I conveyed the same to Mr. Shubrata and we were offered complimentary extra mattresses. Another great gesture but I hope the management pays attention to the bed size and does something about it. The washroom enclosure is separated from room by a glass partition which is translucent and I was not comfortable with it. For most people it may not be an issue but it was an issue for me.
Also there is lot of delay in room service and from housekeeping guys despite several reminders. I think there is definitely shortage of staff.
But I must add the staff at Fairfield by marriott is an asset. I hope the management is listening. All the staff members are polite and helpful. I know I am repeating but they really made my day. I must also add that makemytrip gave an excellent deal for this hotel.
Rooms are very old and need urgent renovation

Visited ahemdabad a lot of times but This has been one of the best experiences. The hotel was spotlessly clean and comfortable. The room was reasonable size and was appealing.  Everything in the room was modern and was well taken care of. We really enjoyed the fresh and tasty breakfast with a good variety of dishes.
The housekeeping staff and other staff of the hotel was Really friendly and helpful in all the ways. They also guided us with the near by market. Really had a good stay!

Not at Marriott level at all. Basic redone rooms to meet what I am sure are standards but no ac in lobby and the air conditioning in room was also pathetic. I stayed on a redemption and got charged which is happening for the first time so don’t know if theres a change in policy. 2/3 star experience with the Fairfield brand name.

Food is ok. We went for dinner.
Dinner Buffet - 1150 Per Person.

You could get a BOGO offer from Easy Diner Application + Additional Rs 1000 Off if you pay the bill via Easy Diner

I booked a 1 Night Stay from Goibibo in June. It was an amazing experience.

The staff at the Reception Counter is very humble and helpful.

I am Jain so when i reached Cafe of The Hotel for Dinner i informed them of Pure Jain food and they specially made jain Sabji and Naan for me as at that time there was no other Jain Customer there.

Also food was so delicious and yummy 😋

SUPERIOR QUEEN BED ROOM was so neat & clean.

Also it has some facilities like Locker, Small Refrigerator, Work Desk with Revolving Chair, Table Lamp and Sofa and Chair for Relaxation.

Tv has almost all channels access.

Also connect to wifi is Just 1 QR code scan.

Some Coffee, Tea, Sugar also available for Self made in room.

The gym was also neat and clean in the hotel and we can access it anytime we want.

The stay was comfortable. What made it even better was Mr Raza at the front desk. He ensured that we had a a comfortable stay with no issues at all.

One gem of a person. Would be visiting again!
Worst place. Dirty linen. Staff not serious. Worst hotel to stay. Never ever visit or stay here. This hotel is spoiling the marriot name. It fits to be called a local lodge. Bad experience..

Absolutely terrible service, the bathroom was leaking. The towels were not clean, the room services was terrible, we asked for a weighing machine they said it will take time, we asked for someone to take bags they said they are busy!
The rooms are not very spacious, good breakfast spread. There's not much of a reception but front office guy is polite. It's a no frills, basic hotel
Nice hotel experience! Impeccable service, comfortable rooms, and a prime location. Recommend for a wonderful stay!"

Most disorganised, irresponsible, unfriendly customer attitude of the back end folks. I had book a room for last minute travel, from the checking for availability till i got the invoice ( after 2days of checkout) it was painful experience. No one answers the phone, no proper instructions of the payment, no confirmation is given even after paying immediately. Makes us feel like iam dealing with some govt guest house.
Really horrible experience!

It was a pleasure staying at your Hotel - the staff at the receptionist counter were very young but very professional, Mature & handled counter gentally & professionally.They were very helpful and attended to all our needs (Our special thanks to 2 cute girls and a good looking guy).
Great hospitality, food was nyc. Nice ambience and well maintained environment.Excellent view of greenry. Rooms are well maintained and clean🥰

Pathetic experience overall. Most of the staff behave like they are favoring guest by talking to them.
Check in: No one to take out luggage from  the cab at the time of check in.
Room: Was given a smelly and dirty room (carpet full of red spit spots), when asked to change, was given even worse room. When I asked reception, they said they don't have any rooms available.
Service and behavior: In evening I used auto rickshaw to come in to hotel and it was stopped outside by security. I did not find it written anywhere that rickshaws are not allowed (if it were, I would like to know why). I asked security to call manager and he called front desk person  (Gautam), who did not bother to move from his place and asked security to tell me, auto rickshaws are not allowed. This guy did not even ask security if I was a new guesr for check in and asked him to direct me to his desk. If someone comes to hotel to check in with luggage then they may have to drag all their luggage from outside thw hotel. And the moment you try to ask questions- they would tell you please don't shout.
Wouldn't recommend to anyone.
Rooms are okayish and food could've been better. Added all three meals to my plan and didn't like any of it much, below expectations.
We have a business meeting every week. The arrangement is a bit poor. The pencils provided are not sharpened. This was embarassing for us with many members complaining not able to write notes.

It's a nice hotel. Nice rooms. The service was good. The staff at the reception was friendly and courteous. Food is also good. The breakfast buffet was great. The only problem was that though the tea in the rooms is nice but the one served in the restaurant along with breakfast needs considerable improvement.

Best hotel for night stay in Ahmedabad. Indian cricket team usually stay in this hotel. Staff behaviour was very polite and kind. Everything was systematic. Food was lightly costly. EV charging station is also available i parking area.

Satisfied with all services. Must visit.
The room size is small, and their bed size is also small compared to a normal bed. If you are traveling with kids, don't prefer yet the hotel is quite good with a decent breakfast and atmosphere.

I had a pretty good time there.
Particularly, the cake was truly amazing, and I respect your talent.

And the flavour was excellent.

I sincerely appreciate all of your work.

Special Thanks to Chef  manoj Bishat

Good for economical stays for short business trips. Very helpful and polite staff.

Rated 4 instead of 5 as -
- For some odd reason the lobby stank during mornings
- And the building could do with a small refresher

Great value for money business hotel. Rooms are clean, functional and sufficient but needs slight improvment I.e.  hot water needs to provide in the morning. Comfortable bed and adequate lighting through window. Overall nice
experience. Good service given by vipin pandey.
The staff is very friendly.Neat rooms.They have really good breakfast.Would recommend it 100%.
Very good place for family staying. Nice experience.. rooms was very clean and good maintained..

Overall a great experience at the hotel - most amazing thing was the staff. Staff was polite and courteous. Helped throughout the stay. They were very responsive. Kitchen staff especially Sindhu had been a great help

Excellent thoughts for accessories for aged people/differently abled people in the bathroom

Slight improvement points:
- Clean room carpets and make it better. Wasn't balanced across the floor.
- Hotter food (breakfast food items were cold on first day. Parathas not much fresh)
- Curtains in shower would be a great add
- Chair legs are very sharp, led to brazed foot. Had holes in cover and uncomfortable.

I have stayed in a lot of Marriott properties over the years. This one doesn't top in any lists. It is a regular hotel. Service in the restaurant especially is very slow. Location is good as it is close to the riverfront and the Sabarmati ashram.
Its very good hotel and rooms all very clean ...hotel staff is very frndly ✨ ... must visit ❤️

Very good hotel…. Conveniently located, staff was incredibly helpful right from security at entry, checkIn process, HK and restaurant. The best part was food you get … loved it! Highly recommended 👍 …
Great experience overall to an amazing place. Great rooms.. cleanliness and courteous staff.
Not great rooms. Very old feel. While I just stayed for the night didn't complain much but won't stay here again.
Happened to stay for a night only to catch an early morning flight. Room was ok. Could be better. No AC in passages. Staff was courteous and cooperative.

I called hotel for taking corporate rates and I was routed to Mr.Tushar Acharya on no. ending with 6670 who takes care of reservation. He shared me the rates and immediately disconnected the call within 1min 2secs without even being courteous as I wanted to ask more details like mail id for confirming the reservation. Its seems like reservation team/management is not interested in growing their business.

I was just a visitor there because I was invited by Vatsal Santoki for some business discussion based on IoT and Blockchain (Cryptocurrency). I liked the concept of selling Chips on MRP and they have open green cafe named Baithak which really made me comfortable. I am impressed by the culture of this hotel.

Staff at the reception are not trained. Rooms are not that worthy to pay so much, instead i would stay in a 3star hotel. WAshrooms are really in a bad condition. Health club is literally very small that 5 person cannot workout.
Breakfast is not so good.

Stayed here for 2 nights on Business visit. I understand that Fairfield is budget/economy range by Marriott but this doesn't even live upto that. I will jus highlight few points
- Toiletries are provided in those bulk bottles fixed on wall. I guess this is part of cost cutting which is fine but the quality should match the name Marriott. It does not
- Strange placement of liquid soap and moisturizer pump bottles behind Toilet seat and no soap at basin.
- towels provided were quite used up.
- No hook/rack to keep towel in shower area
- both bed side electrical sockets didn't work.
- stayed in 507

- Breakfast spread was good and service at breakfast was good too.

Hope Marriott works on the issues mentioned above.

It was a bad experience. Room wasn't ready, wasn't cleaned properly. And inspire of repeated requests, nothing was done. Then instead of accepting her (the lady at the front desk) mistake, she started arguing us!! Disappointed!!!!!
The staff was REALLY welcoming and super helpful, I felt at home. I would definitely recommend Fairfield by Marriott to anyone looking for a place to stay in Ahmedabad.

Went to this hotel in a chapter of BNI. This hotel is good for brunch. Brunch was good. Roses were quite good in that too. Wet used to melt when put in the mouth. There were three types of Dhosa and Darvada. Dosa was made hot at the live counter. But the cook used to make dosa very slowly. Everything else was in perfect order.
Room is dirty... carpet full of stains, no menu... location a bit remote. Not worth as 4 stars. Breakfast was good.
Ashram Road Ahmedabad ni best suprb hotel and bahar je dinner ni vyavastha tena dinner tatha Mr Tushar Acharya , DOS ek hotelier tarike nu management pan kabile Tarif che....
Apparently the best hotel in town! Clean and cool inside, rich breakfast menu. Local and continental dishes. Nice service. Even a modest fitness room is upstairs!

I was put up in this hotel by my client. The distance from the airport is almost 16 kms, so brave yourselves for a long ride.
One good thing about the placement is it's right at the foot of the  highway so quick access to it.
The check in process was smooth and quick. Room was very neat and clean, spcious as well.
They have a gym and pool service with restaurants and room services. I could not eat the restaurant so nothing to say about the food.

Excellent hotel and very courteous people.
Food was awesome.
We had a family dinner her and overall feel and experience was over and above expectations.
Customers were also delighted and shared a good feedback.
I'll recommend this to business travelers.

I recently stayed at Fortune Select SG Highway in Ahmedabad and had a wonderful experience. The hotel's modern amenities and comfortable rooms made my stay truly enjoyable. The staff were friendly and courteous, always willing to help.
The location was perfect for my business needs, with easy access to the highway.
The food at the hotel's restaurant was delicious and diverse. The rooms were clean and well-maintained, with all necessary amenities.

Overall, I highly recommend Fortune Select Highway for business or leisure travel.
My stay was truly memorable, and I look forward to returning soon."

Quite a decent experience at Fortune. Rooms are superb, the services were good and the stay was comfortable. I would particularly like to mention Chetan, Shivani, Iti at the Zodiac restaurant for taking care of  our specific culinary needs. Unfortunately, I missed their interesting buffet because that was off for the days we lodged. Better luck next time.

The food was good, a bit on the spicier side but the service was slow and that messed it up for us. The cooling from the air conditioner was overpowering and there was nothing to fix it from where we sat. Rating 3.5 for the food, 2.5 for the service and 4 for the location.

I had a fantastic stay at Fortune Select SG Highway, Ahmedabad! The staff was exceptionally courteous, helpful and respectful, making sure every need was met with a smile. From Belldesk to reception to housekeeping to restuarant staff - their dedication to providing top-notch service was evident and greatly appreciated.

The hotel embodies the vibrant culture and warm hospitality of Ahmedabad. Every interaction and detail added to the comfort of my stay. Highly recommended for anyone looking to experience the true spirit of Ahmedabad with unmatched hospitality.

Thanks Team 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

Pathetic service.
I will definitely be going to brief it here, today 30th October,I visited the fortune select restaurant named zodiac, just to refresh the evening to have a cup of coffee or tea(beverages). I have ordered one hot chocolate and one cappuccino. As we went there, they said there is no cafe zone and the restaurant can serve the beverages, so we sat and ordered. As soon as we went the restaurant manager started taking the staff review which seems like more importance rather than customer service. Then the order arrived in a simple ghar ka coffee mug with dirty stains in the mug, the hot chocolate tasted like bournvita and the colour is light coffee colour, it was so horrible. The cappuccino was pathetic in a taste. I called the staff n said simply that I have many experiences of taste in hot chocolate as I love having in different places so I know the taste and preparation very well, I said the staff that this is not at all a hot chocolate n she said nei aisa hi hota hai , I said ok see this is so pathetic and bournvita ka taste hai toh  I can't have it so pls take it from here n thank you it's okay. After such a pathetic service we were sitting there for one hour still that time the review is going on they discussed the matter there with all the staff and we were looking at them, but not a single restaurant staff or the Manager came to ask us what happened. And the staff member, one of the girl staff commented from their ki unko bolo khud hi bana le something like this, and mangar with staff laughing. Wowwww so cool of the staff, sorry to say the service ,the food, the coffee, the hot chocolate was pathetic, horrible and wastage of money. I will say the hotel management to look into this kind of service and pls try to attend the customer first and do your important meeting somewhere else in the hotel ( in such a big hotel). It seems like the staff of the restaurant didn't bother customer needs or service, so bad.
Horrible and this is my last visit.

Hi Fortune,
Very disappointed buffet dinner and one of worst i had in my life.
From welcome drink to starters everything was so below average.
Starters were served cold and we opted for non veg buffet dinner but as expected was not up to the mark.
Female Staff that were attending us were very unprofessional laughing and talking so loudly all the time.
What they offered from food to hospitality everything was so below par and not accepted from the brand like this.
Not recommended to anyone
The worst part is that they will respond by a reply of sorry for inconvenience and that's all. That's how it works all the time with these so called big brands one simple sorry for inconvenience message and matter closed.
Regards,
Unsatisfied Customer
The stay at hotel was fantastic.  Hospitality is so good. Specially deeksha madam and dharam sir
Very good service and nice staff....will recommend others to come here for tasty food.....firoz bhai the good person who always stud for us in service
I am editing my review after my second stay. The service is the best. Delectable food.
I always come here on Sundays for dinner with my wife and kid. This place serves delicious food and service is the best. We love the vibes here. So nice and quiet.
Went for Zodiac restaurant. Great food, service and ambience. We were served a good hospitality experience of Rakhi.

We enjoyed food yesterday, party at Zodiac!
Great experience

The housekeeping management department was excellent. Debu and Anjali were very helpful and provided immediate support for provide toiletries  and clean the room experience line I have checkin again in the room everything was very perfectly maintained with exceptional hospitality.

Nice ambience. Food is good and buffet is great in qty but not is taste and options. The desserts are nice. The salad needs improvement. Food overall is great. If you love to take your family friends for one in a time gathering the restaurant is the best place to be at.

I recently stayed at this hotel and wanted to share my experience. While overall it was a pleasant stay, there were a few areas that could be improved.

Firstly, the hotel reception's response time was not as quick as expected. When I called and requested a call back once the room was ready, I was informed that it would take approximately 1 hour. However, I received the call after around 4 hours, which was a longer wait than anticipated.

Secondly, I encountered some issues with the room service. I requested a towel and had to wait for approximately 24 minutes before it was delivered. The lack of promptness affected my schedule, causing me to be late for breakfast. Additionally, due to the delay, I was unable to fully enjoy the breakfast as it was about to end.

On a positive note, I must commend the hotel for their breakfast spread. It offered a variety of options and the quality of the food was good.

In conclusion, while the hotel had its shortcomings in terms of reception response time and room service efficiency, the breakfast experience was enjoyable with a wide selection of dishes. I hope that the hotel takes these points into consideration and works towards improving their responsiveness and service efficiency for a better overall guest experience.

Excellent Experience
I stayed for 3 days for business meeting and staffs were too cooperative and supportive.
Rooms are spacious with all the required facilities.
Food is just awesome, they have varieties, specially sweet & salad sections was decorated good. Food was also delicious in taste.
It was an nice experience. its been great staying There go checkout this hotel.

We came here for only a night stay. The hotel was described as a 4-star hotel but didn’t feel like that in any way. The room we were given was very dirty. The toilet was not cleaned properly and the tables and lamps had a lot of dust on it. We had to ask them to change the room, upon which they said they would upgrade us which they didn’t. The second room was a bit cleaner but still not upto the mark.

The service wasn’t very well as well.

Wouldn’t recommend it.
Experience the food carnival going on their... taste was real dhabba style... ambience was excellent... would like to visit again... 💯 % recommendation …

Had a 2 night stay here and it was a really good experience, The location is pretty good as it's peaceful and quiet.

The staff was really friendly and accommodating, they were quite responsive to any query.

My stay included breakfast for both days, and it was just amazing, the quality and taste of the food were great. There were a plethora of options available to choose from.

The few little nit picks i can do was, for some reason the bathroom (shower area) could have been a bit cleaner.

The view from the room i got was not anything to write home about, but i won't consider this a deal breaker.

Overall a great experience, would surely recommend.
Food is good but not satisfied as a dinner we can't go there for buffet
Best location and best food by hotel I like it ....

The hotel is currently undergoing some renovations. Which will come in affect as the noises will jarr your stay for sure.
The staff are somewhat not in sync with the hospitality sometimes. Our room wasn't ready. The power plugs of the suite wasn't working well. They need to really take better maintenance and care of the place. It's a good place to stay in but I won't come in again until they take better care of their guests. The restaurants are nice.

Previously experienced dining at Dravida, which was good. Now, I tried light afternoon snacks at Zodiac. The service was good, and the presentation and taste were as per liking.
I would love to try their buffet at Zodiac as it looked delicious.
Over all good experience,staff is very helpful and courteous. Location is also good, good options in Breakfast and dinner. Chef is also good.l, they customize dishes if any thing you need to change.
Nice ambience, food is good... Had lunch there...

We had a fab experience at this property. Stayed here for 2 nights. Our room was upgraded to their Club room category. The in room dine service was top notch and the food was great too. They accommodated the breakfast for my wife in our room as she was not well.

Check-in was not a very pleasant experience. Every individual guest should have right to obtain a room key ( not to have fight for it)
Staff in the breakfast area not well trained they lacked common knowledge too. Not really their fault it is the responsibility of the hotel group. The waitresses working in the same dinning area during lunch were completely incapable of good or adequate service as all (3) got the order wrong.
Received very good service by ‘Chef’ Rajat
Also another member of management who me I did not take name was very helpful kind & concerned about my health. On the whole -
Adequate training is all that is needed in comparison to hotels in Mumbai Delhi Bangaluru etc.

This is one of the worst 5 star hotels I have ever stayed at and is a clear miss from a chain as grand as ITC.

The lobby is very small and lacks grandeur. Seating only for 6-8 people in a small alleyway (which they call as lobby). In a 5 Star hotel, I would expect some good air-freshners, welcome drinks and more vibrant and creative space. This is purely a 3 star hotel lobby.

The rooms were okay. The linen was very dirty with patches and spots on multiple locations. The AC only works if you request them to call an engineer. Bathroom had urine stains from previous guests. In a 5 star property, they should keep a separate shampoo and conditioner, but here they just mix it in a dispenser. The bed is super light and even some movements makes it move meters.

Breakfast is decent with an acceptable spread compared to a 4 star. They labeled Pain-Au-Chocolat as a crossiant. Live Paratha they would only serve one variety which is not a feature of a 5 star.

Overall this hotel is just inappropriate for a 5star and more of a 3 star.

The rooms are spacious.. Bathroom need renovation, especially the washbasin and the toilet bowl had stains due to aging. Renovation was on,.so couldn't explore more.
Staff were good, can improve, especially at the front desk. Restaurant was beautiful, staff, especially Nikhil was friendly and always ready to help.
My stay was wonderful, city view is beautiful from the room, room service by Sumit is excellent (Housekeeping)

We had a bad experience and didn't find this hotel very nice. Rooms were very old, dirty floors and furniture with stains and spots on the coffee table and  overall outdated. Not what a 5 star hotel should look like. Wouldn't stay here again or recommend anyone to do so.

Amazing service, staffs are very polite and quick. They welcomed with fruits in the room.
The only thing when i visited that time renovation was going on as Fern Hotel is overtaken by ITC group hence, the rooms and outer area was not that much clean, but i am sure they will complete this in within a month.
The dining experience was good in terms of ambiance. The food tasted okay especially the soup that tasted very poor. The varieties of the salads and desserts are available.

The hotel staff was very generous. But the stay was bad. Definitely not coming back or recommending it to any one. The bed linens and towels were not clean. I got bed bug bites all over my leg. The property was filled with mosquitoes all over. This was the second visit. Last visit I had raised an issue with food and the same was reminded by me at the time of arrival. But there was no improvement. Even the basic tea was not made properly!!
A big NO for my next stay.

Hotel location is good . Previously it was fern not its fortune . Rooms are renovated . Food is good . Gym needs to be upgraded . Staff is good . Specifically Mr Sahil from Front desk operation . Recommend

Awesome hotel, we booked just because of name but the Hotel surprised us
Great rooms
Awesome staff everywhere and wow service
The food is good
Breakfast was great and altogether a great experience

•Good spacious rooms with 5 star amenities
•Service staff for rooms and restaurant were upto expected standards
•Breakfast spread was quite good which included cold cuts, indian, oriental, desserts along with multiple healthy drink options
•Dinner buffet was delicious with; lot of options
•Good location, easily accessible.. Palladium mall within walking distance.

**The exterior of the hotel was going through a renovation during our stay hence the bamboos outside the window in the picture.

The rooms are huge, and it helped that they bumped me up to club room as a free upgrade. Very classy and airy. Great food, good service. Ankita on the front desk was very helpful but overall, the entire team waa a delight.

We are pleased to know that you enjoyed your stay, especially the service provided by the hotel team. Thank you for your recognition of their efforts and it does inspire us to keep raising our levels of service through innovation and understanding our guests even more.

We have always said that our people are our most important asset, and your favourable comments confirm that belief.

I do hope that you will visit us again and look forward to welcoming you back.
Mr. Atharv thank you for helping me for three night stay is very comfortable am impressed ur service and thank u to all front desk staff...thank you to atharv ...🤗

Just back from Ahmedabad and enjoyed the hospitality of Fortune Select SG

Food is Good
Restaurant Staff is excellent and supportive (mentioning Shravani, Iti, Aniket and others were all very helpful)

Property is ageing and needs upkeep. Dustbins, accessories around washbasin, shower

Housekeeping Department is slow, please pull it up

We had pleasant stay and recommend Fortune Select SG

The place is advertised as a 5 star hotel but it's not even close to 2 stars. The management of the hotel has to really step up if they want travellers from overseas to stay at their hotel.  The staff here is very lovely, friendly and helpful however there have been a number of issues : 1. We had booked accommodation for 1 person accidentally and then corrected it for 2 persons. We had a confirmation via an email from the hotel that they had noted the change but when we checked in, the person at the reception didn't accept the email and charged us extra for 7 nights. 2. Cleanliness is a zero for the hotel - there was mold all over in the bathroom, some walls in the room and broken tiles, we had to make a request to change the room. 3. We were moved to another room but the bathroom and even the toilet is pretty disgusting in terms of cleanliness. 4. The soap in the dispenser ran out - housekeeping does not even check the supplies; we had to ask for soap and were given a really tiny soap bar between 2 people - I called the help desk and asked them to fill up the dispenser, I had to tell them I felt uncomfortable asking for soap 5. The hair dryer was broken, we had to ask twice to replace it. 6. There was no milk in the fridge to make coffee/ tea 7. The rooms are old, there is no effort to renovate the rooms or even keep them clean to a basic level 8. The cupboard does not even have enough space to keep your belongings 9. The linen on the bed is old and the bed is not comfortable. 10. We had to ask to replace the fridge in the room twice, even then - the fridge was not cold enough. There could be a number of issues that were identified and hard to list everything in one but the hotel management can absolutely not advertise it as a 5 star hotel, it's almost fake advertising.

The staff at this property are all great! They all go above and beyond to make your stay comfortable, The food is so amazing and delicious, it was great. This is the perfect hotel for a weekend. The best hotel I’ve everyone been privileged enough to stay at. Gorgeous building. Property is clean Overall, I had a great experience. Must try zodiac restaurant having lots of variety with amazing test.

ITC Narmada, Ahmedabad is architecturally inspired by the stepwells of Gujarat, and the traditional ‘toran’ gateways adorn its façade. The hotel is a glowing celebration of the culture, arts, and crafts of the region. Certified as Gujarat’s first LEED Platinum hotel, ITC Narmada, with its prime location, luxurious facilities, as well as ITC Hotels’ renowned warmth and repertoire of signature services, endeavours to make each stay a memorable one.

Most luxurious stay and best hospitality. Best experience with sk aktar with good hospitality. Excellent food and restaurants. Tasty yummy food with best ambiance. Top most for luxury hotels and stay

Really loved the property as they have incorporated the heritage of Guajrat in the decor and ambience. Staff was very courteous. I would definitely recommend the stay here

To Be honest this is not @ all 3 Star also.
It’s just Corporate Business Hotel. If people book for family I will Recommend please don’t Book. Worst Experience from this Hotel.
In Night their Air conditions Gets low from everywhere lobby, Rooms everywhere.
My 8th floor lobby Ac was not in working.
Yeah Their Staff valet Parking Morning Guy and Security Morning Guy were Humble and Good Nature and helpful For Directions and many more.
But overall Experience was Worst Sorry just coz of location I am giving 4 otherwise I won’t.
Good place for the solo and office travel people

Being welcomed at Fortune Select lets you feel like part of the family.

Friendly staff are always ready to help. A great selection of food from their restaurant. You are in for a treat, from starters through to desert.

Bathroom facilities can do with an upgrade and a good cleanup. All and all, Fortune Select makes a great stay.

I didnt like the way they kept packed snacks , chocolates , juices and sodas in the room which was to be paid for  after you take it . . . Those things should be kept  on complimentary otherwise no need to keep in the rooms . . .as per the price of the rooms you should give as complimentary

Loved this hotel in terms of room size, food taste & buffet spread.
Outdoor seating is there besides zodiac restaurant.

I liked the smart remote systems to operate  curtain, lights & ac.

I want to mention once again for Food. Taste is really amazing and you won’t be disappointed even if you are only vegetarian.

Overall it is an excellent experience. Here people very nice. Food and service are excellent.
Thanks

Samar K. Das., Senior Professor, University of Hyderabad

We went for a team dinner of 50 people with our client who came from UK - the place is dull, staff is cold, nobody treated us at entrance, asked about feeding room at reception and the guy went on the call without answering.

Food quality is cheap, many of our staff including the client got sick - when we called them about this, their answers were lame like “we had this many other ppl, nobody complained”.

Definitely not going there again and not recommended

My personal belonging got stole in my absence during my stay dated 04-July- 05-july.
On 4th July I checked in the hotel room 710 and on 5th morning I left my suitcase in the room, when I got back I noticed someone had entered my room without any notice.

Its looks like housekeeping staff had entered in my room through Master key to clean the room. But when I checked my suitcase, my footwear was missing. It was a new one from a reputed brand.
I don’t understand if I haven’t requested to clean my room how can they enter in my private room where I have kept my personal stuff in my absence.

Who is going to take responsibility for our personal items if we left in our room during our stay?
Aren’t we supposed to leave our suitcase and items in the hotel room?
If our items are not safe in the hotel room then why would I take hotel?

In addition, when I raised complaint on front desk, they didn’t bother. Noone had taken this seriously they were super negligent☹🤔😡😡😡😡
This is really disappointing ☹
I never expected this from an alleged hotel. This incident has spoiled my stay in your hotel.😡😡😡😡

This hotel requires a massive overhaul. The staff is super slow and ignore guest calls. The linen and towels were visibly dirty. Even the basic things in the washroom needs urgent maintenance. Not sure how they claim to be a 5 star hotel.

The only reason they get 2 stars is for the quality of the food at their Garden Cafe Restaurant. Their management must look into the day today maintenance of the place. Lastly, they follow a new system, their staff checks the mini-bar everyday. Never seen anything like that. Massive scope for improvement!

Hotel exceeded my expectations was spotless the staff was amazing especially  ARJUN , he is very polite and his service was commendable. Lovely hotel with a wonderful restaurant and food quality was too good . Very friendly staff. Hotel is Just a charming place, must visit .

I recently had the pleasure of staying at a luxurious hotel in Ahmedabad, and I must say that my experience exceeded all expectations. From the moment I entered the hotel's grand lobby, I was greeted with warm hospitality and a sense of elegance that permeated every corner of the property.

One of the class hotels of The Fern, Hotel is well equipped with all facilities, standards and services of a 4 Star Hotel. The rooms are comfortable, cozy and spacious. The hotel is having 9 floors, there garden cafe serves 24*7 and also morning buffet, which serves you plenty of choices from continental to Indian desi breakfast. Hotel also having Two more resturants One on top floor under the stars and one is Dravida- South Indian Specialised. The staff is friendly and helpful. They also have a specialised and well known massage and spa centre. Overall I had a comfortable and pleasant stay and will recommend it well !!

Good location, rooms were well furnished, looks bit old/used, but overall a good place to stay. Pool was not operational when we went, buy the staff was very friendly made alternative arrangements for our son to enjoy pool at their sister property. Dravidian restaurant there is excellent had dinner there and will certainly go there again for the authentic south indian cusines at this hotel
Wow they are very quick to serve food if you have no time. Very good taste

I like this hotel a lot. It's a value for money budget hotel.
The amenities are good. The staff is courteous and the location is great. It's right in SG highway that makes it convenient for any business traveler to go around conveniently.
This place also serves good food. The resturant Dravida is an authentic South Indian cuisine restaurant which serves great South Indian food.

I visited the restuarant @Nine, it has a spectacular view. The ambience is very soothing. It will pick your mood. The food is great. The live music added to the over all experience. there's one issue the service is a bit slow. I'd suggest to have the food here. The package for candle light dinner is also a viable option.

Very good chic hotel. Although they are not built on a very past area but they have utilized the space very well. All of the rooms are front facing and have full glass view which makes in room view just amazing.

So from every room you get great view of SG highway plus it's bang on that railway bridge
So in evening when sun set, sometimes view is great with trains chugging along and traffic moving along.

Their breakfast is also good. It's not that expansive but collection of food items is just right. Mist of the items they server are fresh
Truly a 5-star experience. Amazing services with lip smacking food. Lot’s of choices in buffet. Got a chance to meet the chef Mr. Rajbahadur who is a nice gentleman and a wonderful cook.

We had company get to gather at The Fern. It  was very good experience. We had also get a place for doing such a fun activities by the management. Service and staff are very cool and take care of each and every guest who come in party. Food is very good in quality and delicious. Some of the dishes you can customized by your own easily and staff and chef were there to make dinner perfect. Happy and enjoyed the evening at this place.

Had a good time during my stay. Everyone was so courteous. Especially in Resturant staff Services rendered by Robin and Joshua make you feel home.
Keep up the good services.

We had amazing short break and a lovely surprise given by my wife on my birthday. Amazing hotel considering environment at every single product they used in the hotel. Not a single place to complain about it. Staff welcoming, valet parking. Breakfast lovely and in evening roof top makes your evening more romantic. We will visit again.

The fortune select is great place to stay in Ahmedabad it's near sg highway well connected with Ahmedabad and nearby locations.....the ambiance is very nice....rooms a comfortable .....food is very good and fresh.... everyday you will get the test traditional Gujarati dish....staff very polite humble and taking care to guest at their best ..... thank you to staff of this hotel to make my stay comfortable and safe..... spacial thank to Ankita and Joshua for taking care all my requirements.....this is only hotel i have stay where customer relationship manager (Ankita) calling at my room and check is everything fine....this is just a small word but it makes difference.....i will prefer to stay here only when ever i am coming to Ahmedabad......

Horrible in 1 word. They claim it as 5 star, i don't feel like giving them even 1 star. Rooms have stains everywhere. Washrooms are worst. Commode has stains. Wash basin is choked. Also the bath area is not properly designed hence the water doesn't dry up easily. Called in room dining for 30 mins, no one bothered to pick up. TVs will have regular channels, no HD channels, no OTT. breakfast is the only good thing about this hotel. The Central Air conditioning doesn't have any control in the room, so even if you switch the AC off, it will be chilling cold in the morning.

Just went here to have breakfast and it was great. I purchased this deal from nearby  and it was worth all penny. There were lots of items and few I didn't try as I was full to have those, so I will definitely try next time. Great hospitality and service. Loved the cheese masala omelette, cheese dosa, paratha. Milkshakes were great. Pastries were worth trying. You must experience breakfast once even if you aren't staying in the hotel. Also the place did had a great view.

In my recent stay, excellent & yummy food. Chef Raj Bahadur is doing magic in veg spread

Very good hotel. Friendly staffs. Food, good spread however, taste is ok compared to other 2 fortune in the city.. Check out process took little late. Otherwise it was nice stay. Good for business travellers 👍

We spent one night in March, we arrived very late and had 2 small children with us, everyone was great! The buffet Dinner was superb, a congratulations to all the hard working staff. It was a real pleasure experience..... Ultimately The Fern in other words... Real Value for Not Money... It's Value of Satisfaction...Love it

Stayed during national games. Overall had wow stay experience from food to rooms every expect gave mesmerising feeling. Breakfast had lots of varities and rooms were spacious with control panels near bed to control all lights air-conditioning and curtains all ere automatic very modern and luxurious room.

The hotel has highly chic and posh ambiance. Rooms are very big, clean, up to date and come with central control unit for the room. Hotel is designed in a way that each room has nice outside view. Staff is very good and helpful specially at dinner. Every other amenity is present here along with a nice restaurant at roof top. Only the food seemed to be overpriced though the taste was good.

First impression & it's Bad impression..

I guess you guys need to get your room standards checked once.

AC - Noisy & doesn't work well for me. Controller machine was beeping all over night 😄

Main Door - Stays open & your housekeeping boys has kept this open 5 times 😅. You can cross check if I have complaint or not.

Bathroom - Check the algae over bathroom curtains.. come on guys.. this is rediculous.

No outside food* this is epic to understand!

Best thing is view from Bedroom window & Breakfast!

It's Not coming next time 😉
Bad experience in hotel We did not like the stops in this hotel because the behavior of all the people was not good especially in the engineering department.

Definitely a great place to stay at when visiting Ahmedabad for business or leisure.
This is probably my 5th visit and stay at The Fern.
Rooms are spacious and clean
Staff is courteous and welcoming
Location of the hotel is good too
Food at Dravida (South Indian restaurant) was delicious. I tried a South Indian styled mutton with appam and it was quiet a delight. Breakfast spread won’t disappoint you either.
For fitness lovers, they do have an indoor pool and fitness Center.
Overall, Fern gets a 5 star on my list :)

Room services is poor, Food and Inroom dining is too pathetic.

Serve wrong food items. Food taste is very poor, I felt that I was styling in 2-3 star hotel

Good Hotel, location on SG Highway and is easily accessible. Around 45 mins from the Airport.
The Hotel is overall decent, rooms are spacious and good as well.
The staff at the reception should be friendlier and better trained. The way they talk even to corporate clients is a bit shocking. The same continues to the restaurant as well. We used the ground floor indoor buffet dinner where the service boys were not sure what to do and how to serve. Wrong plates for service. No change of plates/cutlery. If you tell them to get something, they look at each other. The chat counter chef and the service boy were busy arguing rather than getting the requested dish. No manage r in site to see what is happening at the restaurant.

Overall if you look at the variety on the menu it's amazing, but the taste is disappointing. In dinner the best tasting item was the Papdi chat and the ice cream. Everything else could have been much better. I have been to multiple restaurants of the same grade and this was definitely one of the best in variety but worst in overall taste. We had the same experience in the breakfast as well. I guess overall the chef's are not up to mark.

Apart from that, sleep quality, room maintenance, etc is pretty good.

Better service is expected. The area is cramped, but from inside rooms are big, and everything is well-automated. However, some aging is visible. Service staff can do a better job. Breakfast options are just good enough.

The Hotel is located at a prime location. What i personally liked about this place, they have helped you out of eco guilt, by minimising the use of plastic. Secondly, centralized controls for the lights and curtain shades worked well for me. My only concern was, the hotel had very poor Air conditioner. It was not suffice to cool the room.

This was my 2nd stay in this hotel. Location of the the hotel is good. Front office staff was very helpful as I reached there by early morning flight, they ensured my early check in asap. This time I choose club room that is also highway facing. Spacious room having all basic amenities. Special thanks to house keeping staff who on regular interval asked me for any need. Food was good, breakfast was full of varieties. Overall this stay was perfect and thanks to all the staff members.
We had a pleasant stay at Fortune. Firstly it is quite easily accessible, the service and hospitality is amazing. The breakfast spread is good & very hygienic. The rooms are also quite decent.

I feel next level of experience to stay over here, all staff are well mannered and cooperative.

Specially thanks to @Satender Yadav, Shivani and its manager Ankit, they always taken  care of my choice of food and tried to help us for eat . Also, it's head chef @Prasad taken personally feedback from me and cooked special food for me ensure to I feel, I can eat whatever I want . Finally I just say it's WOW felling to stay here

It was an excellent experience to stay and all facilities like reception, house keeping, room service are very supportive, all staffs also very friendly n responsive in each department. The view from room is the feeling of beauty of nature. Variety of food was also yummy as per our expectations. In short The Fern has given us lots of memorable moments in the beginning of our new journey as couple. It was an amazing feeling to stay in The Fern. Thanks to all....

Hello, The Hotel premises was really big and good. But We travelled From our place to the hotel in 9to10 hours. Everyone was tired. We got a room but its electric card wasn't working so we had spend more  45 mins waiting for the spare card!! Then they assigned us another room, when we opened it it had a lot smoking smell in it and it was used!! Only the food was good!!😐😐😐Even the staff was respectful. Thanks!

Good hotel, professional polite smart staff, food very distinctive and  taste wise one of the best specially their dravida restaurant, feel premiumness as hotel is very tastefully made each book and corner of hotel was a interior Marvel. Overall very good 5 star hotel and had pleasent stay.

Really awesome hotel.... Their concept is an eco friendly hotel so mostly everything in the room is designed with wood, all the way till the soap holder.

Rooms are great. Clean and staff was very courteous. Room service was excellent and prompt.

Bfast was not a disappointing. Wish there were more varieties but was still satisfying.

I'd recommend this hotel to everyone.

My friends stayed for 4 nights with a total cost of 20,000 rupees.
Pros- The staff was courteous and went overboard to make us feel at home. The room was very quiet. The view from the window was good. Cons- The rooms are average quality with the wooden floor chipping off at many spots. The furniture is old and is visibly worn out.  After paying 20,000, they asked us to deposit another 2,000 rupees to cover for any room service that we would avail. I have never seen this anywhere else. I wanted to tell them that if we can afford 20k, we can very well afford to pay for the room service. The breakfast was just ok and nowhere close to the quality we found in the Fern hotel at Chembur Mumbai.

Bottomline- there are better 5-star hotels in Ahmedabad that give better bang for your buck. Skip this!

Efficient and clean.. rooms are warm and soothing. Most stuff is taken care of and if you are returning late night, hungry after a long day at work  and just want a nibble, the in room snacks are at MRP.. Thats a relief and thoughtful. Shows honesty and genuine care for customer comfort i think.Beds are very comfortable and conducive to sound sleep.. :-) Breakfast options are good and all in all a great place to stay.

We went for Dinner at their Zodiac restaurant available in ground floor.
We have not visited for staying so not putting anything for room.

Very good and polite staff.
Good service and enough servicing staff, so once you complete the food of one part, they will take used plates from your table immediately.

The quality of food is very good. Chhota Tarbuch is like mixing of pista katari and gulab jamun, but very very delicious.
Angoor rabdi and jalebi also very tasty.

They are Servicing hot fulka roti and other roti on table.

They have verious types of fresh salads and sweet dishes available, which is not seen in other all such buffet dinner.

Overall experience is very good for us all.

I ate at 'Dravida' which served great food at a little-over-the-worth price. If you're looking for a cheap meal, this is definitely not the place. But the ambience, the food and the staff make it a very good eating experience. The rooftop hotel is good for show but not food. The food is average for very high prices. Not advised to visit

Please increase number of people in you're staff because i have noticed that yesterday night in garden cafe there are 3 4 people who was serving and due to out side and inside sitting they can't manging and we also have to wait for order and query in sitting out side dinning area. Otherwise ambience,food quality, and services is excellent. We enjoyed our dinner. Thank you

I went there for breakfast buffet and the decor there was amazing and the food quality was also really nice. The staff there was cooperative and humble. They had many dishes like shakes, juices, idli, dosa, chole Puri, aloo paratha , waffles , pancakes , dhoklas and much more. The environment and quality was good. Overall a must visit for breakfast lovers.

I have been treated very badly by night manager named Rahul. Yesterday night about 10:30pm i was sitting in garden with my wife and we wanted some soft drink so i came in ask a member of staff to serve outside. Staff said we dont serve outside but u can take it with you. So was taking it outside meanwhile i have been approched by manager with his eyebrow raised and shuted at me and where u taking it n y r u taking it and who is sitting outside etc wuth raised voice tone. He is such an ediot manager dont have manners at all about how to speak to 5* hotel customers. I wont recommend this hotel just because of undertrain staff and specificly manager rahul. I couldent sleep at night as he shouted at me and treated very badly. Its nice hotel and location is good as well. We were enjoying our stay but manager has ruined our stay. And yah i took only  dall makhni with rice and was very salty so i couldent it anything else as my tummy was full, and i have been charged for full meal. I wont recommend this hotel to any1.

Great staff and overall decent quality of food and accommodations. Food is extremely overpriced as is water so I recommend going out locally. Breakfast was included in my package. They have an excellent restaurant on the top floor that you should check out. Staff is really fantastic. The spa downstairs only has one girl that knows what she's doing.

Such a wonderful place i visited during a business meeting The Fern Ahmedabad has a grand lobby and also a spacious banquets for event, one of the best hotel in Ahmedabad where they will provide the best service in terms of food and other services, chef Pandya made a lavish Indian food delicacy during the event . Hotel is very good nice location nice interior overall is very good. Thanks for the nice and warm hospitality.
Specially thanks to Mr.Satyadhar Dubey
He is very polite & great hospitality keep it up..👍👍

We visited for Sunday Morning breakfast. Average experience. Sread was enough. But tastr was not so nice. Not consistent with past visits. Especially indian foods, north n south were not liked. Service guys were good n active but nos. were not enough.
How a simple but creative folding of towel can surprise you and bring a smile when you return to the room after a hectic schedule.
Best food And best Staff management.... Enjoy 😀 Day Sunday Naman, Ankit was very helpful, nice service.

It is one of the best 5* Hotel in Ahmedabad. I visited ZODIAC restaurant with friends for dinner and they gave warm welcome to us. We had dinner and that time hotel Executive Chef Mr. Yash met me and we asked for something special food and he fulfilled our desire with extraordinary tasty dishes. Kudos to Kitchen staff and service staff. After Dinner we took round of entire hotel  along with Front office manager Mr. Ramesh. Hotel rooms were neat and clean, interior of rooms was awesome, interior of Banquet hall is superb. Wherever we go staff welcome us with NAMASTE. Well maintained hotel with well trained staff.
Excellent staff. Very courteous. From check in to room service. Mr. Saahil, Mr. Sumit and many more went out of their way to make the experience memorable.

I had a wonderful experience staying here. My room was neat and clean and the staff made sure that I staying safe. All the precautions were taken. I thoroughly enjoyed delectable food. I would recommend it to solo, couple and family traveler. Staff and service was great.

How can I not review this place! I got hitched here ❤️ To ensure that this review doesn't sound biased, I will keep it simple - top quality food, very well maintained interiors, service was absolutely awesome. Lalit Mohan, the banquet captian, is the most friendly hotel guy I have ever met. He was the point of contact I was interacting with and I always felt so assured. I definitely recommend this place for  reception/marriage/seminars.

The Property and it’s Staff is just Pathetic. The services and conduct of staff was awful 😢 throughout the stay. The staff has a tendency of putting wrong bills and they cannot be trusted. And over and above their GM Mr Dogra who is suppose to take the responsibility of the Hotel is also hopeless and doesn’t have guts to face the customer and accept their reviews. It’s better to stay in some Motel then to stay in Fern and spoil your mood and time. Just Pathetic hotel with irresponsible manager.

Stayed overnight.
Rooms are big, clean & comfortable.
Minibar - reasonable & well stocked.
Qia Spa - amazing experience, highly recommended..
Yummy non veg south Indian food at Dravida restaurant.
Breakfast buffet at Garden Cafe was scrumptious too..

Luxurious place to stay, room's are spacious and large french windows gives you loots of roomy feeling and positive vibes.
Lots of food options in veg and non veg both. Hotel staffs are humble and supportive. Interior design is simple and butiful.

It was great experience right from room to breakfast to service during our stay and even after check out. Special mention of House keeping staff Jerald and Gaurav Dubey who was prompt in ensuring that the forgotten documents were immediately dispatched thru front desk and we got it within 2 days at given address. This was really unforgettable pleasant surprise and nice of Mr.Gaurav.

It is a perfect place for a stay, be it with family or solo, work oe leisure...  There is no reason to complain what so ever. The most impressive aspect according to me is its courteous and polite staff. They make you feel important and are always welcoming... They have taken the ancient Indian phrase Atithi-Devo-Bhava quite seriously. I remember names of few of them like Rahul Roy, Karthik amongst others.... really appreciate their service. Apart from this, the rooms too are in pretty good condition. The deluxe room in which I am living is quite spacious and decent ambience. The food is also good. Overall, I am having a pleasant stay over here.

The restaurant is very good. The menu has a lot of Italian options. The staff is nice and helpful. We had gone there for the 25th anniversary of my in laws and were very satisfied. The food and ambience both are very good. Something to look forward to. If you are in the vicinity, definitely give this place a shot.

The Fern is an up scale hotel in Ahmedabad. It sits next to a busy highway in the middle of the city. There are several restaurants in the hotel to eat at which are all billable to your room. They have 24 hour room and food service. The staff are very nice and eager to please. My issue with The Fern is that they don't have a good handle on a mosquito problem. Each time I have stayed there, a year between each visit, I have been victim to the mosquito issues. I would normally not blame the hotel for this, but I have stayed at several upscale hotels in India and have not had this issues at any except for The Fern. Everything else is great. The spa and gym are great and the staff is wonderful.

This hotel claim to be five star but i think it need to improve both on house keeping as well property maintenance. Nothing wrong with property or staff but somehow you will experience its not five star hotel experience altogether. Something is missing..
I was given room without asking if I need smoking or not. Entire passage on floor had smoking stink. They changed it but not a good experience. Outside passage need to be wide enough as its bit narrow. Breakfast spread was good but didn't had International touch which you will feel in five star hotels. Towel and lenin need to more finer to qualify for five star tag.
Nice place to stay good staff everyone is polide food is good i had a lunch today.

Nice hotel having great facilities.
Has three different restaurants available.
Tried two of them. The dravida with authentic South Indian food has great taste and uniqueness.
Overall Food quality also good.
Rooms are spacious and neatly maintained.
Ample parking space is available.

Elegant and  classy  with beautiful view of the western part of the city. The food was equally good. If you are looking for a cozy, quiet  fine dining experience,this is the place you must visit. My husband surprised me on my birthday by getting me here and we enjoyed it.

I Have been a regular Fortune guest, todays experience of check in will make me think again to book this Hotel. I was in reception at 2.35 pm and got my room keys at 4 pm. Most inexperienced and In efficient front office staff I  have ever come across( the Front office manager Mr. Parth was not even in proper uniform and the lame excuses he was giving was ridiculous and not professional. This particular hotel shouldn’t be rated as 4 star. Closing this with a promise to never visit this property ever.

Fortune select definitely lived up to the expectations the name invokes.
Mr Gaurav at reception ensured a very smooth early check in experience.
We thoroughly enjoyed the hospitality at this hotel and would definitely book it again if we came to Ahd

Dinning room staff is exceptional. Arjuna in particular has been wonderful to us. Rest of the staff also has been very helpful and obviously the service there is great.
is great.
A very good experience of buffet dinner. Food quality and taste is very good. All staff members are well trained. Excellent services by Robin and Ankit.

Had amazing experience with our stay in fern. Spacious and clean room. Good room service along with two restaurants and two halls this is really good option for any office conference or parties. Food was also nice and very nice service by the staff.

I like this place because they have the best restaurant I have ever been with respect to South Indian delicacy. I never got to meet the chef, but whosoever she/he is, she makes good food. Having fish/chicken curry made with spices influenced from Southern part of India is amazing.

Staff is very polite and helpful. Interesting range of Mexican and Italian food. Loved date salad. Also, had great experience for candelight dinner. They have specially arranged lightening candle fir us instead of automatic one.

Food is good but they need to staff up on weekends and festive days to provide some basic service. Waited 20mins for a glass of water! The buffet was constantly out of food and the staff was expecting guests to check if the silverware needs restocking. An otherwise good experience marred by lack of service.

Excellent service.

Hotel staff is very nice..special mention and shout out for Arjun...who took good care of me on new year eve.. so that I can  be comfortable away from home..

Thanks...keep going

Bad Service. After completing the checkin formalities, no one bothered to take our luggage or escort us to the rooms. Fortunately, I had stayed there earlier so knew how to reach out to the rooms.
Morning breakfast spread was ok but should score zero on service. It took them 45 minutes to serve tea and that too after couple of reminders.

I cannot understand the good rating of the hotel. Rooms are loud and a bit nasty and the service is so poor. Please do not book an airport shuttle with them. They will forget it and then order an Uber for you. Whick you can easily do by yourself for 20% of the price. Food was also not good.

The main thing is that ,In the breakfast both veg and non. veg are there , when I asked the waiter they said utensils are separate but kitchen is same where they are cooked.......... So, take breakfast at your own risk......... Overall Hotel was much better than others....

Tried to had buffet dinner, but unfortunately it was served cold, later, on request they served hot food.
Hygiene was not taken care while preparing food(found hair in food). Not a single staff attended the complaint, later escalated at reception and F&B manager came and attended us.

Overall stay was ok, rooms were ok. Towel were slightly dirty (found stain).

Hoping a pleasant stay next time.

Every time I visit the ecotel, I fall in love with this place..It got that lovable atmosphere.. Excellent service.. Good hospitality.. Restaurant atmosphere is good.. Don't miss the garden restaurant with live counter..With no additional cost..vallet as well as open parking available... Facilities are also good..Got a small gym n swimming pool at basement.. Adequate to relax n unwind

Fern ecotel is one of the best hotel in ahmedabad city,it's on SG highway,rooms are comfortable and with great view,I have attached few pics of room window,they have indoor swimming pool, loved staying here. They have in-house gym and massage centre for guest. Breakfast was awesome,my 5 star to this hotel,looking forward to staying here again. Missed visiting their roof top restaurant,they have very friendly n cooperative staffs

Had an awesome experience staying at The Fern. The ambience, the staff, their hospitality, the food, everything was at par. I especially liked the rooms. They have provided master controller to control all the lights, AC, lamps including the curtains.

A slightly old property with all modern amenities.. automatic curtains and everything in the room can be managed sitting by the bedside. Highway view for all rooms...one gets bored sitting in the hotel whole day

Good Food, Good Service! We visited Fern for a Birthday celebration for our dear friend. We lunched at the Garden Restaurant and it was just Great! The Food served was delicious and the atmosphere was ambient, along with the helping Staff. It was indeed a Refreshing Experience! 😃 …

Staff is so much rude nd untrained.
Very bad behaviour of vinay and sushil in way of talking specially. Being in hospitality they hv to make sure our stay will be nice and safe. But they are behaving like they are doing us a favor. Stay has been booked before a month ago nd they don't have any records of it. They asked us to pay the full bill prior to the check in. We hv done that as well. Still receiving rude calls to leave on time from staff even before one our of checkout. If minous rating exist, i would like to give -5...

Nice hotel in a narrow strip located by the Higbway overbridge. Friendly staff. Very good food. Rooms are small but having all amenities. Dravida the South Indian food serving restaurant is well known. Spa, Swimming pool, Gym, conference facilities, meeting rooms available.

Rating this place based on Marigold(probably a Banquet Hall). Was attending a wedding reception here. The food was not even good. The only thing "Ok" was the Brownie. Macaroni and cheese and Noodles didn't have any taste in them. Roti was cold and crumbled. Soup I tried was Tomato Soup because the other soup choice was not even recognizable as to if it was Manchow or Hot and Sour. The soup was also not good. Cleanliness was not there at Marigold hall. Proper supervision was not there.

Truly speaking my Best Friend could cook better than the Chef who was in charge of the food.

We went to have dinner at hotel fern..
Food wasn't tasty and less variety in vegetables as well as salads, as we expected. Few deserts were good.
Ambiance is very nice in fern restaurant but only if you sit table outside near the fountain.
To waste 800 Rs per person , in stead it is better to go to any dhaba near by ... We wasted almost 10 K . As none of was satisfied with food.

We went to garden restaurant and food was awesome. Service was also on the spot. Ambience was soothing and quite . No rush compared to other restaurants on Sunday. However the issue was in invoice. We have rs. 2000 off coupon and still they charged the taxes and it. Manager was not ready to listen and in the end we gave up and moved out. Overall good food and service.

Came here for the lunch buffet at the restaurant on the ground floor. Nothing exciting, but everything was decent. The staff are alert and smiling. I did get a chance to check out their South Indian restaurant on the first floor "Dravida". Though I did not eat here but the interiors were very tastefully done.

This hotel has almost all good things in its favor;

1. Location: Sarkhej Gandhinagar highway, relatively decent area
2. Property: Nice cozy, clean rooms
3. Food: 2 in house restaurants, plus a buffet option
4. Service: Room cleaning, Laundry, in room food service, Gym, Swimming pool, non operational due to Covid restrictions)
5. Hospitality: Valet Parking, helping staff, lost and found support, luggage assistance

Now about my stay:
It was a pleasant stay overall, I have had been offered non smoking clean room ( as i requested), the view from edge to edge window was oversighting the highway and distant view of non urban city sites. I opted for 2 person room so that i could opt for ponder free queen size bed, and the comfort of bed was plush and warm.

Room is equipped with smart remote with which you can take control of all equipment's, Hvacs and curtains as well.

The bath area is right at the entrance with convenient see through (optional curtain) glass over looking the bed and enabled with standard sanitary equipment's.

Apart from this in room you will find study table, HD TV and ample AC power outlets.

I had spent 2 nights and 2 days at the hotel and it was a nice leisure filled experience.

Looking forward to stay again in distant future..

One of the best hotels of Ahmedabad. However amenities are less here. Only 2 amenities are available here which are gym and swimming pool. The tariff is quite high, hotel is at a very good location and rooms are nicely maintained. However with this kind of high tariff amenities should be much more. Complimentary Breakfast is good however restaurant is very expensive.

Went to the roof top restaurant. Good service. Food wasn't that great as I expected. Things could be improved in terms of design - majorly the floor. Water sprinklers keep the air cool, however, our table was right under one and water droplets kept falling on me and the table.

This hotel is probably ruining the images of Fern hotel!  Poor and really poor room service and housekeeping... ! i called 5 times and it took 1 hour person to come and deliver the requested bathroom amenities. Ordered food was not at all as per expectations. .. it came in 45 minutes and that also like remaining from some buffet.. A 6 hours before cooked vegitable (price is 450 +taxes), a half-cooked chapati (₹75+taxes for one chapati) and normal salad (125+tax)! but when you see the prices for the kind of food see my attached image of bill..! when you report this to manager.. no one there to see you.. !!
also there is very small Breakfast sections and options...

next day i changed my room and went to Hyatt and had a classic food in the same rates!! but food was value for money in hyatt which was not the case here in this hotel.. but prices were skyrocketing..!! GUYS AVOID going...
Very nice property with good restaurant and professional staff members. Good quality food and veriety of options if you're going for buffet. Highly recommended.

The fern hotel is located on the Ahmedabad highway, it's business hotel. The hotel is very slick with very little campus and a narrow driveway. The lobby is narrow and small, adjoining the lobby is a buffet system dinning. It is completely open to the lobby. The staff is welcoming and the service is precise. The rooms are beautiful with cozy beds. There is not much to do at the hotel and is not recommended for a family outing and the swimming pool is underground and extremely small.
Old rooms. The bathroom door and wet area door collides. Not sure who Engineered this. Reception hospitality and Restaurant buffet is good but not great.

good place to stay. we had a stay for 3 nights. room were decent but not as good as expected like marriot or something. we booked two rooms and both room's washbasin got choked. though service was available instantly.

Very fine hotel. With very exquisite stays and facilities. They provide whatever one wants or even the things you think won't be available in a hotel or in this season. They do decorations. Stay with their customers. And a perfect and balanced hotel.
Loved it.

Located just below the Sola bridge on S G highway, the hotel has 98 rooms. Parking available in basement as well as on the street outside the hotel. Good food at both restaurants. Dravida restaurant specializes in South Indian food. Staff is generally helpful and Courtious. They have small meeting facilities and banquet halls.

The Fern - Ahmedabad is really really amazing place. The hotel is a real quality place. My stay here was really really pleasant and soothing. The service they provide is the best. The housekeeping services were also really really good. Their food was really better than a lot of prestigious places.

We went for Sunday brunch, compared to the pricing food varieties were less and taste and ambiance was average. However, hospitality was good . Out of five I'll give 2 stars to food, 2 stars to Ambience and 5 stars to hospitality.

One of the best hotel in Ahmadabad. Very well location as well as easy to approach. You will get cafe, restaurant and all the needed thing under one roof. They have maintained a decent gentry and this is the reason they are getting local crowd as well. Their dine in schemes are running on periodic basis and this helps very much to get their again and again.

Had an amazing day at The Fern Ecotel, was here today for a conference. The hotel has been really outstanding with right from hospitality to food. They are one of the best in Indian home grown hoteliers.

Very good rooms. Excellent food. Very good Spa gym and pool. Excellent service. The position is a plus and a minus at the same time. Plus because it is strategic to go anywhere. Minus because it is really on the highway. Soundproofing is fine but can be improved.
