Excellent hotel having very spacious rooms Well maintained.. I had loose motions and they arranged Doctor in no time, got medicine and supplied special food. They took good care. Thanks to Amit. If I happened to come again, they will be my first choice.

One of the luxuries hotels in Ahmedabad,
Well designed and well maintained. There are couple of restaurants in hotel, Food is good.

Staff are well trained and good behaviour ,Much appreciated approach towards customers.

Yes , it is couple friendly and for corporate usage.

As usual it is Bit expensive but worthy.

Excellent property in Amdavad (that's how it is written everywhere). Very courteous and helpful staff. Multiple restaurants to eat. Dravida was the best, authentic South Indian food. 9th floor is the open air Mexican and Italian restaurant. Breakfast was just average. The auto wala referred it as 'patti wala hotel'.

Visited @Nine, a restaurant in The Fern- An Ecotel premises manage and organize by FERN only, situated on the top floor i.e 9th. Nice place for some quality time. The decor and cosy rooftop makes it different. The SG highway view from rooftop is quite awesome. As it falls under luxury segment hotel, hence prices are too high 😉
PS: Ideal place for dating!! 😋
Awesome stay and service staff are very helpful specially zodiac, breakfast and dinner spread is very nice.

This hotel offers the best that the famous" Fern" name stands for, with good central location, reasonable prices and very good hotel staff. I have stayed here twice, and both times I have been impressed. The food is above average and the breakfast is to die for. Highly recommended

The hotel asked me send them an email with booking information.  More than 24 hours go by and no confirmation was received.  I called the manager and he said the employee making the reservations will contact me within 2-3 hours.  It has now been 1 week and no one has contacted me.  I ended up staying at a hotel down the road.

If they are not interested in business, they should stop taking reservations.  Ended up at the Crown Plaza less than 4km away and had a flawless stay.  I guess I lucked out in that sense.

Avoid this hotel, if the reservation experience is like this, I can only imagine what my stay would have been like.

The Fern - An Ecotel hotel is fine premium brand in Five Star Hotel category.

* Ambiance :- Very Good
* Service :- Nice
* Food Quality :- Good
* Taste :- Average ( Less Tasty if you like hot n Spicy Food)
* Price :- Slightly Higher but normal in comparison with Five Star.
* Value For Money :- Average

Little improvement in the food taste can make this place really happening & value for money.

It is a nice place for stay and has three theme restaurants housed in...
One of the best hotel that Ahmedabad has to offer but I feel the rooms should have been slightly bigger and better..
Located on the SG Highway it's a good option if u have work in d outskirts of Ahmedabad... Check online travel portals for discounts... If u r lucky u get more than money's worth 👍

I visited this hotel on 31st August to attend a farewell with my colleague which was arranged at basement. While leaving the hotel at around 09 45 PM , we utilized lift of hotel to reach ground floor and within few seconds system was collapsed though total person were within permissible limit. Even ventilation system or fan was not operational in lift. Naturally mobile network was not available and lift call system was not working. Within few minutes we were suffering from suffocation and after vigorous efforts we succeed to open inner side door of lift. Luckily we got some network coverage and called our friends to inform hotel management to do needful. After long time security had somehow managed to open outer door and we have to jump from the lift.
Even after this situation there was no pain on the face of hotel management staff and they were laughing. When interacted with lobby manager he rudely replied this happens sometimes and didn't feel sorry for that. Think thrice before visiting this hotel

The service here is extremely bad. We recently opted to do staycation here which was a terrible mistake. I gave clear instructions on call at the reception to send few things (basic toiletries/ tissues) which were not provided beforehand due to covid. To avoid disturbance, I specifically told to send all items together but the receptionist failed to understand. Their staff came and delivered 2 things in the first time. I told him not to come again and again with separate things- come again but with all things together but god knows how these people are trained by the hotel that he failed to understand this. He came 4 times to give things which I refused as I was really not appreciating entertaining him during 3rd time.  When I complained this at the reception, the guy had so much attitude that he was okay with me complaining to the seniors about it but not to tell him anything. The food was another thing which was horrible. They have “Dravida restaurant which specialises in South Indian cuisine” but the breakfast served was horrible. No good variety for vegeterians- idli / uttamapam had lot of Eno - main thing- they just had coconut chutney to offer- No green and red chutney. They had only 2 options for dosa- plain and masala- when requested for podi plain dosa- I was flatly refused- such stubborn staff. I m glad that I didnt opt for dinner at the hotel. One of the worst staycation.
Amazing experience , great staff,amazing rooms with a view. Breakfast was so great, i never wanted it to end.

It's a really good property. Manager Mr. Nitesh Doshi is excellent in customer service. From the moment you enter in the property he feels you comfortable. Hospitality is wonderful and the view from room number 604 is really awesome.

I went to hotel for one official party and found ambiance is good and also their service is good but quality of food is totally poor. As specially backeddish is like pasta and rice plate also desert - ice cream variant is nt suitable for brownie
Not worth for food

The front desk staff are definitely not from Hospitality industry, I am sure due to Covid-19 lockdown the trained ones have gone back home and they have appointed some low budget ones. Rest everything is good, A good hotel given in the hands of unprofessional front desk to manage.

Outstanding food at Zodiac !!!!!!
Best hotel in terms of safety and hygienic.
Really tasty food, we tried their buffet and it was lavish spread. Chef Prasad cooked Mutton curry for us and it was delicious.
Staff is courteous. Manager Ankit and Manager Rakesh were great with hospitality and other staff Joshua , Shivani, Suman, Satendar and Chandan were very very courteous and ensured we get hot food.
MR ANKIT attended really well.
Kuddos to fortuneSelect  !!!!!

Fern has one of the better buffet spreads in Ahmedabad. But the restaurant I like most there is Dravida! The food is amazing and they keep coming up with regional food festivals which are always a must visit!!
Hospitality is very good and special mention of their GM Mr Dogra who always goes out of his way to make it special for guests!

The place is cool, food at Dravidian is unique in taste and names but we can't frequent the place. The terrace restaurant serves western menu but quantity and device is not up to the mark.The live singer is too loud and disturbing

The ambience of the place is really nice...went there to attend one of my friend's engagement party. The food waa decent.. nothing over the top.. the staff is really nice.. made sure everyone was having a great time!

The closest star hotel to the exhibition center in Gandhinagar.

Decent Rooms,
Friendly Staff,
Wide Spread Breakfast,
Good Internet (Wifi),
Comfortable Working Desk,
Center Panel for room automation including the curtains!

I loved that they provide Fresh Fruits & Cookies in the room along with the Tea/Coffee set.

The only negative point is that it doesn't have a direct access to SG Highway.

they charge 4700 rs for 1 room of 205 sq feet which is quite a low space, it is hardy a 3 star hotel(most of the site states it 5 star) i have to take it as no other hotel available near cims hospital. they didn't provide iron and iron board, bath robe and other things too. so untill necessary don't go for this hotel
Best place to stay in Ahmedabad. Worth each and every penny. Team starting from Ankita till Restaurant teamw as 👍 👌

Nice Hotel in ahmedabad good large and superb rooms. Breakfast is different than the other hotels as here u get the full gujrat feel nylon Dhokla, white and yellow mix dhokla, khandvi and much more from the south and continental.
They offer delicious food, warm service and an overall great experience. The roof-top restaurant 'At Nine' has a pretty good view and amazing live music on the weekends.

Review is for @9 Rooftop Restaurant of The Fern An Ecotel Hotel in Ahmedabad.. Amazing Experience, Excellent Courteous Staff, Very Good Food, Superb Ambience.. Overall very pleasant expirence -and 7 Stars for service staff again..!!

It was a great experience all the staff members were very nice to me. All the facilities of the hotel were good. Anything that was not working was fixed in a matter of 10 minutes. It has good services
I stayed four nights, the starting point of the review is the absolute mystery of the five stars. …

It's hard to find a place for midnight dinner, but this one was open. The views from the terrace, beautiful vegetation on the restaurant walls and, of course, the selection of dishes from 3 different types of cuisine are stunning. Of course I recommend this place!

I have stayed at The Ferm Mumbai Powai in the past and I am very happy with its quality. This time I went to Ahmedabad on a business trip and stayed here for the first time. It was really amazing. The Ferm Ahmedabad maintains its consistent high quality standards. The rooms are clean and spacious, and you can also enjoy the view. It's far away, but the air pollution is quite serious. I also enjoyed the dinner buffet this time, which was a variety of Indian dishes. It was delicious and not boring. I will stay here again if I have the opportunity.
Good hotel, good value for money. Breakfast needs improvement, room cleanliness sufficient.
Food was generally veg. There was no nonveg variety and it was very expensive.
Unfortunately, there is no pool or gym. The staff responds quickly and gives a pleasant impression.
Great place with great service, but the rooms are a bit poorly soundproofed...you can hear the sewerage
Quiet, beautiful, and has a variety of delicious foods
Great hotel with an excellent Indian restaurant
Thank you bharti parekh mam
Very good hotel and service.
Delicious food and pleasant atmosphere
Real five stars, everything is right
Read them 😌
Spacious and comfortable rooms.
Great!!

The rooms were quite small, there was no place to even walk properly in the room. The washrooms were tiny.
Breakfast there was below average. I have not ordered room service. Hence cannot comment on it. However based on the menu there were not many options.
The one and awesome thing about the hotel is the location. Great markets nearby and seems pretty safe.

I stayed for 1 night for official purpose and the stay was good. Room was neat and comfortable for me to stay. Room was compact with basic amenities. Location is easily accessible as well. Had complimentary breakfast which was good. Overall check-In and check-out process was smooth. Thank you.

Good location.  Decent staff.  But cleanliness in the corridor at the lift area needs improvement. The same goes for the room.  There was a damp smell. There was no place to hang towel in the bathroom.
The breakfast was good. The waitress Nikita and Vaishali were very kind and helpful. What I did not like the most was insisting on giving ratings and reviews while having breakfast.

Hotel Review: Exceptional Staff Experience

I recently stayed at Holiday Inn, and I cannot praise the staff enough Mainly Vaishali, Jyothi and Hami . From the moment I arrived, I was greeted with warm smiles and genuine hospitality that made me feel right at home.

The front desk team was incredibly welcoming, ensuring a smooth check-in process and providing all the information I needed about the hotel and local attractions. They went above and beyond to accommodate my requests, which truly enhanced my stay.

Housekeeping was immaculate, maintaining a pristine environment throughout my visit. I was particularly impressed by their attention to detail and their friendly interactions when I encountered them in the hallways.

The restaurant staff was equally outstanding. They were attentive without being intrusive, and their recommendations for local dishes were spot on. Every meal felt like a special occasion thanks to their enthusiastic service.

In short, the staff at Holiday Inn is what sets this place apart. Their commitment to exceptional service made my stay unforgettable. I cannot recommend this hotel highly enough for anyone looking for a welcoming and delightful experience!

I have stayed at this hotel before, but during my current visit, I have noticed a significant decline in quality. Rust is visible on the hand wash and shower fixtures, the floor is not clean, and there are broken pieces of furniture. Additionally, the staff's courtesy has diminished compared to previous stays. The breakfast is particularly disappointing; it is near horrible and definitely needs a complete overhaul. There is no live counter for vegetarians, which is a major drawback. While the smaller room size is expected with the express option, paying a bit more could provide a better experience. At this price, I do not recommend this hotel.

The rooms are super tiny . Not
Much space to move around . You wake up to a wash basin 😞.  But the location is super good and staff are very friendly .
The food is spicy

Had a comfortable stay at the hotel. It's located centrally so that's awesome. The room was well appointed, neat and a nice quite vibe.
The breakfast spread is extensive and staff very attentive to meet your needs. Had most of my meals in the hotel and the food is really scrumptious.The breakfast and dinner buffet is among the best I've had, offering a wide spread of both regional as well as international dishes. Especially great variety for vegetarians. …and Mr.Shantilal who is working at the holiday inn express  was a nice guy and meet your needs in a disciplinary and provide his services in a quite manner.and this holiday inn express provide a laundry  service in a hotel that washes and irons clothes for guests. Almost all hotels have a laundry service. If you hand in clothes one day you should get them back a day or two later. The laundry service will wash, dry, and iron your clothes.

Rm.no.:0715

Overall my rating is 5/5

My review for food staff and reception:5/5
House keeping:5/5
Mr.Shantilal:5/5

The premium hotel with affordable price. Just visited last week with friends and feels like hotel is really value for money. Friendly and helping nature of staff is quite heart melting. Even hotel is quite nearer from all the key areas around it. They provide full safety to guest and their cars for parking. Also the food is good

Service is good. Room sizes are slightly smaller. The staff is cooperative.
Dining food is great especially the breakfast Thepla. The dining staff Ms. Vaishali was kind and professional in service. Liked the housekeeping service too. Looking forward to visit in future.

One of the worst experience in Ahmedabad, they charge half day extra for 3 hours early check in whereas ITC, Taj never do that, they very well know what customer experience is especially what condor to a female who is travelling alone means.
That guy at the reception made me wait at the desk for 15-20 minutes to give the keys, attended male customers first and then me.
Breakfast was not upto the standard, no taste in food, food was cold and bland.
Rooms are too small and not at all comfortable.
Also, they made me pay first, which hotel asks you to pay first.
Pathetic experience
Spoilt my whole trip
Bad management
Worst service
I wish there was negative review, they don’t even deserve a single star for treating females like this and charging extra
Looters

Firstly, reception itself is pretty small with no proper space for seating. During peak hours when a lot of people are checking in and out, you have to stand and wait patiently for your turn.

Secondly the rooms are not just small, they are not well maintained. There is no hanging space to hang the towel also in washrooms, I don’t know how such a design can get approved! Washbasins are part of the room itself and water can get spilled over the room while washing your face and hands. Toilet area is separate and the flush broke in my first use itself. Some mechanic fixed it but the commode got dirty during the process and no housekeeping cleaned it. There is no wardrobe or storage space to keep your luggage. Bed sheets were stained!

Third, food is below average. Ordered one chicken burger, the patty was smelling. Breakfast buffet spread was not having much options. I don’t know if they take any live orders of omlette or dosas.

Fourth, they market about free wifi but don’t train their staffs to give the wifi access details to the guests during check in. I stayed without any wifi.

I have stayed in Holiday Inn Express in Kolkata also, had far better experience than here. Although they will defend themselves by saying rooms are compact and ergonomically designed, but trust me, they are NOT the money you are spending. This place needs a serious makeover. Thankfully I stayed only for a night here, else it would have been a nightmare for me.

The services provided by Ravi, Jyoti and Vaishali were amazing, they were very welcoming and kind. AlthoughI am from delhi so I didn’t like the taste but they tried there level best to serve well. Room are clean but small in space and without almirahs so it was a problematic thing for a person staying for longer period.

Great location to stay and well maintained rooms, the only issue is the front desk staff. Everything was great except the behaviour of the reception staff was rude. Had to give multiple reminders for drinking water and towels. The towels kept in the room were dirty and when informed, it was changed after multiple  reminders and 2 hours. Even in the gym hand towels were missing and when informed at the reception, it was provided after my session was done, this could raise hygiene issues.

The place is nice to stay and the tiffin is fantastic. However, both the room and toilet are very small; a bit more space would be more comfortable for users. Nikita, thanks for the wonderful food suggestions and excellent service."

I really appreciate the service in the the restaurant for all team specialy vaishali,nikita..the room very clean
my first impression was room to small but due to good service place became so big I ll come back if service no change I stay with you.
Only once advice try to build à New with suit and big room
..wonderfull expérience in HIEA

I had a good stay.
Firstly wanna thank Akansha (front desk staff) for helping me to find a comfortable room based on my requirements.
Thank you Manthan and whole team for making my stay comfortable.😊
Rooms were clean.
Food is also good and whole dining area staffs do their best with beautiful smile to make your dining experience exceptional.

Only not liking factor is their room size and toilet and bathroom concept.
But I realised it lately that once I got adapted it was okay for me. But it wasn’t comfortable.

We booked 2 rooms for 1 night (10th aug 24).
Check in experience - was bad as we had early morning flight from Goa and reached the hotel at 10.30am. when we requested for an early check-in if rooms are available, however Mr. Wong and Mr.Aryan at the front office refused saying that the rooms are available but because of their "check-in policy" they cannot allow us to check in early without extra charges. Coming from a hospitality & travel industry for over a decade we have worked and stayed with multiple hotels across the country but this was the most rude way of denying an early check-in by a hotel representative. After we expressed our dissatisfaction, they gave us only 1 room early.

Room experience - rooms are very small and congested. The rooms aren't meant for 2 people to stay unless you are couple and are fine stepping out of bath without clothes to grab a towel.

Dining experience - breakfast was fine and service at the restaurant was good. Vaishali at the restaurant was very good and took good care of us.

Checkout experience - Checkout experience was good as somehow Mr. Wong accepted our request of checkout at 2.30pm

Conclusion - Leaving aside the rude approach of front office staff at check-in, rest all was okay.

I am not sure if I will stay here again but it is a decent hotel for quick transits and business travellers

Staff is very polite and helpful, especially in front office Mr. Murthy,I am regularly staying in holiday inn but this time  slightly issue with room service and housekeeping and after ordering service is very slow the delivery time is high. Almost you have to wait 25 to 35 minute service were not proper, i ordered ice bucket  which took long time to serve i asked for the shaving kit & I called 3 times on reception & rooms boy brought when I was ready for office so services provided were not up to the mark specially housekeeping  & this is my small suggestion kindly  do the pest control regularly in guest room moreover  Mr.Wang Tamang know the reason very well why I am saying like this things, the location of the hotel is very approachable and almost mid of the city

I came here for official trip,
I stayed in the queen room.
The room was good for a single person.
The washroom and bathroom is very small.

The rooms at this hotel are exceptionally clean and spacious. The complimentary breakfast served here is both hygienic and delicious. Overall, my experience was positive, and I would highly recommend this hotel to my friends.

Team lead Pushkar and Ms. Vaishali provided invaluable assistance throughout our stay, demonstrating kindness and helpfulness. Additionally, the housekeeping staff, particularly Mr. Manthan, ensured our room remained immaculate and that we had everything we needed.

The location is a bit challenging for family travelers who prefer a hotel connected to major attractions. Rooms are a bit small but they are convenient for business travelers. Rooms were clean and service was prompt.

The restaurant serves a nice breakfast spread. Fruits are fresh although egg preparations seemed a bit off. The service in the restaurant is great as well. Mr. Abhishek and Mr. Shayan were especially helpful.

Holiday Inn Exp Ahmedabad is truly a decent business class hotel. Excellent n kind staff. Starting from the reception to housekeeping, guys are very helpful. A few wonderful people i could remember at the BF area who were very kind, warm and served everyone with a smile were ms. Rajveer, mr. Ravi, ms. Vishali, mr. Hamir. Keep up the good work guys.

Amazed with the fact that they wouldn't give complimentary early check in inspite of having empty rooms. A first time experience for me.
Washrooms are a bit small for the pricing .
Property is clean per se with very good wifi.

Location of hotel is very good. Many good restaurants around this hotel.

They serves very good breakfast with good options.

Rooms are small but it was clean. Bathroom is very small and uncomfortable for bathing.

It was a very nice experience. The hotel staff is provides a very good hospitality. The location is really good. The housekeeping staff like Manthan and Shantilal offered very good service.
The restaurant also offers a good variety of buffet!!!
Overall nice experience.

Room service best and food taste is good
I recommend all customer try food in hotal

Vaishali is very hardworking girl I’ll seen 3 days in morning breakfast she had very pretty smile she’s doing very well keep doing vaishali I’m glad to here nd your hospitality service is very good next time I definitely come

Service is good. Vaishali of the staff team was really helpful in making the stay comfortable.
The rooms however are too small especially for the price. Feels a bit overpriced.

Room size was highly disappointing, couldn’t even open my full size suitcase properly because the rooms are just a little too compact. Breakfast was good, service is also good, staff is kind and helpful. Just the room service needs to give more attention as I would ask them for a tea bag and they would bring up a whole tea to my room which is under the room service menu. This happened thrice, even when I insisted that I just need the tea and coffee sachets, they would bring the whole drink to my room🤦‍♀️. Front desk was very helpful and cooperative. I wish the rooms had better exhaust because the ventilation is bad and the smell in the room and washroom lingers for hours.

The stay was ok, hospitality was good, but the rooms could definitely have been a bit bigger even for single occupancy! Price point for such small spaces is on the higher side. The service at restaurant was pretty good though..Sayan did a good job in attending us with our specific preferences.

Matchbox ?? Room ?? Can't understand why would someone make make such a tiny room which almost suffocates you. And no , its not an exaggeration. Imagine having the wash basin 'inside' the room , so close to bed that water splashes on your bed. Service was just average. Avoid unless you run out of options.

Unsafe for women,  housekeeping staff Mr. Narayan is a character less personality who vl peek inside ur room. Women must not stay in this property at any cost. Above all, Neha the manager said I can stop his entry on your floor.

Bakvash hotel hai,staff mebi kohi thik se bat nahi karta, jabbi call kare to 10 call pe ek call receive karte hai, third class service..agar paisa dene par bi thik hai javab na mile to esi jagah bilkul nahi jana chahaiye..
Third class service ...never visited
We had a bitter experience of alloting room which was  already occupied at 12:00 midnight.....very embarrassing situation opening other guests room at that hour. Rooms are too small.

Today for the first time in the hotel industry, I have come across the ultimate unprofessional and incompetent system for booking rooms. Since the past 4 hrs, I am trying to call them - No one picks up and even if by mistake someone does then they apologise and then transfer the line but to no avail. Had a solid stay at this hotel – the rooms are compact but well-loaded, perfect for solo travelers or a cozy couple retreat. The room's functionality is spot-on, and breakfast hits the spot. They throw in thoughtful extras like gym towels, self-play music, and water bottles to amp up the workout vibes. Plus, the hotel's location is a win, surrounded by cool attractions and tasty eateries.

The hotel rooms and quality standards are as per the holiday inn express brand of IHG.
And the staffs are also good and capable as long as they are required to perform the most basic and routine tasks involved in hotel operations like checking in guests, checking out, basic room services and that's it....

The moment some situation arise out of this routine and they would have no clue on what to do.

I last stayed with them in the first week of February. Due to some booking issues, I was owed some refund amount post check-out and was told that they would gpay it to me on the same day.
That didn't happen, so I mailed them.
They replied asking for credit card details for refunding and I shared the same with them.
Since then, there has been no response from their side.

It's been two months now and despite multiple phone calls, mails and in-person visits to the hotel, nothing has happened except the most plain and insincere "we are sorry and will look into it".

So in this context, the operations team is a complete disappointment and I hope nobody else experiences such pathetic service.

Just to add one more experience: once while I was checking out of the hotel, a senior lady was checking in with 3-4 bags. She requested the reception for some assistance in carrying the bag to her room and they outright declined saying they don't provide that service. It was very rude and totally unfitting.

I humbly request the hotel management to please get a hold of their operations and provide proper training to the staffs on hospitality

Our company Travel A Deal was organising an event in Ahmedabad for our clients. We eventually selected Hyatt Ahmedabad for stay and conference. The experience has been amazing with the start of contracting the event through the sales team headed in Mumbai by Jimmy Jhunjhunwala. Excellent person with a humble approach, very straight forward and ensures that he is available and contactable for any queries that you may have both before and during the event, including Sunday's. I am sorry had to reach out to Jimmy on Sunday, he was more than glad to assist.

Upon reaching the Hotel I met up with the Front Office Team which was headed by Shehzad the Front Office Manager, who took a briefing of the event from me along with his associate Hitesh Thakur. The Front Office Team is amazing, they were well briefed of our complex requirements and procedures to be followed for VIP & Imp delegates. The Front office co-ordination becomes very important  with respect to room allotments , Check-in procedures and ensuring delegate requirements in room service etc is met with precision and timely deliverables.

During the Day Or Until Late night every person in various shits were well knowledgeable of our requirements. Thanks to Hrishikesh Kumar, Shubham, Ritesh, Hitesh , Sakshi and all in the Front Office Team. Mr. Rajesh Jamnani ( Front Office Manager ) had taken a pre event brief from me during a conference call and he ensured that all matters related to the event is well informed to all departments.

The Banquet Team with Bidyut & Bhargav were hands-on on our requirements and played the most important  role of ensuring our events were conducted extremely professionally and without any hassle. They ensured the Tea Breaks, Meal Set-Up and during conference requirements were well managed and with all replishments on the Buffet and servings in the venue being done without delays. Any sudden and last minute changes and requirements were handled  well. They have an amazing team that is very humble and professional .

Chef Vinod and his team made some delicious cuisine that was very well appreciated by all the delegates. Food was given Hot and the breads , Rotis etc were flowing from the Kitchen timely.
Over all has been a great experience doing our event at this Hotel in Ahmedabad.

Hyatt Ahmedabad: An Oasis of Comfort and Elegance

Stepping into the grand lobby of Hyatt Ahmedabad, I was immediately struck by its elegant ambiance and modern décor. The warm and welcoming staff greeted me with genuine smiles, setting the tone for what would be a truly delightful stay. The check-in process was seamless, and the front desk staff was efficient in providing me with all the necessary information about the hotel's facilities and amenities.

One of the highlights of my stay at Hyatt Ahmedabad was undoubtedly the culinary experience. The hotel offers a range of dining options, each serving delectable dishes prepared with finesse. The breakfast buffet at the in-house restaurant was a culinary journey in itself. It offered an extensive spread of both Indian and international cuisines, catering to diverse palates. The quality of the food was outstanding, and the attentive waitstaff ensured that my dining experience was nothing short of exceptional. Additionally, the hotel's on-site café provided a cozy ambiance, making it the perfect spot to unwind over a cup of freshly brewed coffee and delectable pastries.

During my stay, I had the opportunity to attend a corporate event at Hyatt Ahmedabad. The hotel boasts state-of-the-art meeting rooms and event spaces that are equipped with modern amenities. The event coordination team displayed efficiency and professionalism, ensuring that every aspect of the gathering was flawlessly executed. The seamless corporate event experience, combined with the hotel's commitment to providing top-notch facilities, makes it an ideal choice for business travelers.

The rooms at Hyatt Ahmedabad were an epitome of comfort and elegance. The contemporary interiors were tastefully designed with attention to detail. The king-sized bed with plush linens provided a restful night's sleep, and the spacious work desk offered a functional space for catching up on work. The room also featured modern amenities such as a flat-screen TV, a minibar, and complimentary Wi-Fi, ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay.

Cleanliness is a hallmark of Hyatt Ahmedabad. The housekeeping staff did an impeccable job in maintaining the rooms and the entire hotel premises. The pristine condition of the room was a testament to their dedication to ensuring a hygienic and comfortable environment for guests.

In addition to its exceptional staff and amenities, Hyatt Ahmedabad offers a variety of thoughtful amenities that cater to the needs of its guests. The fitness center, equipped with modern workout equipment, was a boon for fitness enthusiasts like me who didn't want to compromise on their exercise routine while traveling. The rooftop swimming pool offered a refreshing escape from the city's hustle and bustle, providing stunning views of Ahmedabad's skyline. The hotel's spa services allowed me to indulge in some well-deserved relaxation and rejuvenation after a day of exploration.

Hyatt Ahmedabad's location in the heart of the city was a significant advantage. It provided easy access to some of Ahmedabad's most prominent attractions, including the historic Sabarmati Ashram and the vibrant local markets. Whether I wanted to immerse myself in the city's rich history or explore its modern offerings, everything was just a short distance away from the hotel.

In conclusion, my stay at Hyatt Ahmedabad was truly remarkable. The combination of great staff, delicious food, excellent corporate event facilities, pristine rooms, and thoughtful amenities made for an unforgettable experience. Whether for business or leisure, Hyatt Ahmedabad offers a perfect blend of comfort and elegance that caters to the needs of every traveler. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious and enjoyable stay in Ahmedabad.

Extremely Disappointed – Misleading Product and False Claims!

I recently purchased the so-called “Sourdough Loaf” from your bakery Nutmeg, and I am beyond appalled by what I received. Your claims of this being a “home-cultured whole wheat sourdough” are not only misleading but downright false! What I received was NOTHING like a true sourdough loaf.

Let’s get one thing straight—sourdough bread is supposed to have that distinctive, open crumb structure with irregular holes from the fermentation process and a thick, crusty exterior. Instead, what I received was a processed, dense, and highly commercialized loaf that barely qualifies as bread, let alone sourdough. It’s laughable that you think shaping it like sourdough would fool your customers into believing it’s the real deal. The bread I got looked like a factory-produced loaf with none of the texture, flavor, or quality that comes from an authentic sourdough.

This is clearly just normal, mass-produced bread trying to masquerade as something artisan. For a bakery that prides itself on quality, this is either a blatant attempt to deceive your customers, or you have absolutely no idea what sourdough bread is supposed to be. Either way, it's unacceptable.

I expect better from any bakery, let alone one under ITC's name.You should seriously reconsider your product line or, at the very least, stop lying to your customers about what you're selling. This wasn’t sourdough—it was a joke.

Just wow. Loved the decor of the reception, the lobby, the rooms. Also the rooms are fantastic, with ample space, lovely views, soft beds, clean bathrooms with all the necessary toiletries. The food in the restaurant is also great. Do opt for the buffet instead of ala carte. It will surely be worth your while. There's lots of options and varieties and the rate is not all that much. It's definitely worth it.   Also the room service is top notch and the reception is also quick and efficient with fast billing and great assistance in helping find cabs or anything else.
We went there while there was a procession going on, and the cab couldn't get through till the hotel so we had to walk about a km to the hotel. When we called up the hotel asking for directions, they told us to wait and they sent someone to pick us up and our luggage. We followed him easily back to the hotel. The service is that good!
Definitely would recommend staying here the next time anyone visits the city.

I stayed here for 3 days and 4 nights, services here are exceptionally good. Staff is very caring, cordial and supporting. They dont make you feel that you are at a top notch hotel but with their warmth they make you feel good. The Restaraunt is excellent with variety of food items in both veg and non veg. The quality of food is also very good and you will be feeling like having it more. The staff in Restaurant namely Bikram, raju, and chef named Ashik are all excellent in their services. They come to you for all your needs before you speak it out. Excellent team with excellent services. Worth visiting the place atleast once. Superb stay

Lemon Tree Premier: The Atrium, Ahmedabad, is a seamless fusion of elegance and modernity. With its chic ambiance, impeccable service, and prime location, it effortlessly elevates the stay experience. A premier choice for those seeking a touch of sophistication in the heart of Ahmedabad
It was a perfect stay , overall cooperation of the staff was very homely & humble , could suggest to one of my friends

Rooms were not so spacious as it looks from outside. Usually they don't provide any river view kinda hotel it was little bit noisy as  it lies nearby the old city. We have stayed at lemon tree mitha Kali, it was minimal and good for day time. It was clean although we do not recommend staying at this lemon tree khanpur place for leisure time.

I would say it was a good experience not the best. I had dinner at riverfront grill cafe, it was ok. Very less vegetarian food options. Secondly the service was ok overall. I always need to ask for water they were not proactive to at least serve water. Moreover once I finished dinner i had to wait for long because the card machine was not working. Though they had 3 machines but either of them was working. The view of the cafe/restaurant was very good. Specially in summers it will be a good option. I would suggest that they have more variety for vegetarian food. I hope that next time they take note of all this & at-least get new card machine so that we shall not waste lot of time.

Nice ambience and very well maintained property. The staff is very supportive. We have a pool party followed by dinner. Dinner was delicious. Here I want to mention one special thing. As swimming pool is in basement so mobile towers were not there. I was expecting some important calls. When discussed with reception they immediately agree to receive all my calls and give me message. Thank you.
I had stayed recently for 3 days and the room was quite small and clean. They provide a good variety of breakfast and the reception team is very supportive and active.

I booked the suit for 4-5th feb 2023 ! Please do not visit this hotel! I have been part of lemon tree club and the service this hotel provides is very pathetic and slow. They cry for giving extra toiletaries , they provided only 2 laundry bag when we were 4 people and whenever we used to call housekeeping they used to arrive after 20 mins.also they didn’t provided bathbomb for bathtub

First of all I congratulate Mr.Ajit Singh and his team Vijay Yadav,Biplav,Nilofer,Aashi,Sakshi,Vikas to name a few you guys make a perfect team!!!!It was an event to remember forever and entire credit to you guys.Actually speaking it was our home away from home for 3days. I would suggest everyone to stay in this property whenever next in Ahmedabad.
Now coming to the property excellent location right at the riverfront very conveniently located closer to the airport,Railway station or any other major tourist attraction or shopping places.
Great food,excellent services and perfect arrangements everything was more than perfect So you guys get 100%marks.
Once again thanks Nilofer you were so helpful from the day we contacted you till the end of the event!!
Keep up the good work!!!!

One of the worst experience ever. The staff is negligible and first they didn't check and kept someone else's luggage in my room and then while checking out also the staff misplaced our luggage. They got it down from room, kept it unattended and lost it. The rooms are also just basic type and congested. The stuff inside rooms is also old and not at all in presentable state.  The area is also not good. Not at all a satisfactory experience. Not expected from a reputable named hotel.

We stayed at the place for 3 nights. Location is very convenient. The staff are alert to your needs and willing to help. Morning breakfast was a decent spread and service was nice. Really appreciate the F&B assistant manager Mr. Joshi going the extra mile with special dietary requests.

Airport shuttle offered is a great convenient. Friendly and helpful staff making checkin an efficient experience, especially as i arrived late at night. Room was clean but had a mouldy smell to it. Stayed at this hotel on 4 occasions over the last 6 months. Each occassions i booked and paid for a room with a double bed but upon arrival was given a room with a single bed or a room with 2 single beds seperated by dresser ( to late at night to debate) . Typical tasty Indian breakfast on offer with eggs made to order.

Had attended a family banquet party. Being from the hospitality industry, i was requested by the host to take care of the buffet table. Sorry, service could have been better. Very slow replenishment of food. They wait till guests have to scrape the cheffing dish, before refilling it. Baked dish was literally macaroni in thick milk at the end and even on repeated requests, was not replaced. Regular Snack-time paper napkins were offered instead of banquet paper napkins. And they waited till the last napkin to get over, before they placed some more.
Earnestly suggested that Exe Chef or GM, should pay at least one visit at "peak time" and speak to the host or his family, to inquire if things are going on fine.
Expected better from a group like Lemon Tree Atrium.
Above feedback has been given in good faith.

We stayed in the suite room, which had a great view of the Riverfront Ahmedabad. The room was so spacious and clean. We were so amazed by the hospitality and the food. There is a very well maintained swimming pool as well. The entire property is so neat and clean and the staff is so helpful and caring. Loved being there.
Great place to stay along with great amenities... Love the surroundings as places are nearby... Go for it

Location is at the banks of the River Sabarmati after crossing the river via Nehrubridge. Its a very good hotel..nice ambience..very nice reception area. Car parking is vallet. We had a meet on the first floor. It also was a very nice hall with a projector facility. Staff very cooperative. Food was very good. Dinner was served hot. All the dishes had authentic taste. This hotel is recommended.
Excellent services staff is so nice ambience was very good so happy to stay here

Great place .. Good staff .. Nice varieties for breakfast.. We had dinner .. It was tasty ..
On the improvement side …
In the executive room .. bathroom door does not have cloth hanging hooks because of frosted glass in the door .. It is necessary..

Food is average but very costly. Service is quite good. Ambience of the restaurant is also quite good. You can enjoy best view as it is beside the sabarmati riverfront. The resturant serves outside and inside premises. There no problem sitting outside during summer time as they have air coolers outside.

Went to attend a dinner at Lemon Tree Premier. It's a beautiful, classily done up property. The reception and foyer area feels so grand and yet not over the top, done up in warm shades of white and wood. We attended the dinner in one of the ballrooms and again just loved the lighting and decor there. The food was mostly quite scrumptious. All in all, i would say Lemon Tree Premier is surely among the more premium 5 star hotels in Ahmedabad, in terms of experience, architecture and service.

Excellent property. Nice rooms though bit small suitable for small family or business trip. Deck restaurant is awesome with very tasty grills and mocktails. Buffet spread was average not like other Lemon Tree signature ones in Delhi or Bangalore.

Very warm staff and the hotel is indeed good. We had an official training and everything was arranged well. The food was also very good.

The staff helped the guests with the best possible solutions be it places to see, food to be explored etc.
Undoubtedly 5 star service.

Neat and clean rooms, nice internal ambience and polite and well mannered staff. The food is good and is located centrally in Ahmedabad. Overall good family stay in mid range.
The only flip side is that Riverview from the rooms and river-view restaurant are not great sight.
Nice hotel in Ahmedabad for any event

I have been here and had a good experience in the past. However last week I visited along with family. We ordered veg food and astonishingly they served us non veg. food, which my family members have even tasted unknowingly. They later apologized and offered us complementary food, which we denied obviously. But this kind of experience is horrible and can't expect this from the hotel like Lemon Tree.

I happen to visit this place for dinner at the roof top. The ambience was truly amazing with a straight view of riverfront. The decor and everything about the restaurant was more than my expectations. But the food was okayish which can definitely be improved. But otherwise a nice place for dinner dates.

Best 5 star hotel, u get everything u ask for on just a call
Kamlesh bhai - luggage care taker is a nice person - who can't speak n hear bt though serve well.we stayed in room facing river front

Well placed decent hotel for families. The rooms are clean and facilities are good. They provide parking on premises so it helps if one is travelling in own vehicle. Food is ok with some dishes that are well made and some that are not so well. Some rooms AC is poorly placed.

When you leave a beautiful place, you carry it with you wherever you go.

Awesome view.awesome service every thing just AmeziNg❤️
Lemon tree hotels has always impressed me with their policies of employing Differently abled people. Like Jaipur, here also I met one such staff member. Service has also been outstanding.

Good location, nice and clean rooms including premise. Good dining and service. Breakfast has a wide variety of options to choose from. Good service provided by Bikram. A must stay place when visiting Ahmedabad.

This place has an amazing feel of lemon grass as soon as you walk into it. It's Cafe is good and everything here is good. Cute t-shirts are framed and hanged on walls. Location is easily accessible to this premier. I'm with love with it's fritters and would visit again if given chance.

Great experience. Excellent staff : valet, manager, chef etc all very well trained. They truly understand the meanimg of hospitality.
Three cheers to them.
Hotel had a nice ambience. Well decorated..
Rooms are too small. Light is too dim. Nothing entertaining for kids.. Swimming pool has a lot of restrictions they didn't allow the kids to. Let inside the pool.. Not worth paying 7300 for a night

Very nice experience
Ms. Chandni at reception was quite helpful
The gym and swimming instructor was nice to talk to and very friendly.
Breakfast was quite delicious.
Overall, all the staff was cooperative and helpful.

Giving an extra star just because the food was good. The service on the other hand was horrible. It was a Thursday night so I don't think there was too much rush. The drinks came after the starters were over (how long does it take to create a mocktail!). The soup was served cold and had to be reheated. The orders were misheard and took a long time to be delivered. The finger bowl came after  dessert was over. Basically everything that could go wrong did. Usually after the first complaint everything else falls in place but here mistakes after mistakes were made. Not sure if its always like this or they were short on staff that day.

Neat small hotel with warm service and excellent food. They have a pool and fitness center that I did not use, so cannot comment on those. The rooms very spacious and comfortable, with a personal locker and amenities like shoe polish, tooth brush etc. They also offer wifi (free of cost in the lobby only, in room wifi is paid - I think), and laundry service at a cost. It is a lovely hotel, and ideal for short/business trips to Ahmadabad.

Good ambience of the hotel. Rooms have very comfy beds. Housekeeping and in room dining staff are quite nice.
Special mention - Riju was very nice and polite. Great service by him.

We stayed at the Lemon Tree Premier –Ahmedabad, Our stay was exceptional and all the staff (from the security staff at the door, to the reception staff, restaurant staff went the extra mile to ensure the stay was as comfortable and unforgettable, Special thanks to housekeeping Ms Neetu for very good service with smiling face, The hotel is quaint, extremely clean and has excellent facilities. we will definitely stay at the Lemon Tree Premier Hotel. I would highly recommend this hotel to others!

This is a newly acquired property by Lemon Tree and it needs major improvement. The service is poor and the very slow. We had booked a double room for 2 nights and even after telling them repeatedly it was serviced for only 1 person !! We had to keep asking for an extra towel and Toiletries . The Restaurant is good for breakfast but terrible for anything else! We went for some evening snacks and even though there was only one more table being served , we were kept waiting for one whole hour for our basic order! During Checkout an extra Service Charge was added to the bill and upon interrogation the staff meekly answered "you may remove this from the total if you wish"  Which we most definitely did! The location and Parking are the only plus points here. Overall the Hotel is overpriced for the kind of service it offers.

Recently stayed here for 3 days on occasion of office conference... Superb rooms (if you are lucky you'll get river facing room), Prompt room service, Specious conference rooms and most importantly delicious food.. Our all meals were in buffet system at royal cafe on ground floor.. you can also order ala carte by scanning barcode.. wide variety of food & drinks offered.. live counters for dosa n egg were also there. Totally enjoyed my stay here..

Starting from check in, experience was poor to say the least. It took us more than 30 minutes to check in at 4 pm, staff at reception was searching for others to complete the check in. Room was disappointing as well with shower hardly working, only one towel, noisy and non functioning air-condition !
Superb room service and location.. beautiful atmosphere.

Average hotel to stay in.
Buffet has limited options but will satisfy the taste buds. Loved almost everything on menu.
Best was the staff. Really greet you well and ensure you get the best service to tbe extent possible.

Front desk service was good.. But room allocation was late even tough our check in was around 9.30 pm. Wifi not working until 12.30 am.. Got a call at 12.30 am to say wifi is working... What the hell... This was a business booking.. After a long day of meeting.. Don't expect to be waked up to inform wifi is now working. Then as per package no welcome drink served... Soup served at the restaurant not good had to change twice.. Still charged.. Overall a bad stay.

Pathetic service at the breakfast on 15/5/23. Did not get the items I ordered even after waiting for 15mins. The hotel staff on the floor were careless not even bothered. Finally I had to leave as I was getting late. Very bad!!!

Yummy food with an unbeatable service. Thank you to Chef Deepak, Chef Phukraj and service team Raju, Moumita, Sujan, Surajit, Bikram, Toofan, Asif Sheikh, Rishikesh, Subrata. Do not miss the unique exceptional briyani of Chef Suhani Jain.

Visited this hotel recently. Hotel is following safety guidelines for visitors. Availability of sanitizer and thermal checking. Room is cleaning on daily basis. Thanks to staff such as Mr. Dharmendra, Ms. Ruchi for taking care of staff. Menu cards are also on whatsapp..and less physical touch. Good stay.
Services all good.. Really comfortable to stay here..

The Riverfront Grill
Overall Rating: 4⭐
Recommended for: Dinner date with a view 💕

I can (and I did) spend hours beginning with watching the beautiful sunset 🌅 here , continuing till the night got really cold.

The Riverfront Grill @lemontreepremierahmd is my personal favourite ❤️ and the only place in city I know where you can sip on a cup of tea while enjoying the sun set ☕

Winter is the perfect time to try out their menu of grills. However, the food has a scope for improvement.

It's so so perfect for a romantic evening. 💑 Or just a nice, relaxed time with your family or friends.

Food 3.5 ⭐
Ambience 5 ⭐
Service 3 ⭐
For more, follow on Instagram PurpleClutcher

They need to send their staff at Hyatt on the other side of the river for some customer service training.
If u don't want to ruin ur day...stay away from this place.

Stay with hotel was good services which they provided was also good. But, as per our discussion held with Mr. Bhavik (Sales department) who give us confirmation regarding the valentine dinner which was not happen in the evening we got a call from reception they told us that they provide us buffet dinner at Citrus cafe after which we called Mr. Bhavik regarding the same discussion, so many calls we did to him but he end up switch off the phone and in begging of the call he told us that today is Sunday don’t spoil my week off. We as a guest don’t accept such behaviour from the hotel staff.

I have stayed in the same hotel for 3-4 times. Just because of best service. But today when I called in the hotel for booking. Sales team are quoting very high prices. Also they are cofused about room rates. Sales team is very rude and don't know how talk to the customer. Now onwards will try to avoid this hotel.

Very disheartened by the experience. Check in took 40mins, the tea-coffee maker wasn’t clean and had left overs of Maggi done by the earlier guest. Check out took 45mins. Used linens, just tried to be laid out tight but had umpteen creases.

Absolutely,  all of the staff are very friendly,  and accommodating,  the breakfast is brilliant with a nice view of the river , plus the location of this hotel has Less air pollution,  highly recommend this hotel.

One of the best hotels I ever visited and stayed. Very warm welcome given by the hotel staffs. All required amenities that you look for is available at the hotel. The signature style of this hotel is the "Behaviour of the Staff members". They would always be ready to help you and ensure your comfort!
The staff was so welcoming. They took excellent care of us. We left having made new friends. The hotel is beautiful and clean. The food is delicious and safe for westerners.

Easily accessible, on bank of the Sabarmati, good parking, excellent restaurant with wide variety in food including Breakfast. Good rooms and service. I was provided with a good Yoga Mat too.  Polite helpful staff, good exercise room and swimming pool. Live up to their Brand.
Great service by the the staff and easy to reach. A must stay for tourists

Misogynistic rude and impatient staff ruined an otherwise pleasant experience. I'd give this place top points for ambience, food was decent too ( I've had better at less expensive restaurants and the naan could have been brought hot instead of room temperature). When one is out for a dining experience in the age of food delivery apps, one comes to a 4 star establishment's restaurant expecting a little extra. However, upon reaching the restaurant, not only were we ignored for the first 10 minutes, the lady server assigned to us seemed to think she was only to ask "sir" for everything, as my husband and I were seated at right angles to each other, she turned her head specifically towards him each time and brushed aside when i said something. The lack of training was almost amusing. Then she insisted that starters are always served before main course although we tried requesting her to serve everything together and gave up. Then she abruptly came n stood behind us, breathing down our neck, saying main course was ready so she wants to clear out plates which still had some kebab on it, making it awkward for us as we told her to wait so we could finish it but she just stood there till she could see our plates were empty! The valet parking guy who opened the door for me looked through me to greet "sir" on the other end, and i think that was the red sign at the entrance i missed. Never ever going here or recommend anyone with self respect to go here. Will make it a point to email this to the lemon tree management as well.

Very nice place to stay. Spacey and clean bathrooms. Courteous staff who were always willing to help and refused tips whenever offered. The restaurant also served good quality food. I would definitely stay here again.

Ambiance is great! Been there for a dinner date and it was a good experience. There's an open terrace restaurant facing towards riverfront! And starters they served was amazing but the veg main course was ok ok. Overall experience is good.

THE BEST  5 star HOTEL NEAR SABARMATI RIVER FRONT ✨The hotel have different types of bedrooms with a beautiful river view ♥️the property also have a Very nice underground swimming 🏊‍♂️ pool with nice interiors 😊The food is good 👍 The property has nice hygiene and cleaning is done throughout day . The staff is soo good and behavioural ✨ ! All over i had a nice stay at the hotel 🏨!

I have posted more photos and videos of the hotel ! Refer them also if u would or u r visiting the property!
Thankyouuu!😇

Great place for breakfast !! Various options available ! Staff is very nice, always requests you to try more things and always ready to serve. Made me feel special ! Food was 4/5 but still better than most places in city. Bit expensive for students.
Please put in more information about the places around the vicinity of the hotel as well as the places to visit along with place of worship thank you for your lovely service
The place was good and decent selection for breakfast buffet. 3km from station. Found one staff to be a bit rigid and not accommodating. Hence giving 4 star instead of 5.

I successfully completed my 6th months industrial training by this hotel in the year of 2009-10 (oct. to mar.).Last Saturday (12/01/2020) I visit Ahmedabad for official trip,
when I rich this place i fill 10 years back flavor in air....I miss Le Meridian which is know as now lemon tree premier...GM sir Mr.Ajit alam singh & Mr.Biplab Pati they are my idol in my life....
One of the best hotel in Ahmedabad exact on riverfront. One can enjoy the beautiful stay with nice view from window. Mouth watering food in open restaurant serving sizzler’s. 😋 highly recommended …

Apparently looks smart but there are number of shortfalls.The travel desk is extremely inefficient. Cars provided by them are with extremely dirty interior , stinking throughout and without any freshener.The drivers are clumsy and without any sense of decorum.Also they lack knowledge of the landmarks.Extremely disappointing experience.
Restaurant Staffs are friendly but utensils are sometimes Brocken.

Wonderful Hospitality
We had such a nice stay @ lemon tree premier atrium. Clean hotel with excellent breakfast/dinner buffet. We had breakfast and dinner at the hotel. All types of spread were there from continental to Indian both for breakfast and dinner. Also the staff to name a few Mr Vikas, Mr kishore, Chef Lakhan & Ms Jaya was so cooperative & friendly.
This is a wonderful place and the staff there is overall the best in the city and match that of any 5 star hotel. We also enjoyed the panoramic view of the River Sabarmati. It is perfect for both business and leisure travelers.
They really care more about you as a guest than your money as many others hotels do only care of earning money of you.
We will ONLY come to this hotel whenever in ahmedabad.
All the reviews here are paid reviews and fake reviews. never come here this is the worst place I ever went, never recommended place

Hotel is situated at the heart of city. Sabarmati river is flowing near by. View is great at night if you stay in riverfront side. Rooms are compact unless you opt for suite. Has swimming pool and gym. Food is good. Non veg is available but no alcohol. Service requires lot of improvement. Has enough manpower and I think management can be relooked at.
Staff is supportive, Location is also good if we get room at river view side. Food is also OK but items are limited.. many more items could be added in menu. Our overall experience was good.

It was great experience. The view of riverfront was amazing. We went for dinner, Food was good, great in taste. Service was also good. Ambiance is awesome. Atmosphere is so peaceful. One of my favourite place in city.

View from the rooms on top floor facing the sabarmati are good. The hotel is well designed. Especially the swimming pool which resembles Roman baths. Very helpful employees. Food and the room are ok but not awesome.

Overall a good hotel for small stay but definitely the food needs some help.
There is a live performer during dinner. Not a great singer but puts in great earnest effort and full marks for that.

A business hotel and that's exactly what it is. Mostly business. Some of the F&B staff, though rough around the edges, tried really hard and succeeded in adding value to my stay. The USP, is the view of the river front at night from your room. Full points to Gujarat Tourism and lemon tree for that aspect
Room service not found ok, no securities of personal material because door found open after coming back from out side.

On the Bank of Sabarmati, Overlooking the riverfront, lounges this plush and stylish hotel, enhanced by landscaped greens and serene water body.
Location is good , restaurant food is also good, rooms hygiene.
Very well made and maintained hotel.  Restaurant ambience is also very well done.  Menu is well thought and kept concise. Waiters need to be trained a bit more to get best results and revenue.

Booked from mmt around first week of May. It was purely because , many hotels in Ahmedabad donot allow couples, kinda strange to me. I found bit on expensive side,but had a complimentary airport pickup. Room was clean, compact and pleasing. Overall, I won't choose it again, probably because of the price of the stay.
Best in the business, professional luxurious business hotel, kind staff especially Ms.Sharada 👍
Wow, absolutely loved jt !!! Finest amenities i have ever seen … highly recommended ✨✨👍

We stayed for 4 days, I felt very good service wrt all aspects. All staff are very friendly and professional. Hotel was clean, food has good quality n taste. Also can able see sabarmathi River front. And located at prime location.
Hotel is rated as 5 star in MMT, but it actually looks like a 4 star property. Even the menu has very less items. In the hotel buffet ( all the three meals ) the non-vegetarian feels neglected...

If you find yourself in Ahmedabad, the Lemon tree Premier - the Atrium is the ideal place to stay.
Situated in Khanpur, this is an excellent hotel for a family stay.
The hotel is taking all precautions against the pandemic and you will be checked for temperature and your luggage scanned, before entry.
The staff is the best part of the hotel and will greet you and treat you like a royalty!!!
The front desk is very helpful and will take care of your requirements even though it might not strictly come under hotel services.
The restaurant in the hotel dishes out excellent food. Mr. Namrish, Ms. Babita, Ms. Saptaparna and Rinku, staff of the restaurant excel in their services and are sure to satisfy your gastronomic requirements!!!
The hotel is fitted with all modern amenities and house keeping staff are extremely helpful.
The only shortcoming was regarding the bathroom accessories such as bath towels which have certainly seen better times and need to be replaced.
Enjoyed my stay of five days at the Lemon tree - Atrium and will certainly return to the same if I need to visit Ahmedabad again.
Thank you, Lemon tree Premier - The Atrium!!!

Excellent ambience,rooms are good  and well equipped. Staff is very cordial and concerned. Ready to help with extended arm.well maintained pool and gym. I will like to stay in future if got a chance to visit Ahmedabad.
Good property, has been moved to different owners. The location is nice with river views on one side. However not very happy with the food quality. We had breakfast and didn't like it much.

Awesome stay with butiful view from our suite...but breakfast cud ve been better.i guess it being weekend there were no corporate guests hence they lacked good food..
Bience is lovely n overall service is good tho

It's a good hotel to stay, ambience is good, rooms are good, price is moderate. The only issue I had was driving the car and parking as the road is very narrow near the hotel. The location is old Ahmedabad so all the heritage places are very near. Overall good experience.
Good location in front of sabarmati river, but apart from that everything is average. Food quality is Good but rates are high, service is ok need to improve.
Yeah, special thanks to tamal, saptaparna , Biswajit and rest whose name I might not know who took excellent care. Never felt I was dining in a hotel. Saptaparna was really caring. God bless them all
Good service, good food, nice ambience, brisk staff. I like the way Lemon tree has differently abled [hearing and speaking] staff in banquet service, who anticipate needs of the guest so well. Kudos
Hi all... Please dont go here... The ratings are fake.. They are asking agents to rate them in google. Please find the screenshot attached
Hotel is good in every aspect else some room service like water bottle at 12 mid night might got late or like me you people may need to call twice for same.
I stayed in the hotel for 2 days. The room was good but food particularly lunch and dinner was bit okay. The location of the hotel is nice with rooms facing the riverfront.

Good location at bank of Sabarmati river, Spacious, bright and well maintained rooms. Stayed in Room no 305, river facing, enjoyed our stay in hotel, specially House keeping staff is very good, co-operative and supportive

Visited on sunday had thier buffet breakfast
Spread was large and all the food items was very good
Service was quick and staff present was attentive
Ambience is fantastic hotel is located on riverfornt which gives amazing view from the hotel
Indoor Swimming pool  was also very good had an amazing time
Will surely love to visit again

Hosted a function here and stayed for a day.
Service, food and hotel ambiance is good. Location is close to riverfront.
Amazing.    love to stay there best part the view if you love natural.   Lobby  looks rich and feel like  rajwada mahal . Rooms are average size .  Amenity respects the standard .

Located just opposite the Sabarmati Riverfront, the hotel offers awesome views of the river facing rooms.
Food was awesome and the staff was quite courteous.

Pricing a tad higher but totally worth the experience!

Food is not awsome  mutton seekh kabab was good and dry was good lemon juice was ok ok and biryani was third class and also butter roti was very bad  over all 1 star   experience was ohk ohk of iftari i donot recommed to do your party here
Good place to stay, staff is gentel, co-operative,

Very nice.Cozy rooms.Staffs, their behaviour, Room service all wonderful...
Couldnt find any discrepancy..
Loved the place and it's location..just near river front.

Lovely hotel with friendly team and each time when you come back they make smile. Great hospitality does not need formality or world class luxury, it's the team that matters, no matter what short come, we always enjoy this particular team members at The Atrium, Lemon tree premier Ahmedabad.

Location is but tricky as it can be seen from the bridge but finding entrance was difficult as it was a crowdy area. Food seas very good. Purple were good and attentive. I think a lot of space should be there for parking.
Very friendly and efficient staff. Pleasant rooms.
Very Good Hotel with efficient services and staff was very cooperative in everything especially front desk including Kamlesh, chandan, and shardha 😊 …

15th nov...we..went..at the roof top restaurant.. They decorated the table..with rose..specially for us..greeted us...very nicely..treated..us with lots of love..with complimentary..dish to..the end..with the drink..we enjoyed..the. night..
Especialy the beautiful lady girl..who sereved us with a sweet smile..can attract..customer..again.n again..keep it up guys..
Had food here. Ambiance is okay but food was delicious.
Great and amazing work. I liked the work of housekeeping specially Prem, he is really amazing and did a great service

Mr Abhishek yadav manager front desk is very arrogant speech ...staff was very bad and whorst language behaviour...... money invested is not worth ....they are really not ready to listen the problem
Very bad experience first time in life

Very nice experience, personalized service, food quality and taste is very good.
Enjoyed stay 👌👌👌👌 …

Novotel Ahmedabad is a top-tier hotel offering a perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and convenience. Located on SG Highway, it provides easy access to business districts, shopping centers, and key attractions, making it ideal for business and leisure travelers alike.

The hotel features spacious, elegantly designed rooms equipped with plush beds, free Wi-Fi, and modern amenities to ensure a comfortable and relaxing stay. Guests can savor a wide variety of delectable cuisines at The Square, its all-day dining restaurant, which offers both local and international delicacies.

For relaxation, the hotel offers a tranquil outdoor pool, a fully-equipped fitness center, and a rejuvenating spa that help guests unwind after a busy day. Novotel Ahmedabad is also known for its excellent event facilities, with versatile meeting rooms and banquet spaces, making it a popular choice for conferences, weddings, and other gatherings.

What sets the hotel apart is its commitment to hospitality. The staff is professional, attentive, and always ready to assist, ensuring a seamless and delightful experience for every guest.

Whether you’re traveling for work or vacation, Novotel Ahmedabad delivers an exceptional stay, combining world-class amenities with warm, personalized service. It’s truly a place where comfort meets elegance.

Overall Verdict:  My recent stay at Novotel Ahmedabad was unfortunately a disappointing experience, falling far short of expectations for a five-star hotel.  While the location proved to be convenient, the outdated facilities and lack of attention to any detail by staff significantly impacted my stay.

a. Staff: The saving grace of this hotel was its staff. I'd particularly like to commend Amarpreet at The Square restaurant  and Lovi for their courteous and excellent service .  While the food was decent, the staff's genuine efforts to please were truly appreciated. However, some of the reception staff seemed unaware of the standards guests expect from a hotel of this standard.

b. Hotel: The hotel itself is in dire need of renovation and modernization.  From worn-out rooms with visible marks and dated furnishings to torn key cards and malfunctioning telephones, it was evident that little investment has been made in maintaining the property. TVs don't even have proper HD clarity and seem 15 or more years old in appearance and output. This lack of upkeep created a sense of neglect and significantly detracted from the overall experience.

c. Location: The hotel's location is undoubtedly a strong point. Situated in a convenient area with easy access to transportation and nearby attractions, it provides a good base for exploring the city.

I was looking forward to my stay at the Novotel Ahmedabad as I was previously staying at the only Accor property available in Navi Mumbai,  ibis Navi Mumbai, where I was overwhelmed by the warm, friendly welcome given by the staff. I beaming smile greeted each request.  Not at the Novotel Ahmedabad, a cool business like check-in, no smile or kind welcome. Twice I had to call to have my air-conditioning repaired as it was locked on 26c. Twice I had to have the TV remote fixed until finally my request for the batteries to be replaced in the remote control was listened to and the problem was solved.
The Executive Lounge had only soft drinks,  no sparkling water or soda water. No kettle to make tea. I had to use a very dirty microwave oven to boil water.
The buffet dinner was the highlight, but you pay a premium price for this. But the dinning room chairs were filthy with stains and residual food marks. They were dirty and needed to be steam cleaned. It was clear no maintenance schedule was in place. The swimming pool was a glaring example of this. The pool surrounds were rusted through. I gentle touch left flakes of rust on my had and in the pool. A few of the male waiters managed a smile in the dining room, but I was underimpressed by the hospitality of the other staff. A smile costs nothing. The final straw was at checkout when my bottle of confiscated liquor could not be found as it was given an incorrect room number. This hotel is 5-star in name only, not in service or quality. Novotel Ahmedabad you can do better! I had intended two more stays at the Novotel Ahmedabad on my Indian vacation but sadly I will have tolook elsewhere. I'm a disappointed Accor club member.

On the 21st morning, I booked Novotel Ahmedabad for my 6-hour stay. They swiped INR 9,440/- from my CC.

In my email, I received an invoice for INR 4,480/-. In response to this concern, I contacted their sales manager, who informed us that a system limitation prevents us from generating an invoice for the full amount on our "All Accor" application.

I checked in around 6 a.m., went for breakfast, and then we went to our room.

We informed them that the A/C system was pathetic. They sent a technician to our room twice, but the situation was unsatisfactory. We were sweating in the room due to the malfunctioning A/C system. After seriously explaining the situation to them, they rearranged another room for us just one hour before our check-out time.

In response to this issue, Arti Kukreti, their manager, informed us that their centralized air conditioning system maintains a constant temperature regardless of the temperature you set in your room, and it was so high that we were sweating because they wanted to save some pennies.

Despite paying INR 9,940 for 6 hours, we were unable to sleep for even a single minute. We received no satisfactory explanation for the double charge, and ultimately, they declined to issue a refund.

When we told Miss Arti that we wanted to meet their general manager, she informed us that the GM is currently attending a back-to-back meeting and is not available to resolve this small issue.

Despite being a member of the All Accor group, the staff treated us with complete disrespect. Their manager Arti replied to us that we don't have any proof for any of the things, so they will not believe us and we should leave.

The Novotel Hotel in Ahmedabad is a well-known upscale hotel that caters to both business and leisure travelers. Located on Sarkhej-Gandhinagar Highway, it offers convenient access to various business hubs, shopping areas, and local attractions. The hotel is part of the Accor Hotels brand and is recognized for its modern amenities and excellent services.

Key features of the Novotel Ahmedabad typically include:

1. **Accommodation**: The hotel offers a range of rooms and suites with contemporary interiors, designed to provide comfort and style.

2. **Dining**: Guests can enjoy a variety of dining options, from international cuisine to local specialties, in the hotel's on-site restaurants and bars.

3. **Meetings and Events**: Novotel Ahmedabad often provides extensive facilities for meetings, conferences, and events, with well-equipped conference rooms and banquet halls.

4. **Wellness and Recreation**: The hotel may offer a fitness center, swimming pool, and sometimes a spa, providing guests with opportunities for relaxation and leisure.

5. **Family-Friendly Offerings**: Being part of the Novotel brand, the hotel is likely to have family-friendly policies and amenities such as play areas or family suites.

For the most accurate and updated details about room availability, rates, and specific amenities, it’s recommended to contact the hotel directly or visit their official website.

Very good gym
