Next day we asked for delay in check out and they gave us one room extended for 2 hours. They wer courteous and understanding. During breakfast I did not like a certain dish, found it bland, the staff took feedback from everyone and when i mentioned this, the chef personally came to understand the issue and make it as per my preference. Shows how much they value customers. Good rooms n beds are provided by all. These small things make a difference.
excellent service, delicious food, and a pleasant ambiance. However, I did encounter some water leakage from the ceiling, which was unexpected and not in line with the usual Marriott standards.
Had a very good experience staying. Room and bathroom spaces are huge. Breakfast was nice and team is courteous, especially the Momo cafe waitresses very attentive, polite, talkative and friendly.

Excellent hotel to stay while in Ahmedabad. The staff is super nice,  always eager to assist. Front Desk manager Priyam deserves 5* for her outstanding service along with Abhishek Parmar and Avinash. Kudos to food service manager Mr. Anirudhh and Jaydeep Patel for attending to small details and making sure each and every hotel guests are attended in timely manner. Executive lounge staff is also very attentive and welcoming.  I have stayed at this hotel for past 5 years and they are consistently improving their services. I  recommend this hotel without any hesitation.  If you are looking for a comfort with class this hotel is for you!

We had bulk bookings and got the best deal. Staffs were very courteous as well as helpful. They have different floors for smoking and non smoking rooms. Java cafe had delicious food. Room size was good enough.
Their security understands that they are owners and all the labourers and vendors are thefts. please make it easy going, or change security service.

Good hotel with good service standards. Breakfast was of high quality with lots of options. Rates were competitive too. The pool is small but good and well maintained. Best part is the service with smile. Neha, Deep n Pooja  were extremely helpful. The place has a good spa and the cleanliness standards are good. The view around from higher rooms is good too. Overall a great hotel to stay!!

Staff internal shift transfer communication was poor.
The room was booked, and reception staff said no room was booked, then said sorry that there was a communication gap.
same in food.

We already discussed event food planning and at the last moment due to Hotel staff made changes and the event management team was not aware. After discussion, they arranged things, but again, there was a communication gap.
Always an excellent experience with this hotel. Staff are extremely polite and helpful. Loved the live music  played during breakfast. A musician was playing a sitar.
Stayed many times in this hospital. Everything from rooms, cleanliness,services, ambience, breakfast are excellent. The most I enjoy is morning Sitar vadan.

Amezing banquet
Rooms are very nice 👍 …

I wish I could give them No STAR.

If you are looking at spooling your night, Go to Bayleaf. Completely disappointing and totally disgusted.

We went there for our New Year’s Eve celebration Dinner and we opted for the fixed Menu.

We literally had to BEG for service and for food. Let me tell you we paid for it in advance and we still had to ask them hundreds of times for each course of our meal. They served us Papad and Pickles and then totally forgot about us. We had to wait for 45 mins before they served us starter for 1 person. We then had to ask for salad, 2nd person starter, soup, and even main course. We had to even keep on reminding them to serve our food to us. There was order THAT SHOULD HAVE BEEN FOLLOWED of the way the food was coming to the table, we were treated as if they are doing a favour to us.

KUCH BHI KABHI BHI LE AATAY THAY AND THEN WE USE TO REMIND THEM THAT WE DIDNT GET THIS FROM THE FIXED MENU AND THEN IT WOULD TAKE THEM ANOTHER 20 mins to get the dish.

The staff was running clueless and we knew they have messed up with our table. They were not open about the delay and they kept saying 5 mins.

As we got really annoyed because of the delay we called upon the restaurant manager who was mum and didn’t tell us for the reason.

I just want to say that I would have never expected such service from Marriott and what happened today should have never happened.

We left without finishing our meals but we did tell the Manager off but from his attitude it looked like he couldn’t be bothered.

The attitude of the staff should change and they should take guests seriously.

I don’t know if I will ever give it another try as they spoiled my New Year’s Eve.

The best experience one can ask for coming to Courtyard by Marriott Ahmedadbad is like coming to second home. Staff well mannered all with a smile, The hotel is also well located with easy access to a nearby mall and other facilities. The courteous and efficient staff is the strength of this hotel.I love the quality that they remember small small details (needs) of there guests which make you feel special. Love to visit soon
Rooms5.0Service5.0Location5.0

The swimming pool is a big dissapointment. The gym also is no great. They have a sauna in health club but no attendants. This  isnt a classic 5star hotel as per amenities but the kindness and service makes it one.

Visited Momo cafe as a part of my business meeting. We ordered coffee to go with mushroom 🍄 Risotto.

The taste of the food was good but services was not upto the mark , as they took too much of time to prepare the order.

Business Trip with more than 25 delegates/business leaders for two night and three days.

1. The Hotel has a huge lobby now this gives space for the guests to wait. We shared all guests ids before hand and it helped in quick check in.

2. Rooms are slightly old but you don't lose out on the premium experience. Hospitality at the hotel is outstanding. Met the General Manager, Deep. Head of Sales, Tushar. And the entire team was courteous.

3. There is a roof top swimming pool, I missed out on that but it was good as my colleagues pointed out.

4. One area of improvement is the end to end execution during Dinner and Breakfast on a busy weekend, at the Restaurant. Need more training for the team to understand how to manage guest experience in rush times!.

Overall, must visit and great experience.

Experience the finest food options and dedicated service at all times . The Ex Chef is simply amazing and offers you the finest curated dishes .
The team has very good guest focus and offers a warm service .
The Cafe ambience is simply amazing and the Team Leader is absolutely focussed to offer the best services at all times .

I was here for an event and am basing my rating on the food that was served and the service by the staff.

Food: yes, the food is usually average at events but this particular event wasn't as large (300 pax) and you'd expect more from Marriott. The food service stations were ample but the food taste was almost below average. The deserts were actually very good and overshadowed the meal.

Service: since this was an event and the hotels service counts a lot towards the events success i feel they did adequate for the event. I'd recommend asking how the guests will be handled before booking an event.

Front desk staff are very courteous. Food variety is good. Fumes from Momo cafe enter lobby area which should be avoided.
Guest relations manager made sure we were comfortable.  Thanks for the lovely cake to make our Anniversary special
We had out Office Townhall meeting at the Alishaan Hall which was a great experience. Staff members were also very kind and helpful and the entire event was smooth.

Visited this regular haunt till a few years back for a family dinner. The quality of food and service at this hotel has gone down drastically over the years. Short on staff, there is no personalised attention while dining. It seemed that the waiters were untrained. Cutlery was not cleaned properly and had  food deposits. Simple requests took a long time to be catered for. The hotel needs to up the ante to be back into reckoning as a fine dine place.

Nice property by Marriott. Been there several times. Service is good and staff also nice. They have good cafeteria and smoking launge too where you can enjoy your coffee with smoke. Overall move property with decent price range as per class.

We were sitting at the reception area for the last 1 hrs and no water was provided from the staff they were just standing and behaviour of some of the staff manager needs improvement i have visited crown palza , Taj they have way better hospatility.. and one more thing my baby was crying and want to leave so i told the velet parking man to plz bring my car first bcoz of baby but he told me ‘ ye line se aayegi chabi padi hai ese pehle nai aayegi so i have to run down and take my car by my self ..

The hotel is good and staff give a very warm welcome. The rooms are great. Service is good. As a Punjabi I really like the dal makhni at the restaurant. The cafe is 24 hours and attract good crowd. I am giving 4 stars just because the common toilet does not have water faucets or jet spray. Common guys we are still in India 🤐 …
I was there for one event. The hotel has trained and well-behaved staff but the food quality was not upto the mark. Would suggest to eat outside street food at much lower price.

I stayed at this property very recently. Right from the security personal to the Kitchen staff, everyone has got very high standards of customer service. The rooms are well done and the service is topnotch. Special thanks to Chef Trivendra Rawat, Chef Rajesh Singh, Mr. Harish and Mr Krishna from F&B and Miss Ananya and Miss Anshu from the Front office who made sure my stay was way beyond my expectations. The food at this property is superb. I was pleasantly surprised and highly impressed with the variety, quality and the taste of food. The staff is very dedicated at this property and they have great sense of responsibility while working. Thanks to the whole team for making my stay so memorable. This is the go-to place to stay in Ahmedabad
There is construction work happening on my floor, disturbance during the day time, I have had 3 power cuts in night. Not able to sleep

Attended a reception party here. Ambience was great. In food starters both veg and nonveg were great, in main course nonveg dishes were bit on dried out rest taste and all was fine. Desserts were also awesome. Overall a good experience.

Rooms & building outlay is nice and gives a decent feeling during the stay. But food is certainly not the strength of this hotel. If you are a foody, you won’t come back. I stayed here for 5 days. Hotel staff is very good & everything is fine. But sorry to say, food quality & taste is very average. Certainly not the level of a 5-star hotel :(
Food was not upto the mark. Quality should have been better. Alcohol license was not available. We had to drink outside. What's the point of coming here.

I will give this place a four star ranking . It's quite worthy to spent money on your stay in here. Food, cuisine, music is all good. One point is less for cleanliness. I have been there with my senior. So I found it a bit less clean than compared to my stay in page one. Rest this place is a good blend  of all above the services and with really cool bar. I hope my review helps. Thanks for reading it.

I posted a review on TripAdvisor and I want to share my experience here on Google as well. The staff here were amazing, very friendly and helpful. Their hospitality blew me and I was very impressed. I booked a 4 hour tour with a driver to explore Ahmedabad with my friends and the driver provided us a bottle of ice cold water after every stop. It was very nice because the weather was really hot and we forgot to bring our bottles with us. Besides that, I went to the cafe to buy a cup of frappe and the barista asked how was my liking for the drink. He said he could redo one for me if it was too sweet or anything. This is something that I have never come across and i was truly impressed. The room is clean and the in room dining was tasty as well. I would highly recommend this hotel.

We stayed at Courtyard marriot just after lockdown due to covid 19 was lifted.
The norms given by the government were followed very strictly and all care about sanitisation and cleanliness was taken.
The rooms were very well maintained and clean.
The staff was very helpful,friendly, courteous.They took care about everything we needed. Hospitality was the best.
Coming to the food, the food was great. We tried almost the whole menu, the food was just great.

Thank you team Marriot for a wonderful and memorable and safe stay in such difficult times of covid 19.

Comfortable hotel with large rooms. Front desk staffs were warm and professional. The head chef in the lobby resturant was very accommodating in meeting specific requests. Well done! He definately made a huge difference!
Improvements could be made in ensuring the   corridors were quiet and peaceful during nights where wedding dinner is being held in hotel premises.

It's a great place to stay when one wants to visit Ahmedabad. It's on main road and easily seen and accessible. Ambience is good and have separate smoking rooms available. Food quality is exceptional. Items for breakfast are many and covers both vegy and nonveg. Chefs are great and received personalized services which is bit rare. Personalized care made me feel like home.
Very bad service and inadequate charges of everything

Excellent 5 star hotel. Spotlessly clean, well maintained,spacious rooms and rest rooms. Bed and pillows super comfortable. outstanding breakfast spread.Excellent service at all levels. But then why 4 star? Bath fittings of highest quality and cost but getting hot water was quite confusing.. should have helped if the multiple knobs that you face was labelled. Took me around 10 minutes to figure out all the knobs by trial and error and hot and cold showers...5 stars if they sort this out.

Home away from home.

Staff here are so courteous, you never feel that you are not at your home but in a hotel.

Excellent food, nice room (well serviced) with nice ambience inside hotel.

I stayed at the hotel for a full month, not once have I felt homesick!

You guys have a great team and some very talented individuals! I was looked after very well. The Service I received through out my stay was consistent and to a very high standard. Quality of food, hygiene standards in the hotel in general were exceptional.

I would sincerely like to thank Gaurav Chaudhry, Kamlesh, Rishikesh, Yogendar, Chef Anirudh, Chef Vikas and many more members of the team who made my stay incredibly pleasant.

Once again thank you very much and I look forward to visiting you all soon.

Best Wishes - Chandni

I have been to Marriott couple of time but each time I visit I feel great and specially the food and cafe are awesome.

You will not feel that you are in Ahmedabad after some time you spend here.

It's a nice place for Dinner also and for cafe any time is best time .

Review by Inspiring Dreams

Recently i visited this place.
Hospitality and behaviour of staff was superb.
I had forgotten my envelop with few documents over there, i got it safely all thanks to mr kandarp bhatt.
I must say 5 out of 5 in every aspect.

This is Rundown hotel , rooms are old and very ordinary . There is lot of traffic noise coming inside room due to poor glass quality .

Dining place are much smaller then guests staying there . There is no value of any reservations , even if you hv booked n confirmed,  they give it to someone else.

Breakfast quality is very ordinary n chef needs more experience in making dosa, utthapa etc. There is lot of scope to improve Breakfast...

You get better n New hotels like , ITC Narmada,  Taj etc at same price or lower ...

I wish to Thank Amit , Pooja n Ashish for their courtesy extended to us during our stay..  without their efforts , our stay would hv been most horrible.

We will never stay in this old n rundown hotel .

I was at a banquet, at minus one level, and was able to experience only regarding food and service.
Food is ok, many items lack salt in taste which was not available inspite of asking multiple times. The buffet was not getting refilled which kept many guests waiting.
If you're poor, don't come here. If you're rich, don't come here.

Hotel entrance has a very open vibe and at the entrance one can see a coffee shop and a breakfast restaurant
It can get congested at the reception at times of rush or vacation times.

Overall the Hotel has a soothing and a warm feel.

One of the top 5 hotels with all the best facilities in Ahmedabad, many of travellers coming from abroad choose this hotel because of their service. Food quality is great, even java+ the cafe is also a very good place here. Perfact choice for travelers for business & also for leasure. Location of this hotel is also well connected & it is almost in d center of never ending city.

Good but not very appealing also I tried my favourite Italian baked dish Florentine here. But the 5 star restaurant didn't served it the way it is served the vegetables were not baked as it should be.

Rest my other friends enjoyed mocktails and sandwiches.

3 star only for ambience.

This hotel is just fantastic, and the best thing is the lovely staff such as Kushagra, Mr. Pankaj, ishtiyak, Sangay, Pooja, Harpit the lovely singer and many more. The food, the facilities and the ambience is just outstanding. I hope you come because you will have the experience of your life 👍👍👏👌

Booked a table for a Anniversary Dinner at Marriott. It was a Christmas Time.& the decoration was good. We took a buffet dinner. Variety of salads and dessert was there. But main course was not up to the mark.
Excellent Hotel… Great Ambience… Staffs were very nic…. Neat and Clean.. Location and View is good…

I have visited in Marriott with some friends so many time, I must say that everytime whenever I visit staff is very courteous and helpful always ready to serve with smile. Manager Nirmal and Ravikant and team is very good in customer service and satisfaction. Always satisfy with the food and service.  Thank you team keep going.

Hotel rooms are spacious and gives luxury feel. Food is awesome. Hotel staff and chef is very good, friendly, polite. Rooms are super clean. Entrance is awesome and great welcome by the hotel staff. Enjoyed my stay.

This property on Sindhu Bhavan Road is good. Breakfast is better than the nearest Marriott property but even here a lot of improvement can be done. The chef here was very receptive to inputs and feedback given by us. Hoping to give 5 stars next time.

Services are good. Specially Mr Tiwari from F & B Team he is one of the best crew person.
Appreciate his work and overall experience.

The hotel was really nice. I just stayed there for one night but still I felt really good about the place. The best part was that even though the rooms were not soo big but still they were very clean and comfortable. Even if you called the staff late at night, you would get the Same energetic response from everyone.

Very good ambience,service and food. Polite and attentive staff. Only problem is that valet services are not available and you will have to park in the basement and walk to the reception. But definitely worth it Rooms with a city view. Definitely recommended

The hotel is very beautiful decoration, furniture, lighting, well behave staff, the food is also loving as much as a service, the service is very good, and the hotel location is best area in Ahmedabad, last time I have pass good time in the hotel for my company's 43 years completed by our company. And most part of the hotel is best room service I feel ever seen. That reason I give five 🌟 for the hotel.

Positive vibes .Good food , staff service and infrastructure."It has good food and rooms but location is in a bit clumsy place"A popular hotel in satellite area, Ahmedabad. It has nice ambience and lighting. There are small waterfalls in the interior which adds to the beauty. The quality of food is good and cafe is also a nice place to visit. There is also permit facility available. Overall, a popular and busy destination famous among visitors.
Easily one of the best hotel chains in India. Amazing spacious rooms with all the basic amenities and much more. Highly recommended if someone is looking for a luxurious stay when visiting Gujarat. Airport is a bit far away from here though but still easily accessible

A Five star hotel with full of amenities, good food, great staff and service, nearby SG Highway, ISCKON Temple and Karnavati Club. It is a very nice place with awesome ambience. It has the beautiful lobby, reception and reception on ground floor.
The food served here is delicious and mouth watering. Desktop computer with print facility is provided, which is very helpful for the guest.

Have stayed here on three trips to India! For my wedding they upgraded us to a beautiful suite, two years later when we returned they put us in the same suite! We were so surprised and happy. It really meant a lot to us that they would go out of their way to surprise us like that! The breakfast buffets at marriotts in India always blow my mind! I love staying here, and I will be back in my next trip to India !

It started off really badly with really poor service and communication BUT the new manager over there , Mr NILESH changed the entire experience for us!! He was absolutely hands on with his service and facilities. He addressed all our requirements that very minute and made sure we were MORE than comfortable!! Kudos to him !! 👏🏻 👏🏻

Quite a fine collection of sweets, snacks and other junk items at affordable prices. Well placed in one of the happening places in Ahmedabad with a pretty good ambience. Would have preferred to give 4 stars instead of 3, if they could deal with the  customers in a better, humble and polite way.

As the brand is well known, this place doesn't let you down. Java + the 24 hour cafe is the main attraction for the localities. Good place to spend the night with friends with some board games. Separate room for smoking. A nice place to work on the laptop if travelling solo.

It's Cafe i.e. Java+ has great milkshakes and pastries. It's a nice place to hangout with friends for drinks and fun. The staff is very supportive and does listen to our particular requests in our orders. A very neat experience.

We Have visited Java+ several times to have coffee at night. For Coffee it is One of the Best Place in Ahmedabad. But the Quality of Food is very Very poor. Last week on 11th Jan'19, we ordered Pasta Mix Sauce and Agliolio Spaghetti Pasta on Friday Night. We used Zomato Gold Membership. Mix Sauce Pasta was like Tomato Gravy which tasted too bad.Aglioolio Pasta wasnt Cooked properly as it seem hard so actually it wasnt Boiled nicely. When We discussed Issue with Captain or Manager on floor, he Said Our Chef has changed and he went away casually without showing a bit concern to replace Dish or Call Chef. If this is the way Zomato Gold Membership is treated then better not to entertain Gold Members but atleast provide Quality Food. A Good Quality Food.Very Poor Experience for Food. Unprofessional Behaviour.
Over all stay was awesome mainly due to the team led by Guest relation Ananya Bose and other staff members such as Puja etc, we celebrated Independence Day with hotel team.

The hotel is situated at fantastic location.
The ramp made for the person with disAbility or the for the wheelchair users is not following the international standards as that must be atleast with the gradient 1:12. But it's not following the gradient. It must be corrected as that gives wrong impression to the customer and it's not acceptable as per the person with disAbility act 2016.

We visited this place for event Google Devfest 2018 & Bsides Ahmedabad Conference. All the services and arrangements for the events were super amazing.
Also lockers for luggage. Food was also delicious.
Great big halls for talks, workshops, good sound & internet connectivity,basement parking, security checks,rest rooms.

Very good hotel. The rooms are large. I took a smoking room; if you smoke with the air conditioning on, after about five minutes the smell is gone. Large, moderately soft bed. Large chair with footrest. The window is also very large and offers a view of the city. But in the evening it is noisy, especially if there is some kind of holiday. The bathroom is spacious, there is also transparent glass between the shower stall and the room, so you can watch how “someone” is washing))) the restaurant is chic, the choice of dishes is simply huge.
It's a clean hotel, the food is halal.
I think it's an expensive hotel. Great value for the price. This has nothing to do with the quality of the hotel, but drinking alcohol is prohibited in this area, and you cannot even drink beer.

The best hotels in Ahmedabad
The cleanliness is good and the place is quiet. The food is served in a varied open buffet and is considered good. The staff is professional and provides assistance at any time

Good service, polite diligent staff
B&W large good spa and gym.
Good varied food that Westerners can also eat.  Laundry and hanging ok

Gwalia Sweets is a well-known name for sweets and snacks in Ahmedabad! Whatever the festival is, fresh and delicious sweets are always present in the latest variety! And that's why a large crowd of people gathers here to take sweets and snacks during festivals! Gift packing is also available. Apart from this, there is also a food and beverage facility so that you can have breakfast or lunch.

My favorite hotel in Ahmedabad. I have stayed there twice. It is more than wonderful. The staff are fully aware of the meaning of the word customer. You will prefer to stay in the hotel throughout your stay in the place.
Great hotel, great service; fully equipped and you can eat anything there.

Great food and service out of 10.
The people who work here are very attentive
Very good, clean and nice
Not a bad hotel, but a few years ago it was much better

Staff training is well done.
You can stay comfortably.
Hihhhh
Super sweets. Must try Rasmalai, Sitafal Rasmalai😋 …
Its 5 star hotel near ramdeva chaar rasta
Great Gajab Jordar Gujarati ma kai ae to Moje Moj
I reviewed the hotel restaurant. Not very cost-effective. Sulanpam. This is my personal opinion.
The hotel is a little old, but still chic
The worst sweets in the world are available here. Please do not take any sweets from here.
Nice taste..motichuur ladu
Laxmi Narayan Rathod Kalr contractor Ahmadabad Gujarat
5star
RAS. a true 5 star.

Outstanding Experience at Ramada Hotel, Ahmedabad

I recently delivered training program at the Ramada Hotel in Ahmedabad, and it was truly a remarkable experience. The ambiance of the hotel is elegant and inviting, blending modern design with a warm, comfortable atmosphere. The moment I entered, I was impressed by the stylish interiors and the serene environment.

The food was an absolute delight. The dining experience at their restaurant was exceptional, offering a wide variety of cuisines, each dish crafted to perfection. The flavors were rich and authentic, and the presentation was impeccable. Whether it was the breakfast buffet or an a la carte dinner, every meal exceeded expectations.

The staff deserves special mention for their impeccable service. From the front desk to the housekeeping and restaurant teams, everyone was professional, courteous, and always ready to assist with a smile.

We booked few rooms and the banquet to celebrate couple of events there and thanks to Mr. Rakesh, everything went really well. It was difficult to manage a lot of guests on the day but the hotel staff did well to help us manage this things. Rooms were neat and had good enough space, while the banquets are decent in decor. Coming to the food, it was tasty overall, with starters, mocktail and soups were the standout things. Sabjis were a bit on & off, but not bad at all.
Overall a good experience and can trust them for family event, or for business or personal stays.

The name itself tells you the quality of hotel as it is chain of hotel with perfect ambiance, with all amenities, Spa, kids friendly area, conference rooms, meeting area, restaurant and many more. Wonderful service and silane zone on off road of Prahalad Nagar Garden and Corporate Road of Ahmedabad. A perfect location tagged on Google Map.

I've booked this hotel on the basis of their ratings but  what I've experienced is very unpleasant! on the first day of my stay we had a problem with television we called an engineer who took almost 1:30 hours to sort the television malfunctioning and right after that he found out another problem in the room electricity we had no electricity in our room for 2 hours which cause us a very annoying experience and stress we asked the receptionist to alter our room they said yes but right after 2 hours of wait the electricity went well working so we decided to stay in the same room because they assured me it will not happen again, I'd asked for some water bottles from the room service waiter the same day and i haven't received the water until I've called twice to remember them eventually following morning we found out that there was a water leakage from the fridge the floor was wet we barely could even walk and we complained that too. All in all this was my worst experience in the hotels so far i suggests the rooms needs to be more ungraded and up to standard while you charge that big amount of money for giving such a poor facilities, plus staff should be more attentive and responsible. Thanks.

Were there for business meet with doctors in Lunch time as usual spread is good but missing some more as.spread.is less specific Nonveg food. Quality and taste of food is good but may need improvement in service.overall experience is good.

Worst experiance ever, I worked in hotels for 12 years, several different brands and positions and I’ve never heard of charging a guest for ruined sheets. Most charges against guests are going to be from smoking and partying in the room and/or seriously damaging furniture but this hotel paying charge in worst thing there r so many 5 star hotels but they wll not charge of silly stain so dont book this hotel. Worst hotel everrrrrr

Small and smelly rooms, used bedsheets
mini bar items are chargeable (they won't tell you at check in time)
pathetic experience, don't go there ever.
They will provide two single beds in the name of double beds

One of the worst hotel in Ahmedabad. You book single bedroom, they will give you a double bedroom and the receptionist had different level of ego and attitude. There is no slipper in room and if you ask, they will deliver in 20-25 mins. So, I can say, they have very fast service.
Very well located. Good clean rooms and the staff were very helpful. Breakfast choice is good for vegetarians.

Well Ramada Ahmedabad is a nice hotel having lot of the variety in food.
Room are cozy and comfortable.
Most wonderful property it was we really like the staff specially muskaan and saritaat reception both lady was very polite. We definately visitagain.

Honestly it’s not mark to a 4star hotel .. old furniture broken baths and most importantly irresponsible staff and too slow .
The breakfast has same menu every single day with no taste . Hope you guys change for better you .

Had a pleasant stay at Ramada. The rooms were fine, so was the staff. The breakfast lounge is smaller as compared to other hotels in the same category. Also, minor details in services were missed like shower cap etc. The location is a bit outside the city centre.

Overall nice but there are better hotels in the same price point.

I had an absolutely wonderful stay at Hotel Ramada! From the moment I checked in, the staff was incredibly welcoming and attentive. The room was clean, comfortable, and beautifully appointed, making me feel right at home. The dining experience was exceptional; the food was delicious, and the service was impeccable. I was also impressed by the hotel's convenient location, which made it easy to explore the area. Overall, my stay was fantastic, and I can't wait to return to Hotel Ramada for my next trip. Thank you for the memorable experience!

Stay was comfortable Comfortable cozy rooms Food quality is very good polite staff specially I would like to mention Ms Sarita at the Reception she always greets with smile when I pass through the lobby.

They charged me Rs. 10,000 per night for MAP plan (breakfast and dinner of 2). I think it is costly, considering their services and food. They are 4 star hotel. With these rates, easily one can get a 5 star hotel in Ahmedabad.

Rest I think is fine. Overall I am giving 5 star ratings. On goibibo I found they are not charging this much. I don’t know why they charged me this much.
Outstanding experience with hotel , food was delicious and  rooms were also spacious

Good ambience and property is maintained well. Food is superb. Had dal khichdi and never had such an excellent taste. Kudos to the chef.vIts not a big property but maintained well. Good place to stay with Family and Friends

Stay for one night with breakfast
Parking : valet parking available (Open and basement)
Service : Service was good.
Room : Stayed in superior room. Decent room size with old bathroom Fittings
Restaurant : decent sitting capacity.
Food : good food with variety
Facilities : Gym and Spa. Third party roof top restaurant.
Overall ok experience. Maybe I was expecting more of the name Ramada.
It was a great stay  at Ramada . The food was awesome. Services were good n above all the staff was very  n humble . Piya n Sarita n Rajshri n Rajesh were very friendly.
Excellent stay , staff are very polite and prompt specially thanks to Sarita & Sushant make my stay more pleasant.
Chacking and Checkout time must be 12 hours from checkin then it is more convenient for stay.

Renaissance Ahmedabad Hotel is a great hotel with upscale rooms and suites, 2 restaurants, a cafe, and a rooftop infinity pool. It is part of the Marriott group and is located in Ahmedabad, India.

I recently stayed at the hotel for two nights and was impressed with the cleanliness and maintenance of the room. The breakfast and dinner buffet options were plentiful and of high quality.

The hotel has been praised for its friendly staff, impeccable service, and great food. The breakfast spread is also considered good, and the property is clean and well-maintained. The location is easily accessible and the hotel is well-equipped with amenities like a high-quality gym and ample parking.

The hotel is recommended for both business and leisure travelers.

Had gone there with 4 people for a Dinning Experience on wife's birthday, and not as a hotel house guest.

While the ambience and the location is good, the buffet on offer for dinner was nothing much to write home about. Un-imaginative mill of the run dining fare, with hardly anything soul stirring to make the eating out experience memorable.

The service was cooperative but not proactive in anticipating what the diners want and thus couldn't cater for the same accordingly.

The Live Band needs to be replaced with immediate effect to help retain the customers.

An outstanding hotel with top-notch service and hospitality. The breakfast staff are especially remarkable, offering attentive and friendly service. The breakfast spread is diverse and delicious, catering to all tastes. The rooms are spacious and offer stunning views of Ahmedabad, with breathtaking sunsets that make evenings truly memorable. Highly recommended for a delightful stay!

The Renaissance Hotel in Ahmedabad offers a pleasant stay with rooms that provide great views of the city skyline. Guests often appreciate the modern decor and comfortable furnishings, which contribute to a relaxing experience. The hotel's location in Ahmedabad is convenient for both business and leisure travelers, making it a popular choice. Service is generally reported to be attentive, and amenities are well-maintained, enhancing the overall experience for guests staying there.

Being greeted with a cake on our anniversary in the room is a thoughtful gesture that enhances the guest experience. It shows that the staff pays attention to special occasions and goes out of their way to make guests feel valued and appreciated. Such personalized touches often leave a lasting positive impression on guests, making their stay memorable and enjoyable. It also reflects the hotel's commitment to providing excellent hospitality and creating a warm, welcoming atmosphere for their guests.

My recent experience at Hotel during a staycation from June 26 to 27 left much to be desired, especially considering the hotel's purported five-star rating.

Upon arrival at approximately 7 PM after a flight from Bangalore, we encountered a lack of welcome that one would expect from a premier establishment. As new guests, we anticipated guidance to the reception, but there was none. The check-in process was notably inefficient, taking approximately 45 minutes to assign us two rooms on separate floors. When we requested to be accommodated on the same floor, we were met with indifference and directed to wait in a crowded area with no seating arrangements.

During our hour-long wait, the hotel failed to offer any refreshments—no water, juice, or soda—further diminishing the guest experience. Such oversight in guest care is unacceptable for a hotel claiming to be five-star.

After receiving our rooms, one was adequately prepared with decor and amenities, while the other lacked basic provisions such as complimentary water and sweets. To add to our dissatisfaction, the bathroom towels in the second room were unacceptably dirty. Despite multiple calls to the reception, the promised replacement towels never arrived, and the housekeeping staff displayed a lack of responsiveness.

The prolonged waiting period, coupled with the absence of basic hospitality gestures, left us feeling neglected. It was surprising to witness such poor management in a hotel that advertises itself as a luxury destination.

On a positive note, the breakfast buffet met our expectations, offering a variety of options. However, this cannot compensate for the overall inadequacies we faced.

I cannot recommend based on my experience. The management's lack of attention to guest needs and poor service execution do not align with the standards expected of a five-star hotel. I would advise prospective guests to consider alternative accommodations that prioritize customer care.

I had a disappointing experience during my stay at the hotel. The bathroom design caused water to spill over onto the floor, which was inconvenient and hazardous. Additionally, basic amenities like an iron and glasses were not provided, which added to the inconvenience. Despite raising these issues twice at the reception, no action was taken to address them. This lack of responsiveness was very frustrating and did not meet the standards expected from a hotel of this caliber. I hope the management takes this feedback seriously and works on improving the facilities and customer service for future guests.

I stayed for 5 Nights 6 days at the Renaissance Ahemdabad and heres my review of the same -

The staff from the housekeeping is very polite, helpful, and courteous. They will help you with all your needs.

All the amenities are placed in your room and you can also ask for more incase there are any.

Rooms are quite spacious with a spacious bath cubicle and washroom. However, the TV in the room is slightly discoloured and the volume is limited to 50 only.

The food from IRD is just okay. Not that great. They lack presentation and the menu is quite limited.

Their response time for IRD food is about 40 mins and for any amenities is almost 25-30 mins. This might change up and down depending upon the time.

Gym is operational 24/7. The front desk staff was also good. However, I was asked to wait 5 - 10 mins since the room wasn't ready at around 5:30 PM.

The hotel is located just 8 mins away from the Science City Ahmedabad, so do visit since it's very close.

Rest everything was good for me. They provided me a Club room on the 10th floor as an upgrade as per Gold Elite Bonvoy Member. However, the room is just same as the earlier one.

The king size bed in the room is pretty big and very comfortable.

IRD prices are affordable compared to other Renaissance properties however the laundry services are a bit expensive. Although IRD menu is very limited with almost zero local delicacies from Ahmedabad.

When you book an hotel for holiday you hope that it will meet your expectation. And this are based on their websites and reviews.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Renaissance Hotel Ahmedabad, and I was absolutely blown away. From the moment I arrived, I was treated like royalty. The staff was incredibly friendly and attentive, and they went out of their way to make sure that I had a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

My room was spacious and beautifully decorated. It had everything I needed, including a comfortable bed, a luxurious bathroom, and a stunning view of the city. I also loved the fact that the room was very quiet, which made it easy to relax and get a good night's sleep.

The Renaissance Hotel Ahmedabad has a variety of amenities to offer its guests, including a rooftop infinity pool, a spa, and a fitness center. I took advantage of the rooftop pool on several occasions, and it was the perfect place to cool off and relax after a long day. The spa was also excellent, and I highly recommend the signature massage.

The food at the Renaissance Hotel Ahmedabad is also top-notch. I had the opportunity to dine at both of the hotel's restaurants, and I was impressed with both. The food was delicious, and the service was impeccable. I especially enjoyed the breakfast buffet, which had a wide variety of options to choose from.

Overall, I had an amazing stay at the Renaissance Hotel Ahmedabad. It is a truly luxurious hotel with excellent amenities and staff. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a special place to stay in Ahmedabad.

Better to look for better options.

Good hotel, with easy access to the highway. The rooms are nice and spacious with good amenities. The hotel has a coffee shop, restaurant, spa, gym and swimming pool. They offer buffet breakfast and if you choose the MAP package either buffet lunch or dinner will also get included. The check in and check out was smooth and easy. They have limited parking on the lobby level and rest of the parking is underground. The buffet was good, with live chat, pasta counter. Decent amount of variety in the buffet and do try the Egg Benedict, it was beautiful.
I traveled with my family and we all had a great experience in this hotel while staying.rooms are very nice.service is very nice.

I recently stayed at the Renaissance Ahmedabad Hotel and I must say, it was an amazing experience. The staff was incredibly welcoming and attentive, always making sure that my needs were met. The service was exceptional, with everything happening seamlessly in the background so that I could relax and enjoy my stay.

The food at the hotel was also outstanding. From breakfast to dinner, everything I tried was delicious and beautifully presented. The hotel's restaurant had a great selection of dishes, ranging from local cuisine to international classics, all expertly prepared and served.

The room itself was spacious, modern, and very comfortable, with all the amenities you could need, including free Wi-Fi. The hotel's decor was also impeccable and added to the luxurious feel of the property.

Overall, my stay at the Renaissance Ahmedabad Hotel was truly exceptional. The staff, service, food, and accommodations were all outstanding and I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a memorable and relaxing stay in Ahmedabad.

It's a amazing hotel to stay 5 star range hotels in this area. Very nice ambience and luxury look. The rooms are very good maitainance.

All the facilities are available for that hotel. Staff's are very eco friendly and handle softly to the customers.

Foods are very nice all types of foods are available at the restaurant and water facilities are very nice.

Visually it's a good property but the staff here is not very well trained. Services are delayed.

Don't expect the same level of services that you get in any other Marriott Branded Hotels

Renaissance Ahmedabad

It’s been a pleasure to stay at this hotel and  we have truly had a wonderful experience for our first ever visit to India. The team at
Renaissance Ahmedabad has truly been most wonderful and caring to my family and I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone who is looking for a good stay with nice sized rooms and excellent services . I would truly like to thank a couple of individuals who have made the experience wonderful. Starting with the security guard who always said namaste to me with a wonderful smile no matter how many times i came in and out of the hotel, to the waiting staff who were always there to help me and the family with any need that we had. My special thanks goes out to Ashish and the R kitchen team, most importantly the chefs who were very accommodating to each and every request I made for food tailor Made to my kids health due to their multiple allergies . My thanks  also goes out to the front desk team who are always helpful and guided us well for our local journey . My highest and most loved thanks goes out to Mr Manthan Vedant who has truly helped me a lot from organising journeys to hospitals for my kids appointments to going out of his way to also source renaissance taxis for other trips that I requested. His ever lasting smile has truly made the trip wonderful and I can rely on him for anything . This gentleman is an asset to the hotel and I hope the senior management appreciate what they have , I wish him best of luck and hope to see him progress very far in the hospitality field .

Nasir Mohamed-Hussain and family (UK), room 1520.
Food quality is good , staff is humble

I had an absolutely dreadful experience at this hotel. The staff were shockingly rude and unhelpful throughout my stay. It seemed like they couldn't care less about guest satisfaction. The room was in poor condition, with dirty linens and a musty odor. I wouldn't recommend this place to my worst enemy. Avoid at all costs!

Behaviour of GM (MISS URVI) Duty manager was not good.
We have booked room for 21st of October and she refused.
Very disappointed with the service.
Other all things were very excellent 👌
Appreciation for that.

Nice place to stay. Room service and staff are good. Rooms condition was quite good and love it. The food was so delicious.
They are ever smiling and hospitality is good. Swimming pool in on the roof.
Comfortable place to stay. I enjoyed it a lot while staying.

We had stayed at this hotel for a wedding function. True reviews as per me are that this hotel is for corporate guests and not for wedding like functions.
They cater the guests of corporates like air hostesses and other officials very well and those guests were really happy too.
But I must say hotel should not work with some wedding planners who spoil hotel’s image.
Lawns are fine and food is also worth it.

The biggest problem is lifts work only with key cards. All elderly people can’t handle this. So better that lifts should not have such key card entry.

Hospitality staff and security are fine.

I wish that hotel management read these reviews and do necessary changes.

We had unlimited dinner buffet.
The food is tasty and has a lot of Variety with both Veg and Non-veg options.

The ambience is really nice.

The service was up to the mark.

Recommended to others.

Mr Tanuj from front desk

Thank You so much 🙏🏻

I wanna write this appreciation post for helping me out. My room card was inside the room and I accidentally locked my room from outside. I was sỗ worried. Mr Tanuj assisted mề helping my room tở access. It was a great service.

I am really happy for all the things he had done for me. Thank you so much. One of the best hotel i had been so far. Keep up the good work.
Worst hotel experience you can have.

I always booked the (Lounge Access) Rooms. Had stayed there for 2-3 times. This time I made the same booking but during check in I got to know that the lounge was inaccessible due to some reason. The alternative which the hotel gave was really not upto the mark, with limited supplies and very late/weird timings. The rooms and food are good. Make sure that all services are being offered to you. Before you book it. This time the experience was sour. Hopefully it gets better next time. Would stay somewhere else from now.

I'm staying here for one month. And i noticed that the hotel staff is very gentle. But the hotel can't serve it best when there are people at large staying in the hotel. But when there are limited persons then the hotel serves you the best. There are also discrimination in service also. Maybe I felt it but it defers person to person. And the rest ratings are as below.
Food 5⭐
Ambience 5⭐
Rooms interior 5⭐
Hotel staff 4⭐
Amenities 5⭐

Awesome place to stay. Rooms are great, well maintained and have very good service.
Breakfast in morning have a good variety of cuisines where you can self service or you can ask server to get them.
However, access cards have some problem. Most of the time we needed to get them renewed as after some time they stops recognizing, which made us visit reception more often.

Hotel is ok and rooms are fine but the staff can work on attention to detail. For example the internet in the room never worked and even after 3 complaints no resolution was done. Won't expect this of a Bonvoy chain hote. Also the in room dining menu was missing on check in and there was no iron in the room though there was an ironing board. The towels were tattered at their ends and the room refrigerator had ice build up. The one good thing about the hotel was its exhaustive and good quality breakfast spread. Hope they can pick up the service standards. For now the courtyards in Ahmedabad score better.

Superb hotel set in its own grounds. We got upgraded and enjoyed a few complementary nibbles at the 10th floor lounge. No need to go out for dinner after that. Rooms are clean, comfortable and well appointed. Bit far from the city centre.
I just love this beautiful place with delicious food.  Definitely like to visit again .
Went for lunch. Tasteless and undercooked. Meals left me with food poisoning.

Rooms are normal, nothing fancy and didn't feel like a 5 star hotel rooms. But I'll give 5 stars just for their breakfast. One of the best breakfasts I ever had. Service was slow during my check in. It might be because of an event there, but it was very slow hence removing 1 star.

Location is ok… rooms also are good… not the best but not bad at all… but the highlight is the service wherever you go people are the best… special mention to both the BADSHAH’s one is  a manager from the office and the other from the restaurant…. Super amazing hospitality and they will go out of their way to make u comfortable…. These guys could make a 2 star into a 5 star experience… best of luck and a must visit for all

We went for Lunch Buffet at R kitchen / Marriott Bonvey. Nice place to Eat ,with family and groups.  Spacious and Staff are Courtesy.  Lunch Buffet , in Nov 22 , is more like an extensive Working Lunch spread... Food is fresh, they refill the Buffet bowls ASAP..  and bring freshly made Starters to Table. Very Nice experience!!

It was great staying in Renaissance, ahmedabad. All the staff were very polite and humble,also , I would like to focus on the food part, taste wise and ambience wise it is AMAZING. I would definitely suggest my friends and family to visit.
Thank you.
Good food, and awesome place to spend quality time

A Good luxurious five star hotel. Loved every bit of our stay here. The service staff were very courteous and very quick.
The breakfast buffet is definitely a highlight here and  was very elaborate and very tasty as well.

Overall a hotel to stay if one is in Ahmedabad.

Very sad experience. First time came to this hotel. The mattresses are too old and weak. Your body will dig inside the mattress so deep that you can’t even breathe. I raised the issue with Reception Desk and they simply said they can’t do anything & this what we get. No solution.
And the food in their restaurant is absolutely tasteless (talking about the Indian vegetarian cuisine). Absolutely zero taste. I bet you won’t come back again here. Not atleast me :(

I have mix review or opinions for this place.

I am thankful to staf as the upgraded my room catagory on their own to club room.
But may be on the day of my stay they were having  shortage of manpower so staff were less.

1. While completing check in process no one explained us inclusion and exclusion in my package.

2. As I booked my stay from MMT so high tea , Coffee in Mill & Co was there but no one  has informed us.

3. Room was big but bathrooms was small and there was blockage in drainage or floor level was not good as water was not flowing away towards derange hole.

4. As hotel is in city and swimming pool is on terrace it was quite small.

5. Area outside the room was smelly.

6. While having food no one was bothered to refill food or mock-tails on repeated requests  as it was finished beside mock-tails empty jar , drinks were kept but it was chargeable.

7. No one from staff was bothered to help women or children for luggage.

8. Provision in room was good like kettle, iron & Board, slippers, toiletries.

Being well known brand in hotel industry they should take care of each and everything.

This is a personal favourite. Very close to s g highway. Done of the finest food in Ahmedabad. Excellent service. They have various packages like the Sunday brunch and pool, the kitty party with pool package etc. It's a little piece of heaven inside Ahmedabad!  Special thanks to Mr. Jitendra who always helps us arrange these parties!!

15 and 16 December 2023 Night stay there very bed service due to we were going to there 16 December 2023 Night approx 2:00 am but Room is not clean and already given to key of our room. Some images share this one I think that this hotel is not proper 5 star hotel.

Rooms ambience, coutsey of staff particularly at reception and at breakfast was superb.
Few bad experiences:
2 persons checked in the room with prior booking and checked in late at night, still room has lot of deficiencies. Only one set of towels, no soap, no shampoo, no conditionar in bottles. Coffe maker missing.  Called reception ,  the number engaged for half an hour. Called emergency number, promised immediate delivery. 30 more min, no response. Called again reception and then items were sent.
Called for room service.  Very few food items for dinner. Only one serving spoon for three vegetable etc items!!!
Some one needs to train staff and managers .
Nice hotel with excellent banquet which served Nice food.

Classic and Grand. The ambience is too good. The entrance is really par excellence. Service and crew is classy. Easily spotable and at heart of city. Crowd checking in is quite classy. Provides cab service and most of the basic amenities.

The room sizes are adequate, however, on keeping extra bed, becomes but congested. Modern style washrooms and excellent maintenance. Interesting point is the security, even for accessing lift you need to have room keys, so only residents have easy access to commute across floors. Good amount of security checks. Worth a stay with all facilities available and a memoir!! 👍

I recently happened to stay here for a week. Well there is nothing specific to complain about. Cleanliness was top class, rooms layout was fantastic, service was good.
One aspect where I felt they can improve is the Restaurant/Food section. I have also lived in Fortune Select which is just a kilometer ahead on SG road. The options for Breakfast or Dinner were much more at Fortune compared to Renaissance. It is subjective issue, but the food too was better there. More importantly, the restaurant at Renaissance was less spacious and understaffed. If you place any order at live counter, you were required to remind the staff member to get it. A bit of discrimination also, so to say... Some were given more attention than the others.
Apart from this, most of the 4/5 star hotels include laundry service in there corporate plans. But it wasn't included here. Which is kindoff inconvenience especially if guests plan to stay for more than a week.
Considering the fact that Renaissance is a 5-Star facility and more expensive, the expectations are higher here.

1. When I checked in the room was not ready took 2 calls to get toiletries and towels in the room.
2. Tv remote doesn’t work
3. Flush didn’t work
4. Food is ordinary.
5. No service at swimming pool.
6. Trying to call to get the remote to work but no service on the phone. Keeps getting worse

Pretty ordinary experience and definitely not a 5-star hotel

Was here for a official meet for 2 days. The overall experience was not good. Reception staff was cold  in approach , food in restaurant for breakfast was not upto the mark- too salty, improperly cooked etc. A couple of colleagues had issues in room for the whole night etc. Would not  to prefer to revisit soon.

Good food, good staff, clean atmosphere. Food is very tasty. They prepare in the authentic style and if we want some changes in the way its prepared chef changes as per our taste and serves. Baby chair available so easy for parents with babies. Ambience is pleasant. You can see the Chef cooking live. It's spacious. Staff speaks good English and Hindi that's a plus. Variety of starters and dishes available. Give it a try once.

Had amazing stay . The staff was really polite and sweet. Specially aman from the restaurant downstairs. He was so humble and nice that it was cherry on top after our dinner.
Thank you so much looking forward to come again.
Keep up the good work

This is one of the most pathetic place I've stayed in. None of the employees is willing to be of service. Right from the driver who picked us up from the airport. He was absolutely rude and made us walk till the outside of the airport and shouted speak to the hotel people and not me.
On reaching the hotel ms.vaibhavi lied to my face for not having a smoking room available and there is no departure of any customer for a few hours where as when I asked for an alternative room till they can arrange a smoking room, it magically appeared available. There is no partition or a door to the washroom as designed. How can we share that kind of personal space with anyone?
It's their policy of not serving tea after 12pm as mr.vikrant mentioned. What's the point having any entitlement of having a beverage of the day?
No one in this property cares about your comfort or requests. It's 2/3 lines of "no" they'll respond with being stubborn first.
What's the point staying in such a hotel leaving comfort of home n they don't provide anything that we ask.
Very disappointed.
Super stay, tasty food with lovely and soft spoken staff. Fill like home 🏠 Kalpesh what a man hero of Hotel if you are going there please ask kalpesh very careing person.

I had brilliant stay for one night. all made possible because of Head Chef Kalpesh. He was looking after all attention to details for me so that I have best stay possible. Food is amazing and services were amazing too.  Thank you Chef Kalpesh for hospitality.

It was a pressure staying at this hotel. Rooms are so clean and well maintained. The location  is very good. The breakfast has so many varieties as well and the staff is very supportive and responsible. Overall the experience was brilliant.
They don’t receive calls only on reception, I doubt what kind off a service they would provide. Now how would i book the service with them. A big no no.
Great place to stay. Excellent food and ambience. Yummy food.

Ok so let's start

Checked in at about 9 pm despite my booking being done with my membership number it was not reflecting on the hotel's system.
Was allocated a room on checking in the card did not work has to get it activated again
Entered the room and....
The bed was not made up
The bedsheet had stains and dust crumbs on the bed.
There was just one face towel one medium towel and one bath towel in the room. There was no bath mat in the room. The face towel had yellow stains on it.
Dinner time ordered a chicken biryani got served in 15 minutes was delicious but no mirchi ka salan or gravy served with it !
The toilet room had residue on the floor from earlier occupant.
The hand shower in the bathroom was non functional.
The AC thermostat was malfunctioning temperature control was not possible!
Next day breakfast.....
Very poor layout of counters had to literally Hoover over someone's shoulder to get flakes and milk and fruits !
The so called sambhar was made in salt - clearly no food checking was in place.
The water melon juice dispenser was just left there and what was being dispensed was red fluid - no pulp  !
Check out : How was your stay sir ?
Response : Could have been better !

Adios Renaissance - Disappointing!

Always book Direct with the hotel for the best deals. Other hotel booking apps can't get you this steal deal.
The property is just amazing and beautiful and well lit with spacious rooms and impressive customer service. We booked the deal called Ahmedabad Escape for just INR 8k including taxes for a night, which includes a free 15 min foot spa for 2, free one-way airport or railway station transfer, free breakfast for two and free buffet dinner for 2 as well with free upgrade to club level as well, if available. This is an amazing deal and worth every penny and more.
The buffet spread for both meals were lavish and the attention from the waiters were commendable as well.
Overall, am no longer choosing any other property to stay for my future Ahmedabad visits. You have truly impressed me.
The hotel is very nice and well maintained. Rooms are nice, service is amazing. Vikash Shahu from the buffet team took special care of us, keep up the good work.
Superb property. Amazing staff. They'll go miles ahead for your comfort. Received a sweet gesture today from the front desk staff just because I told them I had a long day. Heart touching!

This review is posted with the caveat that my dad is a high level Marriott member. This is one of the best hotels I've ever stayed at in my life. The service of the staff is impeccable, perhaps partially given that my dad was such an elite member, though I was extremely impressed. The lobbies are vast and spacious, with extremely good design. The restaurant and food selection is also top-notch, with quite a number of selection for breakfast including a fresh juice bar, which I have yet to see at other establishments. I would compare this to a resort quality establishment, and I would highly recommend it.
Comfortable, clean and easily accessed from SG highway

It was a very wonderful experience , thanks to team for initially giving us an upgrade in room category.
Breakfast has very good options and dinner too. Food is very delicious , ambiance is very good. rooms are spacious. Roof top pool has a great view and staff is very courteous.
They give the true meaning of hospitality.

Good rooms. Spacious... But missing that Renaissance touch.
Toilet n bathroom doors making noise...  Was there for 2 nights for marriage function. Staff courtesy was remarkable.
Food I can not describe in words but if I can define it was PATHETIC... I never had such BAD taste in my life....
Only breakfast was good...
If someone asks me option of 5* hotel I may not recommend this property....

A small but we'll managed property. Hospitality, staff is courteous, rooms are good sized and clean with all amenities. The executive lounge though small is well placed on the top floor and has cozy sitting arrangements. Buffet spread for breakfast is impressive and the chefs turn out dishes not listed in the menu as well. All in all a pleasant stay and will surely recommend to travellers. Only thing that the drive from the airport is about 30-35 minutes. But if not driving in the rush hours, it's okay.

Renaissance Hotel review

Early check in without price : Yes
Hotel room quality : Good
Washroom cleanliness : Good. Size of washroom was small.
Bed and pillows : Comfortable
Restaurant and bar: Available
Hot shower: Yes
Morning paper: No
Telephone: Yes. Dail '0' for operator and '701' for in-room dining
TV - Yes and has few channels available.
Ac - Centralised and room temperature is perfect
Hotel locality - good. Public transport difficult to reach.
View from my room - was good.
Wifi speed - good
Pool situated on the top floor is of scenic significance.

Total score - 8.5/10
GREAT STAFF! GREAT SERVICE! GREAT BREAKFAST! NO COMPALINS AT ALL, WOULD RECOMMEND TO GO ATY ANY TIME. PERFECT LOCATION. WE STAYED FROM JAN 4-JAN 09.
Wonderful experience for the first time in Japanese restaurant (Kuro). Great service provided by Vikrant and Govind Chef, specially the Sushi was delicious thank you guys.

We attended marriage stay in this hotel on 17 and 18 of February 2024 and the service was disappointed there were no coffee and tea sachet in the rooms , when asked for coffee pouch they said its not their in the hotel stock . service was really disappointing ,no worth for money

Very disappointed with the cleanliness of the rooms.dirtiest rooms in Ahmdabad or maybe India. Would anyday prefer staying in a clean 3 start property.
Irresponsible staff.
Looked like the rooms were not cleaned since 2 or 3 months.
Worst Marriott experience.

Best in town !!
Amazing service ..
Great location ..
Well maintained hotel …
Breakfast at its best ..
They have multi cuisine breakfasts which can be enjoyed by anyone and everyone ..
Quality of food is amazing ..
Gujarati dishes cravings were well fulfilled..
Great staff ..
No complains at all for anything ..
Great place to choose !!

Went there for Business conference with buffet dinner. The service was pathetic.
Details:
- Went there for company's annual meet. We were around 100 members in hall.
- Mocktails were strictly average in taste and were served with huge delays and inappropriate quantity balance between the two of them.
- During the buffet dinner, there were no proper place to dispose off the used plates, no tissue paper to clean hands. We were asked to wash hands with drinking water bottles of "Ava" company.
- Manager had no clue how to handle a decent crowd of 100 people.
- Dishes and plates were unnecessarily heavy and highly uncomfortable to hold single handedly.
- Have given 3/5 rating just because Ambience and Food quality and taste.
I hope this feedback is taken positively. Being a genuine Google guide I prefer to post my reviews in public, avoiding any personal communication with the management.

Great
Clean Hygiene and best services

Beware, if you have stayed before in marriot courtyard and above category hotels, this hotel is much lower in hospitality. however Infrastructure is good with decent rooms. Problem is on service side, they do not understand the 5 star hospitality business for sure. If not all than majority of staff looks unexperienced. right from valet to food quality everything is pathetic. much hyped R kitchen is only good for Sunday Brunch, you can completely avoid it on weekdays.
I liked the stay at the hotel. The food is super delicious and the staff is way kind. Room service is quite fast

Very nice property. I stayed there for 4 days and it was peaceful. Very friendly staff and well
Maintained.

Things I liked -
1. Rooms were spacious and equipped with all
Morden amenities
2. My fav i home device makes life easy with iPhone
3. Vast breakfast menu and quality of food
4. Getting God masala chai was another thing which added extra stars

All in all a good property to stay.

Went to the coffee shop mills & co. Good ambience, but absolutely clueless staff. Endlessly waited and was brought wrong order!!! That too for only two people. Snacks took ages. Even simple lemon drink took more than 45 mins...and that too when we were the only people sitting in the cafe!!! Very average service...but good ambience, not at all crowded...very unlike Marriott..by the time snacks were brought .  ..it was cold...and the drinks warmed up... probably a bad day at work...

Good property that gives value for money. Staff is polite and courteous. Stayed for one night and had no complaints. They even gave us takeaway breakfast since we were leaving quite early. They need to do something about the stink in the foyers.

This is one of the star categories of hotels located near S. G. Highway, Sola Overbridge, Ahmedabad. The hotel has very good security system with mannered staff and employees. The parking place is enough huge and dedicated. The valet parking facility is helpful feature. The Interior and ambiance of the hotel is quite lavish and scaled up. The designing element of the customer lounge, Banquet, Restaurant, bar and other areas is appreciable. The food here is good and delicious. The banquet is good enough and well lit with tall ceiling height of approx. 18 ft. The Hotel has a terrace swimming pool and terrace top restaurant too. The hotel has a nice garden and lawn area outside the banquet. The rooms are quite elegant and well furnishes. The place is worth visiting.

Visited in April 19

Slightly away from the city having decent rooms and good food. Has a swimming pool at the top with a great view. Wish they could maintain some discipline as people were sitting in the pool smoking while i was swimming. Good property, but maybe my expectation was more because of the Marriott tag, it did not come up to the expectations. However, a Value for money hotel with a helpful staff

Didn't have a good experience at Renaissance...
In terms of in room dining, soup was ice cold with everything falling out of the bowl...
Laundry not done properly..
Washroom door dint have a proper locking system...

Everything was so unorganised.
Very unpleasant experience.

I gotta say one of the top hotels in Ahmedabad!
Staff, security and everyone was super nice, polite to the guests
Service was on top
Although pool is on top floor it gets lil bit cold up there 12 noon sunlight doesn't do much justice 😭

The food was 10/5 stars 🤝 top notch from taste to presentation 💯🫡

Half of the people who come there they come for food xD
I visited it last year during Halloween and the food theme was also Halloween..
Halloween themed desserts 🤌🎂🧁

TIP VERY IMPORTANT
Take good care of your spoons and fork as they don't provide another 😭 especially fork..
They take your empty dishes but also the cutlery 😭

They made us wait 2 hrs to check in. We got rooms at 5pm after literally standing at the reception and arguing with the staff. And guess what we got the wrong rooms, we booked single beds and got doubles instead. And the reason the staff gave was “big crowd last night as there was a wedding”. This is the last thing we would expect from a 5 star hotel. Really disappointed with Marriott and I’m a bonvoy member.
The 2 star is only for the quality of room and in room dining staff & housekeeping staff

The hotel though is situated in outskirts of Ahemdabad but do represent the Life Style Hotel. An excellent ambience with omni-beautiful services. The reception is very co-operative and they do are active in any kind of demand or complaint. The hospitality of Marriott group of hotels always remains intact and this has been proved by Renaissance Hotel also. The swimming pool on the top of roof is an executive luxury to enjoy water on the 11th floor. Though one con with this hotel I would like to mention is about the Gym facilities. They don't have much of machines. Only a simple multigym machine suffice. There are no Barbells and the dumbbells even are at the maximum size of 25 Kilograms. One bike Cardio was not properly working and lastly they do not have anyone to attend in the morning hours till 7:30. Your access through card is open 24 hours but than no lights or AC are accessible. Rather the spa facilities are very good having jacouzi, steam and massages available. The food section is OKAY. I didn't found it to the level of other Marriott hotels. Lack of some healthy waters for the morning like Cummins, Coconut etc. Though fresh juices are available and are cold pressed. Good range of Indian breakfast but lack of international breakfast. The chef and Stewart are co-operative enough to prepare anything of your demand (if possible). The hospitality of dinning Hall again remains intact.
Finally the overall experience to the hotel is 4.5 stars out of 5, if I rate the same.

An amazing boutique hotel property by Marriott.
Have been to the previous two hotels before renaissance, this is the best one.
Service was good.
Food menu was limited and the food was also ok. The bakery cafe satisfied our sweet tooth.

Thank you
Keep up

I am a Lushika (crew in indigo airlines) and I would like to take an opportunity to appreciate the staffs I met at Renaissance Hotel, Amd, during my relocation period. I really enjoyed staying at hotel for 15 days. From front desk to dining including housekeeping, all staffs are so courteous and well behaved. Last but not the least I would like to thank the following staffs from the core of my heart----
Swati, Poonam, Shashank, Anukriti, Pranav ( from front desk)
