There is no  "WOW" experience as claimed in welcome letter of GM shree Rohit Dasgupta.
A lot needs to improve. There is no mail address on which one could give the feedback.

We came to Ahmedabad for vacation and we are glad that we chose Renaissance. Excellent rooms, clean towels and toilets, and super food.
The most important part was our interaction with the staffs there. Had good interactions with Sridhar and Hardik. Overall we enjoyed our stay there.

We have come here for one of our corporate event. Hotel is at main location and convenient to reach from Airport and station.
Good hospitality.
Food is good. Preferably suggested for midscale corporate events and gatherings.

No scope for any complaints as far as hospitality is concerned... Would expect a QR code for room dining menu and a writing pad n pen in the room... Probably overlooked during room preparation... Room dining menu was shared on whatsApp by the staff in lobby immediately on escalation... Rest all were top notch...

We booked hall for a function in December. We received the worst level of service from the management there considering the price they are charging and the tag “5 star” they are claiming. The waiters for the event were not even properly dressed, the lawn was not set right, the plot was not cleaned even after requesting to clean for 4 hours, the drinks serving glasses were not unique, the serving tables did not had cloth cover over it and so on. Even after booking rooms for couple, we got room with two single bed in it.
We do not suggest this management at all. Poor response, not up to the mark with “5 star tag”, poor service, poor cleaning response.
I have pictures for everything we observed also.
Simply Amazing hotel.. from outside it doesnt look much, but Interiors are simply amazing.. if planning for a event or for banquets, or room , you should simply check out this place .

ohhhhhhhhhhhhhh
what an nice and good location roof top swimming pool,
infinity swimming pool,
restaurant food is awesome
cafe is also good,
well behaviouring and cooperativ staff,
if you want you can take a membership also,
all service is good from hotel marriot group.

I went for overnight stay and for dinner i went to "Kuro" the asian bistro , if I talk about food sushi was delicious. Ambience, serving staff behavior. I loved it. Everything was perfect and hygienic. Everyone was so helpful and I got a special dessert as a complimentary dish. Thank you everyone.

I stayed in renaissance marriot for 2 days . The best thing of this hotel is their buffet. Fish was amazing and chicken as well. They have a lot of variety for vegetarians as well. Staff is very cooperative and friendly.

I  recently had horrible experiences with their in room dining staff ms Parul. Doesn’t know to talk to guest. She apparently had lots of attitude problem. Her behaviour was very rude . She did not care for an apology by herself . Extremely unemphatic towards guest.

Our wedding party of nearly 24 people stayed at Renaissance Ahmedabad for nearly 5 days last week. The facilities provided were excellent. Rooms spacious and clean, the Restaurant served sumptuous fare, and staff were exemplary in their service. Mr. Saurabh at the Reception counter was extremely courteous and helpful. He would always go out of the way to make all of us comfortable and his evergreen smile would brighten up a day. A big hotel like this one should be very proud of the staff and Mr.  Saurabh has done this establishment proud with his positive attitude. The only reservation about this Hotel was the placement of the Bathroom and the Toilet located separately. The disadvantages far outweigh the advantages of this style. Setting aside this feature , it would be unfair if I do not rate this Hotel Five Star grading and I stand by my recommendation.

It was comfortable and luxurious stay at this Hotel.

Very safe stay inspite COVID-19 pandemic..

Necessary care has been taken by hotel management and staff ..

Very courteous staff ... seniors and of all levels...

Cleanliness everywhere within the room, lobby etc even though there is less occupancy nowadays

Roof terrace pool  side night view is excellent

Food quality very good as per our requirement.... prepared as per personal choice....

Thanks lot to everyone of staff who made our stay wonderful

We had a great experience in  Renaissance  Hotel in Ahmedabad....specially I liked the cleanliness,  hygiene,  Ambience,  Hospitality of all staff. I wanted to tell about the quality and taste of deliciously make food,  had breakfast,  lunch dinner,  the food is so delicious specially the desert part....I have never taste that desert before....Really I have awesome and memorable experience in my stay in Renaissance!!
Thank you so much for staff for Hospitality....looking forward to more stays in Renaissance.....👍👍🤗

The hotel staff was on their toes from the point we reached the hotel.
From services to food, it was a thoroughly splendid experience.
It is one of the best 5 star hotels for hosting functions and for stay as well.

The space is good, lots of positivity in the lighting and decor. The employee are good, trained and helpful. As per the food part, as non veg not so good, example like fish was over cooked, the food was not replaced from the dishes (as I went for buffet). Veg was oke and appealing, even the dessert. Over all 3 stars
Update review adding one more star: on behalf of my last visit to Kuro which is on the other side of R- kitchen, is the best japanese meals you can get.
Just an advice you don't need to specify "The Asian Bistro" just say Kuro.
Here the meals are at the best💗, chefs knows what the customer wants, one of the best sushi(Makizushi) in Ahmedabad. I say if you are the sushi lover in Ahmedabad go ahead this will make your day!!
I really like the preparation, decor, ambiance!!
The staff knows what they are serving or what's all the dish contents are and how to present them.
Pina Colada is not in the menu, you can request it, had the best in Ahmedabad!!
I guess R - Kitchen, should also improve, because I will surely visit again.

First of all the area is very confusing if you are visiting here for first time secondly the brunch over here is amazing and stay is very nice and comfortable but they don't have a proper facility for drivers, I don't know why but at the first they will just say there is no room for drivers later when asked to other person from reception they will show the room but later at night hotel staffs also will stay over there which was quite uncomfortable for driver as well for anyone else 6 to 7 people in 2 sharing bed.

Overall other experience in hotel was good :)

Value for money.
We stayed for 2 days with some staycation package which includes breakfast, dinner buffet and high tea. It was a good deal.
Big king size beds which are perfect with little kid. Quality sleep. Comfy rooms.
Good breakfast spread. And equally good dinner buffet spread.
High tea was not actully 'high tea'. There was no spread or high tea dresser. Just a tea/coffee and made to order sandwich.
Which was not bad though.
If you get a good deal, do not miss this one.
Thumbs up to the staff.

Hotel Renaissance is one of the great property for function, stay and for make our self relax . Many indoor activities are there. Good spa option is also there. For any small get together or party they have nice lawn area for enjoy event. Over all embiance is very good but food of Renaissance is not so up to mark. Avrage food. Not appreciable . Not even international food parameters. Upgrade your taste.

It was my first time at this place. Renaissance Ahmedabad made my visit memorable. Wonderful staff and service. They are actually really helpful. Near by SG highway so location is pretty formal. overall experience was nice. If you are looking above average budget hotel in Ahmedabad to seek best in class service then renaissance will be a good option.
Awsome Food quality,
superb interior's and Hosting by Amazing staff
good Japanese  dishes veg and non veg both.
Good dessert
Many time car exhibition is programmed

@renaissanceahmedabadhotel , Ahmedabad has curated an immersive and unscripted day to celebrate their Annual Global Day of Discovery to discover our Heritage City Ahmedabad featuring itz Culture, Art & Craft, Bespoke Entertainment and much more.

We have enjoyed
Heritage Walk - Mandir se Masjid Tak

Local Scrumptious Breakfast at Chandravilas Restaurant

Charkha Demonstration by Shree Avniji

Rogan Art by Anishji & Taufiqji

Amazing Garba Performance and much more

Thanks alot @renhotels and all the courteous Hotel Members & PR for such a heartfelt event, loved it 🫶🫶

#renhotels #renaissance #renaisanceahmedabadhotel #heritagewalk #amdavad #warliart #charkha #roganart #garba #gujju #traditional
One of the best hotels I have stayed.... awesome place to stay and chill... outstanding service by the staff. Very well maintanence.

I would tell you my unexpected experience! When a friend of mine showed me a picture of a phenomenal pool with a great view I was surprised to know that this place existed in Ahmedabad. So then I checked out reviews and prices and even though i live in Ahmedabad i booked a room for a night and the view there was breath-taking. If i speak about other details, management and servicing is very professional and friendly. Gym , spa, hall,  pool, private lounge what else do you need!! I would personally suggest to spend a weekend here.
Lunch was amazing. Specially Tiramisu mousse.. Simply mouthwatering n must try

excellent service and quality of rooms, not too far from the airport. excellent restaurant and food. good to know: Gujarat is a dry state, so special individual licence is required from police for any buying and alcohol consumption. otherwise, you'll have to learn to enjoy no alcohol beer

Food was disaster and service was even more disastrous. When i told the manager that murmura and papad are soogy  please change it he said its not possible. We asked for curry and it was available even then he said its not possible. Menu at dinner and breakfast were not good. Taste was also bad.

Atleast they could change the soggy food else whats the point of being a 5 star hotel or keeping a live counter in the menu.

We have stayed in Ahmedabad Taj, Hyatt, courtyard, Leela, hilton andvamong all Renaissance stay was the worst

Renaissance is Ahmedabad’s gem in terms of
serving lip smacking food and providing exceptional hospitality to the guests. The property is handled very professionally, extremely clean and well maintained.
They have a lovely lawn for Marriage gatherings, large indoor Reception Hall, Spa, Gym, Private Lounge, Infinity Pool, lovely Brunch at R Kitchen and great snacks and beverages at Mill & Co. it is a complete package everything about the property is extraordinary. All the rooms are well maintained and covid protocols properly followed for the Guests as well. If you are looking to host a party or gathering or an event this could be the best place in town for you to zero in on.

I visited R kitchen to nibble on something interesting. The overall quality of the food was good, however, there were a few delicacies that could have been much better. The hospitality of the staff is exceptional. Ambiance is warm and very welcoming.

Beautiful Hotel with top class services!
🌼🌼🌸🌸🌸🌼🌼🌸🌸

Recommendation : 5/5  ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

1.  Rooms: Well designed & have a great view
2. Hotel Staff: Friendly & professional
3. Location: On the main Road (easily reachable via Google maps)
4. Food: Very delicious

#Check out the pics 🤍🤍

Regards,
Insta: @anewbornyogi

Loved the look and feel of it. The rooms are very spacious. Just beware of the gap between the sofa and the wall which goes unnoticed with the curtains drawn. Limited menu (Indian and Conti, no Chinese although it is in the menu) at the moment coz of COVID but the food is good. There was a set menu in the restaurant for all meals. Buffet was served only when there were groups.

Really good hotel. Cleanliness is upto the mark. Food is very tasty. Rooms are spacious and neat and clean. Hotel staff is supportive, courteous and very helpful. You can see many foreigners also checking in hotel.

All in all a very good 5 Star hotel by marriot group. Only thing which is odd about this hotel is its entrance location. Rsst all is perfect and good.

Stuff are very friendly, when I asked for vegan options they helped me and made some amazing dishes. I'm very happy to be here. Would recommend to vegans when in Ahmadabad.  If you love Indian vegetarian good, this is the city for you!

Ok. Not well managed. Supposed to be a 5-star, but doesn't qualify to be even a 3 star ! First of all, the room which they gave was stinking of cigarettes ! When I asked for a different room, the lady at the reception, asked me to wait in that stinking room, till she arranges for another room & sends the bell boy to shift the luggage. After about 5 minutes, when I went to the reception, I found that the lasy had left for the day & nobody was aware of my room change request. Luckily, the guy in charge helped out & got me a different room. How can this level of atrocious customer service be tolerated ?

Check in: When I came, by asking one lady from reception I told my name and also room booked by Adani Group, She ask some one and he started seeing the hard copies for about 10 minutes and told no booking found. When I asked "why not searching through computer then he asked to go to registration counter. Here Mr. Shubham checked and informed that no booking found. Then some senior person came and he checked and informed that yes booking is there and given Room Number 1018.

Once I have gone for lunch, asked for A La Carte, but quickly as I have to go with in 40 minutes. He requested to take buffet as order will take about 40+ minutes. Then We two have gone for Buffet. After soup, when gone to take biriyani, both chicken and fish biriyani was almost exhausted (Picture attached). After calling to concern person, which took 10 minutes when asked twice to service girls, Mr. Birbal came and he has given starter as that was also not available when we have taken soup. He requested that biriyani will be served soon as we are making fresh for you. We waited and ultimately left without taking food. Once, we were leaving, he prepare bill saying we are giving 10% concession but after my asking him that we have not taken food, why this bill? You may take for one but not for two. Mr. Birbal, shown the courtesy and say sorry and cancelled the bill.

All these shows that your people are not well trained or what but showing very poor performance for such an excellent property.

D K Srivastava
Executive Director-QCFI

Went for my friend's bday party n shocked to know that they don't hv a single cake stand..post dinner we asked for mouth freshner bt the staff said " SORRY Mam" n the buffet  menu was not so tempting at all...mixed daal with gatta sabzi n veg jalfrezi . Wt kind of combination was it?? Live Chaat n starters were very delicious...

I would have given 5-star rating but for few issues - TV was out of order and took more than 3 hours to set right, AC control button was just ornamental with no effect on increase of temp., Internal Tele services were poor, shortage of staff was evident -  otherwise stay and food both good

I never give bad reviews for any brand but this is needed. If there was a possibility to give 0 stars, I wud have. The reception and hotel booking staff need to know the true meaning of hospitality. We booked the hotel considering all the amenities of this hotel. On finding out through research about the facilities we got to know that the pool was shut and we were not even informed of it as pre booked guests.

When we inquired about the same, one Staff member named Anand asked us to search for a different hotel if we are not getting the services we have paid for. So basically it's their way or the highway.  Anand who coordinated with us was extremely unapologetic, rude and unprofessional in terms of hospitality.

We have immediately switched to Novotel Ahmedabad who gave us a brilliant deal at the same price with all the amenities, excellent hospitality and kindness.

Marriot Renaissance Ahmedabad was an unpleasant experience.

Rooms are very spacious,neat & clean.
Hotel Stfaff are extremely friendly & courteous.
Breakfast Buffet has variety to cater every requirements of guests.
For the price,it’s more than worth it.

Had Booked through Bookings.com. Requested check in was at 2 PM , 2 rooms . We checked in at the reception at 3 PM.  One room 1505  was alloted another would be alloted in 45 min was what was said. Till 5 pm since no allotment was done, we proceeded for half day city tour , and reception team said adjacent room would be alloted . To utter dismay at 10.30 pm  no room was alloted and at this moment as I write the review at 10.55 pm I am at hotel lobby. So a wonderful start to Gujrat tour, thanks to Team Marriot Keep up the hospitality. Kudos to reception team. Well done .

Dearth of staff. The basement is unclean. The room key doesn't work and the guest himself has to get it renewed. The ac temperature is fixed at 23° and cannot be reduced. The calls on the reception go unanswered at times. The person at the entrance doesn't pay heed at all and is busy playing games on his phone, you got to open the door yourself. Really did not expect this from a Marriott property, as I have stayed at many. Not at all expected from a 5 star property.

Amazing ambience and hospitality. Enjoyed my stay at renaissance Ahmadabad hotels.tha staff amazing. Mr.panday and Mr.Sarup was very polite and did her job well and wonderful experience 🙂Thank you so much

Today we are here to dine, so there are only cafes on the first floor and buffet restaurants on the second floor. As soon as you enter, you feel a low-key and luxurious atmosphere. The hall is not big, but very exquisite. There are many wooden shapes integrated into the decoration style, which makes people unconscious. I want to see the details. The style of the cafe has a bit of industrial design. There are several board games placed for guests to decompress. The design has a bit of resort style, which is very good.
I think the toilet at the back also has a unique design style. It is a small space that brings country style into it. It is very special and attracts more people to take a look.
You can stay here for a long time without realizing it, it's very comfortable.
The place is beautiful, clean, convenient, the waiters are cute and polite, cleanly dressed. The hotel has almost everything provided in the room.
Excellent facilities. The view of the city from the pool area is unmissable. The breakfast was very good. Very friendly staff. Super recommended.
A beautiful hotel with pleasant and very helpful staff, a rooftop pool with a stunning view of the entire city. I have always enjoyed all the dishes here above standard
Excellent hotel!!! Good service and expected due to the hotel chain to which it belongs.

Beautiful hotel
Location OK
It was very clean and the service was attentive.
Overall clean and well equipped
The Japanese food here is my favorite in ahmedabad!
Amazing good and service

Best location

The hotel is a pretty old establishment and looks antique. The hotel is located right by Sabarmati river and the room we were alloted had a really good view. There was nothing extraordinary about the rooms, it was usable and clean. We opted for early check-in at 9 am but had to wait about an hour anyway, which made us late for our later plans. The staff was kind but not efficient. The food quality was good and the chinese tasted homely. Complimentary breakfast had good options with non-veg available. Not a bad stay during vacation.

The Cama hotel offers a decent stay, it falls short of exceptional. The rooms were clean and comfortable.The location was convenient, but the surrounding area lacked much in terms of dining and entertainment options.

Loved our overnight stay .Big rooms ,comfortable beds, clean large bathrooms with bathtub!! Our rooms looked over garden and pool. We could catch a glimpse river Savarmati.  View of River front was good as well. Breakfast buffet had a nice spread.  You could order dosa and omelette

Our group of 31 members from Kerala recently stayed at Cama Hotel for a day, and it exceeded our expectations in every aspect.
The premises were immaculately clean, the restaurant food was delicious with varied options, and the rooms were spacious.Our entire group was thoroughly satisfied with the comforts provided. Kudos to the staff and management for their exceptional service..Highly recommended, ❤️

The hotel is good and experience was good as the location is awesome. The only thing I did not like was the behaviour of staff over the call They were being rude in the call. I had to extend my stay and I called the hotel directly to check availability. I informed them that I will pay the charges and wanted to know the price however the person did not listen to me completely and repeatedly said that you will have to pay. I would say the staff should listen properly before responding Later on the call was transferred and then the person quoted 4000 INR + tax for 2 room. I wanted to extend my stay only for 4 hours. I told them 1 room would be fine and all of a sudden they changed the price and said 5000+ tax for 1 room. This is clearly taking advantage of someone’s situation And when I told them that the price you are quoting is higher they rudely mentioned that I can roam around the city if I don’t want to pay. I think the staff behaviour needs to change

It was the great experience and it was the best hotel but i checked in room late around 4 pm and they told me to checkout out by 10pm we requested at reception to allow me to check out at 12pm because we got a doctor appointment at 1pm but they was like we can allow you to keep until 10.30am when it was 10.30 someone from reception they started calling and saying room checkout time is 10am hurryup it's 10.30 you are 30min late please checkout the room ASAP. So i think you guys need to understand your customers situation i understand hotel's policy but you guys also need to understand.  Because  paying freaking 7k per room and hotel it can't understand our situation i think that's not good.

This Hotel was recommended to me by a friend and I honestly say it was well worth it! I enjoyed my time here! The staff is all super friendly and was always happy to help. I have a small issue with the AC in my room and it was quickly resolved with no trouble! I also loved the view of riverfront from my room! I would definitely stay here again when I am in town for business!

"I recently had the pleasure of staying at this Hotel and it was an exceptional experience! The hotel's location is stunning, with breathtaking views of the Sabarmati River. The rooms are clean, and comfortable, with all the amenities you need.

The staff were friendly and courteous, going above and beyond to ensure our stay was memorable. The food at the hotel's restaurant was delicious."Highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Ahmedabad!"
Good location with spacious rooms with a lovely picturesque view of the river and the night lights..In house reataura t food was tasty as well...

100% recommend it. The front desk lady and Conceirg Mr Rajnikant were very nice and helpful.
The breakfast buffet was so nice. Room available with all necessary items and hotel is vintage style with Swimming pool, garden, gym and in-house restaurant etc facilities.
Lovely staying over here with a very good hospitality. Good place for kids as well.

I wanted to express my heartfelt gratitude for the wonderful experience we had during our stay at your beautiful property , we choose superior riverfront view room, also decoration as requested was perfect really loved it , my partner was astonished and loved it 😊one of the best hotels specially Sachin sir &  Rajnikant sir was very humble and a good trip guider .. highly recommend

Cama Hotel are Located at Mahaveer Marg, Old City, Khanpur nearest sheth Bhavans arts And Commerce college Khanpur, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380001.
Strategically located hotel near the Sabarmati Riverfront. Rooms size are better than other hotels. We had a good stay at Cama, Service is good, our rooms had a great river view.
A great place to stay. Amazing view of Sabarmati River.
The staffs behaviour and environment never allowed me to think of any other option.
Only issue is food price.
It's much on higher side. Management may give a serious thought on this..
Rooms were spacious and clean. Nice backyard with a pool. Had plenty of breakfast options in their buffet. The only drawback is they don't have drivers cabin and parking space. We're lucky enough to get a parking spot in their porch (which can only accommodate max 4-5 cars). Although upon requesting they did make some temporary basic arrangements for our driver but would be nice if they can have a place for drivers in future. Nonetheless, would recommend this hotel if you're on family/business trip...

A great place to stay. Amazing view of Sabarmati River.
The staffs behaviour and environment never allowed me to think of any other option.
Only issue is food price.
It's much on higher side. Management may give a serious thought on this.
Heritage hotel with heritage style ambiance at lobby area  are very spacious close too sabarmati river front good for those people who go for morning

We had a good stay at Cama, Service is good, our rooms had a great river view. Rooms were spacious and clean. Nice backyard with a pool. Had plenty of breakfast options in their buffet. The only drawback is they don't have drivers cabin and parking space. We're lucky enough to get a parking spot in their porch (which can only accommodate max 4-5 cars). Although upon requesting they did make some temporary basic arrangements for our driver but would be nice if they can have a place for drivers in future. Nonetheless, would recommend this hotel if you're on family/business trip.

Service standards are below par
Food is ok types - you get better quality at same rates
Only rooms are huge!

So honestly not worth the price
Nice location with clear view of Sabarmati river, and staff were very nice and food was delicious, rooms were old but recently renovated so there was no problem with that.
Okay from where do I start, the food, the location, the view the whole thing was amazing. It was my first experience in Ahmedabad and this place was best for it. Love it!

It was dream hotel of Ahmedabad in 1990's to 1999
Most of celebrities choose cama as there first choice in Ahmedabad now lots of opponents were there so it was hard to say it was best

The service is really nice and clean.
Ms . Sonal is really polite and hospitality is up to the mark.

Room clean is properly service boy mr. Ridip has better hospitality and communication.
Overall fantastic hotel go for it.
Stay in ahemdabad this is perfect place to stay here very good service and management
Rooms are big and good, but old towels and bedsheets they provide, average service and food quality not up to mark.
Comfortable stay with good service and food quality. Excellent courtesy shown by front end staff Rabita.
Liked the place old hotel but good ambience location n food
Everything is good. The food is awesome, and the atmosphere is very quiet. The quality of the service is excellent.

Loved my stay, originally I request room with large bed the day we checked in and was given room with 2 small beds and got it corrected on the last day/night overall still enjoyed my stay and would stay here again

A memorable stay

This is an exceptional hotel which gave us both exactly what we were hoping for from our holiday hotel. Our room was spacious and clean, quiet and comfortable. The staff are approachable efficient and always happy to see you with a smile. The breakfast and restaurants provided a variety of food and quality. Great location by the riverfront with a beautiful view if your room has a riverfront view. The pool was lovely
Just an amazing experience , i highly recommend .

I had a wonderful time at the property. The rooms were perfect with the balcony facing the river. Plus the weather that day was amazing with rain drizzling all day, just made it much more fun. Food here is delicious as well. Staff is very polite and courteous. Had an unfortunate encounter at night for which i had to go to the hospital nearby. The staff helped a lot with making arrangements like they got a doctor on call for me. One suggestion i would like to give do keep some general medications for like headache, fever, digestion etc, you never know when someone might need one.
Give five out of five and recommend everyone to stay here.

A great place to stay when you are in Ahmedabad.  The food is great and the service professional.  The rooms are comfortable but the bathrooms look a little dated and could be renovated.
Maintenance should be looked into- some pipes leak and the wiring to the hair dryer is twisted and is a hazard.

My recent stay at Cama Hotel left much to be desired.

The check-in process was marred by the unprofessional demeanor of the staff, particularly the male attendant. His lack of courtesy and attention to my needs made for a disappointing start to my stay. That encounter completely ruined me and my wife's mood.

I would caution future guests against expecting a four-star experience at this establishment.

Sincerely,
Disappointed.
Had a pleasant stay. Would recommend anyone who wants to have a warm stay.
Toilets doesn’t have soaps or dryers. Inside restaurants I noticed so many flies.
The rooms are spacious and well maintained. The place gives good vibes overall. Decent staff, service, environment and food. Highly recommend.
Awesome hospitality. Loved our stay. Will stay again in the future

The Cama - A Sabarmati Riverfront Hotel is an experience! From the moment you enter the hotel, you are taken back into time. The interiors of the room are exquisite. This hotel has some of the most beautifully crafted room interiors that I have seen in a while. The only place where I believe there can be some change is the service that the hotel provides. This can be a little better. The swimming pool in particular was not cleaned despite asking at the first instance. But overall, this was a wonderful stay.
Nice stay here. Good ambience, nice staff, peaceful stay.

My husband and I stayed at the Cama for 3 days. Mr Deep the Manager was most helpful and made our stay comfortable The reception staff Aman and Rita were efficient and friendly, Rajnikant the concierge was knowledgeable about the local area and guided us and Kiren in the breakfast room was very attentive and courteous. The location was very good to get to anywhere and served well by Uber. Overall an amazing experience! Thank you!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at The Cama Hotel in Ahmedabad, and it was truly a delightful experience. Unlike many modern 4- and 5-star hotels, The Cama exudes warmth and genuine care for its guests. In this hotel, you do not have to put on a false air of being “rich and sophisticated.” It’s a good, sober, warm, and classy place with lovely antique-type ambiance.

Located very near to the riverfront so locationwise it's good. 3star for the room, decent size, for my room the window pane handle and lock was broken so was unable to close the window, bathroom door was damaged, was unable to close it properly. Wifi had issues because of the less range was unable to connect, I called them multiple times but they did not assist, so 2 star for the service. Suggestion, you'll find better options at this price range.
Strategically located hotel near the Sabarmati Riverfront. Rooms size are better than other hotels. Food and cleanliness is satisfactory. Staff is helpful. Overall a very good experience.

Had a pleasant stay. Decent, cleaned spacious rooms. Everything was good. Didn't try the silver leaf restaurant looking at the prices which seem too much. Location good. Also had a chance to stay in a room which had a river view. So overall good. Could have been better.

Its good stay and all services are good.
Ravita attended well throughout the stay

Good hotel, good staff, great view of river. Good hotels, market available very close to the hotel. Very safe.

the AC could be better, washroom did not have exhaust and food and water is very expensive. I used swiggy for food and water.

It's an old but well maintained hotel. Once upon a time, it was a very famous hotel in Ahmedabad. Situated at the river bank of Sabarmati.  Not sure about the rooms but back side there is good loan for small function.

A wonderful experience from start to finish. The hotel is well located and the service is excellent. The staff is incredibly welcoming and accommodating. The food at the hotel was also delicious. Everything is well maintained from cleanliness to housekeeping. This is a great hotel if you need to stay in this area.
Great stay and heritage hotel vibe can reanovate little bit

Overall all experience was great. [1 night stay]

We arrived at the Hotel early (~8:20 am) they took some 30-45 mins to get the booking voucher and allocate a room. I was informed normally the rooms are available after noon (12:00 pm) hence difficult to make the room ready early. Despite that, staff were very polite and helpful as arrange the room early.

Room was beautiful with good view and amenities. Very comfortable and felt relaxed.

We found food there to be bit expensive but there are good places near by to eat and explore.

Few constructive feedback I can give to hotel managers are to try to make end to end experience for the customer more seamless at check-in and check-out. In the room there are less plug point where the devices can be connected to charge so that may be increased by one or two numbers. A note can be given during checking with general useful instruction. like how to connect to Wifi and get access to internet. How thermostat is operated. How TV is operated... Flush in room 211 can be improved as its not super effective at flushing.

These are just minor gripe and not a deal breaker. But would definitive improve the overall of experience of the stay even further.
Amazing stay at a heritage hotel at. Good food and authentic service.

I had a very pleasant stay at the Cama Hotel. The rooms are very spacious and well designed. The AC was perfect and the service was prompt. Moreover, I was given the Sabarmati riverfront view and it was awesome. Just that the local municipal authorities should beautify the riverbed so that the road will get an altogether different look. Keep up!

loved the place, exactly as i had my dream vacation stay.
quite impressed with the architechture, ambience, mind blowing energy of the staffs and the way of addressing people and i can go on and on. really loved the stay and helped me for all my deeds.

The hotel is really a decent one and of course as it's a 3-star they do care to maintain it like that. The staffs are helpful and will guide you to all your queries regarding the food and the nearby attractions. I had a pleasant stay there and i do wish to visit again. Thanks to Hotel-The cama.

Good service , good property, good location.
Must visit.
House keeping staf and manager also very helpful and polite

Famous since years and years... Cama was perhaps the first and only hotel in city of Ahmedabad, before years, when it started,  of the stature of a 5-star hotel..!! It is yet good.. Though there are hundreds of similar hotel options now in the city.
The food has always been good and tasty.
The restaurant is open till late at night, almost till 2 am.
Hence if you want good food at late night, Cama is there.

I checked in at midnight due to my travel from Pune for just overnight stay. but the process was quick, room was neat and view outside just amazing.
The breakfast was scrumptious and healthy.
Overall a very good hotel within heart of the city.

Good Hotel, Food is good but costly. Nice River view. AC is not good in the room. It should be in front of bed, flow is going another side bed position is not correct. Sealing or table fan should be there.

Open from morning to evening in beautiful garden. Lovely hotel and supporting staff..thank you for wonderful service.

Thank you very much cama hotel and Always prefer to stay again.

The Staff is superb, welcoming , hospitable and had a nice hotel stay after a long time. To mention miss Zareena, mr Rajnikant and all the front desk staff, have been extremely delightful to stay with.

Hotel location is too good but rooms are very old. Scenery from room is very good. Rooms are big but old feel gives dullnes. If renovation is done then its best hotel.

Welcome was amazing with happy smile, and staff approach was nice. Excellent rooms with nea and clean, room was prayed , nice fragnance. washrooms and bedrooms are very good, nice river view. Strongly suggested

Genuine my review .I have visited to day for  Marriage ceremony function but I astonished at that time around 1993 hotel is number in Ahmedabad. But today stood when !

Really I miss ronak of CAMA hotel
Stayed here during the Golden Jubilee Celebration of GCMMF. The Hotel was located just beside the riverfront & rooms were also well maintained.

One of the few places who has still managed to maintain their taste standards across decades.
Their 24 hour restaurant is one of the best spots to grab a late night bite especially if you are a non-vegetarian.

The oldest or probably the First Hotel of Ahmedabad. Situated beside the Sabarmati River Front.
Great view from the river view 🪟 room.
The rooms need serious renovation......flooring laminations Peele off from many places.

One thing is that .....this hotel has spacious rooms and bathrooms.

Mr Sagar handled my call and he was very rude. He asked to book hotel online as he would not be able to help me. Very rude. I would urge all not to book this hotel. If staff is so rude I wonder how would they treat their guests.

Very old building, suit rooms very dusty and with bad smell, not worth to pay for 3500 - 5000 per day . For this cost you can choose some other branded hotels with amenities and ambiance. Here you can't feel the ambience at all

Best hotel for the price. Excellent food with choice of good vegetarian and non-vegetarian options . Helpful staff. The rooms are old well furnished but few upgrade needed to at some places. Overall great experience with best view of the new modern waterfront.

The ONLY GOOD thing about the hotel is the 4th floor, riverfront view.

Except that, the food and the stay is not good. In 2 days i have changed 2 rooms. The rooms interior is good to go but the maintenance is zero. You give the key to the reception for room cleaning except making the bed no other cleaning of the room is done.
The rooms are being provided to the guest without checking it prior for the facilities. Either the ac is not working or the washroom is not faulty.

Hi...
We stayed in your good hotel room no 106 and 108 on dated 24rth and 25th december..

Stay was pleasant. We really appreciate reception staff  ( 1 lady and 2 boys ) found fully trained and professional. Their assistance for hotel stay was memorable. But we regret regarding food test and found cost for the food not worth it. Request you to look into this.

Regards

It was wonderful and satisfying stay at CAMA hotel. The staff was good and food quality of MAP plan was excellent.👌 I recommend this hotel as a good stay for family also as being specious rooms and greenery at pool was amazing

Wow wow it's just one of the few of the most amazing places that I ever went , it has an excellent performance from my point of view and  I think that it's still kind of underrated and the experience that I gain from this place was just excellent and would like to recommend this place to you people
Stayed for 3 days. One staff named Bipin from restaurant is very much rude and not fit for staying in service industry. Overall stay was very good but given 2 star only for bipin.

It is one of the best restaurants I have visited ever. I tried vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian food along with Parsi food.  I have enjoyed a lot Parsi food. I tried Patra ni Machhi, Fish Curry, Prawns Curry, Pomfret Garlic,  Pomfret Tikka,  Galouti Kabab etc.

I strongly recommend visiting the restaurant.

You can contact me for a review of any other place.

In all CAMA GROUP is deliberately trying to run a hotel I.e. CAMA, Ahmedabad by all means right or wrong. The hotel which was once prestigiously known for its quality standards, top notch service and best in the town hospitality has merely reduced down to unethical practices, sub standard unacceptable business ethics and worst of all high in the cloud attitude. Sorry to mention but the current mid level administration especially the Food and Beverage department manager and the general manager are liars, cheats and scammers of the hugest order.

The only case where I can suggest anyone this venue is only if they completely want to ruin their once-in-a-lifetime event or occasion and that too in the ruining it in the best manner possible.

I am very disheartened and upset about my reception event which was unorganised & not properly executed by team Cama, Ahmedabad.

We had organised a Wedding Reception on 3rd May, 2023 at Cama Hotel, Khanpur Ahmedabad. The charges and tariffs that were provided in the first meeting were unrealistically revised and presented in the second meet. The reasons mentioned seemed far from the truth.(I still have both the prints of revised and unrevised tariffs provided by cama). When we approached them with our food menu selections we were told that certain food items weren’t available as a part of our selected package. And that we had to upgrade our package by almost 33% price rise to accommodate those cuisines.

I) The primary issue is that we were charged at ₹900/- plus GST for 60 additional guests. Estimate was for 275-300 guests. Actual arrival as per Cama records was 335 guests. We would’ve fully accepted the additional charges and gladly paid in entirety, if we had received, Complete good quality food, with proper quantity and with proper service.

Sad to say that none of the above criteria were met! Cama appeared totally unprepared for even a simple 10-12% addition in guests. This resulted in shoddy, shabby, and shameful stop-gap arrangements. The tables were in disarray, the serving staff were disheveled, and not looking worthy of a hotel of Cama’s repute. By 8:30 pm they had run out of starters even as fresh guests were arriving!! By 9:30-9:45 pm when the final guests were being served, including the Bride, Bridegroom and their respective families, none of the tables were in order (There were piles of food, drinks and half empty plates lying uncleared). The counters serving food had run of of crockery and cutlery, and also, food items like Nans & Parathas, Dal Makhani, etc. The vegetables appeared watery and diluted. The serving staff were rude & high-handed.

Apart from this, I list out the other points of concern,

II) Welcome drinks were served in disposable plastic glasses instead of proper glassware.

III) We were promised imarti for dessert and without informing  us they were serving Jalebi of lower quality, that too leftovers. They were not even refilling.

Further, and importantly  I am being charged fully for which the promised quality/quantity of food  was not delivered.

At 11:50 pm, my relative, Mr Rupawala was rudely awakened from his sleep for this matter, which is, truly, a shameful and disgusting act, considering that he is CAMA groups Auditor! On his advice, we settled the full bill amount under duress.

As no complimentary rooms were provided for the bride, we opted to book a room at actual tariff. The state and condition of room too was in actual disarray. Moldy smell through out the hotel, leaking taps and creaking furniture were a total displeasure. Judging by this I would never ever suggest anyone to engage in any sort of business with the said hotel group.

The staff has been very very rude and non corporative with us. We decided Cama for our once in lifetime event because of the Brand Value but CAMA Khanpur has proven it wrong on every single count. In the next 3 months we have about 3 different events in our family but I'll make it a point that no one decides Cama as the destination

It was a wonderful experience staying at Hotel Cama the people and the staff over there are very Cooperative and professional and the approach with great hospitality to all the customers whenever I visit Ahmedabad I make it possible that I should stay at hotel Cama the staff members like Akash and Nancy and Denis they all are very supportive.
Hotel acchi hai rooms bhi bahut acche Hain Sagar sar ki service hamen bahut pasand I kitchen stop bhi bahut helpful hai morning breakfast ke liye

I liked the hotel, particularly the wooden make for certain interior. They were trying to maintain hygiene at every place they could, staff was co-operative and polite and,  food was good. However, they need to improvise on restaurant part as they had only limited items in menu, maybe because it was a slack season they didn't stock enough. I would recommend this hotel as it was worth paying for it. Keep doing good job.

We went to dinein in cama hotel for lunch but the hotel was not serving food on the ground floor, which was the beautiful area of the hotel. Instead, they directed us to the basement area, which was below one star rating.

Even if for any reason the hotel has stopped its restaurant services on the ground floor,  they should have maintained the alternate area for the guest.

We decided to take lunch as we didn't had time to go to any other restaurant.
The services were too slow. In starting we were the only customer and hotel delayed the preparation for no reasons.

Food tasted average. I heard many times with my colleagues that we came here only for ambiance and food; both were missing.

Request hotel management to keep their customer satisfaction on high..
This hotel surely offers great hospitality & most importantly the location is perfect if you want to explore Ahmedabad. & special mention to Zarina mam ( front desk) who was so helpful! 😊
Very nice old property with modern facilities... Location is altimate with good food good hospitality and staff behaviour also supportive and good
This is amazing place for stay. The rooms are pretty good. And the service and location is wonderful. I love this hotel.

Hotel woth staying💯
Location is so perfect.Literally rooms and interior is so good.Staffs are so kind.Washroom and rooms were so clean .It felt like home!

Lizard in the room:
Its for the first time that i am writing a review while am yet to complete my one night stay in this hotel. Its been only few hours since i checked in and i have experienced:
- cobwebs in the room
- torn curtains ( in two of three rooms i checked)
- unclean balcony ( used glasses thrown)
- torn sofa sheets
- Internet not working, (took arnd an hour to fix)
- passage area unclean as one of two wings of the hotel is under renovation and there's no mention anywhere at all while booking.

Lastly the icing on the cake was.. when i tried enjoying the riverfront view from the room and fiddled with the curtain.. a huge lizard fell on me and had to run out of the room without my slippers as the lizard was on my bed close to the phone.. couldnt call the room service.

i simply picked this hotel as it had good reviews and is told to be one of the oldest hotel and still has its charm, i will not deny to this completely.. while the staff is helpful and the room service (food) i ordered turned out to be good. I think its hotels responsibility to shut it completely if they are in for such large renovations. Its one of the first property of Ahmedabad and it has some prestigious sentiment and they should not be ruining this for mere few bucks or getting few rooms filled as a bad experience once lasts forever plus given the list of hotels next to this. Upholstery aren't getting cleaned, rooms are not being maintained as they might get renovated sooner or later..so why let the customers have such a bad experience.

The views from our small balcony room were fantastic. We were warmly and professionally welcomed, checking in was very quick and easy. Our room and ensuite were very clean but the decor and the shower cubicle were showing signs of age. The hotel serves a buffet breakfast white enough choice to suit most tastes. There is a wide choice of restaurants within a short walk of the hotel and a massive choice if you want to travel further afield.

I loved first it's structure. It's very unique and very good to see.
And the interiors are very good of that hotel. The hotel rooms are very luxurious and the bathrooms are luxurious too.
Yes there have also a little garden in it and i liked it so much.
Their is no doubt about it that staff is very good at helping us
It's just near one more best hotel in ahemdabad
Good hotel, good service and reasonably priced. Restaurant downstairs is good too. Pleasant staff and clean rooms
A good place to stay. At reception zareena is was very helpful for smooth check in. we stayed with friends. Food was 3 out of 5. a good hotel to stay.
One of the oldest Hotels in Ahmedabad having its own legacy. The rooms are quite good, food and service quality is decent. Appropriate location for arranging wedding festivities also.

Its a famous hotel in Ahmedabad situated on the banks of Sabarmati. It is at a walking distance from riverfront. The area is called Khanpur. The ambience of the hotel is really good and the staff is very cooperative. I haven't had a meal here as it was not in my package but I'm sure the food will be great. The stay prices maybe a little high for a middle class layman but the stay will be very good. Security is also good and so nothing to worry about your belongings. This hotel is definitely worth one visit.

One of the oldest and very well renowned hotel in Ahmedabad. Situated near the banks of Sabarmati river a gueat can enjoy the view of river front from the room. The rooms are quite specious. Rooms are cleaned and we'll maintained. Staff is humble and supportive. They also have restaurant named curry leaf which is very famous for its veg and non veg dishes. The restaurant is open almost entire day and night. The food is very tasty.

This so called hotel is an absolute disgrace. The property shouldn't even hold a single star, let alone three. Here are the facts:

- Checked in 6 hours ago
- Outside temp over 36 degrees Celsius. So, it's hot.
- Room air conditioning has broken down 4 times in the last 6 hours.
- The bathroom piping was damaged and water leakage everywhere
- Despite requesting the staff for changing the room twice, it wasn't done
- Instead, a service rep was sent that switched on the air conditioning and kept standing in the room to "observe"  while I wanted to sleep
- Telephone connection to the reception seems severed. So one has to walk down everytime for a chat with the reception reps. Bizzare, right? Clearly not for the staff - who simply ignored the question!
- The staff is not trained to deal with customers in an optimum manner
- Despite asking to speak with the manager, nothing was done

NEVER AGAIN!

Great food & service as always ... only feel very sad that they have not included pizzas & quesadillas & burritos in their new menu ... I miss the Silver Leaf, Florentine pizza so much. Would request them to please include these all time favourites back in their menu.

Cama Hotel in Ahmedabad* is like being at home away from home. Unlike most of the new shiny 4*/5* Hotels, this hotel exudes warmth and a feeling of being really cared for. In this Hotel you do not have to put on a false air of being ""rich and sophisticated"". It's a good, sober, warm and classy place with lovely antique- type ambiance. It's old , but it's wonderfully charming. The warm and smiling Staff , right up to the Top Management , simply went out of their way to help us and made our stay a memorable one. And, the food there is absolutely mouthwatering.
Even the view of the River Sabermati from the Hotel is stunning .
My son and I visited Cama Hotel this October, and, even though they have just reopened due to the Corrona situation, we were really impressed .
For those who really want a calm, relaxing and warm experience..... I advise Cama Hotel

This sabarmati hotel was so good and they all the things were so goodly attached also the decoration and rooms are so good that for the couples and also the swimming pool and other things are so good dining rooms and the launch was so good so I loved it 😍
Experienced a happy stay. I just loved it. Staff is cooperative. Food very tasty and healthy. Fantastic.

This review is for my stay during JUL-2017. The hotel, when constructed, would've been a very good one to stay at. But there has probably been a complete negligence in maintenance since some time and now the condition of the rooms is really worsened. There were issues with tap, shower, toilet etc. The staff is helpful to some extent but not really accommodating to your needs. At this price range, I expect the facilities to be better than what the hotel currently provides.
Regarding the location, you better have a private mode of transport if planning to book this hotel. Public transports are far off from here. The riverfront section on the hotel's side was under construction. So you don't have that scenic a view on hotel's side of the river. The opposite side of river has the riverfront completely constructed.
There are 2 restaurants inside the hotel. Found the food to be good. Breakfast and the serving staff in the hotel were polite and welcoming.
Overall, the hotel needs an overhaul in the infrastructure. The staff is doing its level best to keep it afloat.

Very maintained hotel at sabarmati river front. It is quite decent and economical to stay.
Also the hotel is located very nela yo airport and at the center of the city. So commutation from here is quite easy.
Although the rooms are a little old.
Breakfast is fast and served well both continental and indian dishes.
Suitable for couples and for business purposes

A bad experience

We had booked 3 rooms for 2 days in this hotel by reading the review and location. But I must say we were let down by the management / front desk staff. We checked in the hotel at 6.30 am , though the hotel had rooms they did not allow us to check in. Front desk was rude and was not at all helpful. We waited for 3 hours at the reception in early hours of the day and none of the staff even offered us even a glass of water. When asked repeatedly we were told we will get our rooms at 9am, but eventually we got it at 10.30 am. On the food front , breakfast was bad. Sambar and chatini to the plain Dosa comes ages after we have ordered the Dosa.

Hotel just next to the river front and even though its old its well maintained. Rooms are big and have all the necessary amenities. Only let down was the check in and staff of the hotel.
If you wish to stay in the hotel , please come as per correct check in timings.
Excellent ambience and good service
Stayed here during an official meeting. Hotel may have been one of the best in its prime. But, has to innovate to stay in race.

I was at Cama Hotel for an English Proficiency Test. The property is pretty average compared to what 5-Star Hotels look like, even though this is a 4-Star Hotel, I don't feel that the property from the outside looks too good. The location is great, there are river facing rooms, which are a delight. I could grab a look at one of those during my visit. The interiors are okay and looks like it was last updated in 2008. The staff is helpful but at the start of the day, there were not many to be found. I've usually found hotel staff at a call's reach elsewhere, which is why my expectations could be high on this one. It was above average overall.

"Every thing from rooms, service, food was truly Royal in all sense."
The place is very good it's serves good food and drinks and the location is good"

Such a lovely experience. Rooms were massive like our own house. Staff pleasant and always willing to help. Food was delicious. I would have rated 5 but service is amazing at restaurants. Overall, a majestical place.

Great 24/7 cafe cum restaurant. Good ambience with a live tawa counter. Cozy place. Helpful staff. The kati roll, tawa chicken and cama club sandwich are the specialities. Parsi food is also available. Tried dhansak as well. Quality and quantity is adequate. Reasonably priced. Good place for family and friends. Kids will enjoy as well. Overall a fun filled experience!
Rooms are in really bad shape, hotel management should look into this

Had a late night dinner at silver leaf - cama hotel on my marriage anniversary and I must say the the menu is pathetic now, everything ordered was pathetic. ordered chicken lollypop, cama sandwich, apple pie and cheese cake (it was hard cheese as if someone just place raw cheese cube on it). All of the above served dishes were not good and the taste was pathetic. They need to improve alot and really the menu sucks. I don't know why I even paid for the worst food I had on my anniversary, I wish I could my money back
You must try the Rooms with river view.

A very quiet hotel owned by Mr. Jahangir Cama. We were in the lawn area. The hotel is on the banks of river Sabarmati so one can enjoy riverfront as well. No VL parking is available but security guards guide us where to park. Quality of food is excellent.

I prefer Jain food and here nonveg is also served so generally I don't visit this hotel for lunch or dinner.

It’s a 60 year old property but still holding up the fort against the new entrants of hospitality sectors. Room have been renovated in contemporary style and every detail have been taken care of. Food is delicious and staff is very accommodating.
Food was so delicious but the old charm is completely lost. It was painful to see the condition of restaurant. Once upon a time they were the best in town.
The hotel was good. Sagar the receptionist was friendly and helpful despite of the long waiting for the chiffon check in.

A landmark of both culture and comfort, in the glorious city of Ahmedabad, the hotel has an enviable location in the heart of all business and shopping areas, - only 11 km away from the airport and 3 km from the railway st.Warm rooms & suites in a down-to-earth hotel with river views, an outdoor pool & 24-hour dining.

Located along the banks of the Sabarmati River, Cama Hotel-Ahmedabad, a boutique hotel is set amid a tropical landscape. It features 2 dining options, an outdoor pool and a liquor store. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the property.

Air-conditioned rooms come with modern décor and a private balcony. Each room is fitted with a flat-screen TV with cable channels and an private bathroom with shower facilities.

Guests can workout at the fitness center, or take a relaxing stroll in the garden. The hotel provides car rental and currency exchange services. Ticketing and travel arrangements can be made at the tour desk.

Overlooking the river, La Vista restaurant serves a variety of local and international dishes. Available for all-day dining, Silver Leaf offers Indian, European and Mexican cuisine.

Cama Hotel-Ahmedabad is 1.9 mi from Ahmedabad Railway Station and 6.8 mi from Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport.

Ideally located on the border of old and new Ahmedabad on the bank of river Sabarmati, hardly 25 minutes drive from the airport.
The property gives an impression of old fashioned luxury hotel.  Stunning views of the Sabarmati river front.
Enjoy good food (veg and non-veg) pool side or in one of the restaurants. Nice gym. Very courteous staff and quick service.  Sumptuous breakfast spread.

On flip side the furniture and especially windows need immediate repairs. The central AC goes off suddenly.

Although the hotel has covered a vast land area, but the maintenance is average. There is visible trickling of water in the lobby and the walls are also loosing their paint coat. I haven't tried any food items here so can't comment on it. In short, the stay will perhaps be pleasant and one shall find all the facilities and amenities as expected from a 3 star hotel.

A dying legacy..... Crying for help to survive.... Excellent property converted into shambles. Basic upkeep also is conspicuous by absence... They can save the property by spending some money.... Grandeur of past can be felt. But condition of property makes us feel sad.

Clueless staff, arrogant at times.
No sense of service.
The hotel's old reputation has been lost for good.

Mr sunder was greate person and I was completely relaxed during my stay .. quality delivery and very good ambiance to stay.
Strongly recommend
Hotel and restaurant wise good but the hospitality is not so good and the people also not so good and the price is not favourable to that amenities
Cosy rooms ,clean and tidy . Helpful receptionist Zarin and housekeeping staff are good. Breakfast was excellent.

During my 2 weeks visit to India last week, I organized get-together party of 150+ guests on Pool side of Cama Hotel. That was the right decision I took to organize party on Pool side in hot summer of Ahmedabad. The food was very good and of much higher standard and quality. The staff was also very nice and friendly. My guests also liked the venue and some even mentioned it. I think from now on whenever I'll organize another party in Ahmedabad, it will be in Cama Hotel!!!
One of the best locations to stay in Ahmedabad

I happened to visit this hotel twice and both the times with my wife.
The rooms that are on the rear side of the hotel are very good and have an excellent view of the river front.
However the rooms along the front side of the hotel are not so impressive.
Their AC was not working and they weren't able to have it fixed during our stay.

Overall a good hotel near Riverfront and VFM. Rooms are clean but old building and interiors... needing refurbishment to be called upscale . Lawn at backyard is welcoming change to relax evening and mornings. Restaurant is not tested yet but didn't see too many guests there.

The best thing about this hotel is its location.
Ideal for people who come to Ahmedabad for business purposes as it is close to major market areas of the city.
Sabarmati river passes from near the hotel that gives a pleasant view from the hotel room.

I did not stay there for the night so I cannot comment on the service provided by the staff.
So good. Oldest star rated hotel of Ahmedabad. Very good stuff, good service, ambient also very attractive.
Wonderful place , staff , very good rooms , most comfortable rooms , the staffs - zarina , sagar , rajnikanth very very humble , polite and helpful.

When I have visited the hotel I thought it will not be that good but the place and space were awesome. The room i stayed in was also having very nice view. The hotel is just in front of the River. So view as well as location is quite nice. Food and service is also great. Staff was really helpful. Overall good experience.

It's an old Hotel with spacious rooms but old furniture. Staff is polite and co operative.
Advantage is they have swimming pool and liquor shop, one can obtain online license and buy liquor from here.
Good service and nice stay, Ms. Zarina, Mr. Rajinikanth and others staffs are well behaved. Overall good service.

If you go to this hotel with the memories of its past grandeur, you will be surely disappointed. The rooms are in a terrible mess. The lobbies on the floors are unkempt. Only saving grace is the restaurant. It is sad to see that the shining icon of hospitality of the past is slowly sliding into oblivion.

Good experience overall. Hotel, it's interiors are really good.
Food and service is excellent.

The location of this hotel is quite interior from the main road ,there's no bus transportation facilities in these region there are rickshaws and own vehicles and the place is little bit dirty but, the facilities of the hotel and parking is good. Overall it's good if we have our own vehicle.

Located near Ahmedabad riverfront in a not very prominent locality. The hotel clearly shows ageing and the rooms are not the best. Gives an imperial feel but also clearly looks like an ageing hotel. There are many other good options available. Stay here only if you have to.
Had dinner. Food was okay. Value for money 3.5 out of 5.
My wedding reception was held here and it was our best decision. Everyone praised the venue and their service. All and all Cama made my function unforgettable.

I had been in Cama Hotel for 3 days in November, 2021 for wedding of my daughter. It was fatalistic experience for all of us. The hotel was completely booked by us. We have done all functions and marriage at Cama Hotel. The guests reached here from Rajasthan, Kolkatta, Bangalore, Delhi, Chennai, Mumbai, Surat, Kanpur, Jalgaon etc. All have enjoyed and appreciated services provided the Cama Hotel. A Special Thanks to Amitbhai Panchal, GM to supervise and provide his valuable advise to conduct wedding. Thanks to  Cama.
A classic staple gone dusty with time. Food is dependable. But the service and ambience isn't what it used to be . Fall from Glory. One gets nostalgic

Ahmedabad's first Five Star Hotel with very uniquely designed heritage + morden rooms. This hotel having awesome view of Sabarmati River. And also they provide liquor to Permit Holders. No words for Food. Really yummy

Many walls needed painting and furniture needed a coat of polish, but the kind, courteous staff and warm, homely feeling almost made up for that.
Some essential painting and polishing done,  old and dusty carpets (stuck with tape to the floor of the 1st floor lobby) removed, and the place could be restored to what must have been its glorious past.
Staff is humble, location is superb, rooms are well maintained and hygiene. This hotel is go for sure.

Right adjoining to sabarmati river front. Quite place. Old and maintained hotel. Polite staff with good interior
Hygienic and clean rooms and bathrooms
Problem of parking rest is good... If there are lots of guests the  there will be an issue of parking

Dirty dusty rooms... Had to remind several times for hand towels and extra pillows. 3rd floor is horrible with squeaky floors and gym next to the rooms. Seemed like cardboard walls as noisy were the neighbors with the safe or cupboards. Increased the rates after the agreed rates - noticed later. Too long to check in.

We're Staying at Cama Hote from 13th Feb to 16th Feb
Has Huge Rooms and iconic views of Sabarmati Riverfront
Heritage Interior
Large Bathroom and Bath Tub
Especially
Liquor Shop with in the premises (Valid Permit required)
Very Nicely Located in the heart of Ahemedabad
Breakfast was amazing

Staying at this "hotel" was far from the luxurious experience I had expected. From the very beginning, the troubles piled up. Finding the hotel at night was a daunting task, despite the presence of large, unlit signboards on the building. Their operations were limited to a single floor, the fourth, and only one lift was functioning, making the path to it feel like a haunted passageway.

While the rooms and decor appeared decent, the state of the washrooms left much to be desired. The bathroom had an alarming accumulation of dust, a mirror marred by leaked paint, and a water outlet plagued by rust. An old, worn-out towel hung forlornly, and the broken door handle on the inside only added to the list of grievances. The flush tap, too, showed signs of corrosion, and the commode bore unsightly stains – a series of issues that were painfully evident in the attached pictures.

Adding to the woes, there was no phone in the room to connect with the reception, leaving guests stranded in an emergency. Speaking of the reception, it resembled more of a makeshift work-from-home desk than a welcoming area for guests.

In conclusion, my advice is not to be swayed by any outdated photographs. The reality of this hotel falls far short of its former glory, and the prices charged are in no way commensurate with the quality one would expect from a 3 to 3.5-star establishment.

I couldn't go below one star, else would have given the place -10 stars. Dirty rooms, cockroach infestation, inedible food, pathetic housekeeping services, dirty linen, dirty toilets are just few of the things that are wrong with the hotel. Staff are courteous though, but it doesn't help if I have to spend better part of my stay trying to kill cockroaches. I have seen better lodges than this hotel which according to few websites is rated 4 stars. Either the guy rating it was blind or was being paid to give such reviews.

visited this place with family, booked 7 rooms 2 months in advance, did not get the rooms we had booked for and had to compromise since we reached the hotel late in the night, did not expect a 4 star hotel to be so badly maintained, lifts do not work half the time, filthy stairways, rude, unpolite, unfriendly, lazy staff, all the 7 rooms were in a bad condition - AC not working, door locks not working, sinks filled with filthy water, flush not working, no hot water, everyone had to change the rooms at least thrice in the middle of the night, the rude reception staff initially said no other rooms are available, upon escalating the matter to the higher authorities and expressing our extreme displeasure things, new rooms were arranged. We have to go everyday to the reception to renew the smartcard to open the room and the reception staff don't care to mention it. It is highly inconvenient and annoying. The entire family included many elderly people were needlessly harrassed by the staff. Upon inquiry, the housekeeping staff mentioned that more than half the rooms in the hotel are not in a usable condition, they also mentioned that there is a high turnover of the staff due to bad management policies and 95% of the staff have worked for less than 2 months at the place. Do not fall for the attractive room prices offered. Avoid this place at all costs if you want a pleasant stay.

Very bad rooms. They claim to be 4 star but we found stained bedsheets, bad bathroom floors, hair and used packets on the floor when we checked in. We were forced to use only two options for the AC: either freezing or switched off. Some bad smells too inside the room and corridor. Service was unresponsive and very poor when we asked for some room fresheners. No one turned up.

Its such a pathetic hotel, and I wonder who gave the "4 star" recognision.

First encounter the lift to the lobby, it was old and dirty. The room at first glance is spacious. 10 mins I enter, used the bathroom, noticed the toilet is full of stained, cockroaches everywhere, hairs all over my bedsheet, pillow case.

The breakfast was pathetic. I had my breakfast at 9am, the food seen to be some leftover. Never mention, how dirty the utensil, how annoying the staff was. I had 4 different staff asking me for room number, imagine that. Further to that, there are cockroaches on the dining table.

Overall, it was not a pleasant stay, and I strongly recommend everyone to stay away from this hotel.

Before the welcome drink could reach our rooms, we were greeted by cockroaches.

Besides, dirty linen, scarred walls, substandard furniture speak volumes.
My advice... Don't spoil your tour. See other options.

Not worth at all.

washroom is terrible and unhygienic also hot water not available for bath, honestly it was a pathetic experience, also staff behaviour is not good, rude behaviour toward female occupant 😡 money wasted.. DO NOT BOOK THIS HOTEL

One of the worst stay ever not deserve single star too. Pathetic rooms with dirty lines and pillow cover floor is dirty not internet no cable TV . Limited breakfast options and front desk staff don't   know what hospitality is worst then any guest house .

The hotel rooms don't even have wifi though it was mentioned in the hotel amenities, the clarification that the hotel staff gave was that wifi is provided only at reception and not in the rooms.

Once in ancient times, it was a 5 star property. That property has not evolved since. There have been no changes to the interiors and no changes in the exteriors. Located at a prime spot at Thaltej, it commands respect however only at the prices it offers. All the rooms and all the food items are exorbitant in pricing. The carpets have never been changed and marked with dust , spotting of spilled items of a long gone era, musty walls filled with paint breaking over, cockroaches and mosquitoes in full glory, and pathetic quality of furniture. The tata sky connection worked on daily recharge and it was not working when the tv was opened. We had checked in at 5 pm and TV was opened at 1045pm. Calls were made several times and finally recharge was done at 1130 pm. At midnight the tv signal failed and tv had to be switched off. This rant goes on and on. It's winters and instead of getting the swimming pool dried and area cleaned, it was filled with dirtiest water you could imagine. In morning I had ordered tea, till night even after house keeping had done it's work the tea jar was present. No newspapers were provided. Overall my stay was on brink of pathetic. Cambay grand is to be avoided.

"Wonderful Open-Air Dining Experience at Gardenia Restaurant"

I recently had the pleasure of enjoying an open-air dinner at Gardenia Restaurant, and it was truly a delightful experience. The ambiance was perfect, with the cool evening breeze adding to the relaxing atmosphere. Dining under the stars while surrounded by lush greenery made for an unforgettable evening.

The food was exceptional, as always, with a wide variety of dishes that were both flavorful and beautifully presented. The service was top-notch, with the staff being attentive and accommodating, ensuring our needs were met promptly.

The open-air setting added a unique charm to the dining experience, making it ideal for a romantic evening or a casual dinner with friends.

Overall, I highly recommend Gardenia Restaurant for anyone looking for a beautiful outdoor dining experience combined with excellent food and service. It’s definitely a must-try!

I recently stayed at Fortune Park, Ahmedabad, and it was a delightful experience. The rooms were cozy and well-equipped, making me feel right at home. I particularly enjoyed the delicious meals at the Gardenia restaurant, where the variety of Indian and international dishes was impressive. The staff were incredibly friendly and attentive, always ready to assist with a smile. The hotel’s location near Ellis Bridge made it convenient to explore the city. Plus, the fitness center was a great bonus for keeping up with my workout routine. Overall, it was a memorable stay, and I would definitely recommend it to anyone visiting Ahmedabad.

Fortune Park Hotels offer a traveler's delight - a spotless 5-star stay that blends luxury with authentic Indian hospitality. The stunning lobby makes an impressive first impression, with its opulent decor and welcoming fragrance. The rooms are brightly lit, spacious and modernly appointed with every amenity for comfort - plush bedding, elegant bathrooms, fast wi-fi and work stations. What really sets this hotel apart is the impeccable service. Every engagement of the stay is greeted with a warm smile and genuine concern for your experience. No request is too small or large for the willing and considerate staff. A multitude of optional amenities like fitness center, outdoor pool, day spa and expanding restaurant menu with exquisite culinary offerings provide plenty for both relaxation and excitement. Destination hospitality is mastered here in a way that feels luxurious yet never stuffy. Fortune Park has found the perfect balance between affordable luxury and a home sweet home. Certainly a 5-star stay worthy of your hard-earned traveler bucks! I wholeheartedly recommend and eagerly await my next sojourn at one of their properties.

Many things wrong with this hotel.

1) The cost per room for what you get is way too high, should be half. We got a 'premium' room, but the inside is rather shabby, very old. And the toilet smells like a public toilet despite their cleaning.

2) The staff we not trained at all, highly ineffective and brainless in the restaurant. This morning at breakfast, we heard a table complaining that the they did not clear the table to clean, so any cutlery and cups could have been used be previous customers. Same thing happened to us actually.

3) We went down for dinner, and sat down on a table with water on the table. I informed the waitress, and she then got the napkin cloth and cleaned the water mark, then placed the same napkin back, folded nicely!!! How stupid can you get!!!

4) We ordered prawns and a rice. After half an hour they bought the wrong dish. Then they informed us it would be 20mins. After 20mins, when we complained, they informed us there are no prawns. This place is pathetic.

Do not stay here unless:
1) you want to shower in a place that smells like a public toilet
2) you want to dine in a 'restaurant' where the plates and cups potentially have been used by the previous customer
3) you have too much time you want to waste it
4) you have too much money, you want to waste it on shabby '4 star premium' room
