THIS IS A LONG REVIEW.
This review is me mentioning about my main course first, then starters and then the appetisers I had. I went here to have dinner with my father while staying at a hotel nearby. I must say, although they had limited dishes, but they all were culture oriented dishes, including gujrati Kadhi, Daal-E-Fortune and things like that. There was a special of the chef parantha- Mirchi ka parantha where he had a pre-self-made masala for the parantha and then he topped it with the masala to give it a hint of spice and aroma which was extremely succulent and aromatic!
My dad tried chocked biryani in which the rice was well cooked and the chicken was tender and the flavours were mouth-watering.
We also had starters, which I should have started off my review with, but none the less, we ordered one of non-veg platter and a Veg platter which had tangri, chicken tikki, muttilon seekh kebab, chicken tikka and in veg they had cauliflower, mushroom, cottage cheese (paneer), veg seekh kebab and hara bhara tikki kebab with cheese filling. I personally loved everything that the chef made and was delicious! The one thing I found a little different was that the Hara-bhara tikki kebab had cheese filling in it and I just LOVED IT!! this thing and the veg seekh kebab were great!

The appetiser-- the soup (which I forgot to mention before) 😂
I ordered cream of much room soup as well with was extremely thick, well cooked, great texture! And it tasted great!!!

My overall dining experience was great here!
WE then had gajjar ka halwa and few desserts which I'm sure everyone with a sweet tooth would like!

I'd like to give a special mention to Chef Khan and their current GM Mr. Sunil who was kind enough to observe me being specific and particular about my orders, so he ensured nothing goes wrong with my meals 🤣🤣
Also chef Khan took care of the food very nicely and the staff was very hospitable as well!

Mr Sunil is doing a great job at training and maintaining the staff and the standards of the Fortune hotel chain!
Thank you for a great dining experience!
What a wonderful gentleman! He has a great experience in handling "guests like ME" I'm a very particular person! But it was great to see their senior management being present and taking care of the guests! Great job sir!

Fortune Park, Ahmedabad is a contemporary business hotel located centrally in one of the greenest areas of the city with excellent connectivity to the airport/ railway station, commercial zone and shopping hub. The hotel is strategically located near Ellis Bridge within short driving distance to the Sarkhej-Gandhinagar Highway (S.G. Road) which houses some of the leading corporate and also provides easy access to cutting-edge institutions like the Indian Institute of Management Ahmedabad (IIMA), the Mudra Institute of Communications (MICA), National Institute of Design (NID), Gujarat Vidyapeeth and the Nirma University of Science and Technology. The hotel offers comfortable accommodation, a round the clock dining outlet, choice of banqueting venues along with warm and efficient service.

We had a trip to 'The Eatery' for a evening buffet with family.

The ambience for The Eatery is very good. The staff seemed to be a little preoccupied but were cooperative and helpful.

There are a good selection of food items from salads, live counter, starters to main course and desserts. Subjectively, I found the taste to be a bit lacking and bland across most of the dishes. The highlights for me were the fish starters, chicken curry and the hazelnut cake. I  wished for more.

For the overall value proposition I would say the buffet price does not completely justify the taste experience. But the experience exists and is above average considering ambience, service and food taste.

A unusual thing we noticed was that the eatery is on the fist floor and the washrooms are on the ground floor. Would have preferred to at least have them on the same floor.

Excellent family hotel. All staff right from check in to check out were very polite and welcoming. Buffet breakfast menu had varied options. We had a lovely stay.
Thank you Four Points Sheraton!!

I had the most relaxing weekend stay at Four Points Sheraton Ahmedabad! From the moment we arrived, the personalized welcome set the tone for an exceptional experience. The highlight of our stay was the delightful high tea on bed—a luxurious touch that made the morning extra special. Both the buffet breakfast and buffet dinner were a culinary delight, with an array of delicious options that catered to every palate. The service was impeccable, and the ambiance made the whole experience feel like a true getaway in the heart of the city. Highly recommend for anyone looking to unwind in comfort and style!

Four Points by Sheraton offers a solid stay with its prime location in the heart of the city. Its proximity to major markets and attractions makes it convenient for both business travelers and tourists looking to explore.
While it leans more towards catering to business needs, the hotel doesn't disappoint with its comfortable and spacious rooms. The room service is efficient and the overall customer service provided by the staff is commendable.
Overall, Four Points by Sheraton provides a pleasant experience with its central location, comfortable accommodations,and attentive service. Whether you're in town for business or leisure, it's a reliable choice for a hassle-free stay.

I recently had traveled to Four Points by Sheraton, Ahmedabad and decided to dine at the restaurant. I was impressed by the culinary skills of chef Suneel Kumar. They had a wide variety of food which was packed with flavors. Chef has good attention towards taste and presentation. Each meal was prepared with fresh, good-quality ingredients.

In addition to the outstanding food, the service was great. The staff was attentive, and knowledgeable about the dishes, providing helpful suggestions if needed. The chef clearly takes pride in both the kitchen and the overall guest experience.

I would highly recommend dining at Four Points By Sheraton to anyone looking for a memorable experience. The chef and team truly elevate the dining experience , making it a highlight of any stay. I look forward to returning soon!

We didn’t use the hotel for much else beyond sleeping so it wasn’t the worst, but if you are looking to enjoy your hotel stay, you may want to look elsewhere.

3. I love the location. Many of the tourist attractions is 10 mins away and easily accessible in rickshaw/ App bikes. Small eateries and chai wallas are around.
4. A great layout of food .very attentive staff at the Eatery, and the Head chef keeps checking with all customers. So do the attendants. Avoid peak hour buffet , so your live orders come sooner.

My recent stay at the Hotel Four Points by Sheraton in Ahmedabad from March 14th to March 16th, 2024, left me deeply disappointed and dissatisfied. Despite my initial expectations of a pleasant and comfortable stay, numerous issues arose throughout my two-day visit, culminating in a significant level of frustration and discontent.

To begin with, I had made two separate bookings for consecutive days, one from March 14th to March 15th and the other from March 15th to March 16th. Prior to my arrival, I contacted the hotel directly to inquire about the need to switch rooms between bookings. I was assured by hotel staff that there would be no need to change rooms, and that the same accommodation would be provided for both days. However, upon arrival on March 15th, I was informed that my room was not ready and had to wait for over an hour for it to be cleaned. This unexpected delay after a long journey was certainly not the welcoming experience I had anticipated.

Furthermore, I had specifically requested a birthday cake and decoration for my friend's birthday celebration, which was scheduled for the evening of March 15th. While the hotel agreed to provide a 250g cake, they stated that they did not offer any decoration services. Despite confirming the arrangement over the phone, the cake was not delivered as agreed upon at 11:50 PM on March 15th. This lack of follow-through on their part was incredibly disappointing, especially considering the significance of the occasion.

Additionally, there was confusion regarding my request for airport transfer on the morning of March 16th at 4:00 AM. Initially, the hotel staff informed me that such a request had not been made and quoted a price of 1800 INR for the service. However, after further investigation, they acknowledged receiving the request but only after a delay and some initial confusion. This lack of organization and clarity in their communication further added to the frustration of my overall experience.

In summary, my stay at the Hotel Four Points by Sheraton in Ahmedabad fell far short of expectations due to a series of disappointing incidents and lapses in service. From delays in room readiness to unfulfilled promises regarding birthday arrangements and airport transfer confusion, the level of dissatisfaction I experienced was significant. As a result, I cannot recommend this hotel to others and hope that improvements are made to prevent similar experiences for future guests.

I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Sheraton Four Points in Amdavad for the second time.  And I must say it was a delightful experience overall. The hotel provided a comfortable and memorable stay, and here's my review based on various aspects:  Special thanks to the GM Vinod Kumar and his staff.

Location: The hotel is conveniently situated in a prime location, making it easily accessible from major attractions and transportation hubs in Amdavad.  Easy for Uber and Ola.  Whether you're a leisure or business traveler, you'll appreciate the hotel's proximity to key areas of interest.

Accommodation: The rooms at were spacious, clean, and well-appointed. I particularly enjoyed the comfortable bed and the modern amenities available. And even though close to the main road, it was very quiet.

Staff: The hotel staff demonstrated exceptional professionalism and hospitality throughout my stay. They were friendly, attentive, and always ready to assist with any inquiries or requests. From the front desk to the housekeeping team, the staff ensured a warm and welcoming atmosphere, making me feel valued as a guest. I felt very safe and secure, thanks Nipurn.

Dining: The dining options at are impressive. I particularly enjoyed the breakfast buffet, which featured a wide array of delicious traditional Gujrati dishes: khandvi, dhokla, khaman, jalebi, and many more.  The quality of the food was excellent, and the service was prompt and attentive.  Thanks Utkarsh, Manoj and Payal.  The chef was awesome!

Additionally, the hotel offered meeting and event spaces, making it an ideal choice for business travelers or those hosting events in Ahmedabad.
In conclusion, the Four Points in Ahmedabad is a top-notch hotel that offers a fantastic stay. From its convenient location to its comfortable rooms and exceptional service, the hotel excelled in providing a memorable experience. I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Ahmedabad, whether for business or leisure purposes.

I stayed with my husband in this hotel of Ahmedabad  from 25th January to 30 January, 2023 . Walking distance from Sabarmati riverfront was a boon for us. Would walk down daily evening. The hotel has wonderful ambience, warm hospitality and wide spread-out of excellent world class food  . The main Chef and staffs were so friendly and cooperative , Service is top class. They would keep asking for any special recommendations for food. I would recommend this hotel to all my friends.
Nice and clean rooms...Good hospitality...unlimited tasty breakfast ....

Decent rooms ( preferably if you happen to get the suite), great location with respect to Airport and/or Railway Station ( Kalupur Railway Station) and few of the traditional areas of the great city of Ahmedabad.

The support staff was very kind and cordial and greeted us with a smile every time they interacted and/or room service.

They serve breakfast buffet (you can get that included in your package) from 6:30 AM- 10:30 AM and dinner buffet starting at 7 PM IST.

I went there for one corporate event. The banquet hall was good. It was well equipped. The sound system was running very good. The technician was there for support. The ac were functioning properly. The food review is also nice. Taste was really good and quality was up to mark. Very good place for corporate /business meetings.

Everything about the hotel was completely top notch.
Hotel is centrally located in Ahmedabad with proximity to railway station, lake, market, riverfront. There is no valet service but have space for parking.
They took good precautions on Covid guidelines and made to feel safe.
The rooms were spacious, well kept and the staff was very courteous and helpful. The breakfast spread was good as well.
I would highly recommend this place.

I enjoyed my stay at Sheraton. The rooms are very neat and clean. The staff is also very polite and good at their work. I have booked my room with breakfast and dinner. I was very happy with the breakfast buffet and dinner was also very good.

It is a great place to stay. The staff was polite and courteous. The restaurant staff, Chef Sunil and their team deserves a special thanks. They were very helpful. Right from the front desk supervisor to the housekeeping staff, bellman etc everyone was extremely friendly. It was a lovely experience staying here.

My first experience and, it's worth remembering.
Mr. Sunil Kumar -head chef interacted and it was a good experience. Front desk Mr. Akshay and Mr. Sudhir (if I correctly recall) are energetic professionals. Food quality is good and hospitality is fill with warmth by all the staff on duty everywhere.

We have no complaints about this place room was in excellent decor and the bed was most comfortable. Overall the staff from reception to resturant were very helpful and help full.
Excellent keep up the good work 👍

in room dining is very bad here I would not suggest to stay if u want to stay peacefully . The food quality is very low fruit juice was stinking and very old they delivered my dinner in 3 parts The first they served the main dish beverage and dessert they forgot after that when I asked for it, they again  sent only the beverage and forgot the dessert I had to  sleep  empty stomach because of their pathetic service. The staff was very rude the housekeeping staff was nice but the in room dining staff all were so annoying.

You have three or four Marriott options at Ahmedabad. Chose this one.  They upgraded me,  as I was eligible. Property will be better uplifting in rooms. Restaurant BF menu was limited,  food acceptable. Mask discipline in kitchen and dining can be better.  Needs efforts for usual Marriott standard.

Labelled to be 4 stars, clearly not even close. More like a 2.5-3 stars hotel.

Lacking swimming pool. Our rooms' cleaniness was not up to standard. The room was also lacking an iron, ironing board, heck even the whole mini fridge is missing!

How is that even possible for a "4 stars" business hotel?

Soap dispensers in the shower was not maintained, conditioner was dried up.

Only had 3 hangers for a 2 person room. Luckily I brought my own hangers.

Very disappointing. Other than good pricing, everything else was lacking imo. Front desk service was not bad though.

Excellent, cosy, and excellent service. Competent staff, a great chef, attentive housekeeping staff, prompt service, good food, good bathroom amenities—there is no way I could give anything less than a perfect rating. I will therefore be present whenever Ahmedabad is mentioned.
It's a clean, well staffed, convenient hotel

Excellent 👍 service by Rohit from benqut...very good behaviour staff friendly with smile ,Pooja from front desk,all overall good experience.special thanks to Mr. Rohit verma ji . Restaurant Service is Poor. Staff behaviour not Supported.

The place is very welcoming, amazing reception front desk staff. Helpful with requests. The kitchen staff, managed by Manoj and chef Suneel made our breakfast time fun. The food made per order and taste reminded me of Home.

Excellent Hotel. Superb ambiance. Well maintained. Excellent staff. Food test is superb, bit expensive. Restaurant staff is also excellent and well trained. Checkout day morning Chef with his team greet us and took picture. Special thanks to Ms Anuja 6 months experience fresher serves you as if she is well experienced.

We stayed here 2 weeks before and we really enjoyed a lot.
Their hospitality & their services & also food wise, breakfast was awesome & lunch and dinner were speechless..!!
Main thing its in the middle of the city..!! 👌👌

By far one of my best hotel experiences ... the property is excellent and the experience if further enriched by the professionalism and warm hospitality of the entire staff. Got an upgrade to my room .. and the stay was very comfortable .. the food is great as well .. the staff is very professional and courteous .. special mention to Ms. Nakshita for all the assistance .. and to the Manager Mr. Vinod to personally attend to the guests .. they certainly are raising the bar for hospitality in Ahmedabad .. will surely stay there again during my next visit.
Atmosphere good but not good lunch

The Room was quite spacious, clean and sanitised. We had a wonderful time during the stay.
I have to mention the hospitality and staff who were extremely polite and very kind with all our requests.
The Breakfast buffet variety was huge and extremely good ! Will definitely stay in Sheraton the next time we visit Ahmedabad.

I recently stayed with family on our trip to Gujarat. Location is perfect and very near to the riverfront , airport, Ellis bridge and ashram road
Rooms are a bit dated and in desperate need for makeover

Reception staff are very nice and accommodating to all requests

The food is awesome with very attentive chef, servers

Good quality of food for both veg and non veg varieties, courteous staff especially Chef and other staff in dining area. clean room and great location not far from railway station. would like to come again. i recommend this place.

Rooms decent, staff courteous and helpful, location also good....Only thing they should look upon is for Health club and swimming pool. They should hv steam, sauna, jacuzzi and swimming pool....
Breakfast was decent and it starts at 6.30 am ...

Good rooms however the buffet spread was like there but not there. No separate cafeteria, only one restaurant. Below four star standards. Location is good but cannot be easily found, there were trees covering the names board.

The hotel is amazing. Rooms are very good. Service is at par. The hospitality is mind-blowing. Would definitely recommend anyone to stay here. They didnt charge us for extra bed even after we agreed to pay for it while doing the room booking. This was a really nice gesture from their end. The breakfast spread was beyond expectations. The taste was also superb. Highly Recommended.

TIP: Do not miss the breakfast here :)

I am staying here for the last 5 days and the wonderful services are rendered by all the members of staff of this hotel. It is a wonderful hotel and offers delicious, foods, with love as if you are taking food at your home. Serving members are attentive at all times and provide exceptional services while having breakfast, dinner etc. 5 stars for the services offered. The rooms are very good despite the charge low compared to other hotels in the same category.

It was really nice stay with brilliant experience I had at four point by Sheraton Ahmedabad.|Food was very good +room service very nice everything is very nice 👍. I m visit again four points Ahmedabad.

Nice hotel in centre of the city. Staffs are very co-operative and understand your needs and try to do whatever possible to help you. Food is also very tasty. Sr. Chef Sri Sunil Kumarji is outstanding. His hospitality is outstanding. He goes out of the way to help you. Apart from him, Ms Payal and other chefs are also very co-operative.

"I recently stayed at the Four Points by Sheraton and was blown away by the exceptional service and amenities. From the moment I checked in, the staff went above and beyond to ensure my stay was comfortable and enjoyable. The room was immaculately clean and beautifully decorated, with all the modern amenities I could need, including a comfortable bed, large flat-screen TV, and high-speed internet access.
Are these rooms? They are so small not worth at all for this price. In the same area you will get better hotels at much cheaper price. Service is abysmal, better don't talk about it.
Good hotel , well settled rooms , location is also perfect . Food is tasty and its value for money . Staff is quite Co operative and well mannered. Air conditioning need to be upgraded .

A lovely hotel with a calm atmosphere. Friendly staff especially Anima in the restaurant. Very attentive and professional. Delicious food, thank you to everyone for making our stay so enjoyable and relaxing x

Nice hotel. Room is nice and clean. Toilet and shower are very nice.

Staff exceptionally helpful and friendly. Breakfast buffet is nice with a lot of variety. Please try the Dosa with potatoes.

The Cheff came specially to my table and asked if I need any special thing to be made for me.

I stayed here during 13~14 Dec this is how rate it

Property give you aging signs and you find it during stay as well

Check In : Not ok as expected with Marriott. No be boy.
Room : Find quit OK after checking in
Bed: Comfortable and Cozy
Toilet: Clean but without toiletries and felt like some Budget Hotel. Lotion kept was used by some previous Guest.
House Keeping: After giving request through Marriott App it took full night till time I called them again for the same in morning.
Breakfast : Ok Ok feeling noting great about it but staff was curtious.
Check Out : Fine but did complaint about used toiletries

It is a wonderful place. The meals offered here are extraordinary and amazing. Quality of service is also unquestionable. The behaviour of the staff is appreciable. If you are going there by public transport then make sure that you are not thugged by a local services provider.

Excellent stay! Nothing could have been better for me as a frequent traveller.

Thanks to Payal, Utkarsh and Bharat. The hotel has an efficient set of managers and leadership which was evident in everything.

It was amazing fine dining experience with four point by Sheraton..Excellent food and  service and coordination. Taste and presentation for each item  presented was superb..cherry on the cake was staff and chef Sunil Sharma who has taken care of
everything  and has made our experience worth celebrating..thanks for all the support and cooperation to Sunil Sharma for the food and taking care of all the guest present there.

Very small room.. Suite room is large enough.
However, Wardrobe inside the bathroom is beyond my understanding.... Staff is courteous.
Services are fairly good. However, if you want a family stay go for expensive suite room. Business room is for lone travellers.

I'm enjoying it here. Staff are friendly and getting upgraded to a suite probably helps.

Airport pickup was smooth and getting a car for the day wasn't crazy expensive.

I enjoyed the (often rather empty) dinning room - a reasonable range of cuisines, nicely prepared.

No, the place isn't built like a hotel in Zurich, but it's on the good end of the quality range for India.

This is not the highest quality hotel in Ahmedabad but I've found it to be friendly and welcoming, something other hotels St this rating don't do well.

That said, rooms are well appointed and of a decent enough size, breakfast is very good and served by staff who help without that feeling they are going to sit at the table and feed it to you!

I shared for 2 weeks in June 2015 and then a week in July as well. With excellent wifi is a great place for business travel.

Very happy with service levels at restaurant and house keeping staff. Amazing energy levels. It is a great asset to the hotel,

Indeed, it is compensating poor infrastructure. Like GYM, Room interiors etc.

Pathetic service. they seem to be really short staffed. my package included afternoon tea. when I went to their restaurant during the mentioned hour, I could see only cleaning staff. when I went to reception to check the lady lied it is available and sent me back to restaurant only to see cleaning continuing.
Except for clean rooms there is nothing going on for this hotel I would say.
Rooms are well maintained to Marriott brands standards. Food varieties are good. Walkable distance to Riverside.

This is my favourite hotel in Ahemdabad owing to the proximity it has from city center. Location is perfect if you have too many meetings to cover in a single day. It's approx 14 kms from airport. The service, food & stay was nice and comfortable. The hotel will try to provide you effortless and seamless stay right from check-in to check out. If you are regular, the only thing required for check-in is signature. They retain your id card copy for easy check-in. The hotel staff are friendly.

Loved the spread at the restaurant. Usually, good hotels have bland food, bit four points by Sheraton had amazingly yummy treats for a private function we hosted there. Attentive service, though their buffet sometimes kept running out of certain dishes, they were prompt in replenishing them.

As per commitment for late checkout paid, they havn’t accordingly and already charged high without any prior notice. Front desk manager is rude and changes it’s commitment of time and try to thug the customer with high charge. I have to argue and get my charges wave off when the other person went sick along with me. That was kins of customer harrasment just for their timepass. Staff issues, stay was great.

Not worth the price they charge . Rooms very dull. Old property, (when i checked in rated them 2stars)
however the staff and service was good, their breakfast spread is also good with a lot of healthy stuff.
When we told them we were not happy with the room we got, they upgraded to a suit.
The staff is v good with customer handling.(rating changed to 4stars)

Very good hotel in Ahmedabad. Staff is very courteous, Rooms are well furnished. Ambience is ok. But major challenge is to locate the hotel location. The signage is not at all visible. Administration should consider to make it visible by putting it up at the top of entrance instead of sideways.

I checked in today and was alloted room number 301 which was really smelling very bad as if the room was not used for days. Then they changed me to 901 which was good and I had placed an order to get 2 cups of capuchino which took more than 30 minutes to reach and the presentation of the cups for which the photo itself says.

Happened to stay here for two nights. Wonderful staff and amazing service with natural smile on their faces. Always ready to help the guest. But the issue is the room where I stayed was not at all comfortable. And limited options in the breakfast 🍳 menu. Also, very irritated frisking process which I ever faced. …
I would just like to say naam bade darshan chhote, prices are very high but rooms are not as per expectation, food was good stay was also good but rooms are very small as per charges

Great stay, loved the food and guest support. Staff is courteous and friendly and they take good care. Location  is also good. But the only issue is that it is locked from all sides with other buildings. Rooms are a bit small and if you travel with a three piece luggage you may feel a bit cramped. Other than that, I would certainly recommend this hotel for stay.

As always the stay was excellent but this time got to meet the head chef Mr. Pramod Choughale, excellent guy great eye for customer needs. If you ever have any special request speak to him, he will never disappoint u. Very observant staff they really take care of you.

The Hotel is very good and offers comfortable stay.  Hotel is at 20-25min drive from the Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport (Ahmedabad Airport) which places it at a very convenient location if you staying there for both work or liesure purpose.

The Buffet lunch/dinner is very simple and does not have huge variety. There are couple of good hotels near by where one can visit for good food especially if your stay is longer there.

Hotel also offer Forex Services, Local Transportation, and Helps their guests for any services they need.

Amazing staff
Special thanks to Nidhi from food and beverage department...Very humble and polite.really like hospitality provided.
Overall it's  was good experience.
Laundry was very well done
In room dining very well taken care clean and tidy.
Thankyou
Hope to visit soon

One of the best places if you want to experience great ambiance, cosy time with family and friends, great service by the staff and last but not the least an excellent quality of food ... The chef himself was so humble enough to take the review!!! I went to have non-veg buffet with my family and I don't regret going to this place.. I will visit Sheraton again and again.... Kudos to the Staff and team!!!

A special feedback for Ashish from Inroom Dining. He’s not only just super polite but also very understanding. When I said that I didn’t like the taste of a certain food item, he quickly just replaced it with another yum food item. Thank you so much Ashish. You literally  made my day. Due to extra work load I was starving and then the way you handled it was amazing. Keep up the good work.
The entrance of the hotel is not very good and can be improved. Location is good but room service is very slow and can be improved. Food was good in restaurent.

To begin with, the check in process was very smooth and quick. Rooms were clean and well maintained, hopefully sanitized too!
For in house guests dinner buffet timings could have been either extended or compensated by in room offering, as, to be done with dinner by 9pm, one has to start quite early. Spoken to restaurant manager Mr.Rohit about the same, but could not arrive  into any solution.
Food was found to be quite decent enough, but the service could have been better. I ordered for a portion of veg starter (Gobi Manchurian), through a waitress, who took my order. To my bad luck it never came, even after finishing the Kala Jamun!
Another glitch I found was from the house keeping department.
I made a request for a pair of bathroom slippers. I was asked for my room number, upon then, I was denied for the same. Resaon given - "Stocks have not arrived post lockdown". Why was the room number taken then!!
Next to the water boiler, I could find all the sachets expect for coffee, which is the only thing I have, that too black without anything else.
I happened to ask for a pack of shaving kit as I forgot to carry my own. I receive a pack of dental kit to my surprise !!
Well these glitches can be avoided, as the occupancy rate must be quite low at this time. Also the inconvenience occuring to the undeserving can be avoided.
The chauffeurs were extremely polite and courteous though, which impressed me a lot.

Rooms are pretty decent, size is a bit compact and infrastructure is something they can improve especially of washrooms.
Food is very good.
Wonderful service and great hospitality by the staff named Bharat. Would like to highly appreciate all the efforts made by him in making our stay very comfortable. Keep up the great work.

Had a very comfortable stay at the Hotel . Right from the staff at the  concierge to the restaurant, all are very courteous and attentive . Special mention for Chef Suneel who pays personal attention to guests . Anima , Pawan and Narendra also were very attentive.

Located in midst of location. Value for money for accomodation, Room alloted was having problem with phone and has to change the room. Room arrangement took lot of time. However Manager sorted out.
Amneties wise good, Food is also good but not value for money. Breakfast was good with many optuons. If you want to stay in Navrangpura one should consider the option.
Excellent service and assistance by Vasu and Fareed.

Best experience. Very courtesy staff.
F & B is best. I and my family loved the breakfast, they are always there to serve you. Very polite and helpful

Thanks
The hotel is close to the airport. The staff is polite and welcoming, the property is clean. The rooms are a bit small but comfortable.

It's a beautiful place to visit for perfect stay during the Traveling. If you had a day to take rest for one day, this is the best place to stay. Food quality is also very best over here. According to me if i am a traveller i priffer to stay over here.
Great place, most of all the staff in the restaurant and the Chefs take care of dietary needs.
unlimited buffet dinner is so poor.pls don't go. It is my first bed experience in a five star hotel dinner.in s dessert they serve barfi which is so hard like a stone
I have recently been to this place, the way they maintained ambient was very good, reasonable price, it will definitely be a good day.

Pros: clean room, rich and delicious breakfast, stable internet, nice service staff

Disadvantages: The damp smell is a bit strong

It is an old hotel with outdated facilities. All equipment and facilities appear to be in need of remodeling, there is no separate bar, and the first floor dining area closes at 10:30 PM. Perhaps because it is a place that not many people visit, the towels are smelly and the bathrooms only provide shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, and soap. This place is disappointing for the price.

The hotel apparently undergoes renovations at night, because... When you go to bed you can’t sleep because of the constant noise. Dogs howl outside the windows all night. The water in the shower does not drain well, and after a shower the room begins to smell of dampness and sewage. Pros: polite staff, good location.

Hotel is fine but the price is expensive for what you get. for him. The service is excellent but the rooms are not the most updated. The breakfast is not particularly tasty and there is no pleasant place to sit in the hotel. The hotel lobby smells bad and the location is central but not beautiful.
Good hotel, with satisfactory cuisine. The menu offering is a little more modest than in other hotels. There is only 1 restaurant.

The place is nice, even though it's called the Sheraton group, it's not as big as the Sheraton in China or Solo
Sheraton and India Sheraton, but breakfast....... India)))))

My baby shower event happened at Wellington hall today. It’s really great hospitality by entire team. Food was amazing and service was excellent. Everyone enjoyed our event at Hillock Ahmedabad. Lovely moments for my entire family members. Highly recommended to everyone.

I must say this is a restaurant which needed In Ahmedabad badly as their punjabi food is really different from all other places and hit your taste buds. It is a must visit if you want to get best taste with best ambience in Ahmedabad. Their blueberry cheesecake is a must try.
Excellent hotel. The room is clean and well maintain. The restaurant food is very nice. The waiters and the bell boys serves well. I will stay there again.

The experience has been very good. The food service by Mr Vinod was prompt and courteous. Housekeeping by Mrs Parul was very good and thorough. All the staff has been generous in their attitude. Must visit!

We had lunch together at wellington Hall 20 peoples family celebrations,. Everyone enjoyed a lot. Food and service was excellent.  We are having food of Hillock - Mount Abu last 15 years.  Same taste,  really appreciated.  Keep it up.

Stayed at The Hillock Ahmedabad Hotel, and it was a very pleasant experience. The rooms were tidy and comfortable. I also used their airport pickup and drop-off service, which was convenient. The location is excellent, close to the airport, making it easy for travelers. Overall, a very pleasant and convenient stay.

Absolutely love the interiors; it’s the best I’ve seen among all the hotels in India. The ambience is stunning, creating a beautiful and serene atmosphere. The service is also excellent, making the stay even more enjoyable. I would highly recommend everyone to visit this hotel at least once.

I have come here 3 times now this year for stay and have checked in every possible rooms they have. I must say the owners have very elegant choices while making this kind of concept true in a buzzing megacity of Ahmedabad to cater people with utmost facilities. Food is the best thing here which is designed very well for all class of people. Service provided by their staff is too good. Mr. Vinodbhai served us continuously well and on time. Also rest of staff is also very polite and on time. All things are well organised and hygiene is the best thing I liked in this place. I would recommend everyone to come and stay here or dine here.

The Hillock delivers a serene and memorable escape with its picturesque setting and exceptional service. Guests enjoy spacious, well-appointed rooms, a tranquil atmosphere, and stunning views. The attentive staff and delicious dining options add to the experience, making it a perfect retreat for relaxation or a special getaway. Highly recommended for a rejuvenating stay.

Hillock Ahmedabad is a reliable choice for anyone looking for a wholesome meal. Its balanced blend of taste, quality, and service makes it a standout restaurant in the city. Whether you're a local or a visitor, it’s worth checking out if you want a fulfilling, multi-cuisine experience.

Had dinner yesterday… new year dinner with family. Very average food. That was buffet . Limited items as compare to charges. Everything is cold. Only gulab jambun is hot. Roti and sabaji all r cold and tasteless. Seriously below average food. They have spent money on interior only. Do not recommend for food. Don’t waste your money.

The only positive about our stay was the breakfast which was 10/10 but overall the hotel needs to up its game if they want to charge 4/5 star rates when there are other options. Superb ambience, super delicious food (esp paneer - made in house).

Everything is perfect for this hotel, feeling like Primum experience in every thing, there is conference room markebal, dining area is unique, room like up to the mark, large parking, food delicious, atmosphere and intirer make prefect pictures capture place, location is on road easily getebal

It's amazing and there are room facilities also like 5 stare hotel and room service is satisfying, if I talk about food so it's much more delicious. We can say all the things good .

First time booked this hotel 🏨 lovely property, we enjoyed the hospitality of The Hillock Ahmedabad. We love the food because it's so yummy and delicious during morning breakfast. Special thanks 🙏 entire Hillock family.

I stayed here with my friends for birthday celebration in 5 rooms, it was nice experience. Staff of reception is really cooperative. Happy with all the services. Wonderful  experience for us. Booked through MMT. It's  lovely stay with this property.  Food and ambience was amazing.  I'm staying in room number 508 very clean and grand. I'm  frequently traveling to Ahmedabad,  Highly recommend this hotel for good stay.

Had a great time at hillock Ahmedabad, very beautiful ambience in garden also. Food was fabulous as well as serving. Especially mentioned Ms. Tanya. Ms. Ruhi, Mr. Suresh, Mr. Soumik. and all over staff very kind. We will come back soon surely.
Wonderful dinning experience at The Hillock Ahmedabad. Narayan & Biswajit were spectacular at their services and recommendations. Food was amazing too.

Unprofessional hotel staff .. no manners ,We came from Udaipur, and stayed here to celebrate Navratri

Today we enjoy a food at Hillock Ahmedabad

Wonderful experience for today’s photo shoot at hillock Ahmedabad. Best place for photo shoot. My experience with this property amazing just because of great support from Shakun & entire staff. Food and services are beyond our expectations.

My recent visit to Hilllock, Ahmedabad  was an absolute delight. From the moment we stepped in, the warm ambiance and attentive staff made us feel welcome. The menu offered a variety of options, and we decided to try the Paneer Subji and Cheese Subji along with an assortment of bread: Garlic Naan, Lachha Paratha, Tandoori Roti, and Tawa Roti.

The flavors were exceptional! The paneer subji was rich and creamy, while the cheese subji had just the right balance of spices. The bread was freshly prepared and complemented the curries perfectly. Each bite was a burst of deliciousness.

What truly stood out was the impeccable service. The staff was attentive, courteous, and prompt. They ensured that our dining experience was memorable. Kudos to the entire team!

If you’re looking for a place with great food and top-notch service, I highly recommend this restaurant. We left with satisfied taste buds and happy hearts.

This hotel honestly makes you feel like you’re no longer in India, the sheer grandeur of the restaurant & attention to detail given in the smallest of areas really shows. They really deserve a 5 star rating for clearly leaving no stone unturned to go with the theme of the property.

The rooms were spacious with very high ceilings to add to the opulence. They’ve got a restaurant in the ground floor that’s themed around the Trevi fountain in Italy. There are grand chandeliers all around the property & even inside the rooms.

They’ve got 3 banquet halls which seem to be very popular here which were all booked throughout my 2 nights stay at the property. The owner is very actively involved in the operations which is a key reason for the standards being so highly maintained. Out of a lot of hotels that I’ve stayed in India, this is definitely one among the top stays I’ve experienced in it’s price category.

In terms of feedback on what they can improve on, the breakfast quality is something that could be worked upon. And when there are loud events in the ground floor & they play loud music, the sound does travel up to the other rooms, so they should have stricter rules regarding the decibel limits permissible here. The pool & gym are still under construction, but I’m sure will be great once it’s ready.

All in all, highly recommended to stay here.

Nestled in the vibrant city of Ahmedabad, Trevi at The Hillock beckons discerning diners to embark on a journey of Italian opulence and culinary mastery. Recently, I had the pleasure of immersing myself in an evening of fine dining at this luxurious establishment, where every detail, from the décor to the cuisine, surpassed expectations.

As I stepped into Trevi, I was immediately captivated by the grandeur of its Italian-inspired décor. The interior exudes sophistication, with elegant marble floors, intricately carved wooden furnishings, and ornate chandeliers casting a warm glow over the space. The ambiance strikes a perfect balance between timeless charm and contemporary flair, creating an inviting atmosphere that sets the stage for an unforgettable dining experience.

Must try dishesSoup: Roman Broth, Trevi’s Khow Suey
Starters: Corn Ball Chilli, Gilafi Vegetable Seekh Kebab, Tandoor ka KhazanaMain Course: Paneer Tawa Masala, Paneer Multani Rara Masala, Veg Kadhai, Dal Makhani

In summary, Trevi at The Hillock is a beacon of Italian elegance and culinary excellence in Ahmedabad. From its lavish décor to its exquisite cuisine and impeccable service, every aspect of the restaurant exudes a sense of luxury and sophistication that is sure to leave a lasting impression on discerning diners. Whether seeking a romantic dinner for two or a celebratory feast with friends and family, a visit to Trevi promises a gastronomic journey like no other.

I would highly recommend this place if you want to spend a good time with your family, friends or partner. Every staff member I encountered from the valet to reception, housekeeping, and service were delightful and eager to help. Hospitality with responsibility by The Hillock Ahmedabad.

This property interiors and ambiance and chandeliers awesome. Dining here Dazzles with the contemporary restaurant TREVI and VERANDA delicious food options. All banquet are grand with Italian Flooring, single carpet, piller less. Best place for memorable wedding, Reception, Sangeet nights. Food was yummy in all places. All staff members are very professional and helpful.

The moment we entered, everyone welcoming, all staff members are so attantive, feel so special, my birthday celebration organized by friends. Hillock knows for deleciues food. location also so convenient from my home. great hospitality and excellent ambiance of this property.

Review of Hillock Hotel for Wedding Banquet:
I recently had my wedding banquet at Hillock Hotel, and it was absolutely amazing! The interior of the hotel was stunning, creating a beautiful and romantic atmosphere for our special day. The staff, especially Jaideep, was incredibly helpful and attentive from start to finish. He was there every step of the way, ensuring that everything ran smoothly. Thanks to Jaideep and the entire team, our wedding function went off without a hitch. I highly recommend Hillock Hotel for its gorgeous venue and exceptional service. It made our wedding day truly unforgettable.

"An exceptional stay at this hotel! From the moment we arrived, the staff went above and beyond to make our experience memorable. The rooms were clean and well-appointed, the food at the restaurant was delicious, and the location was perfect for exploring the city. We can't wait to return to this wonderful establishment."

It's only been a year since the hotel was built.. and the rooms are damp.  Damp walls need a paint job.  Also the carpet in the room is so dirty that negative energy is received there.  Apart from that, the towels provided in the bathroom were in torn condition.  There food quality was good.  The breakfast dishes were not as per their charge.

Apart from that there are no amenities.  And the room check out time is given at 11 am which is not reasonable.  Step out of the room and it smells like it's in the kitchen.

One of the best hotels I have stayed in recent memory. Excellent property located within a short driving distance from the airport. Staff are very attentive to detail and go out of the way to make your stay comfortable. The in-house restaurant has a wide variety of options for families with young children. Room service was great too. I would highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Ahmedabad.

We went there to celebrate my wife's birthday. They provide Candle light dinner pack. The Balcony sitting was very romantic. View from the Balcony was also good. Best service provided and Food was very delicious. I would really recommend to any couple who want to spend some quality time they can visit.

Very beautiful ambience for clicking beautiful pictures.  Bread and Curry was amazing with delicious food. Very quick service and very nice hospitality special mention Tanya for great attend.  Memorable dinner At Hillock. Thanks

Today again we visited and celebrated our very important occasion at Hillock . We booked the Private Dining Room for Family. Food, Service, ambience was Extraordinary. Mr Suresh Planned in such a way that we got many Surprises like he took one of our photo, he himself edited and the complete family was amazed when we entered and found our photo on the screen. Then Ram Kumar was with us and his service was so good that as family we could spend Quality time. I want to Thank Mr Himanshu he gave my earlier message response also that shows how much even the management is respectful for their customers. Thank you for making our occasion Memorable.
Hotels is amazing, rooms are very comfortable and luxurious, feels like heaven. Staff is very polite and humble and got a top notch hospitality. Would suggest anyone seeking royale stay in Ahmedabad.

We had a beautiful event at hotel. It was very pleasant. The food was too yumm. And main part was the service was very nice. Would be seeing again in near future for some other event. N mainly my daughter is soo happy after her birthday celebration. Thanks to himanshu ji , shakun ji n team hillock.

I went to this hotel for a BNI meeting. The hotel is good. Ambiance is also good. But some things that need to be improved are 1. Parking, 2. Food test, 3. Information should be available to all staff.

Even the reception desk did not know where I was going to the meeting. The meeting was on the ground floor, the reception desk sent me to the first floor, the laundry guy on the first floor sent me to floor -2, then I got a room waiter in -1 who took me to the proper place. Now all this happened at 7 o'clock in the morning. So wasn't the receptionist awake?!?

"Absolutely delighted with the exquisite dinner experience at Hillock Hotel [Ahmedabad] The culinary expertise of *****the brilliant Lepcha chef.showcased in every flavorful dish. Special thanks to Nitinkumar, Ramkumar, and the seasoned team for impeccable service. A culinary journey worth savoring! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐"and
Nitinkumar, Kudos to the perfect service led by Ramkumar, highly recommended for those who appreciate culinary artistry and superior service. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐"

Kalasi Hotel, a very simple design from the outside, but when you go inside, you feel that you have come somewhere in Italy or somewhere in a Royal Palace.

Passed by here many times and yes, years ago when the hotel was being built, I met the owner Mr. Panil Agarwal at his house regarding business. Very easy going person, was a pleasure to meet.

Talking about the decoration here, something different has been done and it looks really beautiful.

Thus, time cannot be allotted to go. Went to an event of Divya Bhaskar.

Not too modern but very attractive decoration. Let's talk about the banquet, it was great, it was like sitting on the set of a movie, I met his safe Shri Krishna ji, it was fun.

Now finally it's time to eat, eat heavily and that too requires hot juice 😂 The fun of Jalebi was different.

We will definitely come again until we come to their restaurant
Excellent service soumik ji

See how luxurious the place is! This place that looks a bit attractive from outside is very luxurious, colorful and full of decorations inside. A beautiful blend of modernity with classic furniture. It was fun to see everything around.
Excellent food and facilities by Bishwajeet and Viren Bora
I found this place to be just luxury, no fun, fake money look, not even worth a 0 rating.
Bod rumas
Roshan and Rinku and Vishwjeet

Odd place
Good food
Decoration jordar che
Soils
All perfect 👍🏻😊 …
Gaiajan
nice
Amazing

A Heritage Gem in the Heart of the Old City
The House of MG is a stunning hotel that perfectly captures the essence of Ahmedabad's rich history. Its heritage-themed decor, beautiful indoor pool, and two exquisite restaurants create an unforgettable experience.
A particular highlight is the Gujarati thali at the Agashiye restaurant, a culinary journey through the flavors of Gujarat.
The staff's courtesy and helpfulness further enhanced our stay, making it truly delightful and memorable. We extend our sincere thanks to the entire team at The House of MG for such a wonderful experience. We look forward to returning soon.

It's an Old Haveli Converted in to Hotel. Cool and Decent Place to stay in the heart of the Heritage  City. It's a Heritage place too. Its an Architectural Beauty. Huge Rooms, Terrace Garden. You can eat here a Treditional Gujarati Thali and Food .

Was one of the worst dining experience I had, Seeing the rating I went there.
The staff was rude, least interested in serving & behaving as if they were doing a favour to us.
The food was below average & so was the ambience. I have had much better food at less than half the price in much better places. Wouldn't recommend any1 to go there & waste their time & money.
Simply useless.
If you really like that vintage touch in everything & want to explore the heritage city then you should not miss this place. The food is quite homely & staffs behaviour is really appreciable.

I had the silver thali at the house of MG. It started with a tour of the shops followed by a delicious vegetarian thali served on silver plates and utensils. We were a group of around 30 people. Gujarati food was served. I really loved the basundi, the bhakhri, the kadhi and the paan.
The view was breathtaking and we really loved the ambience and the food.

Very rude staff. Maria Freitus was the one to welcome at entrance. We were here to have Gujarati thali (over hyped but not worth it) all the way from Mumbai and made to wait for 45 mins at the reception (not even offered a glass of water). This wait was because they were yet to open.but the decent thing to do is atleast offer a seat but no! They were very stubborn and did not care much about visitors. This shows why this place has so many negative reviews. Owner needs to train staff on hospitality. Funniest part was when the Agashya team encourages you to opt for other restaurants in the property!

We visited this place to have lunch at the Agadhiye specifically for the Gujarati Thali. It was a great experience. Loved the food. The small parathas with makkhan, dal khichdi rice, ice cream, corn bhajiya, was really good.
The starters themselves are a delight. Great drinks and excellent service. Quality and portions both score high
The beautiful house trip you will be experiencing here. The nostalgic experience of rooms with the next level of hygiene and safety makes it as one of the present stays.

Very heritage boutique hotel.
You will get authentic gujrati food here.
The ambience is beautiful. And staff is very friendly.
Great heritage hotel but in a very busy part of town so get ready to sleep with ear plugs on if your room faces the street.

I had lunch at House of MG today and to say the least, it was my worst experience..inspite of being a regular at this restaurant,  the kind of treatment which I got was absolutely pathetic. Below are the pointers on which Abhay Mangaldas and his team should work upon.
1. Fulka Roti..The Rotis were half cooked and cold.
2. Jalebi..known for this signature dish, the jalebis were all yellowish and with no taste at all.
3. Chole..Again, the Chole were nor properly cooked and were smelly.
4. Sugarcane Juice..It tastes more like Rasna from a can rather than sugarcane juice.

It would be better if the management starts with a road side dhaba to learn the basics of cooking. The height is the arrogance of the manager who said that this is what we give. If this is the best, why the heck do u charge such an exorbitant amount ? It is better If u guys shut down the complex and introspect on your standards of customer service..

Finally,  thanks Mr. Mandalas for spoiling our celebration of Father's day.

Beauty's peace expensive romantic
Pan served there after meal is not sweet its salted pan be careful

Went for a family lunch with a friend, amazing place , very well maintained! the lunch was typically a gujrati thali but every item  was very exquisite and tasty and freshly made.
The portions are unlimited as one can’t keep eating but the taste of the shrikhand and the hand made cream was really great !
The service is excellent but he waiters should also allow some privacy while having food as they keep asking whether you want more helpings!
Definitely a place to recommend for a great authentic dinning experience with a touch of history!

Having had amazing experience at House of MG previously, we decided to stay here once again. This time we stayed at haveli 2 and booked a Jr. Suite and a Pent House. I suggest never stay at Pent House in summers as the Pent House turns into a live oven even at 2am in the nights. Despite having 2 ACs in the room they were just ineffective. We sweated all night, couldn't sleep. The hotel management when informed sounded helpless and expressed sorry.

Our holiday got spoiled despite being charged a premium over the 5 stars in the town.

Magnificent place to stay at. Absolutely phenomenal staff - they are so welcoming, kind and attentive. The kitchen staff in particular make you feel so at home and taken care of. They go above and beyond to make you feel comfortable and have your needs met. I came with my family with small kids, and our stay in Ahmedabad was made so comfortable because of the kitchen staff of MG. Food is good too, of course. The experience of having a Gujarati Thali is not to be missed!
This place is very beautiful and lovely!!! Here you can stay and enjoy the view and hospitality!!! I really love this place ❣️ Just love ❤️🫰🏼
Nice place to stay. My clients stayed there and they had nice experience.

I recently dined at The House of MG and unfortunately, my experience left much to be desired. Despite the charming ambiance and nostalgic vibes of the old city, the food fell short of expectations. We ordered three Gujarati thalis, which ended up costing around 6k Rupees, but the taste did not justify the price. The khichdi, alloo sabji, bhindi, mix sabji , Chana sabji dal, dhokla was poorly prepared, lacking in flavor and texture. Overall, the food was disappointing and lacked the authenticity and quality one would expect. While the aesthetic and ambiance are appealing, the tasteless food left me feeling unsatisfied and unlikely to return.
Agasiye (roof top) is highly overpriced (1500 Rs for a limited thali! ) great ambiance but negligible value for money w.r.t. qty. Hence they ask you to pay in advance 😉
One of the finest restaurants of ahmedabad, food was amazing. Live music was the best part. They have many options in thali. Its a must try

Absolutely luxuy preserved in a royalty. Heritage value is maintained with class and traditional approach. Loved the thali served at the Agaasie. Very cordial staff Nd they made us feel like home . Just enjoyed thevtime spent. The Kamal bath is so well done up. Rooms are small yet it is a gorgeous experience of Gujarati tradition and heritage ... Must visit
Beautiful location and authentic gujarati food.. loved it👌🏼

This is where you bring people if they want to try Gujarati thali for the first time. Such good food, such good ambience and amazing service.
Love the moon at this place(you'll know what I am talking about when you visit the place. Hehe) :D

The food was pathetic, below par and very spicy. The standards have dropped massively, no wonder they cater to only foreign tourists now. No value for money at all. The service is top notch, but sadly the food doesn't justify the price.

Amazing heritage hotel with so much to see.
Food very good. Service in the Green restaurant was a bit  hit and miss. Lots of staff but not good at welcoming or helping at late breakfast time.

I didn't find the worth price for food at " The green house". They charge like five Star hotels as it is a part of 'Haveli' but the taste, looks of dishes were very usual and common. The art gallery items were also at too high prices. I can buy 10 pieces of the same item outside.
Great experience, totally worth it, Thali is good, other food is homely.
Such a beautiful property. The staff is lovely. It is located in the heart of the city but still you can't feel the chaos when chilling inside. Authentic Gujarati food. Very hygienic.

We went on a morning heritage walk with our cousins who were not Indian.We wanted to show them the actual old Ahmedabad and indulge them in its history so we chose "House of MG" for the same
When our walk started the guide who was with us (Mr. Saeed) showed us 2-3 properties only of "House of MG"
Generally the walk starts from Swaminarayan Mandir(Kalupur) but suprisingly that location was not included only in our walk
We were also not taken Kavi Dalpatram Chowk, Shri kala ramji mandir, Siddi saiyed Mosque(from inside) and many more such places which even we wouldn't know

He was also critizing on how the people whose house is declared as heritage are suffering and government is not helping them enough and rich giants of India are not willing to make any contribution for its renovation

The guide should be such that he should portray India in a way that non Indians would like to visit India again and again which was not the case with Mr. Saeed
Request to change the guide or change his approach

We are visited with families for Morning breakfast. Staff is good but main cook is very arrogant and at all not co operate. Food is average. Total mess on the day when we visited there. Other staff are supported but the cook is at all not supporting. All major bowl are emptied and even reminders, she is at all not bothered about the same. We have complained to Manager but everything is drain as Manager and other senior staff are not responding. They listened everything but even not bothered about  customer difficulties. This is absolutely ridiculous hence I suggest avoid such hotel as there are many hotels are much better than this and services are much better than this.

I really liked how wonderfully they have retained the haveli. The experience was in the details they have incorporated in the entire hotel. Having said that, the service is very average and a little unprofessional. I called in at the reception to ask for the Wifi password and the guy blatantly replied, "Mujhe nahi pata. Call the restaurant." The restaurant asked to call the reception and the wifi didn't connect the entire stay. The staff didn't seem very hospitable and friendly.

One of the iconic hotel in the Heart of Ahmedabad city. I have stayed many times at House of MG and eveytime it's feel different. The staff are very humble and the atmosphere of the property is excellent no words to describe. The architecture of the property is so classy that you fall in love with the property.

You need to visit once if you want to discover the heritage life of the old times.

10/10 for everything.

It's a heritage property owned by the Mangaldas family. They have indeed preserved the heritage of Gujarati family customs and traditions very well. Everywhere you look inside, they have family pictures of their 5 generations. They also have haveli in Manekchowk and at Mangalbaug near Parimal garden. We went for luncheon at their Lal darwaja haveli. By Ahmedabad standards, their food is very expensive but their thali's taste is amazing.Every piece of food is outstanding !! So is the inside decor and ambience. If you want to taste authentic Gujarati thali, this IS the place to be. OUTSTANDING !!!
Only went to lunch. The beautiful ambiance. The food was amazing and well prepared.  The staff was very attentive and organized. Love this place . 💯 % perfect
This is the most favorite place for an family and friends outing. The ambience is great and the food is awesome. This is just perfect place for an amazing meal and incredible experience.

What is the point of serving great food when staffs can't be kind enough to serve your guests.

My husband went here and appraised me about this place and we revisted together. However the kind of behaviour some staffs have that nobody would ever visit the place again.

Thank you for disappointing us to not  visit again. Kindly learn some hospitality and manners to deal with your guests.

It's an excellent ambient & their interior was amazing... They preserved their conservative architecture with modern technology. Every corner of the house has historic elements & the artistic touch of decorated walls... Their Juice beverage was good but the food was an average taste & their staff service was very biased... The first time when we visited HMG the attendee staff his name Balram I guess he has vitiligo received us with a good welcome note, later served us well, also suggested a palace tour too. We didn't tip him because the price was high with the tax also we didn't enjoy the food... The next time when we visited he ignored us & there was no crowd too in the restaurant ... Still he didn't serve us. Other staff also did the same... They were more welcoming towards foreigners ...... Which is very disappointing to see. Even though we do pay for the food... Respect was not given properly...  As a traveller exploring this historic restaurant for their art & culture, the taste of their traditional food... Yet some poorly behaved staff spoil that experience ..... Management should take care of this part...

Value for what you pay (get a deal online or negotiate). Rooms are interesting, property has character. The tours are little more $$ but you get more from them, guy is great, so with it.
Music for rooftop thali is exuberant.
If spa services were a little less over priced they would be value.

Gym had 2/3 cardio broken and BOTH AC broken, this was most upsetting part that they didn't care to fix

Rooms are spacious , with some acoustic  privacy issues as there are curtains and louvers instead of walls on one or two sides . Veg food is good , overall a very good heritage hotel if you have to stay in lal darwaza area . Slightly overpriced considering the location. The jhoolas and all in lobby area and outside every room is a delightful experience.

I've been to this place almost 7 times now and not had bad review once! The rooms are huge the service is great and the only reason it's 4 stars instead of 5 is as food is very expensive and the portion are very small. otherwise no love the place!

Great food. Good place. Good service. A very strange thing I noticed. They were asking for 100% advance payment for the thali restaurant. Like really!! Is it a cheap massage parlour or you don’t trust the customers coming in that particular restaurant? I really waited for GM but he never turned up. May be he had no answer or that’s the level of customer service the property has.

Whilst the property itself was absolutely breathtaking and the rooms just as charming as the rest of the property, I was disappointed by some of the staff’s attitude towards its guests. I am a foreign tourist and therefore am used to being charged more, but when the hotel offered to call me a cab to the railway station and charged me 1200 rupees for it (I paid 150 rupees from the station to the hotel when I arrived, which I also let reception know), I was rather appalled considering this is a 4 star hotel. Whilst of course this example cannot be applied to the entirety of the staff - some were particularly lovely and helpful - I felt that management needs to tackle the insincerity of its staff.

I would really like to give House of MG a full five stars because it's doing so many things right.  It's a destination in itself, gorgeous, relaxing, friendly, overflowing with character.  But the Google page it set up and administers  doesn't display factual information.   It needs to be corrected, leaving me with a sour taste in my mouth.  It's probably an oversight, but misinformation can feel dishonest.  On the other hand, I loved everything else about the hotel.  The front desk was SO  helpful and friendly, the food excellent, all the nooks and walkways to discover were a pleasure.
we went for traditional gujrati thali lunch. ambience is nice , heritage kind , service is good but food was nothing special.

I happened to visit House of MG for a dinner at their Agashiye terrace restaurant. Agashiye over looks the Sidi Saiyyed Mosque and the view at night is beautiful. It was a pleasant evening with light breeze. We were a group of 5 and we sat outside with live music was going on in the background (a sitar and table player). The food we had was a Gujarati Thali and it was really nice. The staff is polite and well mannered. I liked the mini bakhri's and the sabzi. It's a good place to visit if you are looking for vegetarian options.

Visited this place for Lunch at their rooftop restaurant.
IT WAS AWESOME 👌🏼👌🏼
The Hotel is / was actually the residence of two brothers who themselves are a Legend. The entire place is adorned with framed photos of them and their families.
Very nostalgic.
The food is mouth watering, and the service is beyond great....
All in all, a wonderful experience.👍🏼
Would surely revisit, next time in Ahmedabad.

Visited Agashiye in the House of MG. The entire place is an ancient haveli turned into a hotel with incredible aesthetics. Every part is picture-worthy and the food in Agashiye won't disappoint you. Its a grand dining experience and the best way to enjoy Authentic Gujarati food. It's an unlimited thali with 30 plus delicious items in the thali. The mukhwas platter and unlimited hand churned ice cream are the highlights of this meal. This will cost about ₹2000 with taxes and if you are looking for a special dining experience, then go for it

What an excellent property. An ancestral property converted into a boutique hotel and a job well done. The decor is outstanding and super inviting. They have a cafe at the GF and a rooftop restaurant, both serving delish food.

The rooms are done tastefully keeping in mind minute details. The best part, the rates are affordable and economic considering other hotels of the same stature.

5 stars for rooms & food quality, but for the food quantity and service speed is totally exhausting. Too slow!!
It's not a value for money experience if you're going for dinner or lunch.
You can go to other such places where they give prompt service when they charge heavily.
Nice place to be. Went there for the office dinner, tried authentic gujarati food and it was good. Even if your palate does not like sweet dal, you can still go and try this place once.

Perfect heritage stay that gives you a homely feeling. All staff were helpful and polite throughout the stay. Ageshiya the gujrati theme restaurant offers thali so take that challenge if you are really hungry. Green house breakfast buffet was good and had good variety options. Everything was vegetarian so it was perfect for my family stays as well.
The food of this place is truly amazing however the service is excruciatingly slow which ruins the experience

last week I went to Aghasiye with my family... I feel very good Service at facade area...
Mr. Bhardwaj who is in security staff his behaviour is too good and Helping nature also...

I visited this place for dinner and chose "The Green House". The staff were well-mannered and happy to provide suggestions. Since it was a warm evening, we enjoyed the outdoor seating. The place was neat and had a charm to it.

We tried the Dabeli, Kesar Lassi and a winter combo. All of them tasted yummy and I would definitely recommend this place for anyone who wants to try Kutch delicacies in a refined environment.

Car Parking: Available

Restroom Facility: Available
One of the best heritage home converted in to hotel & having restaurant serving delicious Gujarati food. It is situated on opposite side of Nehru bridge in East side of Ahmedabad.
Nice ambiance and cordial stuffs. Completely veg. Variety of foods with delicious taste.

Excellent place to stay in Ahmedabad. In the heart of the city, this beautiful structure is well-maintained and wonderfully decorated. Ever-smiling and helpful staff add grace to your stay.
Rooms are amazingly designed and are very very spacious. YRooms are not cheap but value for money.
The staff is very polite, kind and very cooperative.

I was happy with the food provided at the restaurant called The Green House.
Chief Parul was so kind towards her guest, and the cooking, and serving team. I love the way she was very politely asking the guest and providing all the necessary food. She was also taking care that guests should not wait too long for their orders. The benefit of an open kitchen is that we can not only see the preparation of food but the intention of the cook also. "Jesa Khave Anna Vesa Hove Mann". And I must have to mention here that all are cooking and serving with lots of love and kindness. I took a photo with team for my good memories.

I like most, Batata Vada, Patra, Kachori, Puri Bhaji, and the welcome drink which is prepared with coconut milk. It was very tasty. And Masala chai was the best one.

I could not able to visit the other restaurant - Agashiye, Next time I will definitely visit.

If I am visiting Ahmedabad again, I will always prefer to go back here.
Thanks, House of MG for your hospitality. I have recommended you to a few people already :)

Good Heritage staying experience . Service not up to the mark. Average . In breakfast they was not able to manage the orders . Took more then 30 mints for simple South Indian order n lastly we cancelled the order after long wait .. Not value for money .

I have always been a believer that most of these so called boutique and heritage properties will never have the class and finish of a new building but I was slapped back into reality as soon as I walked into this hotel......the level of detailing and maintenance of such an old property is simply outstanding and by far I would rate it as probably one of the top 10 heritage properties that I have been to. The care taken to placing each artefact across the place is amazing and has come together very well. The service in the restaurant is excellent with smiling and welcoming staff right from the entry. A fantastic idea that I witnessed was in the menu where they serve a single person portion as well for all the dishes in the menu. The only thing which I think could use some improvement and which brings it to a four star rating is the overall quantity and taste of the food......it's very average in taste which kinda was the only sore spot in my entire experience.
One of the Best gujarathi thali in Ahmedabad one should must visit to taste the quality of food as it is very amazing and great terrace venue .

I loved the place! It has an old world charm to it. It's an amazing place to chill and eat out. The terrace restaurant Agashaiye is lovely and we had a fantastic time partaking their thali.. Just loved every morsel. The entrance to House of MG has some interesting facts which I've posted in photos..they also conduct a heritage walk where they give a tour of old Ahmedabad through the havelis ..

You can’t miss staying at House of MG if you are visiting Ahmedabad for a vacation.
I was fortunate enough to stay at both properties. One sits near the mosque and other one is just about 1.5 kms away in the bustling market area.
I stayed at the penthouse sweet with my parents and it was such a delight.
The location is absolutely amazing. Rooms were huge and airy. Decor reminds you of good old days and yet you get all modern amenities.
They have a cute looking auto (Tuk tuk) in which you will be transferred from main property to the small one which is truly a walk away (15-20 mins walk).
The food served during breakfast was fresh, nutritious and full of taste.
Do try the famous Gujarati thali at the hotel. Unfortunately i missed it but it was recommended by so many people I knew in Ahmedabad.
You are not far from the airport when staying at house of MG. Plus if u book a package or book directly through them, they will provide you with complementary airport pick up and drop.
I can keep writing a lot more about the place :)
It has become my top spot to stay at Ahmedabad.

A decent place, with authentic menu. Has variety of dishes from Gujarati to international cuisines being offered in different time slot. My friends loved instant smoothie. I being tea fan had 2 cups of tea. The handvo served was very delicious. It also had a cart being placed in center just for show in which a lady was selling organic stuff. Overall - A must visit place

Excellent heritage spot to experience traditional culture, food and hospitality. Really good traditional food, ambience, value for money, right at the heart of the old fort city part of Ahmedabad. Also, showcases the rich family lines of MG family and the way their generations have evolved. The food itself is really good and diverse from the state of Gujarat and also has limited South Indian dishes too. The taste is more of less authentic. The kesar variyali ice cream could have been a bit better. They fun of stock in few items, something for restaurant department to look into. Overall very genuine place worth the money spent.

Loved the Ambience, hospitality & the food.
If you are a foodie do try out the lunch /dinner thaki. It will be in the range of 1500/2000 +, but the exp is worth a visit. You will taste authentic Gujarati dishes with authentic Gujarati hospitality.

Great place with unique interior. The restaurant serves traditional gujarati delicacy on rooftop under beautiful dim lights & soothing Ambiance. You may need prior reservations during peak hours and holidays, it's open to walk in guests. Well the taste of food could have been better. Overall a great experience.

Went for dinner. Good service from staff however if you are searching for authentic(Desi) Gujarati food then you should prefer to go. I only refer for non-gujarati audiences as an Gujarati audience you should have eaten some of the items within your daily lunch/dinner with wife's comment "Lo Thunso"
this is amazing space and had dinner with foreign nationals everyone really enjoyed a lot. it is heritage and looks elegant. rooftop is awesome

It's located in lal darwaja area on main road. It has a heritage look which is quite eyesome in itself. Despite being old it's well maintained and intelligent use of plants and water provides a soothing and comforting experience. It's staff is quite professional, I must say. And the food is delicious in both the restaurants. If you wanna try traditional Gujarati cuisine, a must go place for you.

The House of MG is simply breathtaking! As a family we stayed here for 15 days and we did not regret choosing this hotel. It’s unique old heritage style architecture on the outside mixed with it vintage india decor on the inside makes it a spectacular place to stay. The ambience transcends you back to what old india was like but at the same time provides you with all the modern amenities you need and more! The location is bang on central which allows you to travel to anywhere in Ahmedabad in no time. The restaurants are mind blowing. The infamous Agashiye rooftop restaurant serves outstanding vegetarian all you can eat Thalis. Don’t miss out! The open air Green House cafe serves you devine breakfast, lunch and dinner with traditional Gujarati and World dishes. The ambience is amazing! The best part of the hotel is its impeccable service ethic. The guest is their number one priority from room service to catering to security to front of house. Whatever you want or need, it’s delivered without fail and with genuine love and care. I can’t end this without some notable staff mentions who went out of their way to treat us like their extended family. Heartfelt thank you to Chirag and Parul from the Green House, Harsh S, Hasmukh and Pawan S from house keeping, Bradal, Prakash and Urvesh from Front of House and the wonderful Bharatbhai from security. The House of MG was truly home away from home and we can’t thank enough everyone who works there for their hospitality and endless care of me and my family.

Pros: large rooms, clean, plenty of towels,  lower staff are very sweet and smiley. Good internet, central location, offered walking tours which is really helpful

Cons: food is not edible for westerners, some upper position staff are disinterested and gloomy, location is central but very shabby and dirty. Pool is ice cold.

More suitable for locals, not for westerners.
