Great hotel, Ive been to itc and even marriott in Ahmedabad but Hyatt was the best so farr

Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad is a luxurious hotel that offers a truly exceptional experience to its guests. From the moment you step into the grand lobby, you are greeted with warm hospitality and impeccable service. The hotel's contemporary design is complemented by elegant furnishings, creating a sophisticated and inviting ambiance throughout.

The rooms at Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad are spacious, well-appointed, and exude comfort and style. Whether you choose a standard room or a suite, you can expect modern amenities, plush bedding, and stunning views of the city skyline. The attention to detail in the room's decor and amenities truly enhances the overall stay experience.

One of the standout features of this hotel is its dining options. From fine dining at the elegant restaurant to casual bites at the café, the culinary offerings are diverse and delicious. The staff members are attentive and go above and beyond to ensure that every dining experience is memorable. Overall, Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad is a top-notch choice for travelers looking for luxury, comfort, and exceptional service in the heart of the city.

Service is very poor ac was not working
Nor the staff was attentive, food came out very late, no water was served despite of asking several time will never visit here anymore. Improve or you will face consequences

I had a strange but incredible stay with Hyatt. I have stayed in Hyatt across the country and committed to post a review for the kindest staff I met. My baby got sick during the trip due to some food infection for which Im still unsure of the reason but the staff went over and above to help us out by arranging a taxi to hospital in the middle of the night, checking in continually throughout and also sent us breakfast to the hospital. They literally were a family away from family. I never imagined this kind of service from a hotel. I must must recommend this place for anyone looking to come to amd. Everyone from front desk to chefs to kitchen staff and cleaners were super kind and helpful. They personally did everything to have a comfortable stay for us.

I was there for a function and it was a good place. The rooms were clean and the staff was very polite and helpful. The food was delicious and the juices were fresh. The view of the lake from the hotel was great.

There was an education fair held in the hotel, it was Good mostly bc of the facilities provided by the hotel.
Would recommend.

The Hyatt Regency is a luxurious hotel known for its exceptional service, elegant accommodations, and modern amenities. Guests often praise its comfortable rooms, convenient location, and exquisite dining options. However, some reviews have mentioned occasional issues with noise or maintenance. Overall, it's a highly recommended choice for travelers seeking a top-tier hotel experience.

Upon checking I was waiting for my room for an inordinate amount of time, while I can appreciate the hotel was fully booked the night before, guests who arrived after me were given preference with the room assignment.

I had asked staff for assistance in booking train tickets, while this request was no problem at any other hotel I stayed at in India, apparently here they could not/would not assist me.

There was an infestation of bugs in the bathroom (see video) which I no way expect of a 5 star hotel or the Hyatt brand.

I listened to another guest complaining with duty manager late at night outside of my room door.

The rest of the room was pleasant enough and the checkout staff & door guys were friendly and professional but for all the above hassle I’d probably not choose this location again.

It’s wonderful place and service.
Specially the staff  ‘Sangita, Mansi’ is sooo kindly
And good attitude and service.
Never forget their kindness

The Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad is a great hotel that blends luxury with reasonable prices. Everyone in our group was very happy with their rooms, which felt modern and clean. The hotel amenities are also fantastic, from the large meeting rooms to the spa and large gym. It was great to stay at a hotel that had a complementary steam room and sauna included. The breakfast is also spectacular with fresh pastries and yogurts and a massive selection.

Hygiene and neat..
Food is great .!!
Thank you Saurav and Amrish for ur kind Service.

This is advertised as a 5 star Hotel but it is not of that standard. Stayed here for a week. The staff are mostly nice but lacking in what it takes to make a 5 star hotel service. The spa staff made terrible mistakes with a booking of ours. Similarly, they can't seem to handle requests for food that are normal but for them "unusual" like a masala coffee! Yes coffee not tea...which all the stalls outside will make for a fraction of the cost. Rooms are nice, breakfast was OK but service and other standards are not 5 star.
Very pathetic management in valet parking at hyatt ashram road during a conference today. Waiting period of more than 45 minutes to get. Management should look into this.
Fabulous Ambience and I enjoyed delicious chai and pakora and Special Thanks to Gautam at chai shop for good Service and assisted

Nice hotel. Check-in and check-out out quite professionally handled. The rooms are kept very well. The best part is the regular supply of fresh fruits. apples and pears and tasty Gujarati savouries. Toiletries and especially the tooth brush needs improvement and also a regular supply of newspapers.
TODAY VISITED FOR ROAD SHOW OF SINGAPORE NICE HOTEL GREAT  SERVICE NICE FOOD NEED TO JUST MORE FOOD OPTION FOR JAIN OTHERWISE EVERYTHING BEST

I had a good stay in Hyatt Regency. The staffs are very friendly and helpful. The food is also good and chefs can sometimes take special orders for you. They have a good spread in their breakfast and live items.

Attended an award function on the 16th September 2023. We reached the venue half an hour early, so we got to use the 24/7 cafe till the time. The ambience of the cafe was nice, with beautiful landscape views. The staff was polite and helpful.
After the event we again used the cafe, as our train back home was scheduled at 1:05 a.m... We were thankful to the staff for allowing us ...we appreciate the hospitality..

The venue for the event was good, all systems worked perfectly. The lighting and decor was beautiful.

Starters were good, but the dinner was average with the only non-veg option of fish was forgettable...

Amazing rooms and food.
Highly recommend for stay in Ahmedabad.

The Hotel is situated approx 30 min driving from the airport depending on the time of the day , it might be more .

The Lobby of the hotel is a bit odd , specially the waiting area , there is are chairs raised up on a podium , and if you sit there you tell everyone look I am here .

The reception desk area , and front desk staff were excellent .

The rooms of the hotel were very good , and you get a good nights sleep . The bed was comfortable , the AC was perfect , you don’t need to wait long for the room to cool up .

The room was also spacious .

We have stayed for 4 nights here….our stay was an awsome one.
Would like to thank Hariprashad from the Regency club who looked after us and was attentive.
Also like to thank all the restaurant concierge staff for their service and hospitality as well as the front desk staff.
To put it in words outstanding.
Thank you all for making our stay an enjoyable and a very memorable one.
Amazing! Ahmedabad needs more cultural events like this.  Congratulations to everyone involved!

Very good business hotel...
I enjoyed my stay here..
Food is awesome , staff very polite.

Best part of the experience was the F&B manager, Akaash. He made us feel extremely welcome and at home. He was available during breakfast and dinner service, and always made sure our kids were happy and accommodated our every needs.
We stayed during the Vibrant Gujarat festival, so it was an extremely busy time for the hotel, but he made sure we were always looked after!
Outstanding hospitality and extremely delicious food. Highly recommend the propertg to everyone.

Had a one night stay on my business travel. Amazing hotel with large room. Good AC in the room. Big bathroom separate shower, and toilette. Service was great. Check in was informative. The staff explained me of amenities in the hotel  and offered me discount for buffet dinner and breakfast. Room service was slow. Breakfast area was spacious with various options and service was good.

Very nice hotel.  Rooms are great....with cold AC.  Plenty of hot water for the rain head equipped shower.  Even though the room was on the road side, it was very quiet.  Staff had good English and very helpful.  The only downside to the hotel is that it is relatively isolated with no other markets or restaurants nearby.  On the other hand, the chefs at the main restaurant will go out of their way to accommodate your special requests. Things such as custom pizzas or extra little treats are routine.   Very much enjoyed our stay!

One of the worst experience ever of the reception staff! Reception services are absolutely not upto the mark, unreliable and irresponsible. It's better to say that local hotel's reception services are better! Didn't expect it from Hyatt and that too in my hometown Ahmedabad!
On the contrary, food services and the restaurant staff were very helpful, very humble and absolutely spot on with their work!
It's all about hospitality and services for a purpose and very unfortunate to have such an experience!

Really enjoyed our stay here, and we were upgraded to the Club room as well with an amazing view. The breakfast spread is wide & has something for every taste but we particularly enjoyed the Gujarati dishes. Staff is welcoming & courteous. The only trouble we had was that hot water wasn’t turning on in the morning, they couldn’t really fix it and we had to take a cold shower :/

The Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad offers a luxurious and comfortable stay with its modern amenities and attentive staff. The spacious rooms are elegantly designed, providing a relaxing atmosphere. The hotel's dining options showcase a diverse culinary experience, and the service is impeccable. The central location adds convenience for both business and leisure travelers. Overall, a top-notch choice for those seeking a refined stay in Ahmedabad.

So the hotel lives up to the Hyatt standard. However, the service is a little to be desired. The restaurant was a big disappointment, in that the food was in point, but the service was again very disappointing, even though I specifically asked how long the rotis would take if I ordered mid meals, so they are warm, and told that it wouldn't be long, by the time rotis did finally turn up, my curry had gone cold.
All is good tea and coffee is good service by Chandan Kumar the Hyatt team
Good rooms, reasonable price, good and quality food and service. Well maintained, clean
Nice ambience, good food, great service.
Hyatt brand it self is luxury. The prices are higher side but worth every service they offer
Fantastic 9 course menu of Gujarathi delicacies. Relishing.

Staff is nice allover. But there is few people is very helpful and they take extra step to make you feel really comftable. Neel in resturant area is very caring and best customer service. And also Ajay sir in the front every visit he make feel like home. Over all good place to stay.

Wow. What a hotel, what an experience. Exceptional hospitality. Have to name names given how stand-out these people have been. Had the best welcome and check in experience that I can remember, and brilliant rooms overlooking the river thanks to the planning and kindness of Sathi and generosity of Mr Sengupta. Jitender went above and beyond to ensure all meals were spectacularly good and exactly as preferred, and restaurant service was always professional, efficient and tireless from Abhishek. I haven't had a more healthy as well as delicious series of meals in a hotel in a very long time. Professionalism, hospitality, facilities, location......all boxes ticked. Thank you.
Mr. Venkatesh gave very good service at Tinello Restaurant

Must say that it's one of the best hotels we have ever stayed in. Not only in its exquisite quality but its reasonable rates as well.
Located by the famous river bank and its long walkway, we are absolutely enjoying our stay here. Our room on the 8th floor has a nice view to the river. Can't fault room staff either, we were impressed by the diligence of Monika who has been servicing our room.
Multi national myriad of gourmet food and staff at their Tinelo restaurant were excellent, Gautam Kumar who served us today was courteous and obliging!
Kumar kundhan at the restaurant is very professional and felt very very satisfied with his service

Morning BF was really very good.
As far as service is concerned,  service was more better than food, specially of Mr Gautam, he was very polite and humble to all of us.
A big appreciation to him.

Had a great time while I was here! The staff was very welcoming and helpful, setting up vehicles for us and making recommendations for things to see. Each day's brunch was excellent! I didn't consume a lot at the hotel restaurant overall. The pool is attractive, and the gym is decent. Although I found the room illumination to be a little difficult to understand, everything else was excellent.
Excellent breakfast and service. Staff very friendly and accommodating and made masala tea like we make at home. The spa is good and the massage treatment by Esta was good.

One word,
Pls avoid this hotel.
Staff are often discourteous and sometimes downright rude.
Same breakfast menu every day.
Buffer dinner overpriced and food is cold and tasteless. We check dinner buffet price in reception at check-in they said it's 1100+taxes but when we started to take our dinner, one staff came and told us we need to inform them before taking the dinner as they need to add in system and block the value on my credit card ect ect ect and the price will be 1550+ taxes

They note wrong order and later dump the food in trash right in front of guest. Cook and other staff argu among themselves right in front of guest.
Tinello Hyatt regency is the name of the restaurant inside the hotel.
We stayed there for 2 nights but this restaurant and its staff behaviour made our stay a nightmare.
Food, hospitality and atmosphere is amazing.  A must try is the cannelloni from the sous chef Pradeep!!  Fantastic chef and really personalizes his dishes for western visitors.  Wonderful experience.
Centrally located, very good service, good food, menu options are good and includes local cuisine as well. Near to river front

Worst services ever seen in any such hotel. Asked for tea at room service order on 23rd Feb  evening, recieved after 1.40 hrs . Special request again done for 25th, today morning tea at 5am . Got assurance but tea. I highly recommend NOT 🚫 to select this hotel
Very nice hotel...courteous staff ..saw cricketers there as it was 2023 world cup final . EV charging facilities present. Restaurant has lovely and sumptuous food with quick service
It's good Hyatt regency in ahamedabad..one day i visiting this hotel

Really enjoyed my stay here! The staff was very friendly and accommodating, helping arrange cars for us and suggesting things to see. The breakfast was top notch both days! Otherwise didn’t eat much at the hotel restaurant. Gym is pretty good and pool looks nice. The room lights are a bit confusing to figure out in my opinion, but everything else was great!
Superb breakfast and dinner, lots of variety,  enjoy the experience

It was wonderful ✨😍 visiting Hyatt. It is very good in terms of 📍 location they have vast parking space also valet parking 🅿 is available. It is very Neat and clean and also staff is very courteous.
Rooms are good with all facilities. Lifts are also large and working fine. Food 🍲 quality is awesome👍.

Great place for a stay. While i was travelling on work, the hotel does it's best to accommodate any requests we have be it an early check in or an early checkout.

Friendly and courteous staff. Good dining options. Very close to the mall for any shopping needs. A good stay overall.
The staff were absolutely excellent especially Pankaj and chef Surya who went out of their way for our family. They accommodating to all our food desires! 10/10 experience!

We had a most comfortable stay at the Hyatt. A most courteous staff, good food with the breakfast layout so grand that one is spoilt for choice. Located just across the lovely Sabarmati riverfront which we could luckily view from our eight floor room... A plus for me definitely

Hotel F&B staff under Chef Surya is very well oiled machine at anticipating and delivering the guest needs. Front office and Housekeeping needs a fair bit of work to maintain Hyatt brand standards. Special mention to the chef's and staff at breakfast spread. It was out highlight of the day for 4 days in Ahmedabad!!

Hyatt regency is a really nice hotel right in the middle of Ahmedabad and close to International airport. Morning buffet is what I like the most. Food is excellent with a mix of Indian traditional and western food. Staff is really helpful and service is excellent. Rooms can be improved because it doesn't looks as per the standards of luxury hotel.
Lovely hotel, and lovely service! Brijal and Ashim were especially wonderful to talk to in the club lounge; and the food and drink was fab. Rooms were clean and very comfortable.

Near to the airport, nice property and ambience, rooms are spacious. Multiple breakfast options to try.

I have recently noticed about their vegetable juice which they start offering in morning breakfast which is recommendable and this is something which I have never in any other hotel till now so quite impressive.

It's been a while since I visited Hyatt Regency due to my previous not so good experience with their food..., but as I heard about the authentic Italian cusine with Chef Alessio from Italy I thought I should give it a try.
My family and I were so excited to finally taste some authentic Italian food in Ahmedabad, but we all got very disappointed! Except for 3 ready made dishes at the buffet all other were tasteless! Unfortunately pastas and pizza were prepared by Indian Chef. First we tried white sauce pasta, which was totally tasteless and sauce consistency was like water - tasteless white water! Red pasta was better but not perfect. Penne should be cooked aldente! Aldente means that pasta should be firm when bitten but not hard, and this one was a bit too hard. Pizza was just ok. Authentic Italian pizza, even simplest one have some flavour, but not this one!
If it was supposed to be an Italian cousine experience with an Italian Chef, then why wasn't it prepared by the Italian Chef? I'm sorry but Indian Chef doesn't know how to cook Italian food!
For desert we ordered Tiramisu, thinking that at least we can sweaten our tasteless experience with lunch, but that was the worst Tiramisu we ever had! It was overly sweet and cream wasn't thick enough....I mean, I have no nwords,  who adds so much sugar to Tiramisu? It is not an Indian sweet! When I mentioned that to the staff and Chef I was told that this is how people like to eat Tiramisu in here... well if so, then it should not be called Tiramisu anymore! When you promise an authentic experience then it should be authentic! Don'make your own inventions and call it authentic Italian food!
Extremely dissapointing!
The staff service was pathetic. We had to ask continuously for the food as it took a lot of time, and no one would clean and clear the dirty plates from the table.
It was a waste of time and money!
One expects better from a 5 star hotel!

The Assistant Manager of the restaurant, Sanjiban Majumder, is rude and egoistical towards lower class people. He abused my assistant and helper. He has an arrogant demeanor in his post. He urged me to forgive him after discovering my position. but over all staff, rooms and all things are best.

I just wanted to say that I enjoyed my stay with Hyatt Regency and this was my first stay with Hyatt brand. Special thanks to Philomena for providing the early check-in and special thanks to Aheli for providing 1 hour late check-out. I wish to thank Monika from the housekeeping team for providing very friendly service. I also enjoyed the dinner buffet which had a very good variety. The buffet breakfast was too good and the services of Ranjana and other team members from the restaurant team was excellent. The room was perfect with a partial view overlooking the river. The beds were comfortable and other amenities were good.
Thank you I enjoyed my stay here.

Today is the departure day but the experience here at Hyatt Regency in Ahmedabad will remain with us
The staff for breakfast were amazing in particular Tanvi Irfan Vishnu’s and Navneet to name some were very attentive and professional

The duty Manager Dharmesh was excellent

Edit: Mr. Puneet was kind enough to meet with us personally and resolved the issue. Really appreciate this gesture it's something that we don't see at all nowadays, he really went the extra mile to ensure that we keep the Hyatt Brand and Ashram road Hyatt as a pleasant memory and completely changed our mindset and experience. We hope to see more people like Mr. Puneet in India who truly do care about the customer experience and professionalism.

Initial Review: Terrible experience. We met a client today who was staying a Hyatt, we met him at 9am and  until 9:10 nobody came to even get our order we were waiting at the cointer. Finally we got
Hold of someone ordered a Mocha, our client had to leave at 9:30 for the airport, the coffee never showed up! Such an embarrassing moment for us and shame on Hyatt for this terrible customer service. People come from all over the world recognizing the Hyatt name as a brand name and this is the second time Hyatt Ahmedabad has let us down with your terrible customer service. But this the height of ridiculousness to see a coffee not even show up with staff who are least bothered to even take the order.

My stay at Hayyat was absolutely amazing. The staff was attentive, the hotel was luxurious, and the service was impeccable. The rooms were comfortable and well-designed, and the dining experience was exceptional. The hotel's amenities, including the fitness center and spa, added to the overall experience. Highly recommended for a perfect 5-star stay.

Great property to stay and have some business activities. We went there for attending the corporate event. The Banquets are good, spacious, well maintained. The food quality is great. Staff is courteous.
Very helpful and caring staff. Everyone at the property really helped us as we faced tough times. Nothing is better than staying at Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad.

Located on the riverfront, you can get a room with great river view for a little bit more money. Rooms are nicely maintained with all amenities. The food was nice, the buffet breakfast could use some more items and some issues with the live counter. Rest was fine.

Went for a buffet dinner with family. The buffet appeared to be for namesake only. Spread of menu was not of standard of a 5 star hotel.  Very few items, specially for vegetarians.
Attrium was also not as expected in a 5 star hotel.

First experience staying at the Hyatt anywhere but a lovely time accept on are arrival having to take our own large bags to our room, but wanted to take our small bag - when you need the help it wasn’t there , otherwise very good
We were spoiled in the restaurant,
One particular man was brilliant
Rooms clean well stocked each day
Lobby toilets so clean
Cleaning staff brilliant
Front desk staff helpful

My son and I stayed at Hyatt Regency Ashram road for 4 days. Check in was smooth thanks to Ahila, and Saathi kindly allocated a spacious and comfortable river view room, which was kept immaculately clean by polite housekeeping staff Shilpa, Kamlesh and Mandeep throughout my stay.

The breakfast buffet at Tinello was a pleasure to eat, with a wide variety of delicious Indian and Continental dishes. Mr Dean, Ranjana, Tanvi,  Anish and Bhagwan, your care for guests with a smile makes one's day (Thank you Ranjana for the local travel advice). I am also grateful to the executive chef Mr Surya Narayana who, on knowing I relished the upma, gave me the opportunity to thank Chef Partha in person and even gave some upma packed to take on my flight. I was very touched with this kind gesture.

I also found the hotel's cleanliness impressive. Though I didn't use the swimming pool, each morning I noticed staff cleaning it thoroughly. The aspect I liked the most was staff taking care of you while still giving you your space.

The location is also perfect for local sightseeing. The outside road is busy but there is a peaceful silence within the hotel. I will definitely stay here on my next visit to Ahmedabad. Thank you once again to all at Hyatt Regency for my happy, pleasant and comfortable stay.

A fantastic place to stay. The service is amazing and everyone including the chef, managers etc make sure you are comfortable and things are as per your liking. The place is clean and well kept. All the necessary amenities are provided in the rooms and the interior seems really thoughtful and convenient. The restaurant China House has really good food and the breakfast spread is also good. All in all had a good time there

Very nice ambience and really great food with a good variety. Staff is very generous. Overall, I had a great experience with the Hyatt Ashram road staff. The room was wonderful, clean. Special Thanks to Chef Pankaj for special Pizza’s.
Was here for one night. Awesome top class experience. Will visit again. Breakfast was also good but can improve Gujarati menu. Room was quiet and worth the stay.
The room service and food quality need to be improved
Amazing service at Hyatt Regency in Ahmedabad. Especially Mr Gautam Kumar took great care along with the whole crew here at the hotel. A great place to spend your time.
I loved the frappé from the cafe next to the reception. It just made my day a little more better every single day of the stay.

Fantastic breakfast with wonderful service and care from the chefs ( in particular Surya) and waiting staff. Had a wonderful meal at the Gujerati restaurant on the 2nd floor. Rooms very clean and comfortable.

Big name, but poor show. Entrance is too small. Staff don't seem much interested. Restaurant is difficult to locate, once located, has a narrow entrance. Staff are either missing or busy with own work. Getting bill looked more important than food. Live counters were unattended.
Rooms were good.

We stayed in this hotel for our special occasion. We were amazed to see such an active housekeeping staffs because they made sure and ensured that all of our needs were met on time and attended professionally and we liked to see such a courteous staff. Nice place for stay , food , drinks with excellent ambience. We will certainly recommend this hotel to our other friends and relatives.
Food is below par. Needs to review the entire Menu and preparation.

Never ever visit the hotel... they will give you all kinds of trouble.. I arrived at 2am and they gave a smoking room on smoking floor by default....booking was non smoking....today when I raised issue Sagar poses as manager and just says sorry .... Not trying to resolve till you get down there....

Room -917

Great place to stay, brilliant selection for breakfast and clean. Also, we had 2 adults and a child in the room, but every day they would only service the room with two towels and toiletries… even after being asked to do it for 3!

It was an amazing stay
Venkatesha provided good service

Experience was okay...not fantastic.Reasons :

Great place for a stay.
Friendly and courteous staff.(special thanks  Sakib Ali ) Good dining options.

Had a great pleasent stay at Hyatt, service was fantastic. Mr. Ashim in the restaurant was very polite and we are completely satisfied with his professionalism and customer service behaviour. Infact everyone out here is quite impressive.. we have enjoyed our stay. Thanks Team Hyatt. 😊
Today visited TINELLO Restaurant at Hyatt regency. Amazing Food and love it all the services. Speciality Saurabh done amazing job. Very polite and helpful. Must try for everyone.

Nestled gracefully along Ashram Road, the Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad stands as an epitome of opulence which was nothing short of enchanting, and it is with great delight that I share the myriad aspects of this remarkable experience.

The very first convenience was abundant parking ensuring a smooth and stress-free arrival experience for every guest.

It stands as a veritable culinary haven, offering a delightful array of dining options that cater to diverse palates. From the warm and inviting coffee shop to the sensory journey through pan-Asian flavors and the immersive experience of a traditional Gujarati thali, leave an indelible mark. The food, within the exclusive club area reserved for privileged guests occupying higher-category rooms, consistently exhibits a fusion of exquisite quality and tantalizing flavors.

During my stay, I had the privilege of partaking in the Independence Day celebration near poolside area. The decorative adornments and arrangements w truly commendable. The breakfast spread laid out for the guests during this event was nothing short of spectacular, offering a gastronomic journey that delighted the senses.

Gratitude is owed to the hotel's management, who ensured that my experience was elevated with a room upgrade. The rooms themselves are not merely spaces for repose; they are sanctuaries of comfort, characterized by their spaciousness, pristine cleanliness, and tasteful décor with a panoramic view of the serene river that unfolds beyond the windows, adding an extra layer of serenity to one's stay.

A special commendation is due to the housekeeping team, whose dedication to maintaining the common areas and individual rooms in an immaculate condition was consistently evident. Under the able leadership of Nitu Shah, this team, comprising the diligent efforts of Prerna, Naveen, Kuldeep, Rohit, and Monika, demonstrated unwavering readiness to provide top-notch service, regardless of the hour, always accompanied by a welcoming smile.

Special Acknowledgments: It is with profound gratitude that I extend special acknowledgments to several individuals who played pivotal roles in making my stay truly exceptional. Foremost among these is Anshita Detha, the Human Resources Manager, whose patience and unwavering assistance were instrumental throughout the booking process.

Additionally, the housekeeping team, led by Nitu Shah, deserves profound appreciation for their relentless efforts in ensuring the hotel remains spotless and pristine.

The security team, featuring the vigilant presence of Gaurav, Shiv Singh, Himanshu Kumar, and Mukesh, provided unwavering and helpful assistance.

The valet parking team, under the efficient guidance of Sushil Dubey, and security guards Kuldeep and Avdhesh consistently exhibited promptness and effectiveness.

The front office manager, Sanjay Sengupta Ji, and his dedicated team including ritika, shubham and sagar ensured a seamless and expedited check-in process. Notably, Kiran, who went above and beyond to ensure our utmost comfort, deserves a special mention.

My interactions with Pankaj Kumar Ji (banquets), Ranjana (PR executive), Sajal (Team Leader), and Sopan during my business meetings at the hotel were highly commendable and contributed positively to my experience. At Tinello, where Chef Laxman's culinary artistry stood out. His special preparations for my children left an indelible mark. Tanvi, Gaurav, and Simon provided impeccable service.

While I was tempted to deduct a star from my rating due to the hotel's lackluster social media handling team, which remained unresponsive, I ultimately bestowed the full five stars that this establishment genuinely deserves. It is my firm belief that the hotel's unwavering commitment to love and exceptional service for its guests should not be marred by a lack of responsiveness in its social media engagement.

My overall experience at the Hyatt Regency Ahmedabad was nothing short of fabulous, and I wholeheartedly endorse it as a highly recommended destination for your next stay.
We enjoyed our stay at Hyatt regency,staff are polite and cooperative,Chef Mr.Surya M.ensuring about food and service.He is friendly and keeping healthy environment.

Came for Sunday brunch
They have a good buffet spread (veg & non-veg)
The head chef Pankaj entertained us well , esp he was very interactive with our son
we were served by Sakir & Amresh and they were courteous

I had been to this hotel for consecutive four days. I was attending one conference. The ambience is very good. Staff is courteous. Parking help is very good. The halls were nicely decorated. AC was quite effective. Food was served on time. Taste of food and quality of food was very good. Service was also nice.
Washrooms were constantly neatly maintained and spacious with special care being taken that tap water was warm always. In all a good experience.

I had visited Hyatt yesterday. I genuinely felt so warm welcome from the staff members. All those are very calm and kind. ❤️ I love the interior design and Cafe Area the most ❤️ i found very decorative christmas tree at the entrance of Hyatt🎄. Overall this place is the best place to stay and for a coffee date 😁☕
We hv taken buffet dinner and it was excellent. Tinello has specialised in Italian food. Pasta & Pizza was very good. Amrish served us very well. Keep it up !

Most shocking experience with the Spa and the saloon. SPA cheated on me to take the reflexology from the spa as they don't do the service at the Saloon, when confronted the Saloon after my Spa treatment, the Saloon said yes they do provide the service and the Spa staff face was in shocked.

Also, my wife had a head massage at the salon, and the male staff decided to also massage her neck and shoulders without any concent. Then he'll break out with the Duty Manager.
Unacceptable behaviour from the saloon staff.

I am saying this after seeing Hyatt properties globally. This one in ahmedabad is at best a 3 star hotel. Its a relatively small property with a tiny lobby (nit much space). Rooms and facilities are basic- nothing 5 star about it. Have seen better 3 star hotels providing much better experience. Staff are good and helpful, though. Overall, not worth the money charged using the Hyatt Regency brand.

We had booked Suite room in Hyatt Regency, Ahmedabad. The stay was absolutely blissful. The complementary evening snacks were very tasty and very thoughtful. Ranjana & her colleagues were very amiable and friendly. Will definitely stay here whenever we travel to Ahmedabad now

A lovely place for a beautiful stay. As one expects from a star property, so is everything. The staff is perfect in their respective fields right up from check in to room service to restaurant service to house keeping and all other categories of staff whom one experience during the stay are all perfect in their respective fields of service. The food is awesome. The morning buffet breakfast spread is quite vast in terms of varieties and has lip smacking options. In all definately would like to visit again.
I wish you added a bath tub in the room. Otherwise, it is a wonderful experience staying here. The food is lovely, and the staff is very friendly.

I went there because we were having  business get-togethers over there , The banquet hall was awesome and  well arranged  also well behaved staff , The  food was also very very hygienic overall it was an amazing experience I totally loved it 💖
Delicious Dining experience and very good ambience. Chicken Turrywala main course was very good suggested by staff Mr. Amrish.🤗

I booked this Hotel for my cleints but i am sorry to say that the service is not up to the mark. They take a lot of time for check in doing lot of formalities. I ordered a Birthday cake in advance for a cleint 2 days back and informed that we are in total 11 Persons, so please provide us the cake accordingly. Today when we did check in the Hotel i again reminded them about the cake, but in the evening when we received the cake i was very disappointed and felt ashamed to get a mini cake which was may be 200 gms. It was like 2 pastries joined together. What an Embarrassment for us. Hyatt is a big chain and i have never expected this here. I met the Front office Manager and complaint about this but no one cared anything about this. It was normal for them. So it was a bad experience for us today. I request the management to take that into notice seriously.

Rating 1 * bcz 0 star rating is not available. We booked their king suite, as soon as we reached their front desk, they offered us the upgrade for a lower cost so we paid 25k for one night stay. We asked for pics for the room,but they told us that they never shared pics of their property. Hyatt stands for its brand so we didn't even ask ourselves but the rooms are not up to the mark. It's a total waste of money and experience too. It was a very important day for me but I ended up regretting my decision to choose hyatt. Also they offered a cake with my package which I didn't receive, when I asked for it, they said we will prepare and give it to you after 5 hours. When I reached what i received kindly check out what they offered. 😬😬😬

I am glad that I booked this regency for my 15 days stay. Staff, room and service are top notch. Everything was above expectations. Tinello is just incredible due to it's Executive Chefs.

Find these people, they are just awesome. Sanjay sengupta, Sila, Deen, Sumit and Chef Narayan!
Hotel Hyatt is one of the finest stay we had sooo far.The Nine course meal was awesome which everyone should try, and the hospitality was just beyond explanation. Would definitely recommend ...

I recommend this hotel to everyone, who is looking for a good stay, good food and great hospitality. we undoubtedly had best experience overall. Lovely food with Wide choice to keep you going . We would definitely stay once again next time visit Ahmedabad. Above all , Great Great Hospitality shown by all the hotel staffs and to name a few whom i can remember now- Parameshwar, Naveen, Sila. Krishna and the lady who served the masala tea ( forgot name ) ..........

Nowhere near a 5 star level hotel. Front office staff is a joke and half. They blocked access to my room once they figured that THEY had made a mistake and not taken a credit card as security for incidentals. Hot water was not working , toilet was broken and over flowing , and the AC was not cooling properly . This was in a club lounge room as well , not even a base room . Their Chinese restaurant is a horrific , tastes like indianized Chinese street food. Highly overpriced as well. buffet breakfast was not the greatest , however the staff did do their best to try and find me something decent to eat. The club lounge attendant , Shivender , was polite and courteous. Duty managers and front office reception on the other hand is a whole other story. Stay far far away from this place . Hyatt is an international brand , and their properties I have visited in the USA have been nothing short of stellar. However in India, especially the properties in HYd and Ahmedabad , the Indian staff of Hyatt India hotels treat fellow Indians like second class citizens who should tolerate bad customer service for the privelege of staying in a "Hyatt" .
Last month I had stayed at the Hyatt Centric in Candolim Beach , Goa......my stay here was heavenly in contrast.
Hyatt India ..if you are listening and I hope you are , do an internal investigation and see which of your properties need attention and training .
We have seminar there, so I can't comment on rooms, basic service are good

Experience was good but found it too congested. Staff is enough and we'll mannered. Lawn and pool side needs maintenance but the atmosphere at poolside is really good for night time. As premises is very close to the bridge you may find it difficult but to ease their guest hotel added valet service which is efficient.

If we talk about location, it can be easily located. Infrastructure of hotel is nice. Banquets are spacious and functions like bday party, ring ceremony, freshers party (if music is arranged) can be done. If we talk about the main thing i.e. food , its qualitative and delicious I will suggest hotel pragati grand for organizing small functions and also for taking family to the dinner.
Excellent food, parking space

The place is good, the cleanliness is excellent, the comfort and the quiet, but note: be careful not to rent and come before the checkout time and he tells you to pay extra to let you in immediately!! And I waited for half an hour or an hour and they said your room is ready and I went out 😅 I mean, maybe the room is already ready, the price was a bargain.

This hotel's breakfast and dinner service and operating hours were excellent. I was very satisfied because there was enough time to use it. The food menu was varied and delicious, and the staff were all friendly. I especially remember Amit. I liked the bright smile and meticulous attention to detail. He is a great employee. I would like to visit again next time. The river view from the room was also great.

Almost very good 💯😊 then city in center palace is good in all ways and its environment is also good service is number one environment room and inter location is very good in small space they have done good maintenance 🙏🌺 Jai Shri Ram

Stable service and comfortable space.
Good access from both the airport and the city.
There was one ☆ minus because there were some issues with the water supply in the room during my stay, but the front staff's response was appropriate. I would like to visit again if I have a chance.

Great service! The room was very clean and comfortable: my room attendant Naman Saxena did a great job and was very friendly! I give it 5 stars 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟 I can recommend the hotel to everyone, it meets the highest demands and no wish is left unfulfilled! A very good hotel 🏨 the nice woman at the reception should also be mentioned: very friendly, professional and well trained! 😊👍
It's okay. The staff is friendly and clean. The hotel seems to be a bit old, but it was well maintained. The location is also good.

Used for 2 nights. The inside is very clean and new and everything works perfectly. The outlet is a world type and can be used with any type of outlet. The room is perfectly stocked with beautiful items such as iron, ironing board, hair dryer, wired LAN, wifi, razor, toothbrush, soap, shampoo, conditioner, kettle, refrigerator, safety box, etc. There are no problems with hot water or drainage. Air conditioning is adjustable. The windows don't open. Completely separate smoking floor. In the morning, newspapers are hung on the doorknob. Dinner and breakfast are buffets. For dinner, you can additionally order pasta from the a la carte menu. The breakfast buffet only has pork and bacon. I didn't have time in the morning, so I only ordered coffee, but then I asked if I wanted to take out the patisserie. They provided attentive service such as making suggestions. Convenient location for morning and evening walks near Riverside Walk. Recommended!
I used it to attend a wedding. This hotel has the best rooms and food.

It has larger rooms than expected, a great swimming pool, and a good breakfast. A particular advantage is that there are Chinese and Japanese restaurants within the hotel, and it is conveniently located 15 minutes from the airport.

Worst experience here every customer last time I had a patel party his bag was dropped by the security guard and reception it was a very bad experience I condemn it and these people have different welcome in the price so please foreigners it is better to go to a small 3 star hotel than to go to like These hotels are poorly staffed

The best place I visited in Ahmedabad in two weeks. Excellent service, cozy room, polite and correct staff. Well-deserved five stars.

Pathetic Service, particularly - the front office team. Everything has been in a pathetic state , since we checked in 2 days back - asked for a twin bed, but denied despite rooms being empty. Wifi is not functional, hardly any amenities. Better to stay in any budget hotel with some courteous staff.

Every time I visit Ahmedabad, I stay at The Fern. The staff is very hospitable, polite and helpful. The rooms are clean and have all the required amenities.

Quite and well connected location. Close to the airport.

The food is good and has a good variety to choose from.

I would recommend it 5/5.
Rooms was good but service is okay okay and food taste is okay okay not too good not too bad

Nice Hotel Value for Money food is awesome

We went to this hotel on 16th Jan to attend one wedding followed by reception. Our experience was awful. During the wedding, they served us mixed pakoda which were not at all tasty. There were big pieces of cauliflower in pakoras and they tasted very raw. Once the first lot was consumed, the next replenishment was not ready.  Even during the wedding, they ran out of the kachori filling and they started serving kachoris with potato filling. If you are planning to select this hotel for a wedding or party, think twice.

Staff is unprofessional and slow. Cannot access their data base to have your name and ID, doesn't matter if you stayed here last week only. Rooms doesn't have sleepers. Food is okay okay. Since Fern Residency taken over the Hotel. Quality is deteriorated immensely of staff as well as rooms maintenance. We have used this since 2015, it was okay back then but now, i wont recommend it to anyone as there much better options available here.
This Fern Residency Hotel is old construction, washbasin can turn to bath tubs so that your hands while washing will be in the clogged water in the basin taking the dirty bath. Rooms have wet walls and paint chipping out. Foul smell. You can consider it as an OYO Room "good for couples", check the reviews down the line, you will understand what kind of gentry is acceptable to this Hotel. BIG NO FOR CORPORATE TRAVELLERS like us.
A fantastic hotel to stay near airport, well appointed room, courteous staff and near to Sabarmati river front as well.

I can't say that I enjoyed the hotel as much as I would have liked. Can't be denied that the location is perfect and it's easily accessible to reach interesting spots of the city. It also has a big parking space in the basement. Therefore transport and access become my highlights here.

There's also a gym available, not very spacious but enough to complete your daily exercise if you wish to.

However, the room was not up to my expectations. Decoration seemed quite dull and too old-fashioned. I'm not sure if it's meant to be like this or simply is a category that they are missing to pay more attention to. Decoration shouldn't be an issue if you just stay overnight but it definitely affects your comfort and adjustment to the place if you stay over two nights, specially considering the amount of money which is being paid. It also felt quite empty. Just basic amenities. But I suspect it was the lack of charm what made me develop this opinion.

Lastly, I was not very comfortable with the lady at the reception.
She was not rude, but she used to observe so much whenever I would come in or leave that I couldn't help but feel uncomfortable about the same. I appreciate when people act more discreet in this regard.

Very good hotel 🏨
1) housekeeping is excellent.
2) The restaurant has very good staff and serves delicious food.
3) Rooms are hygienic and toiletries are also excellent
4) Location is excellent
5) Nearby- Big market and not crowded.

Our company employees stayed in this hotel and it was a pathetic experience. Earlier it was known as The Metropole and was pretty much decent to stay for business trips. But lately it has been taken over by The Fern Residency and had a very bad experience. Staff was not professional. The rooms had foul smell and walls were wet. There was clogging issue in the washroom basin. Overall a big no for families, business trips. We can consider it not more than an Oyo room.

The hotel is under renovation after taken over by Fern. It will take around 3 4 months time to get things in place. Rooms were not maintained properly,  restaurant was small and packed. Food though was enjoyable.

It's nice place to be there for stay. Very prime location. You get easily transportation wherever you want to go. I like the quick room service. but i concern with dine in part not as much as good like this hotels have in their portfolio.
Overall good hotel for stay but needs improvement in dine in.
Untrained & inadequate staff & service. Food taste is also not good. We went with our guests to make them feel good but felt very bad experience.

Great rooms. Very clean and tidy . warm atmosphere. Good breakfast because some people don't prefer sweet Gujarati food. Breakfast is really awesome. Great room service available 24/7. Cake shop is also there. Overall good experience and loved the hotelbut it is a bit expensive. Still great.

Very badly maintained. Not to Fern standards. Had stains on bed, paint is peeling off. Promised change in room next day, but refused next day.
The towels were too dirty / stiff due to over use.

I stayed here before few years back and I enjoyed my stay, but this time I am very much disappointed.  I waited for the front desk services. The rooms are  not with the price it's so dull atmosphere  not well coming at all. Just looks nice from outside but inside is disappointing .
Would not recomend to anyone.

Wonderful experience and stay along with a widespread of buffet. Must go and visit this place for all the aura and zest. Wonderful dining experience.
Food: Serves the purpose with delightful taste buds activation. Excellent quality of non veg and veg with a wide choice and variety.
Architecture & ambience upto the mark with quality and standards. Rooms are high in finish and luxurious for a blissful stay. Don't hesitate in terms of living space.
Culture: Freindly staff to help you beyond expectations and rightful purpose.
Travel wise near to the airport block so a very well connected for quick travel and airport hotel purpose. RTO circle is a very important landmark in Ahmedabad.
Speciality: The place is one of the liquor permit stores on Ahmedabad which help the people to gain access to their requirements as per their convenience.

@metropolehotelamd 's 24/7 all day dinning coffee shop offers lip smacking veg as well as non veg options. I tried their veg and non veg both. I liked the quality of food they serve. Staff is polite. Service was really good. They have really good, pocket friendly fixed and combos meals too.

It was a excellent experience. A very nice hotel, a very fine coffee shop, and superb service.

In fact all these depends on the company, in which company you visited the place.

I Thanks to my partner who shared a very good quality time with me, a cup of coffee and some snacks.

Friends, I am lucky as I got a cute and lovely partner when I visit this place.

So again Thanks to my today's evening decorator, Thanks to Metropole and Thanks to god also who permit me such a very special & quality time.

Very nice and economical. Bakery is too good very friendly staff. Tho electricity is a problem. No power backup We spent night in candle light. Had to check out at 3am no light lift was not working. Had to come down by stairs.
You can get the drinks also. Lucky to get in dry state.

I had gone to meet someone at the hotel so not able to comment on the hotel rooms and services.
However the hotel looked quite good and I might book myself in this hotel.
A great plus is the liquor shop situated in the hotel from which out of Gujarat people can purchase alcohol without much issues.

One of the best hotels I've been in. Unfortunately the architecture on the inside seems like an Aashram xD but the rooms are beautifully maintained. Service was top notch and everything was delivered to room when asked for. The place is just a walk away from the beach which was very helpful. The market is also closeby with a lot of restaurants and anything can be found easily. Overall a great experience.

Worst hotel I ever stayed ! I stayed here for 3 days and I really wanted to checkout on first day itself. On first day WiFi did not work. I was told someone is working on it and I asked reception to let me know once it is fixed as I had lot of work pending. But no one informed me that it is fixed. Rooms are smelly and they barely change bedsheet. Refrigerator did not work even the replaced refrigerator did not work. On my last day I requested front desk atleast 3 times asking if someone can come help me with luggage but the lady hang up on me. I am never coming here again. Extremely pathetic service ! I wish I can give them negative 1000 stars

My stay at the hotel, although only for one night was good and comfortable.  The staff was courteous and helping. Problem was the light buttons in the room, we had to undertake a vigorous search to locate the buttons to put on n to off the lights. U should give at least 2 bottles of mineral water in the room. We had only one bottle when we checked in.  Rest was all fine.

Metropolitan banquet hall
We have arrange birthday party there

Banquet space is good for function, parking is there in basement and ground floor.

Banquet and hotel have two seprate gate is good to manage guest.

Food quality is not good as per 3 star also as per price.

Services of Banquet is not good.
Guest have to wait too much for food, quality of food is bad, magnet response is also not good.

Too bad Management and no one is taking responsibility.

Overall as per restaurant and price its too bad for services.

Excellent hotel. Very good location close to the airport and also they have a legal liquor store in the basement. Very Good customer service.

I had left my Rayban sunglasses and really hats off to the front office manager who was really kind enough to courier the same to my home town Goa. He even paid the courier charges which I had told that I would pay the courier company in Goa. Will definitely stay again if ever I'm in Ahmedabad

Disliked it. I booked it based on the photos and ratings but I feel that they are over rated. The hotel is too old interms of interiors. In the online booking platforms you will see attractive photos but in real it is not. The rooms are okay okay with almost nearing end of wood work and specially one thing to notice is that they don't have windows in some rooms, it really feels suffocating due to the no ventilation and lot of cigarettes smell will be there in the gallery. Slippers and iron box was provided on request, doesn't have hand sanitizer inside the rooms or handwash in the bathroom. The food should be avoided in this hotel since I feel that the raw materials for food are stale. I had a food poisoning for 4  days during my stay and the food is very very expensive, literally expensive. It's better to eat outside and not inside the hotel or in your room. I didn't try buffet, but for me, I feel that it was chargeable if I had to eat. Staff is courteous, no issues with the staff. Overall, a makeshift hotel only. Choose this hotel only if you want to just sleep in the night but not spend your days. This hotel should be your last option.

One of the best hotels I've stayed at.
Pros:
Location: walkable distance from Sabarmati ashram and also in central part of Ahmedabad.
Rooms: Spacious, Well maintained, clean.
Service: very good

Only positivity is they agreed for an early checking in at a nominal cost and that was really helpful.  Thanking Ms. Neha for the help.

Rooms are not so big and the space is more like the transit hotels.  Too much of furniture's when the space is limited is difficult and here it was more such.  Did not try any food because of the experience with the complimentary breakfast.  There were not much choices and the Food was cold.  However, there was a live counter.  Ordered for an omelet and Dosa from the live counter and they told they ‘d serve it to the table.  But it never came and I didn’t remind too.

We stayed there for two days this week, a group of 15 people.  While most part of the stay was ok, I would like to highlight that a rat was found running across the breakfast counter.   What is unbelievable is that the management and staff of the hotel were non challant about it and did not care to apologise.  The general manager when contacted did not apologise or explain.  I will rate it negative but since there is no option mark one star.  The overall cleanliness of the hotel could be a lot better.

Very friendly, good clean rooms, good service and a vast array of breakfast from healthy salads to not so healthy cakes. Close by to the riverfront, sabarmati Bridge and gandhi ashram. Also good dining places nearby if you don't want to eat in hotel. Hotel did good non veg. Would recommend 👍 …

Better to avoid. Staff are OK. Toilet not upto expectation. Big flies were there in the room. They take undertaking that for all happenings  in the room we are responsible but we could  see leftover  liquor bottle in the room.

Nice stay, staff are very polite and humble.

Good quality foods and nice stay, Near to city area.

Nice experience.

Thank you so much Mr Prakash for the comfortable and relaxing stay with some really delicious meals and coffee would highly recommend this hotel for stay and i would like to visit again at this amazing property

It's at the end of the Subhash Bridge and easily noticeable. I have visited the restaurant of the hotel and food is amazing. We celebrated my parents birthday (yes, my parents' birthday is on the same date). Our experience was splendid at metrople hotel. The food is amazing. Service is just up to the mark. We had buffet dinner over there. Veg and non veg, both the options are available. Price is affordable. On every Wednesday they have 50% off on every meal. Buffet and Ala carte both, veg and non veg. So it's very tempting offer according to me. Parking facility is very good. Security guards are there too. They have a big hall for ceremony and other social celebrations.

Incompetent staff working in management positions. If you are looking to stay at this hotel or eat here you might as well stay at a road side trash can. The staff does not know the definition of customer service and the Manage Director plays hide and seek better than a new born toddler when there is an issue with a customer complaint. We were forced to use our first deposit to eat in the dinning area when we had to cancel our event due to a relative's death. They promised a refund but we never saw the face of it. The food was absolute garbage. I have eatten better food at the food cart beside my barber. Avoid this hotel at all costs. If you have any issue you will receive zero customer service.

I think this is the best place if you want to stay in Ahmedabad. Although it is a hotel but you will definitely get personalized service. Staff over there is courteous and proactive. Few names which I would like to call out are Reema and Leetu (sorry for wrong spelling) working at restaurant. They took great care of us while visiting.
The room is spacious and the king bed is really comfortable. It has all the amenities which you require. The service does exceed the expectations.
All in all, a great stay and definitely recommended.

Located near the RTO circle in Ahmedabad,I almost missed it while driving my car from River front road. Signage should be more prominent. My room was in fourth floor, spacious and neat. Amenities were good for this class of hotel but some had to asked which was immediately attended. WiFi was not offered but I believe it's available.Food spread was decent and service was good. For the tariff, things can be improved. Even though valet was available,I had to park at basement myself and lift service is not available from basement to lobby which I found to be strange.

A nice business hotel located in a very convenient area. It's just 10 mins from the International Airport. The Sabarmati Ashram is also a 10-minutes leisurely walk away. The hotel itself is clean and serves very tasty food. The staff is well-behaved and courteous. The rooms are spacious, neat, and clean.
They have a wine shop in the basement but remember that since Gujrat is a dry-state, you need a permit to buy/consume liquor anywhere within Gujrat. A permit can be availed in the hotel itself by providing 2 ID proofs (Aadhar card NOT accepted) and proof of your travel into Gujrat (e.g. train ticket, bus ticket, etc.).

I was just about Ok with the place. Good location and in close proximity to the airport. But I find the rooms not the very best or to my liking in terms of cleanliness. Applies to the bedsheets and towels. Rooms are quite frugal. Front desk check-in and check-out process was ok. And food was reasonable in terms of taste.. nothing to rave about. So overall, I was just about ok with the place

Loved the rooms specially keeping in mind to be interconnected. BUT Service could have been better. Waited roughly 45 mins in waiting area to ge the rooms although it was booked in advance. NOT HAPPY. The shower was not working properly, and it had timescale and rusting edges in the bathroom door.

This is my favourite place from now in Ahmedabad! Loved how the staff are giving us our own space by being their at all times. Really really impressed with everything! The service, food , ambience and literally everything! I felt i made my home here for the couple of days, wish you make that too.

This is an old property with so..so maintenece. I'm surprised how they could get 4.2 rating on Google. Seriously I don't believe that was given by someone whove stayed here. Pathetic experience with the room service. They take too much time for petty service. The faucets in the washrooms are stuck and don't work well. The don't have 24 hours hot water service. The bedlinens, towels, pillow covers are all very old. Not at all justified for the high price they charge.
I didn't get hot water for bathing even after asking 5 times in one hour. They kept on telling we will switch on boiler. I am surprised how shameless they can be to do this. They couldn't afford to send even a bucket of hot water!! Breakfast options are not upto the mark for the amount they charge.

Totally Bakwas Hotel Rooms Like Oyo Room, and Facility is Very Faltu, No Proper water Supply, AC not Working Proper I suggest Please Don’t Go 🙏🏻 Recently 127 ppl stayed in hotel for our event from 27th march to 29th March. Out of this 80 ppl are suffering from food poison. Vomiting and ppl are having loose motions, fever. Please avoid this
hotel.

I heard the reviews were very good but when i went there the staff members were not showing interest in serving and first of all atleast they serve water they didn't serve even that. And there were very cheap people around like there was a man who was speaking bad words like anything.
Won't recommend this place

Unprofessional staff with no proper responsibillity.
Gave the material to receptionist and not supported at all.
Not satisfied with the function service as well as the after service.
Waste of time and money.

Nice place to hold a convention or seminar. The seating is proper and the food tables are set appropriately. The food could be of better quality. Since the buffet which I attended, the tomato soup was stinking rotten and the naan were super hard to be broken with three fingers. Rest of the food was eatable, though nothing specific worth mentioning per se.

The hotel itself is very good in terms of staff behaviour and facilities. But the condition is terrible and in dire need of repair and maintenance. I had to change our room due to moulds growing in the ceiling of toilet and swampy smell. Blankets are old thin and begging to be retired. Bedsheets had spots.

Metropole has very kind and thoughtful employees! I inquired and was shown rooms 3 weeks in advance, told them my concerns and was given everything I inquired about with main concerns. Very safe, friendly, and accommodating Hotel! It has a 24 hour coffee shop with delicious pastries! Breakfasts has so many choices for everyone! I definitely recommend the Metropole Hotel!

Decent stay option in Ahmedabad, specially if you are looking for something close to Ahmedabad. The rooms are really big and offer a perfect value for money. The food is good and they also have a 24 hours cafe. The hotel is close to a variety of sight seeing places namely River front, Sabarmati Ashram, Atal Bridge, Hatheesingh jain temple and many more. The hotel is nicely furnished. The service is quick. It is quite clean. The beds have quite a bit of bounce. The breakfast is pretty well spread and made well too. Rooms are well equipped. I couldn't find anything to complain about.

I booked this hotel looking at the old brand name of Ahmedabad but it prooves the famous Hindi Saying "ऊँची दुकान फीके पकवान" .  The journey of my struggle with this hotel started right from my entrance to the hotel. I would try to sum it up through following issues:

1.) I reached at hotel  before the checkin time (12:00 PM) and requested the reception to provide the room, of available. Initially they denied for it. However, she already done the checkin formality including collecting my ID card over hotel's whatsapp account. After an hour or so, the receptionist offered me a room with additional amount (saying that its early checkin price). For which I denied and decided to wait till 12:00 PM.  Since it was a business trip I requested the receptionist to provide the room soon at 12:00 PM, so that I can be on time for my scheduled meeting in Ahmedabad. However, even after back to back follow ups, the receptionist regret for unavailability of any room till 12:30 PM. After 12:30 PM when I raised this disappointing thing, a room has been provided to me.

2. After reaching at hotel room (Room No. 209), I saw broken tap in the washroom, wet walls near the bad, insects in the room. It was the situation post cleaning by the housekeeping staff.

3. One of my colleague (boy) wanted to stay with me due to an urgent meeting in the early morning (next day). So he contacted the hotel and asked for the formalities and additional fare. The hotel staff confirmed the lump sum amount of INR 500+ taxes to checkin in the same room with me. However, after reaching at the hotel, they mentioned that he will have to pay 1500 + taxes. While he mentioned his previous discussion with staff, they did bargaining and finalized the amount of INR 1000 + taxes. My colleague then decided to pay INR 1000 + taxes without doing argument. He also raised the disappointment to the receptionist.

4. At night, we ordered the food from zomato. While the zomato delivery boy reached at the hotel , the receptionist called in our room and said that outside food is not allowed. She said that while taking the ID card details on whatsapp this thing may have confirmed to us. While I shown the whatsapp to receptionist and said that there is not a single message received from the hotel, she regretted and allowed the food to the room after 10-15 minutes.

5. In the next morning, we went to the hotel's restaurant to have the breakfast (buffet breakfast was included in the hotel booking). While looking at the kept food, we clearly saw the insects moving around sandwiches, table spoons and tongs, Also the mosquitos round. I called the  serving boy and shown the same. After which the services boy just picked the sandwiches and went towards the kitchen. The table spoons and tongs were there only. Many other guests used those utensils to take the food.

While leaving the hotel, I again shared my entire feedback with the receptionist and requested to look into these serious issues. For which, she requested to provide the feedback in written.

I hope the hotel administration and the management will look into the issues for the benefit of upcoming guests, prospect travelers and even for continuation of the hotel operations.

Thank you.

The room itself was beautiful, with modern decor and all the amenities you could ask for. The bed was incredibly comfortable, and the bathroom was spacious and well-appointed. I also appreciated the little touches, like the complimentary bottled water and snacks in the room.

The hotel's location was also fantastic, with plenty of restaurants, shops, and attractions within walking distance. The staff were happy to offer recommendations and help with transportation as needed, which made exploring the area a breeze.

Overall, I would highly recommend The President A Boutique Hotel to anyone looking for a luxurious, comfortable, and convenient stay in the area. The staff, amenities, and location are all top-notch, and I can't wait to stay here again in the future. Five stars!

The hotel's location is a major draw for many customers, as it is within walking distance of many of Ahmedabad’s top attractions, including some promptly known places. The hotel also offers stunning views of the Sabarmati River front and is also very close to Parimal Garden.

The location of the hotel was very good. It was near the local shops and restaurants.

The room size was good but the furniture needs an upgrade. The Kettle in the room was broken, the bedsheets were torn at some places. The wardrobe did not close properly. The leather sofa was stained and torn. The coffe cups were cracked from the edges. The air conditioner in the room was very good and the cooling was perfect.

The bathroom fittings were very good. Just the napkins and towels need an upgrade as they were very old and torn from the edges.

The breakfast in the hotel was very good as they had good selection of Indian and western foods.

We made a booking for three of our family members through Expedia three months in advance to watch the India vs Pakistan cricket match. However, the hotel cancelled the booking just one day prior to the check-in. We made the booking in this hotel truly based on google reviews, but the hotel disappointed us in the last minute. The cost was already very high when we booked the hotel, even then they cancelled our booking because of demand due to the cricket match we think so that they can make more money. This hotel management is not honest in doing business, so we will not think about this hotel again and it will be a warning for others who would want to book in future.
Great hotel to stay in because it is in center of the city. I must say the staff here is very polite and there is good cleanliness and hygiene maintained overall.

I recently had the pleasure of dining at regenta, and I must say it was an absolutely fantastic experience. From the moment we walked in, we were greeted warmly by the staff and seated promptly at our reserved table.

The atmosphere of the restaurant was cozy and welcoming, with tasteful decor and soft lighting that made for a relaxing and enjoyable dining experience. Our server was incredibly knowledgeable about the menu, and made excellent recommendations for both food and wine pairings.

Speaking of the food - it was simply divine. Every dish was beautifully presented, and the flavors were nothing short of extraordinary. I especially loved the tomato soup and the tandoori paneer, both of which were bursting with flavor and cooked to perfection.

Overall, I cannot recommend Regenta highly enough. The service was exceptional, the atmosphere was lovely, and the food was truly outstanding. I will definitely be returning soon

The rooms are spacious and hygienic. The amenities are also great if provided on time. The room service is very slow. I have visited the property twice. The food is also very average. They forget to serve welcome drinks. Also, during some issues, the manager vivek solanki does not pick up the call in time. If they improve these things, it could be a great property to stay.
Good location, s quiet and peaceful areas, all international brand shops are nearby, lots of food shop are nearby (only veg). Clean and well ambient hotel. Hotel restaurant is also good.

It is alright for a short stay if you plan on not being inside the hotel for most times. The hotel is very average, you can find much better hotels at a similar slightly higher price point. The rooms are clean but otherwise average, the wi-fi was very slow and almost never working, food is not bad, housekeeping failed to clean my room even after calling them thrice. The location is alright, nothing too great. The view from my room was of a plain wall which would block sunlight. There isn’t much parking space either. The walls are thin so it can get noisy if there are noisy neighbors around (which I experienced).

Overall, I would not call this a “4 star hotel” by any means. 3 star if being generous.

Highly recommend this hotel for comfortable stay!

The rooms are nicely air conditioned with good free WiFi. The room service is also good. The food at Artisan is delicious and hygienic. Even the staff at Artisan is very friendly. The hotel is located in city center so you have access to a large collection of shops and eateries. Regenta is perfect for short stays.

The washrooms have a very good heating system and the floor dries on their own. Their food also is very good. Overall, its a pleasant experience and they try their best to serve you.

P.S: Do give a like if you found the review helpful.

Around reception, in restaurant, in lobby and floor corridors, effect of colourful lights in bright red, orange, green and blue has been streaked over walls. Room numbers outside the room have been illuminated on large screens depicting spacious, pillared halls. Quite unlike any hotel you would have seen. Staff are courteous, helpful and friendly. Food is nice, but could be better. Lacks a fresh appeal to the palate. The hotel is within walking distance of all CG Road commercial outlets and food, beverage & cafe services. Overall a pleasantly unique experience. Give it a go!

Disappointing Experience - Far from a Five-Star Standard

I recently stayed at The Ummed, Ahmedabad, expecting a five-star experience as advertised, but my experience fell far short. From the moment I arrived, the hotel showed signs of needing serious renovation. The rooms were outdated, with a musty, unpleasant smell that made the stay uncomfortable. For a hotel claiming to be of such high standards, the ambiance and upkeep felt closer to a three-star level.

Service was another major letdown. I had difficulty reaching the front desk for assistance, with calls going unanswered despite repeated attempts. In a first for any hotel experience, I ended up moving my own luggage to the lobby simply because no one responded. When I asked the reception about the lack of service, they didn’t offer an explanation or apology, adding to the frustration.

For the price paid, I expected far better—better rooms, better upkeep, and certainly more attentive service. Unfortunately, The Ummed did not live up to its claim of being a five-star establishment. I wouldn’t recommend it to anyone seeking value for their money or a genuinely comfortable stay.
