Rooms and esp bathrooms are not only old fashioned but lousy. Water supply is very erratic and one has to complain to the front desk to have the water supply resumed. Service again is an issue. No resolution of your concerns. Food is just ok. Overall a lot of improvement required in each aspect. Personally I won't recommend this property to anyone

We visited this place for a meeting before our onward journey, it’s very close to Ahmedabad airport so one can finish Ahmedabad business meetings here and move on to the highway for the road journey,

We had mumbai masala sandwich and cold coffee, they were excellent and really it was a 5 star experience.
The food was really good.Also the rooms are very beautiful and lavish. Hotel culture was pleasant and peaceful, special Frondesk Raktima pradeep deepak were very helpful overall good experience.

It was a last moment booking and we are happy that we chose this hotel for our stay.
The reception desk is always ready to help you through all the necessary requirements and queries.
The room was very neat, clean and the view from the room was quite nice.
The housekeeping staff was always up for the daily requirements and cleaning, that is very important that the cleanliness is maintained.
The location is about just 2 km away from the airport so, it gave us comfort regarding our time management for the flights even if we got late due to work to catch up the flight.
There are a few more things to add,
1. The quality of food is great.
2. There's a swimming pool for your daily cool off purpose.
3. There's a gym with well equipped machines for your daily fitness mantra.
So we loved our stay and will definitely recommend the others for this hotel whenever they are in Ahmedabad.
Stay was comfortable, All the staffs were very professional and kinds

I book a table for lunch in jacaranda nd call in restaurant about my booking they can’t receive my call nd i call another number they say i dnt knw about ur booking so i cnt help uh nd then after they also can’t receive my call worst customer service worst 😡😡😡😡
The ummed in ahmedabad one of the great hotel,rooms is very clean and hygiene and front team great welcome at check-in time really staff very spotted great job 👍 thank you

The hotel is located nearby the Airport circle. I stayed here for two nights and the experience was really average. The staff was not attentive, the room were comparatively small and outdated compared to pricing and the management wasn’t good. Overall, the entire experience was very average considering other hotels in this range.

Great place. Rooms give a Regency era feel with solid wooden furnitures. Breakfast spread is great & so is the taste. Service staff & their behaviour leaves something to be wonted but nary another drawback.

Hotel rooms are not at all good 0 ventilation no air is passed no windows washroom is very poor water can't pass water gets clog totally useless. You can clearly here other rooms noice in your room. Rates are high hotel is said to be 4-5 star but services are not at all good.

We visited their restaurant Jacaranda for a birthday dinner and chose to have the Buffet. There were a lot of varieties in all the courses and everything tasted really well. I believe it's really famous for its non vegetarian section but I had vegetarian and there were a lot of options in that too!
Overall a good experience!

I have been to this hotel many times for business purpose.
Restaurant service is very average (taste n staff etiquette’s) and degraded.
The overall hotel service quality is reduced as compared to my past visits. Rooms are ok.
Location for air traveler’s is very convenient since they have free pick & drop facility 24x7).
Overall, they need to improve service and also renovate rooms (old washroom set-up, AC, room interior) to match with the price.

Good place.
Restaurant is also very good and with not so high price!!! 😁

I recently stayed at this hotel and had a fantastic experience. The staff was incredibly welcoming. The room was spacious, clean, providing a comfortable and relaxing atmosphere throughout my stay. The staff was cooperative, Ruby one of the staffs was helpful way too much. Overall, I highly recommend for anyone looking for a luxurious and enjoyable stay.
Thanks for the service.

Nestled in the heart of Ahmedabad, The Ummed offers a luxurious escape from the bustling city life. From the moment you step into the grand lobby adorned with elegant decor, you are greeted with warmth and hospitality.

The rooms at The Ummed are spacious, well-appointed, and exude comfort. Each room is meticulously designed to provide guests with a serene ambiance, perfect for relaxation after a day of exploring the city. The plush bedding, modern amenities, and thoughtful touches ensure a memorable stay.

The culinary experience at The Ummed is nothing short of exceptional. With multiple dining options offering a diverse range of cuisines, guests are treated to a gastronomic journey. Whether indulging in authentic Indian delicacies at the fine dining restaurant or enjoying a casual meal by the poolside, every palate is catered to with finesse.

The hotel's facilities are second to none, with a well-equipped fitness center, rejuvenating spa, and inviting swimming pool. Whether you're looking to unwind with a spa treatment or maintain your fitness routine, The Ummed has you covered.

One of the highlights of The Ummed is its impeccable service. The staff goes above and beyond to ensure that every guest's needs are met promptly and efficiently. Their attention to detail and genuine hospitality elevate the overall experience and leave a lasting impression.

For those seeking a venue for events or conferences, The Ummed offers versatile spaces equipped with state-of-the-art technology and impeccable service, making it an ideal choice for both business and leisure travelers alike.

In conclusion, my stay at The Ummed Ahmedabad was nothing short of extraordinary. From the opulent accommodations to the exemplary service, every aspect exceeded my expectations. Whether you're visiting for business or leisure, The Ummed offers a luxurious retreat that will leave you longing to return.

The staff are very warm and the food is exceptional. The hotel rooms needs renovation in electrical points as they are loose and can cause sparking and fire, and water leaks out of the  shower cubicle. Overall a good stay

Though the service staff at the restaurant needs to be more prompt and vigilante wrt customer needs with exception for Mr Ashutosh.
Rest everything about the place was perfect, rooms atmosphere etc etc.

A Charming Stay Near the Airport:

I recently had the pleasure of staying at The Ummed Ahmedabad near the airport, and it was a delightful experience from start to finish. The hotel's heritage charm is evident from the moment you arrive, with its impressive architecture and well-manicured gardens.

The hotel staff were incredibly welcoming and went out of their way to make our stay memorable. Check-in was smooth, and we were promptly escorted to our room. The room itself was spacious and exuded a classic elegance that perfectly blended with modern amenities. The comfortable bed ensured a good night's sleep, and the in-room facilities met our expectations.

The hotel's dining options were a real highlight. The on-site restaurant offered a wide range of delicious dishes, both local and international, and the breakfast buffet was a great way to start the day. The bar was a cozy spot to unwind in the evenings.

The Ummed Ahmedabad hotel also boasts a beautiful garden and outdoor seating areas. We spent some relaxing moments enjoying the serene surroundings. The hotel's proximity to the airport was a significant convenience, especially for those with early or late flights.

In summary, The Ummed Ahmedabad  hotel near the airport offers a wonderful blend of old-world charm and modern comfort. If you're looking for a unique and convenient place to stay, I highly recommend it. We left with fond memories and a desire to return in the future.

I stayed at ummed Ahmedabad and I want say the services are Excellent along cleanliness and hygiene they follow are very good special thanks to Vinay and tikinath from Housekeeping Department who made our stayed more at home.
We had a very good reception from the beginning with Arpita and DEVENDRA. Good buffet for dinner and breakfast.

I visited here for a dinner party.

Food was good and there was live music too at the restaurant area , rest of the property was.well maintained and the location is good as it's nearby Ahmedabad airport.

didn't had chance to check in the rooms but due to my guests review i can say the rooms were good for comfortable stay.

We had a social function guests staying at Ummed , very very good service , right from front desk to concierge, food is very tasty, feel is very old world charm.
Just a little trouble for senior citizens for having high beds.
Location is good, heard they are going for some renovations in March.

Its my son’s birthday so we went to celebrate it in The ummed and stayed there for 2days . There team at reception knows how to impress the guest. While they saw the date of birth of my son quickly they all came to wish us and provided a cake in the evening they even offer a chargeable deco which we dnt require. We had dinner which was nice . Although they made us feel wow .

We were there in business meeting and dinner. Although space is good but they can't manage more people. Service is little bit slow have to improve. Even they can't Handle just 10 % more gathering. Otherwise food is good and tasty but as earlier said service is issue. Overall a good venue with great ambiance.

The hotel has large rooms, very good house keeping, good breakfast buffet, and gym and other facilities. The price keeps fluctuating and can go quite high (above 8k if not booked before hand). Mr. Naveen Kumar, the housekeeping department leader,  helped us tremendously (with housekeeping, sightseeing, room service related things) during our stay and made it very pleasent and comfortable.

Terrible service at Jacaranda restaurant
We went in there for a quick bite and asked what we might get immediately since we have a flight to catch. Lackadaisical response was "nothing - everything will take minimum 30 minutes". Just didn't seem to care that they lost 6 customers!

We had breafast here about 6 months ago- then also,  service was terrible- took them almost 30 minutes to get the coffee after breafast and another 20 to get the bill.

A good property with a wonderful location close to the Ahmedabad Airport but fully worn out and has lived its age. Looks like Promoters are not doing any further investments after Taj group withdrew from the venture. Needs improvement.

One of the best hotel in town. Welcoming and saying good bye with two handed delivery of bills. One can keep his luggage post they leave from the hotel with them. Thank you kamal for providing such a nice hospitality

It is one of the finest luxury hotels in Ahemdabad. It scores quite high because of its proximity to Ahemdabad airport , just stone away distance . One cannot miss the location . The service and staff is super fast . The rooms are pretty decent , absolutely neat and clean . The best part is their food , it is delicious. Even the room service is super fast . The y offer huge variety in breakfast from all north to east and west n South Indian dishes . Their bakery items are also great . Overall great stay and quiet vibrant place
Had an opportunity to stay on official visit. Located just outside Ahmedabad airport. Check in experience was above average. Housekeeping services needs lot of improvement.

Being Wedding photographer, I will recommended this venue to my clients, it has one stop solution for all your wedding or any event requirements.

You can really get very good atmosphere, even outdoor and indoor ambience is excellent.  See our team picture posted.
You can see our warriors weapons there. Buffet is awesome.

I haven't been into the hotel as a 'guest' however, i visited this hotel to visit my friend. And i could access the longue. From the look and feel, it feels quite premium and a nice quality hotel. The parking is also decent enough. The staff seems to be very hospitable. Would love to visit this hotel as a proper 'guest' to review it properly...
Very near to the Airport, the Hotel is very comfortable to stay! The staff is friendly and efficient! The food is excellent! Enjoyed my stay. Would love to come back again!!!
Best location in ahmedabad and also staff so polite and parking facilities also available

Great location though an old building. Some rooms are a little musty but ideal location.
Their spa was worth the experience. The gym was not too good with two machines out of service. Nothing swank.

Very convenient due to its location near the Ahmedabad airport. Little costly on the pricing of restaurant food. A la carte food delivery was very very very slow. Food was reasonable. Housekeeping could improve. Could see little dust waiting to be cleaned on furniture. Staff was courteous.

Great place to stay, with a convenient location for the Ahmedabad airport. The staff were very welcoming, friendly and helpful, and the food at the restaurant was delicious. Would definitely recommend!

I am very very disappointed with this hotel. I am so impressed by the name of this hotel thought it will be nice rooms but very disappointed. The only reason I choose this hotel cause it is close to the airport. Poor communication and customer service is worse. Very hard to get hold of the person. Not recommending again.

Wife and I had a short one night stay at The Ummed, Ahmedabad during a weekend and we loved the experience. We opted for a Deluxe Room and we loved the upkeep of the room inline with the standards of a 4/5 star hotel, cleanliness of the washroom, linen and bedding and the spread of the buffet breakfast. They had a complimentary pickup service from the airport and the chauffeur had arrived at the Arrivals well on time. The staffs at the concierge were very helpful and prompt to give us the room after the verification.

Just a heads-up which the property manager has to take note and rectify - the washroom has no scupper/drain in the basin/WC area. The lone drain of the bathroom is in the tub. There is absolutely no way to drain the water from the common area of the bathroom and this has to be corrected. We had water from the bathroom spill over to the main walkway of the room. This made it slippery.

When we were doing the check in process the staff was very curious about our age and he denied and said  that you will be not allowed in our hotel due to our age criteria this was very shocking for me as I have already paid online . it was really not expected from 5 star hotel 👎 this all happened on my birthday ! After that they let us check in as we have paid such a large amount of money ! All though the other staff was very nice to us and helped us in so many thing ! But that age  incident ruined my mood and my birthday was totally destroyed for a moment! So I’m not visiting again and not suggesting to anyone

Bathroom showers are not according to the hotel standards. Shower cubiles leak and water from shower aim out of bath tub…
Also to my disappointment , we were asked to pay for cashwes kept in the bar in the room though we didn’t consumed any of the item from there.. Although I denied to pay for the cashwes but It was so humiliating to face such situations in a big hotel like Ummed..
Best thing they are doing with folded hands Namaste at lobby and Reception. Thank you to Gentelman at lobby in grey suite for delivering luggage quickly in my room. Solo trip but best hospitality.
The ambiance was nice. Services were really great and the staff was cooperative. Must mention - The lift was fast!! which is very convenient. Nice rooms and hospitality too.

Its a business hotel

Kesar Restaurant is waste of money
Salty, exorbitantly priced food. Nothing exotic as claimed

It’s a very old hotel and needs a lot of improvement. Rooms look quite old with a mild stench, rest rooms can be better especially the fittings and the bath tub. Breakfast spread is average, swimming pool works only in the evening, day time it remains surprisingly stagnant with a lot of pigeons feeding on the pool water.
Overall an average stay. But there is a lot of scope for improving.
Staff though are quite friendly.
Free Pick up and drop to airport is a good thing they do.

Hotel Umeed exceeded all expectations during my recent visit to Ahmedabad. Impeccably clean rooms, exceptional hospitality, and convenient amenities made my stay memorable. Highly recommend to all travelers. Thank you, Hotel Umeed!

Had booked this hotel for Wedding functions and stay and it was worth it!!
From quick check-in process to great hospitality to lip-smacking food in each and every event, was extremely happy with every service provided.
Great Ambience and location very close to airport is just cherry on the cake!
Would definitely recommend this hotel for stays or any wedding events.
Special thanks to Mr Priyesh for ensuring everything goes smooth without any hassles and providing support whenever needed.

Jacaranda Restaurant Review

When we visit Taj, we expect a certain ambience, service and level that you want from a fine dining restaurant in Taj.

- Soup took 40 minutes to come (without bun/ butter and anything)
- Starter came 50 minutes after order
- We had to cancel the main course

- We had to serve our own water

It felt like I am in honest restaurant or any other 3 star place. Servers had all just graduated.

Overall super bad experience
Never expected this from Taj

This place was awesome, we come here regularly for the business meeting and conference the staff was excellent especially Raktima was friendly and co-operative,the chefs the manager all were just perfect. The food was also good and cleanliness was well maintained.

We were greeted by Rajesh at the check in counter, and he was very gracious. He spoke English well enough for us to understand each other. He was kind, patient, and explained things to us well. He helped us get a translator and a ride to go shopping. We came after a weeklong trip here in India and were tired and frazzled, and desperate for a place to stay after our flight got changed. The price was only $75 and included everything. They even had smoking rooms available (which is impossible in the United States) and they brought my husband an ashtray and matches. we’ve just arrived, and we’re already thrilled.

Hi travelers, I was at the hotel last week and stayed for two nights on an urgent work travel requirement. The hotel offered a complimentary THREE Minute ride from the airport to the hotel. I was also asked for my ID and checked in even before i was at the hotel so i didnt have to bother with formalities at the counter physically. Staff seemed to be situationally aware of the new normal whilst keeping things as normal as possible. Good quality hand rubs, masks - NEW LUXURY! I
Our stay was very nice, food was excellent and above all hospitality was at its best.wish u all - Arpita,Rishita,Raktima at front desk was very helpful overall excellent hospitality

The only plus point of this hotel is the proximity to the airport.
Old fashioned rooms with low lighting and to take a shower one needs to step into the bath tub which is both dangerous and uncomfortable. Rooms are not kept well with stains on the sofa. But the worst part is the service. Both check in and check out took unnecessarily long with staff appearing completely clueless and taking permission for every small thing from the supervisor. I asked for the bill on mail thrice and they said they'll send but didn't confirm email ID until I asked. Still waiting for the bill.
It was a good property. Our Indian football team was there. We were lucky to have their autographs and wonderful pictures with them. Thank you to the Management of Ummed and team India.

Nice basic place to spend the night before flying out or a quick overnighter if you are arriving in a late night flight before heading out to other parts of Gujarat further away.

Its a basic place with decent rooms, slightly aged property but reasonably well maintained as far as cleanliness and hygeine is concerned.

The breakfast spread is quite okay and the service is pleasant which makes it an added bonus.

They provide a comfortable airport transfer as well, which makes the property ideal for anything to do with the new improved Ahmedabad Airport.

If there was more time, the pool looked tempting for a quick dip.

I came out of Ahmedabad leaving my luggage at room after getting ensured on 14nov 2023 with reception manager imran regarding extension of stay at ummed hotel till 20 nov 2023.

Staff  are not having proper intercommunication and  manager Nural had asked me stupid question that have you got any written confirmation from reception manager regarding extension of stay.

Such an idiotic,commercial, stupid staff. Staff not having any kind of common sense nor character. Hike in price because of world Cup match they told me to checkout on 18nov2023.

Simply not maintaining standards of star hotel and stupid gestures of staff.

Luxury Hotel near Ahmedabad Airport with some flaws

Stayed for 5 hours so take the review with a pinch of salt. This seems to be a heritage building because the furnitures etc are quiet old. On one hand it really feels good but on the other hand checking on their room rent things can be improved. The telephone in my room was broken so I had to call someone to fix it.

But the reception staffs are very friendly I felt a good vibe from them.

Overall decent stay for few hours.

Ms.Jaba at Reception gave us Very Warm welcome....
But kitchen staff made me angry for while ordering midnight Menu as what I asked was not available but than Mr. Mandeep FnB Manager Understood and make My Stay very comfortable as  Provided what we needed....
In a very Gentle N Calm Way...
Thanks to Mr. Mandeep who understood Customer Service.
Keep it Up !!!

The food and service were good. Food service could be improved with more information provided.
Recommended for stay after flight

Have stayed here multiple times.
PROS- location, food and service!! These will make the issues vanish. Also the heritage style gives a royal feeling.

CONS- Maintenance..... lacks everywhere. Dirt at all corners, even lobby glasses n mirros were not spotless with dirt n streaks all over. The bathroom looked like that of a 2-star hotel with tiles needing caulking, tub painted shabbily, centuries old separate valves for hot n cold water making it a task to get water at remperature of liking. Also, a/c unit works on chilled water making rooms humid above 22 degrees.

Great hotel with a great price and maintained very nicely. Food was very nice & rooms are very nice, spacious, well maintained. Beds are nice and comfortable. You'll have everything supplied from dental kit to all toiletries.
Pool and gym are well maintained and nice.

Staff was very good great hospitality
Nice experience and close to airport.

One of the best services for a Luxury hotel in Ahmedabad. The staff is very helpful and the ambience is just awesome and beautiful. It's the perfect feel of Ummed Palace.

It's a must visit in Gandhinagar Gujarat and Ahmedabad.
One of the Best hotel and best location near by Airport. Attentive staff at Desk with promptness response Specially Mr. Kamal who always available to help. Visiting again soon

Not worse more than three star rating.

Firstly, we were double charged, and they refused to acknowledge it, despite having full credit card transaction receipts, and the travel agent looking

The rooms were awful. The mattresses were weak, the bathroom is dirty and to top it all off, they were barely any shower, gels or soaps

The food was average

The general staff on the front desk were at best malaise

Located just 1.8km from airport, this property offers in house dining, spa, swimming pool and many more other option. One side complimentary airport drop or pickup is also offered. Airport is 5-7 minutes of drive.

Complete privacy and good security. Room is large and bed is comfortable. Swimming pool is clean and safe. In the ground floor there's a restaurant where you can eat. Breakfast was awesome, Thanks to all the staff members for your great service. Overall it was a awesome experience staying in The Ummed. And special thanks to ........ for taking good care and making my stay comfortable.
Our staying at the hotel was short. It was not negative but can't say that what I experienced was a 5 star hotel experience. …

If you wanna stay close to the airport for stay, this is the place to be. The ambience was the highlight of the day with serene and peaceful music. The staff and reception people were courteous and went above and beyond to delight the customer. Cherry on the top was the lip smacking food.
Looking forward to another stay soon.

The Ummed, which I knew was under the Taj management several years ago, and that was significantly observed.
The valet parking attendees had a lackluster attitude, basically depending upon their mood, whether to park the vehicle or not.
I visited the hotel as a guest, though. The overall maintenance was compromised.

Stayed here as it was the only good property near the airport road, it’s rated 5 star but didn’t have a king bed or a balcony and the room is pretty small compared to a 5 star hotel, being asked for a bigger room or a bigger bed they said all the room are of same size. Room service was pretty good, quality of stay was also good. Food quality good.
Customer service is useless. No interest in responding or replying to emails or calls. No interest in sales or service.

Close to the airport, 5 star safe????, Rooms were musty , needs better cleaning, bathroom? Previous body wash and soap still in the shower area!, Maybe less house keeping staff, but that's not an excuse, expected better for the rates they offer. Breakfast was awesome. Smoking rooms in ground floor? Initially we were given a ground floor room despite my online specifications of non smoking room??. Wake up guys , you can fare better. Nearer to the airport alone cannot be your selling point

An automatic choice because of its location. No staff approached while we waited for the guest , the venue is excellent to host a gathering and each staff is well disciplined with Greeting and being cooperative.

Worst hotel experience Ever👎👎

We booked buffet dinner and went, Food quality was very poor...Poor taste, AC wasn't working properly, Food wasn't warm, item advised while booking were not available...No one to replace it...
Overall it was a waste of money and time... Will never ever go there and I suggest others not to Visit...

Just Pathetic Place to visit👎👎

We booked a dinner table for our anniversary.
Very less choice of food variety. It is understaffed in restaurant, whatever we asked for it came late.. we were just sitting and waiting for chapatis.. they were not trained to clear the table once a course was over.. no one was serving water..Cake was put on a cloth napkin.. cake was brought without candles .. later when we asked they brought two candles where as any small baker shop too provide cake with candle . There was no one to light the candles we were provided with a lighter.. There were quite  a few people for dinner . Staff was struggling to refill the food bowls.. they weren’t bothered about our booking. Where as we have very different experience with other top hotels of Ahmedabad.

Horrible experience!! Staff at the reception are not professional at all due to which we got late for our flight even after we informed them in advance..AC in the room was not working. Rather stay in any 2-3 star hotel for the same experience...

Surprised to have an experience of no water in the bathroom, although it was rectified quickly when it was brought to their attention. Coincidentally, water had choked in the drainage trap and was getting stagnated in the bathroom while taking bath. Food and other services were good. They provided courtesy pick-up and drop from and to the airport, which is just 5minutes away from the hotel.

Where do I start with this hotel? It was an all-around nightmare of an experience, getting far worse than 1-star quality for 5-star payment.

- We made it clear twice in our email communication with Noorul Islam that we were arriving with two young babies and lots of luggage, and would need an  Innova or similar SUV. They agreed over hotel and then sent a Sedan anyway which couldn't carry half our luggage much less the babies. We had to wait at the airport for 30-40 minutes after a 30 hour journey across the world because they didn't keep their word on pickup car.
- Got allotted a SMOKING room with YOUNG BABIES. This hotel knew our check-in time, our arrival flight (that's how they could send a car), yet they couldn't be bothered finding a baby friendly room and keeping it ready. We had to wait at the reception for another 30 minutes while staff us told us "no available rooms on the ground floor, only room available is in the smoking zone", our while our young,sick and hungry babies tired after a 30+ hour journey were screaming to be fed.
- Linen was old and with stains in weird colors. Not enough bedsheets, towels, napkins (barely one of each), when we paid for a room occupancy of 3-4.
- The bathtub was held together with painters tape. I am not kidding. This is a supposed 5-star hotel, with stained walls, old and insufficient bathroom towels and bedding linen., and a worse than duct-taped bathtub.
- No microwave. No explanation for why there wasn't a microwave either. Good luck getting hot water for warming baby milk bottles.
- No refrigerator, there was a "mini-bar" in the room that barely held temperatures at 10 Celsius, good luck if you need to keep formula, breastmilk or medicines at 3-4 Celsius. Supposedly this is a 5-star hotel yet the staff balked at us when we asked why there wasn't a functional refrigerator in the room, as if it was an unreasonable ask.
- Breakfast food was barely ok. I've had much better food in other brand hotels (Hyatt/Hilton) locally that cost half the room rate.
- Extra bed charges slapped on for a nasty dilapidated bed, enforced even though we checked in at 4am, left at 10 am, and needed the extra bed to put babies on, not a third person (we were too busy with the babies to even consider napping).
A beautiful place to makes us feel Happy. i had a great experience during my stay there. The rooms are very classy with all the facilities to fulfil our needs.

The only USP of this hotel is it is near to the airport. The hotel rooms are far from reflecting a 5 star facility. They have never changed the beds since inception. The bathrooms also reflect a long lost glory. None of the bathroom fittings deserve praise, only frustration. No hot water in other time of day except morning. Slippery and clogging bath tubs in which one has to bathe. No hand shower adds to further frustration. Hotel and it's fittings are very dated.
The only brownie points is its restaurant. Food was tasty and had variety in the evening buffet like pasta and other Italian dishes. Desserts were good too.
You get a free airport pickup and drop which is good.
Extremely slow breakfast service even with 5 people sitting there.

The Ummed Ahmedabad Airport is a safe and luxurious 5-star hotel. The hotel's location is convenient, being close to the airport. The rooms are spacious, well-furnished, and clean. The staff is polite and helpful, and the hotel's facilities are top-notch. The food is delicious, and the ambiance is perfect for both business and leisure travelers. Overall, a great place to stay in Ahmedabad.

Just few minutes away from airport .The indian food delicacies served was awesome. Thanks to the kitchen team for home like food. Had a comfortable, safe and caring stay. The team efforts to make us feel the same old days are appreciable with adaption to the new change. After check out I can stay the change might have come as a huddle but hotels have changed it as an opportunity to make every guest special. Keep up the good work.

They gave us room # 327 which they knew had a crack in the bathtub. Not knowing about this, our bathroom floor was flooded after taking a shower. We called front desk to help us clean this but no one came. Finally around 2 am, they switched our room. I'm surprised that they claimed to be a 5 start hotel when they cannot provide a 1 star functionality/feature.

The Only Official 5* Hotel located so close to the International Airport.
Have undergone so many changes in ownership in past and now called as The Ummed.
The entrance and lobby is not that grand keeping up with one's expectations from a 5* property but, it's okay. Check-ins are smooth and so is the checkout plus billing.
Rooms are good, clean and well furnished with all essential amenities a business traveler may need. Quality of supply is also very good.
The buffet B/F which I had was almost the high of my stay as the spread was just too good. I couldn't find anything amiss and very surprisingly it has many items meant only for a lunch/dinner at most 5* hotels. Staff there were way too courtious and always on their toes taking full care of every guest which was really commendable! Can't stop myself from mentioning the name of Mr Surjit whom I found running thru the time I was there. Keep it up Dear!
It has a good gym and a swimming pool (no instructor though) to let you refresh.
All in all a good place in the vicinity of airport saving travelers from a lot of time.

This establishment was horrendous they were trying to charge us extra for staying 30min extra to pack up the reminder of  our items we had just flew in from London and arrived at 5 there . They also tried playing victim when we started to protest about this their over all customer service was disappointing to what i had heard about. Next time i am going to taj skyline way better . Furthermore there was no reason to charge us for 12 hours half day 50% extra than our package price which was cheap but an unnecessary expense with no benefits

The staff were very polite and helpful, everything was very quick, there was no unecessary waiting time... They were even very helpful

We had forgotten an item in the room and they very courteously handed it to us at the airport without any hustle..

Would recommend this hotel anytime... Very close proximity to the airport with all amenities.

Kudos to the team.

Been visiting Ummed for years. Stayed for a night was disappointed on multiple accounts

- difficult to take a direct reservation took me multiple calls and waiting for get connected
- I gave in written details but still reservation dates were booked in correctly .. which I had to correct
- However airport pick up arranged on bases of wrong booking which I had to correct again with the transport section
- the barthrooms need urgent Revamp plumbing does not work the bath tubs are chipped and do not drain properly even after hours

Over all the location and expanse of property are all negated by poor upkeep and crumbling infrastructure
Good ambience. Very well mannered staff, particularly Mr.Umesh & Mr.Amit. Good food. Overall an excellent stay
Very nice and strategic location... A good Heritage hotel.. one of the best hotel in Ahmedabad in terms of location and brand and services... Staff are very polite and supportive

Team Ummed hotel

Dear team Ummed, I recently had a chance to stay at the hotel on a work visit. I wish to acknowledge the following people for making my stay comfortable. Saurabh Singh and his security team were very courteous and helpful at times. Ashutosh was very hospitable at Kesar and eager to assist as was Nitesh at the other restaurant. I am grateful for the memorable experience. Thanks!

It's proximity with the apt along with beautiful lawns around it, makes it an ideal choice for travellers. Staff is very courteous. Rooms are spacious, clean and comfortable enough to assure a sound sleep.
Perhaps they can improve on the condition of the gym. Gym is well equipped but lack ventilation. This could be dangerous specially for an unmanned gym. Otherwise it's spacious and equipments are good enough to offer a variety in work outs.
Staying in ahemdabad this hotel should be the ideal choice for many reasons one of the main being the courteous, helpful staff.

The service is zero here, you got to call 3-4 times for one single thing. Nobody takes hospitality seriously here.
The location is perfect if you want the airport right beside your hotel and the rooms are calm and spacious.

I think every thing that can go wrong, went wrong with my booking

The reservation team was really bad - HIGHLIGHTING Mr. Noor (absolutely poor service)

1. Double payment done from hotel side
2. I had to write 6-7emails asking for refund for double payment - but still I did not get it
3. My company booked the room with dinner, however some how the booking for dinner did no go through which is fine things happen. I was disappointed because they team was not ready to send an email that no booking for dinner was received. I had to visit physically three times to get that email after 5 days of leaving.
Nice place to stay..A little more cooperation from the hotel staff could have served well

Went there as a guest of my friend who had stayed there for dinner and my god what an unpleasant experience. The buffet dinner was absolutely not worth the price.
Quality, spread, taste, authenticity, service, freshness and hygiene all was under par.
I would never visit again.

The only good thing about this hotel is it's close to the airport.
The washroom had a weird smell, it took us like more than half an hour to just check out because there were not enough people working. Poor customer service. I had expected better from a 5 star hotel. Very disappointed.
Good stay .The staff was very helpful specially front desk Ms. Raktima she was outstanding... Food also very good also maintion front desk night staff was very helpful.

We were at Kesar for dinner today...Had a great experience... As soon as you enter Kesar you feel the Royal touch in every single item in that place. Debasish was very helpful with our food selection. He even arange a welcome drink, a amuse bouche and dessert from his side.
We order there
Mutton Pardha Biryani: Mutton was so well cooked that it was actually melding in our mouth. Pieces were quite good and the flavour of the biryani was very balanced.
Secondly we ordered Awadhi Murg Biryani: It was Awadhi style murg boneless biryani the flavour and aroma was exquisite. Chicken was soft and succulent. Probably I had the best biryani in Ahmedabad in Kesar. Highly recommended!

When I decide to book to stay at The Ummed  Hotel, I had no idea what I feel like. But when I stayed there, I felt like staying at home. One thing that the most I like is the cleanliness. The hotel is very clean and I think I deserved what I paid for. The room size of deluxe is  comfortable, complete with the room facility. I also could open my email as the internet access is fast to connect. The view of pool area in the evening and morning are so amazing and romantic. I could watch sunrise and sunset .I only stayed there for 3 days but wish to come back again at my next visit, could be with my friend. I will recommend Ummed to my friends. Thank you Ummed for making my stay enjoyable.

The property was nice although all the facilities are shut due to prevailing situations. Timely pickup from airport was a plus. All meals were served in room.
Had informed the desk and the in - room dining staff in advance that i would require an early breakfast(paid inclusion in the package)at around 0730h next morning.
Next morning when I called up dining service, I was informed that dinner will be kept at the reception desk before my departure. Upon reaching the reception, I was informed that chef will only arrive after 0800h and breakfast can not be served. Despite informing and paying in advance, had to leave empty stomach for my onwards road journey. Didn't get any refund for the same as I "need to sort it out with the booking site not us".
Disheartened. 2 stars for the property.

Old property, rooms are smelly, nothing good except large building and proximity to airport. Priced at part with 4/5 star property but lacks standards, out dates. Bathrooms are too small beds and linen, curtains too old, ac ducting and bed gives unbearable foul smell. More pinching it's rates too.
Dining quality and option too is not good. Cutlery utensils too pathetic in room dining experience is like cheap dhabba quality
Seems management is sleeping and nothing special about this property except large format , need major overhaul or atleast management change. I wonder previously how Taj operated there ??

The Hotel is great and the front office staff Ms. Ruby and Deepak were very nice and the Mr. Umesh was very helpful,
Mr. Kamal was very nice and humble
Will visit again
Service is in restaurant in very nice good food test is very delicious special thank to Mr Abhishek is kind with us.....

We organized our daughter's wedding and reception at Ummed along with the stay for the guests. Our experience was very special. Marriage in the Indian settings is a culmination of all culmination of all collective familial aspirations and find solace, happiness, satisfaction and enjoyment amongst all martial stress and chaos is like getting a glimpse of heaven. This is what we felt at Ummed. The team here led by Mr Priyesh and Mr. Amit was an extended family and all the arrangements were as per our expectation. Moreover, all the guests were meticulously attended and everyone had just good things to say. The ambience and the food were top notch. Heartfelt gratitude to the team of Ummed for making our daughter's wedding a memorable one !!!
Enjoy brunch experience like never before – live counters, music vibes, endless non-alcoholic sips, and poolside bliss await! 🍰🎶🍺🏊‍♂️

Hotel is very convineint and easy access to airpoort with complementery two way airport pick up . Very polite driver Mr.Dhanvan was very helpful waiting outside arrival pick even flight was bit late.
Booked first two nights  with on line. Arup, Khushboo and Sandeep are very helful and polite and helful . Quick check in without any issues.Hotel is very nice  and room found very clean on second floor. Also extend stay for one more nigh t without any issues on line.
Breakfast and varity of food choices found very good. Nitu and all other staffs are very polite.
Looking forward to book it again during next visit in Ahmedabad.
Kishor Kholia

Had chosen this hotel because earlier it was run by Taj group so had very high expectations which were belied. It is a small hotel close to Airport- 2. Km But is far away from the city. The rooms are small and the property is old which can be noticed in the washroom. However, the hotel is neat and clean with a swimming pool which is an added attraction. There is a ground at the back and I utilised it for morning walk, but it was not maintained properly and dogs were roaming.
Food is good with a hospitable staff ever ready to help. If you are coming from Airport the place can be considered as a Value proposition. However, those of you who are used to staying in branded hotels like Taj or Marriott you may be disappointed

Staff and location is great. Very near to airport, as such it's a good place for a frequent traveller like me.
Downside is that the rooms need to be upgraded/improved. Small small issues like plumbing, bed mattress needs to be taken care of.

Great place, near airport. Restaurants are good.. Jacaranda is 24x7, & Kesar opens by 1930 hrs .. both are great.. Swimming pool is closed & under renovation as of now, so don't opt for Pool facing rooms..
Next to airport, rooms are decent though an extra bed might be required for families. Room service is fast and food is tasty.

Stayed here for a wedding, had a great time. Good food, decent rooms.
Close to airport.

Location - Next to Ahmedabad Airport. But u can't just walk if you're having too much luggage.
Service - During breakfast, staff were too slow to react / connect.
Dosa was awful. Bakery products in the breakfast menu are awsome

I did check in on 19th Aug, I was put up in room no. 348, there the bedside lamp were not working, even the room was so dimlit. Even the TV wasn't working. The issue could not be addressed, so I was alloted room no. 350, even in that room the whole wall of wardrobe was damp ( please check pictures)with water in the wardrobe and TV remote not working. I was shifted to room no. 354. It was not ready so it took another 15-20mins. Even in that room the AC grill looked so unkempt (check picture) with strange smell. But I was eventually exhausted to further change the room.

The swimming pool floor was slimy. The water did not seem clean. No pool side owels, I requested and waited for 15 mins for the towels to arrive.

Even I will take this opportunity  to ask why no direct extension number is provided for reception or housekeeping (check attached picture)? And no mention on any page around  about the number to dial to connect with particular department for the convenience of the guest.

Overall it was very below the expectations experience from Gujarat's first five star hotel.

Accepted the current times are tough for hospitality industry but in such times also the housekeeping should not be neglected. This is basic hygiene factor and
should not be compromised especially in current pandemic times.

Overall I will say, I have vowed not to come to this property again. I shifted to Wyndham next day, for nearly one-third of the rate and  got a far better room. They gave false promises on phone also.

Wonderful hotel in great airport location. It requires freshening the furniture, carpeting, etc. The furniture has "aged" look. Painting/fixing of walls will enhance the property. Quality of food was excellent in Jacaranda. TV monitors are distractions to the waiters as frequently they stare at the TV and not pay attention to the clients. You would greatly improve the service by removing the restaurant TV.

It was a pleasure to visit this place for a banquet function of our conference of gujarat state surgeon's association. The arrangements were really superb..it was at pool side. Both regular and jain menu were there..juice and soups were really authentic.  All food starting from soup to desserts too good. Taste, quality, ambience all were 5/5. Staff behaviour was very cordial. In the desserts one thing needs  Special mention..the ice cream .. It was incorporated in actual fruits- apple, guava, orange, pomegranate.. All flavors just superb..

Rooms were okay. Gives you vintage vibes. However, the breakfast was of real poor quality. Cakes, khaman, dhokla, chutney were stale and the food quality was not up to the mark. If someone asks only to rate food it will be not even 2 star. Hotel did not seem like 5 star- food wise and service wise.

Safe and Hygienic Hotel

Loved my stay here. The hotel staff is very courteous specially Mr. Kewal and the location of the hotel is very good. Food is great, rooms are clean and hotel has loads of amenities. Hotel is also taking special care of hygiene in covid 19. Its a great value for money and would like to stay here again when I come back.

When we asked for water from the staff, we were given water from the tap outside, they did not allow us to sit in the voting area, they asked us to sit outside the hotel. When I left my luggage for just 2 minutes, I was misbehaved by the manager. After that, we  Asked to sit in the parking lot. I have been to all the hotels in this area but I have never had such behavior as I am sitting here.
The stay was amazing. Especially the food. The rooms are clean, the space is ambient. Mr. Rajesh was so helpful.

I have never ate such bad food. Mostly everything was unfresh. Taste was worst. Even the plates were not clean. We had to ask them again and again for refilling the dishes.
Also we asked them to take back the food and serve hot again, and now we are about to leave they have not served it. The staff was not responsive at all.
Coming here at a 5 star restaurant we came with great expectation, but it was disgusting and pathetic. We are too much disppointed.
The restuarant does not live up to its reputation

WE had a comfortable stay at the  Ummend hotel in Ahemdabad .  I specially wanted to praise one employee (Neha) who went out of her way to help us.  For some reason my uber app was not working and we were having trouble with the wifi as well (We were traveling from USA).  She helped us get the transportation and made sure the transportation arrived and we were on our way.  She was kind, helpful and made us feel so at ease.  Excellent customer service skills

was a special treat with my dear ones, hotel staffs took the special care . thank you so much for everything you have done to make our moment more special. the arrangement were superb , overwhelmed with it. love to all , wont forget this day. my friend was happy and surprised with the arrangement

Food really not upto the mark. Didn't expect this from a 5 star.

Room lagged basic 5 star amenities. Staff was good. Location is great. But they need to work a lot on food section

This charming hotel is located very close to the airport. The staff is very warm and friendly and takes good care of their guest. The rooms are clean and spacious and reminded me of 5 star properties from back in the 90’s. A good place to host weddings as they have ample of space to organise all the various functions etc.
Only and biggest drawback is the layout of the hotel. I really really recommend the owners/management accommodate another lift and staircase lobby as the hotel design is such that the rooms are quite far away from the main lift lobby and becomes a hassle to travel from one end to another.

Poor cleaning. Even No heating system. Although centrally air conditioning, but only for cooling. 5star rating only for name. Nothing like 5 star. You can see dust on windows.

Please avoid it in winters

The best fine dining experience I had in Gandhinagar / Ahmedabad till date. Lovely ambience. Quiet place. Very friendly and courteous staffs. And best of all....yummy food. Very pocket friendly too. Loved every minute of our dinner there. Definitely will visit again n again.

Name is enough but it seems that it is only give well service to foreigners.
We the normal people not treating well like we have to ask them one thing many times and management don't give proper response.
Good interior, sanitisation, security, cctv, wifi, luggage attendant, reception staff is quite professional.
Pool and proper parking is available.
Garden for walk. Well maintained rooms available
Too costly.
I disappoint by service which requires a lot to improve.
Had a great stay and the staff did all they can to make our stay warm and welcoming

Stayed in room 223.

Cons: Air conditioning could not be adjusted in spite of temperature setting done to 25°C. Got chilled at 20° and had to switch it off.
Bath tub drain was blocked. Hot water was warm, not hot.
Dated sanitary fittings. Single lever water mixture tab is absent. Didn't need it though because water was not hot.
No HD channels on TV.

Pros: Furniture is traditional and good. Has an antique feel. Rooms are average size. TV has fair amount of SD channels. Breakfast spread is fabulous.
Went to attend a wedding, beautiful hotel , food quality and services was wonderful.
Very good cleainess and feel very comfort. Good house keeping. Nice supports team
Ver convenient location close to airport. Clean, well maintained rooms.

Well, everything was average and does not qualify for 5 star but I would particularly discuss about the “only” restaurant they have.
1.  During lunch, We had ordered for 2 chicken burger and after waiting for 40 mins, a burger with veg pattice and chicken chunks came. Only asking why they said mistake. Got absolutely tasteless chicken burger after another 30 mins and tons of followup.

2. Butter chicken (800 rs) had exactly 4 pieces of chicken. I’ll leave it at that.

3. Now comes the snack time. We ordered Tiramisu and this is how it came? There was no coffee sprinkle and staff instead of accepting customers feedback give constantly kept arguing. It’s not the first time I was eating Tiramisu.

4. We ordered for veg pakora, they said will come in 10 mins but it took more than 30 mins and multiple follow ups.

4. we had ordered cake slices for kids which never came for 30-40 mins and we had to cancel the order.

the last but not the least we had to followup consistently for the bill as well. Even that came so slow.

Either work on your customer’s feedback and improve the service or close down the restaurant. It was highly highly mismanaged and just very very slow
Nice to have an ambience filled with wooden fittings, giving Royale feel.

Had a very bad experience today,
I don't understand how long does it take to deliver a water bottel to the room, Well in my case it took 25 mins in which I had to remind them twice..
Room service number is always busy or dead, I had to called reception for anything.
And the story doesn't end here I had Worst breakfast experience today I asked them to cook Masala Omlette they cooked the white one, when asked for the Masala they cooked it in so hurry that the Omlette was just Half cooked.
Had a very great expectations from this Hotel but now am disappointed.
Excellent service, food, banquet and hospitality.  Good response from Abhishek Tiwari for banquet

The hotel is close to the airport. Decent and functional.
The lift is on one side of the hotel so if your room number is beyond 40 tuen you will have to walk a lot.
Food is just about ok.
Rooms washrooms are worn out and need immediate attention. Room and bed are spacious and maintained. Breakfast and dinner spread is amazing .

Nothing is like 5 star.
Only one restaurant, limited dishes.

Room, no minibar, no toiletorries, old furnishings,

All that you will never expect from 5 star, you will get here.

Of course, the room charges are also low.

They should surrender the label of 5 star if they cannot afford to switch on even lights and air conditioning in the lobby.

I had purchased the pastries from Ummed. I got white forest and black forest pastries but they weren't satisfying at all. They weren't fresh . But still, didn't get a chance to stay at the hotel but would love too. Their service was really nice. That's why 4 stars.

The hotel is having all the facilities that one look for. The staff members were polite and kind, the place was clean and it was very well organised.
The only thing that might get better is their buffet dinner.
Great stay front desk staff was very polite and helpful thank you. God bless you
Reasonable priced accommodation for short stay near the airport

Well maintained property at good location
But service is too much poor
Average food quality never recommended this hotel will surely spoil the name.  I saw each n every guest complaining about the service and staff rude behaviour as well
hotel was very nice front desk staff was great ... very great hospitality
It should have made with some architectural excellence. It's looks like only normal 3 star hotel building

A decent place to stay at.
.food has to improve..
Their chatni was salty, the idli n sambar were good
Meduwada was stale..
I loved the vintage look the rooms had, with morden facilities. Staffs were very helpful. I think they had organic shampoo, bodywash, and lotion. The view was nice.

Travelling and staying during these covid days was a concern for my family. But The Ummed Ahmedabad has not only assured but delivered the assurance of safety and took care of my each and every requirement. Would love to visit again & again. Must to be recommended
Hotel was looking gorgeous and service very great and iconic.Ruby
This is an old type of hotel. Internet speed was very less and getting disconnected intermittently. Break fast is better than dinner. Gym is good.
It was a great experience to stay in this Hotel every facility they provide is very well

No lights in the parking area. It was like parking the car in utter darkness. Their restaurant was functional but still the receptionist said it's closed due to COVID. We came to know about the truth through the security. It looked like a haunted place. I won't be visiting them again.
From food to rooms to quality of laundry service to housekeeping, everything about the hotel was disappointing. The only saving grace is the proximity to airport, for flyers.
Stayed there for wedding of my cousin. The food was very was fantastic. Big lobby    and well maintained.
Property is good, nice big cozy rooms but the service could have been better, had to wait long and even had to remind for a few basic items I needed.
Umeed hotel Ahemdabad provide very good services. Highly recommended.
Best jewellery shop in Chanlodiya & Vandematram

We found hair in the food and there was no response or compensation
Or will they cooperate in recovering the value of an additional day that was paid?
Rajesh and Anirban were amazing hosts
Quite ok.
Top fiod
Spacious and comfortable, close to the airport and convenient.
Security guard behavior bad
Good hotel
Excellent restaurant

"Exceptional Stay with Impeccable Service and Modern Comforts"

I had the absolute pleasure of staying at Welcome Hotel by ITC, and the experience was truly exceptional! From the moment we arrived, the staff was warm, welcoming, and attentive, ensuring our stay was perfect.

The rooms were spacious, impeccably clean, and thoughtfully equipped with modern amenities. The large bathroom was a standout, featuring the latest fixtures and offering plenty of space, making it a pleasure to use. The bed was incredibly comfortable, providing a wonderful night’s sleep.

The hotel is located in a great spot, near key attractions, yet still offers a peaceful, relaxing atmosphere. The pool on the terrace looked stunning and well-maintained, adding to the hotel’s charm.

I highly recommend this hotel for anyone seeking a luxurious and comfortable stay with top-tier service. I’ll definitely be back!

A beautiful hotel with modern amenities and spacious rooms.
The base category rooms also are of decent size and modern and very well maintained
The buffet,  food is amazing, the chef was accommodating according to our food restrictions. The staff was very helpful and friendly. We were a huge group but they made sure everyone was looked after well.
The location is central.
It’s a good hotel for families, friends and business stay.
Highly recommend this hotel for luxury at great prices.

Good place for stay. Room size is also nice.  Breakfast menu and quality is awesome but room service is very poor. You have to give multiple times call for any kind of service required. When we were going to check out and ask for luggage pick up, no one came in half n hour, at last we take that luggage and came down to lobby. Few floors required renovation.

Over all apart from room service nice hotel to stay and have food.

Rooms were very spacious and neat. Food was great in their lobby restaurant. Ate there  and Gita was very helpful in whatever I needed during breakfast, lunch and dinner. Wonderful service! Would recommend this hotel.

A regular customer of this hotel and I'm proud to say they never disappoint. The highlight of my stay was undoubtedly the amazing buffet, which offered a wide variety of delicious options. I'd also like to give a special thanks to Mr. Imran from housekeeping, his unwavering helpfulness and attentiveness whenever I needed assistance during our stays truly made my stays exceptional. His dedication to ensuring everything was perfect did not go unnoticed and greatly enhanced my overall experience. Highly recommended hotel for your stays.

I had booked this hotel for my 3 days trip to Ahmedabad. I loved its location and proximity to Riverfront where I also went for quick walk and cycling. The rooms are spacious, clean and I loved the bathroom area with bathtub. The breakfast buffet was quite amazing with local Gujarati options available but it could have been better if these options were rotated on daily basis. All three days I could only see Khaman in the menu. I found the servicing staff in cafe to be a bit slow. Also, on my first day the service was very dull, I had to call thrice to reception for getting my luggage delivered and also for water bottles which was quite disappointing for a hotel of this status. The staff looked very dull welcoming us. Other than service part the room and food was quite amazing.

The Ambience is beautiful. The service is heartwarming one and staff is very co operative and prompt.
Staff at Reception is very Humble and very comfortable and Prompt in service.
Specially mention Ms. Nisha was very warm and courteous.  Thank you Nisha
We had a delightful and very comfortable stay .
Keep it up 👍

The staff provided exceptional assistance in managing all aspects of our experience. The food was exquisite, and we were particularly impressed by the outstanding support of Mr. Ashok Kumar Chauhan. His prompt and efficient responses, coupled with his courteous demeanor, ensured that all our needs were met seamlessly.

The hotel is a good on. Nice clean rooms and all services provided are ok. The view from the 11th floor is great. The food is also good. The area in which the hotel is located is not that great. But a 10 to 15 mins walk you can see riverfront and restaurants etc. Only the reception staff are not that welcoming and helpful. Apart from that great. The lady in the restaurant called diya needs a promotion.

The food and service is excellent and the hotel stands highly recommended. The live qwali band at the Ikkat restaurant had personalized our song requests and the staff, especially, Jagdish, Praveen and Shubham were courteous. We had a great 3-day stay overall.

We attend conferences at this hotel. The staff are very approachable and work on all the feedback. The banquet staff Mr Ashok as well as the coordinator Ms Spraha have promptly helped out for all our requirements!
Praveen is incredibly hardworking. His willingness to help, and ability to create a positive experience for everyone he interacts with is truly commendable. He is a gem. Keep up the good work.

We stayed at the WelcomeHotel by ITC for more than a week, and I must say it was a pleasant stay. The rooms are nice and the hospitality was really great. All the staffs are very welcoming and pleasant and at your service all the time. Gita, Bhumika, Renuka, Praveen, Minati  and chef Jagdish. I must say all of them were very polite and efficient and very pleasant to deal with.
We loved the visit and we will definitely be staying here again.

I recently stayed at 5 ⭐ Welcomhotel by ITC Hotels from 12th to 15th October 2024 and had a wonderful experience.

The room was impeccably clean and spacious, with extremely comfortable bedding.

The hotel staff were exceptionally friendly, making us feel welcome throughout our stay.

The food was outstanding, with a wide variety of delicious breakfast and dinner options catering to all tastes.

Overall, I highly recommend 5 ⭐ Welcomhotel  by ITC Hotels for its exceptional service, top-notch amenities, and excellent value.

I am an ordinary Assistant Professor in a village and I am mesmerized by the treatment given by Praveen, Geeta and Jagdish. I appreciate their efforts to satisfy the tastes of the people. The staff is loving and polite. The quality of the the food is ultimate.
Everything was very wonderful, service at the highest level. The location is very good, most importantly, I would like to note the interior of the hotel, which creates comfort and homeliness. :)

Food is really nice. Especially the biryani prepared was really nice. Thank you chef Jagdish! Will definitely visit again. The service provided was amazing as well, thankyou Abhishek! Overall staff behaviour was friendly and cooperative.

I am having a breakfast in welcome cafe at ikkat the staff was very good and polite and well behaviour also food was very delicious thanks to chef Jagdish specifically thanks to f and b team they taking care in breakfast asking about need and wants hotel location was very good thanks f and b team thanks lot Shubham miniti Gita Abhishek Shila thanks you praveen Mishra ( Mishra ji )

The service was very good and staff was very friendly and plolite mr praveen kumar mishra taking care in breakfast dinner all the tume if u am come in the restaurant thanks mr praveen abhishek and shubham renuka
STAYING AT WELCOME HOTEL  WAS GREAT.. WE STAYED HERE FOR 6 DAYS AND THE SERVICE  WAS GREAT.. STARTING FOOD TO ROOMS EVERY THING WAS PERFECT...  SPECIAL THANKS TO GEETA,BHUMIKA IN THE RESTAURANT  ....

I have done  advance booking with this hotel one month ago. when i have arrived into this hotel after a long journey, the desk manager said that there is no booking in my name.when i showed the booking confirmation, they said that there is some issue, so rooms are not available and insisted me to take alternative property. why haven't i been informed earlier when my booking was done a month ago? if i knew earlier i could have booked different property by myself.
this hotel has ruined my plan.
Totally  insulting and dissapointed with their service. Didn't expect this kind of service from ITC.
Amazing hospitality....The food was really amazing and tasty great effort done by chefs ..thank you Mr Sudeem and Mr Praveen for making us feel special...keep up the good work ..

I am staying in welcome by itc hotel Ahmedabad for 6 days I am in sbi group the hotel was excellent specially the service is very best in welcome cafe ikkat the staff was very good and well behaved and very friendly nature specially thanks to Praveen Kumar Mishra shubham minati Gita renuka shila Abhishek thanks to all f and b team

We stayed here for 1 week .. our experience here at welcomhotel was really good.. Enjoyed the food and stay.. staff in the restaurant are very attentive... Like service in the restaurant... Geeta and praveen and bhumika was really very helpful.. chef jadish  was also there when need.......

I enjoy a lot here the breakfast was very good the food was excellent thanks to Jagdish chef and also thanks to Praveen Mishra Shubham Gita minati Abhishek Shila the breakfast was very good thanks to chef Jagdish thanks all f and b team I visited again this hotel the service was very good

Overall stay was great. Location, amenities and room decor was awesome..Service of staff was satisfactory.
All in all value for money.. Will strongly recommend others to book this property.

I just stayed at the welcom hotel and it was a fantastic experience over all . The staff was so warm and hospitable , the food was lovely , the ambience was great, the rooms were done up so well and  were big in size  and the whole experience was overall outstanding.Since the location is also very good it is a good choice to stay there next time too .

During my recent stay at ITC , I was impressed by the housekeeping staff's attention to detail and courteous service. My room was consistently clean, and the evening turndown service was a lovely touch. Special thanks to.Housekeeping manager Premanand
Housekeeping team dhoni,
Mir ,suraj  for their exceptional service. Keep up the great work!"
Extremely polite staff. They were really helpful in everything.. it was my first time in the city and i had an amazing stay…
The food is amazing and they have authentic chicken sorba. Good ambience.  Bhumika and Praveen and Geeta are very courteous.  The music is good as well.  Great experience!

Apt to it’s name, the property offers a very pleasant stay & hospitable staff with good service right in the heart of the city. Comfortable rooms with a nice ambience await you. The ones on the top floor offer a great view of the city at no extra cost😃 Will definitely patronize again.

KEEP UP THE GOOD WORK!!!!

To the Welcome ITC Ashram Road Ahmedabad Team,

I would like to start by thanking the entire team at the Welcome ITC Ashram Road Ahmedabad Team for the excellent stay we had at your property.
We had 2 rooms booked over 5 nights coming over for our family trip to Gujarat.

We arrived late but we're greeted warmly and checked in as soon as possible. We were even given an upgrade but it was more than what we expected when we actually checked in to the room. We were blown away by the room upgrade and the set up, it just set the standards for the rest of our stay.

The staff at Front office and in Food and Beverage were fantastic and always eager to assist. The Food and Beverage team in particular were always flexible and even let us dine in for our kids when they weren't even open for service and also catered for their special food preparation requirements. Special mention to Mustafa (Restaurant Manager) who went above and beyond for everything. And Menati, Geeta and the chef were all great as well in service.

Terrible Experience at Welcome Hotel by ITC, Ahmedabad

If you're thinking about staying at Welcome Hotel by ITC in Ahmedabad, take my advice and look elsewhere. My experience here was so frustrating that it ruined the start of my trip.

I was visiting Ahmedabad for the first time in 15 years, and after checking out a few hotels, we decided to visit Welcome Hotel. We spoke with the receptionist, who quoted us a price of INR 42,000 for three rooms: two triple-occupancy rooms and one double-occupancy room. She said it was an all-inclusive price, so we told her to hold the rooms while we checked out a couple more options. We came back after about 10-15 minutes to confirm, and to our surprise, the price had suddenly increased by INR 5,000!

When we asked why the price had jumped so quickly, the receptionist said it was because of “less availability of rooms.” This didn't sit right with us, and we tried to discuss it with her, but she was unwilling to negotiate. Frustrated, we asked to speak with a manager. One manager was “in a meeting,” and after a long wait, another manager named Amit finally came over. We explained our issue, but rather than addressing our concerns, he just kept repeating that this was the “best price” and insisted that the receptionist hadn't included the cost of a third mattress in the initial quote.

It was absurd – in any other hotel, “triple occupancy” includes an extra bed or mattress, but they refused to consider this. Even when we asked for a small reduction or at least an acknowledgment of the mistake, Amit was completely rigid and unapologetic. It felt like we were talking to a wall, as he kept repeating himself instead of addressing our concerns.

We ended up sitting there for almost an hour, going in circles, with nothing offered in terms of compensation or even an apology. Compared to other ITC hotels, like the ITC Maratha, the service here was shockingly poor, and it was clear that customer satisfaction was not a priority.

If you’re expecting professional service and transparent pricing, I would honestly advise staying somewhere else in Ahmedabad. ITC management should really take a closer look at how this hotel treats its guests because it’s a disappointing representation of the brand.

This 5-star Welcomhotel by ITC Hotels, Ashram Road, Ahmedabad sits beside the Sabarmati River in the heart of Ahmedabad City, and boasts a gym, a dining option and pastry shop. It is a 15-minute drive from Ahmedabad Airport. It offers free WiFi throughout the property. Some of the rooms are under Renovation, please bear with us.

Decorated in neutral colours, elegant rooms are fitted with warm lighting and carpeted flooring. Each comes with a flat-screen TV, minibar and ironing facilities. See-through glass bathrooms have hot-water showers and a hairdryer. Certain rooms offer river views. All units are non-smoking.

Welcomhotel by ITC Hotels, Ashram Road, Ahmedabad is less than 2.5 km from Sardar Patel Stadium and Hathi Singh Temple. Free parking is available. Designated smoking area is offered.

Guests can exercise with personal trainers at the gym. Enjoy scrumptious buffets and a la carte options, including local delicacies, at the Welcomcafe Ikkat that is open 24 hours a day.

Happy Visiting 🎉🥳🎊
