Also, they have lot of other amenities including pool, outdoor sports, mumbo jumbo for kids, forum (banquet), Wave Garden, Axe 🪓 Hatchet house etc.

We did our breakfast in their 24x7 cube lounge,, buffet needs more changes,, we go for À la carte and tried Indian Nasthas breakfast - pranthas were yummy with great quantity. Also, tried in room dining - chilly panner (were costly), corn crispy and french fries.
They do have other amenities including spa & saloon (a unique service). Overall experience was good just we were not happy with their amendments policy as we did a mistake of wrong date while booking for 2nd day and they charge us 1000rs,, that was not good part from their end to serve their customers.

Regarding hotel location - it is very far away from city, almost 20km from Ahmedabad station. Shela is a village and another reason that the Tap water supply in hotel is somewhat salty, u may feel while teeth brushing or during bathing. Water quality should improve

Remarks - Big improvement required in their services as they are very slow since many reminders were given for every single service.

The rooms and ambience was good however, locking system was bad. They had issued same room key card to other person by mistake so multiple ppl could access the same room even though it was locked/ latched from inside. Time for the hotel management to re-visit thier security system & revise the door locks. If latched from inside it shouldn't open even if someone has the key card from the outside.

Very nice experience of stay and also i turned out to be a member as the food and hospitality is awesome. Mr Vishal, Mr Mukesh, Ms Harikiran have supported in everything and thanking them for smooth stay. They have kept everything available keeping in mind of kids and senior citizens.

Also for room cleaning Mr Nageshwar also was very nice.

Hope to look forward for great membership ahead.

Worst stay checked in occupied room at 1: 30 am and team was laughing even after know it all, Mr. Ajay and Mr. Rohit at night.
Morning team FNB is not ready to
listen  Mr. Santosh and wants to argue for everything even Mr. Yadav FNB manager is also not willing to speak or wanted to know or willing to assist.
I had requested in night to meet GM in morning and team is saying he will come after 10:00 am along with FNB manager.
Not really sure how you all are running the hotel, some anticipation and willing to assist guest is must.

Hotel industry is known for it which entire Wyndham Ahmedabad hotel is lacking.

No warmth no welcome only faces which don't know any thing and not willing to assist.

So sorry to say this all but it seems know one is interested for guest in that hotel.

A very beautiful stay. I stayed there a conference happening in their premises. Staff was good, rooms were spacious, they can go extra mile for cleaning things inside room.
All over pleasant experience!

Great hotel. They have very big and spacious rooms with an inbuilt kitchen too. The staff is very helpful and polite.
Restaurant serves good north Indian food and continental (I tried these two).
Would definitely recommend to other travellers.

Wide variety of amenities. Cool property. The rooms are quite good. Services are reasonably well done. They have a good library accessible for patrons, thanks to the adjacent club. There are four eating joints. The food at each one of them is super delicious. Even the plating of each dish is done efficiently. Overall experience is way better than most of the grand hotels in Ahmedabad.

Rooms are spacious. Fine linen.
Droplets of water falling from AC.
Very good view from the balcony.
Even though location is interior, very calm during night.

It was a great experience at the Cube Lounge Restaurant in Wyndham Hotel in ClubO 7.The staff   was very courteous and helpful.We simply loved it.The PR Executive Ms Ranjana and her team helped us in every possible way.Thank U for everything.We would love to visit again.

Very bad experience, please never book your stay in this hotel, lack of hospitable staff who'll ignore everything you say, ridiculous policies, broken ACs in the room. Not a 5 start hotel in any case. Beware before booking and this is the same reason you won't find this property on goibibo. Never book.

Such a bad experience with the hotel and even with the staff. Firstly, our room locked and not going to open. We called staff many times but not able to open the locke. Finally staff mamber came with laptop and opend but still it was not working then finally they changed our room...... response was very slow...not advisable to stay in this hotel.....it's just show off....

I stayed here with my wife and was ultimate experience. Staff is front office staff. excellent and co-operative. The property is well maintained and luxurious as well.
Also jain food is very delicious.  So many options are available in jain food . Hygiene food

It wa a wonderful experience at the Cube Lounge Restaurant in the Wyndham Hotel in ClubO 7 in Ahmedabad.L9vwly place to stay.The staff was so courteous and helpful.We loved our entire stay here Love to come back again.Thank to the whole team of Cube Lounge.

Totally a new experience. Very spacious. No bad odour any where. Food and refreshments were great and would rate it to 4.5 out of 5. Everything well set. Certain areas need some proper maintenance especially the washrooms and the ceiling area. Overall a great place to be at. Staff was well disciplined and courteous. Thank you very much Club O7.

One of the worst property I have stayed so far in my life. Everything is mess starting from the reception to the check in to check out.
There are enough front desk staff but only one guy serve the cusotmer. Rest are sitting and Not assisting the cusotmer. They didn’t orient about the room facility and forget facility they even didn’t inform WiFi password also. There was constant leak of flush water. I have informed them thrice to either repair it or completely off the tap so water not get wasted. But none visited in 24 hours. The bathroom is very poorly maintained. When you on the hand shower there will be leak from overhead shower and there is no way you can stop it. While check out I have informed all these things and they are arrogant to answer and make facies. I wish the management review their quality and customer care policies.
This is the my longest review so management can understand how bad is the service. Thanks
Spacious rooms, water pressure in the shower leaves you frustrated, hard salty water. Abysmal service and staff, especially the in room dining.
Well this is a fab place , looks like heaven and than this is what everyone should have an experience,  this is simply great place to stay

Disappointment is barely a word for me. The ground staff is super inexperienced and give you cold stares when asked a question. We came in from Mumbai and requested for an early check-in (which I understand is subjected to availability). However we chose to wait in the waiting area. We weren't even treated hospitably. I am not sure which good hotel would not even bother to communicate with your check in guest's and just keep walking around as if no one exists. Moreover, the nightmare was when we had booked a triple occupancy in the Suite room and when we called in for an extra bed almost 6-7 times no one provided us with the bed. The 3rd person had to sleep in the living room. Literally had to call 15 times to the reception area for the call to be picked up once. Please train your ground staff or hire a new staff!! The hospitality of the hotel literally shadows the beautiful rooms and all the other positive listings.

Service quality is really upto the mark. The room, bed, bathroom are very pleasant n clean. The swimming pools are the best attraction here. They have an indoor n outdoor pool which is available whole day ! Food quality is also good. The room interior n color is very basic, the view from bedroom is not really attractive. That's the only reason to give 4 star.
The room size is grand and it has good tennis courts

I would say that it was just average stay. I am surprised that the hotel isn't upto the mark as compared to other wyndham properties. Room accessories had leakages, TV wasn't working. Rooms are quite spacious though.
The club 0 7 and it facilities are pathetic. They could not even produce the transaction history of the amount billed on the guest card. The gaming facilities etc are just a way shell out money from customers. I mean after obtaining the guest card they would still charge for club entry juat for nothing. Hopeless.
Otherwise the hotel staff was fine and food is just average. You can find much more better place with amentities to stay in Ahemdabad.

Our group of 23 people visited this hotel in June 2023. Easy check in, nice hospitality,  wide variety in breakfast and high tech rooms .
Here grand suites are unique , so worth to book it...
Our family is thankful to team Wyanndham Ahmedabad,  especially Mr Ratheesh and Ms Pooja on front desk.

rooms r good, we took suite, but stuff very slow in general. reach them by call  reception it task. in restorant food a la carte is very good.
breakfast buffet is not good. and horrible part was and unacceptable as well expired stinky chiken! ham and stinky boiled eggs!!!
I was first point to give 4 star due slow service but today issje with spoiled food change opinions abt this hotel.

Some people here are talking nonsense. (At least to us) The staff was overly friendly and as hotel guests we were allowed entrance to all the Club facilities like the pool, gym, badminton etc. Room was super clean and well maintained and the food in several restaurants plus the breakfast were really enjoyable. A "commercial" or capitalistic vibe rather than a genuine hospitality can definetly be felt but that's probably normal and not to be changed at such a price rate - plus the facilities make up for it. Great stay overall!
Very nice facility and services. Great food and value for money for refreshment.

The hotel is very outside of Ahemdabad with limited connectivity in the morning and night. Airport and railway station are far away from this location.
Bathroom was not good, why it is being called five star hotel.

Pro - The Hotel is maintained well. Rooms are great and value for money. Location is off the main roads, with facilities like hospitals that are quite the distance away.
Housekeeping is prompt and courteous.
Hotel guests require a swimming pool pass from the reception. Huge outdoor pool with kiddie pool to the side. Lots of other facilities available to club members.
Need for improvement - The exhaust from the men's washroom on the ground floor  vents into the kiddie play area, making it somewhat nauseating.
Inadequate facilities and management by staff during breakfast. Butter was never given (no reply from staff till the end of breakfast), drinking water bottles ( came after repeated requests), made to order eggs delivered to some other table ( repeatedly requested atleast 5 times), basic coffee preparation was a challenge.
All in all, every hotel has its needs for improvement, Grand O7 was an overall value for money.
Definitely not a 5 star hotel,  not sure why its mentioned as a 5 star hotel, way behind ITC Narmada and Taj , should be downgraded to 3 star category, Ramada is much better than this hotel
Food quality is 3d class after order allmost 1 hour is waiting and rate is 5 star servise 0 star..

Large variety of activities to take part in. Food joints are very good as well. The pools are made sure to be very clean by the rules you must abide by when using them. One member can bring in many guests, a good deal. Lawns for sports and even a walking track is available. Nice place, will come again for sure.

This review is entirely dedicated to the exceptional, selfless service rendered to me at a time of crisis!! I am was stuck inside a Car in the flooded streets of Bopal late in the evening. The evening shift manager on duty, on 22nd July 2023, went out of his way to come over with a rescue vehicle and pick me up from waist deep water!

We often stay in top hotels and appreciate their service in times of comfort. But this was one of those situations that has left me with a deep sense of Gratitude!

Thank you Vishal (I hope I got your name right), Thank you Team Wyndham!

One of the best destination for weekend getaway. Especially Chef Ravindra Nath savoured our tummy with mouth watering delicacies and Mr Pushpendra served each dish with great love and fullfiled all our needs. The facilitate like gym, swimming pool, game zone were awesome and all staff are damn friendly. Food is excellent and ambience is awesome. The room was damn clean and view was great. Even the reception people helped and favoured us throughout our stay. Looking to visit soon.
Service is good , rooms are neat and clean food is avarage

Hotel is located in shela , not so good  area but hotel is very nearby to bopal so it doesn't hurt much .

Rooms are nice and tidy , but pricier for the space provided in the room . Amenities are provided in room include frigde , locker and chimney to count on mainly .

Service is good , people are attentive and helping so you would not have much to complaint about .

The is a club attached to property which is club07 , very good amenities in club which has good indoor/outdoor activities and good places to eat ( one cafe and 2 restaurants ) . In room dining options are also good .

Overall stay was good , just that it would've been better if it was in some areas inside the city .

Good property to stay. Courteous staff, nice breakfast spread. 👍🏾 to housekeeping team very prompt and responsive thank you Kaushal for your quick and good service.

Negative point - hotel location too far from city centre

It's a big club. Good maintenance is seen throughout the year. The gym is nice and spacious.I removed 1 star b3cuase the swimming pool is just nasty. I mean the color is so bad that you can see it!. Else the club is pretty good . parking is probably the best in ahmedabad. Lots of space! Huge swimming pool. Lots of activities for kids and adults. The food is probably the only drawback. It's very mediocre.
Nice ambience, big and clean room, hotel staff is very supportive
It was a great relaxing stay there with good food. Only drawback is that it's a bit outside of city.

Top class palce! Stayed there for 2 nights for doing a programme for a client. This is a top class club / resort.
Rooms superb and amenities great, its an all suits set up. The grounds are huge, lots of car park, lots of work in progress. The lawns are ideal for a wedding / event, the sounds are blocked out by good sound proofing in the rooms. The banquet, conference halls all are best in class.
But..... service is a little slow in the rooms. Its a big resort, need lots more people in all departments for service to reach. The lifts from the lobby tends to get crowded if there is an event or a conference.

Very very very pathetic service since last more than 20 days they are not even replying about my refund issue...and not even confronting and replying ....realy i hate this place ...staff..and service ....initially acchi achhi baate karenge than at the time of refunding amount no response at all..my rating would be 0 star.From my side it is one of thw worst service provider..

We stayed here for a day as there was a triathlon organised. It was a wonderful and comfortable stay. They gave us a good package. It's a good well maintained place with spacious rooms, delicious food and courteous staff. I wish I could spend some more time...... It's definitely a wonderful place to relax and enjoy..... far away from the city crowd!👍

Abode of comfort.

Once you reach a city, one thing most people look for is a comfortable place to stay at.
Club 07, is perfectly that.
The rooms were clean and spacious and oh, so comfortable. The staff are well behaved. Trust me when I tell you this, you don't need to go out of the hotel to have a good time, there are activities to indulge in spread out in the hotel. Badminton, bowling, table tennis, swimming pool and their own theatre, VR gaming, all you have to do is choose your activity.
My favorite part of the stay was the cafe, I have friends who are anime addicts, the moment I walked in I couldn't help but notice all the anime posters, that was a moment I wished my pals could see it, they would definitely geek out, also the other walls were filled up with movie and series posters, that is where my inner geek burst out in joy. Whoever designed that cafe, thank you, you have great taste.

To sum it all up, this was a stay that will be etched in my memory for a long time.

One of the best trips I ever had with my extended family. Now all of them want to go back to this club again and again. The club is just awesome. They upgraded our rooms from deluxe to executive. The rooms are spacious, beautiful and well maintained. The staff was courteous and helpful. The breakfast had good variety and the taste was great. Pooris, Dosas and Uttapam were made to order and served hot and fresh.
This club has very well maintained 3 pools. One outdoor Olympic sized pool, a kids pool and an indoor pool. Pool services are complimentary with stay and if you like swimming don't forget to bring your costume.
There is also a kids play area, very big, well maintained with lots of things for the kids to play with. It was chargeable for a nominal charge of Rs. 118 per hour. My kids just loved it.
IPL match screening was also going on. If I am ever staying in Ahmedabad again this is going to be our place of choice. If you just wish to relax, spend some time with family over weekend this is the place to go.
We visited the club again this year and the property still amazes us.

Huge property. Little outside city but perhaps thats the good parts. Olympic size swimming pool, open space, open air theatre etc  make it even more attractive. Rooms are excellent in terms of size, interiors, furniture placements, bathroom aesthetics, spacing etc. Given that it ia a big club, room service can at times be a little sloppy but is something that can be worked around with some beforehand thinking. Small play area for kids is a part of the package too. Food seemed average but that might be a one off thing.

Overall a good place to be away for a while yet enjoy a stylish stay. Good for organizing family events, cultural programs and even office outings to some extent.

The Property was good enough to have a normal stay. But The property before Wyndham was much more rich than current. Didn't expected such changes low category after Wyndham take over. Rooms finishing are not as before. Room as not bad but they vere much more in good conditions under O7

The level of hospitality is excellent. Clean and comfortable rooms with the best amenities carering to your every need. Food has lot of varieties and is a pleasure for the tongue. Gym yoga playgrounds swimming pool cater to your fitness needs to the fullest. Air conditioning is great. Auditorium Banquet Hall conference hall are there for entertainment. Moreover the management is very friendly and much flexible to customers request and needs. Pleasure to be here. Hope to visit the place again.

Sub standard low class hotel, the toilets in suite rooms are worst than the ones at railway stations. THERE IS NO TUB IN SUITE ROOM. The only advantage is club is attached to it which has activities.
The breakfast buffet is pathetic.
No manpower,  no tables,  food is undercooked. When a marriage party arrives it better you buy food from any of the retaurents rather than having it here.

Great getaway! We are visiting fur the second time.. the quality of rooms had gone down since we visited the last time but I guess that's because of the holiday season rush.

We enjoyed using the Olympic swimming pool and state of the art gymn everyday, it also has a Badminton, tennis court, kids play area, video games, squash and spa..

We loved the buffet breakfasts and kind service through out well long stay..

In addition, we got a crazy deal on go ibibo for 5 nights for a couple and our two children under 3 years for a mere Rs. 17,000 which was a steal.. all these facilities for this price, felt worth it!

Things to remember:
1. There is nothing in sight. No general store, no medical store, even the restaurants are far off and in case you don't have your car, it is better for you to carry your basic utilities with you..

2. Each room has a refrigerator and a kitchen sink. You can stock some basic eatables, curds, milk etc. For your kids. My wife did an excellent job of stocking our bags with eatables. This might sound a bit cheap, but we managed to save up on those extra bucks on lunches and dinners.. we did have the dinner buffet on a couple of days though which was fairly good. I felt like the food was a bit stale but we liked it.

3. Their odd-hour checkin time is the only draw back. Who keeps check-in at 2pm? We had to wait and kill some time at the airport so that we could get nearer to check-in time. And from my last memory, the front desk was rude at the time of check in. This time though, they were kind and polite!

In the restaurant if you have Vaibhav serving you, he will steal your heart with his kind hearted generous services we were fortunate to have him on both our trips. Really loved the guy! He's a standout!

Enjoy your stay at O7 and try and fully exploit all their club services.. thats the whole point!

Wonderful Hotel with great food. Had a issue with the first suite I got but the management and employees were quick to handle the issue and provided me with a new room and it was great. The breakfast was great reminded me of home. Will come back

I must say its one of the best hotels i have been to... The staff are amazing and helpful. Its a best place to stay with kids. We stayed for four days though on one day there was some technical issue with power the staff arranged the hotel car for my little one as he was cranky and crying for air. Cleanliness,Food, Ambience everything was at its best. I highly recommend this hotel.

Great rooms. Good quality. Great service. Rooms will give you feel like you are in 5 star hotel plus amenities. The service starts from welcome drink to till you leave the hotel. Only thing is, it is not on the main road. If it was on SG highway. It would have got higher value and better rank

Worst experience ever. Hospitality is dead. Management was rude and very shrewd with us. We ourselves had to pick our luggage and drop home while staff was gossiping n laughing. Receptionist was not responding while we were waiting for her to keep the phone down ( we waited for 15 mins and left as she was busy) .
There were ants on our bed while we went there and we were blamed for the ants on d bed while d room service took 2 hours to come and clean the bed. Our beds were cleaned by 2 a.m. In the night.   11 floor hotel and no staff help available on the floor. Every time we had to call the reception to get things done ( which took more then an hour to get things done)
They do not have d facility to handle a big crowd ( weddings and big functions) and even the room service did not sterlize the mugs..just washed it with water... Worst worst worst experience ever.

When I visited this place we felt very familiar behaviour from reception staff side, they gave us early check-in with lovely smile so we are so grateful they treated us family. Thank you reception team.
Club Very well equipped n maintained.  Rooms are quite spacious.

Pathetic service. Do not stay at this hotel. Their service is horrible. The staff is pathetic. We had a book for days but they forced us to check out within 2 days. Do not make the mistake of staying at this hotel.

Very good hotel to stay. The adjacent club facilities are also good. It's little far from city center. The food is good. Also it's has got a liqueur shop in the basement. True treasure in Ahmedabad if you get permit to drink.

This is not a resort it's a normal hotel foe stay

And services is not good
Food's is so expensive
Behavior of staff is so rude.

Very bed experience.
Not advisable to stay.
Rooms are nice with a good view.  Service is a bit lax, where things get done only on reminder.  Hygeine can be much better.

Poor... worst.... experience ever ....
Room AC is always on auto mode temperature set on 27 degree...AC don't work (that's why Hotel set a celeing fan on Room) No cooling...

After several call to reception.. engineer came and said AC temperature 🌡️ is not to be set manually ...this is set on auto mode

We request to all...before taking any rooms ...plz check AC in room

Checked in at Wyndham Shela AMD close to midnight. First room had stains on the sheets, broken frame, disgusting fridge. Second room had hair in the bed, stains and dirt in the sheet. Third room much of the same. Struggling with 2 sleeping kids at midnight to find a clean room isn’t something I’d expect for the amount each room is per night.

Management assured me multiple times they would reclean/take care of the issues. This didn’t happen until I informed them I was checking out early due to this. They refused to refund the unused nights.

Plenty of other properties in Ahemdabad that live up to the promise of a 5 star hotel. Check out any other one in AMD, stay away from this dump.
Worst management.. Worst behaviour with customers.. I suggest you don't go for it. The hotel is a very old one.. With this price u can find the best hotels in Ahmedabad..

We checked in at around 6 in the morning and wanted sleep for a while as we had to attend a friends wedding later in the afternoon, we could not sleep for minute because of some noice in the room, maybe from the sealing which was horrifying, the wash room was stinking and the 2 reception staff guys were so rude and lied on our face.. worst experience ever
We had been there for a conference so we saw only the convention centre and that was fabulous, the food was top class

Good property, the food is also good. Nice swimming pool. There is closed swimming pool too. The Gym and other indoor sport also also here. Other than this not much here to spend your time; you need to visit city. Better to book Ola/Uber car while coming back to hotel from city. Auto is not advisable.
Hotel was quite good and hospitality was also good. Behaviour of the stall was very polite

Best in class club in Ahmedabad,
Club O7 is your ultimate destination to enjoy, rejuvenate and grab your slice of life. Club O7 is the largest city club in Gujarat spread across lush ample acres of land in a perfect strategic locale, enchanting you into a world of supreme joy and splendid beauty soothing your body and soul. Presenting you a world free of pollution, stress, heck n deck of this mechanical life and Club O7 introduces you to a life kings size.
Club O7 extends an opportunity to explore your style quotient and providing surplus fascinating avenues to rediscover your own self.

Best in class staff, so polite and helpful.
3 restaurants,
GYM,
National Level swimming 🏊 pool.
And a lot facilities.
Must visit,

An excellent place to stay with very good amenities to enjoy inside the hotel and have a very good variety in breakfast as well. The inhouse restaurant is also not very costly like other 5 star properties. The hotel is just outside the city and you need cab for every place to go.

Luxurious feel with prompt services were the hallmark of my stay here during Navratri. Loved the fact that they served me fruits and lassi promptly, while I was fasting, even though they were not part of the buffet. Hotel is far removed from the city chaos, it's location in a serene area ensures that you can hear peacock's call also in your hotel room also!

Decent rooms but average experience, not upto the mark.

Pros- I have taken executive suit room and it was spacious. Room had a small kitchen area, living room and bed room.

Cons- Place is not in the city it's little far off...I had a work on SG road which was 6-7 km away,
Road to reach hotel was bad...
To my shock found cockroach in the room
Have told reception but it didn't work so had to escalate for cleaning.
Intercom phone was not working etc...

Overall average experience not upto the mark if you stay in 5 star property.

Not happy with resturant team. Had been here. However no issues with room and banquet team. Excellent job to them.  Restaurant team please confirm with the front office for details if any confusion. Don't make customers run here and there. It spoils the hotel name...
Nagendra is one diligent person and takes the job at hand seriously with a smile. His housekeeping skills makes the stay even more comfortable.

Must go. Rejoice be in touch with nature play workout swim get inspired. Would love to vist this place as many times as possible. Good international regional and traditional food with high quality. Hospitality and service is top notch.
A five star property and Really have a Club which is so attractive,a big swimming pool,Spa,badminton court,gym,and more, i stayed here 3 nights and all staff is polite.

It's one of the newest clubs in the city. It's a completely new property built on the outskirts of the Ahmedabad city. If ur visiting Ahmedabad and planning to stay here while frequenting the walled city, it's a little far and you would need a dedicated vehicle/transport for the same. Staff and service is very good.
One of best hotels in India... Really loved the way they treated us...

I am giving this star only because I have to. Pathetic food quality in restaurant and service quality is even worse. You should know how many chapatis you will eat before you order your food or else you would spend the entire evening waiting for the chapati:) Needless to state that the same caterers will serve you in the events that you would organize. The club isn't cheaper compared to the remote location it is situated at. Go for it if you have money in excess.

Great service! Staff was friendly as well as helpful. The rooms and the hotel was nice and clean and well kept! The food was great as well. I would definitely recommend this place to friends and family

Just great place. If you get member discount then IT IS THE place. Better to stay a little far for the great food, rooms quality and giant swimming pool. Families can spend 2 to 3 days inside the club itself.
Very nice hotel for stay with delicious food and verious amenities included like swimming pool , indoor club , gym , cricket lawn etc all in all nice place to spend some quality time.

Totally  mismanagement , I went to attend a marriage function , I asked to related Staff to inquiry of Host.
Reception staff tell me We have no information about the Host. Who had already booked Wyndham .but all the staff doesn't interested to assist Guest.
Someone Lady staff was appointed to assist Guest, but She ask me that , I have so many guests , I will not Check List !! You Should have to contact your Host !!
How Surprising !!!
Sorry to give you Less than One Star.

Grand O7 is a perfect upscale place to have weddings and other functions. Rooms are available in bulk and are very luxurious high class. The club has kids sections including a gaming cafe. Big swimming pool.

Good place to stay but the food is very stale.. very nice swimming pool u will love it... they only allow members to use gaming areas so u can only use pool from ammenities if you are not a club member... spacious rooms... overall nice place..

We love to visit here once in a year as a non member guests....not only.kids love to go here but older one also as so many things to do here for full on entertainment and enjoyment with your family.... Theatre, swimming pool, indoor games, big park inside boundaries to play cricket.... Kids zone for toddlers .... All safety measurements are taken..... Evening snack ..... Buffet in evening .... Rooms are also available for stay and destination partying.
Good for luxury stay.. reception staff specially Pooja and Anchal are very helpful while doing checkin and check out.

It is a vast club consisting of all your needs. It is a different kind of world, some different city or something cz it's very huge. You can complete your daily foot exercise just by completing a whole round of O7. Great experience overall!

Very bad hotel
Hijab is not allowed in swimming pool
I have taken videos don't stay in this hotel pls pls pls

Its a nice place to visit with family and your loved once. Its a combination of hotel and club.. Hence it has all the amenities.. Like games for children, gym, indoor and outdoor swimming pools nice rooms with good ambience

The rooms are absolutely lovely. The location can be hard to find if you don't have Google maps. The service is pretty elegant, but slow. The activities all have prices, except the swimming pool and gym.

Fortune Landmark Ahmedabad, part of the ITC hotel group, is a well-regarded property known for its blend of luxury, comfort, and convenience. Here's why it stands out:

1. Strategic Location: Conveniently situated near key business hubs and tourist attractions, making it ideal for both corporate and leisure travelers.

2. Elegant Accommodations: Spacious, well-furnished rooms and suites with modern amenities to ensure a comfortable stay.

3. Diverse Dining Options: Known for its excellent restaurants offering a range of cuisines, from Indian specialties to global flavors.

4. Business Facilities: Equipped with state-of-the-art conference rooms, banquet spaces, and a business center, perfect for events and meetings.

5. Recreational Amenities: A well-maintained fitness center and other leisure facilities for relaxation.

Fortune Landmark is a reliable choice for a seamless and satisfying stay in Ahmedabad, combining warm hospitality with contemporary amenities.

Stayed in Fortune Landmark Ahmedabad from afternoon of 23 Jan 24 till morning of 26 Jan 24. Stay was comfortable and staff courteous and helpful. Food was good but two days I had to go early. For 25 Jan Morning I requested for packed breakfast of 4 sandwiches, one apple and a banana, to my surprise there were two small triangular bread slices with tomato. One pomegranate one apple and one a kiwi. How can one eat kiwi without cutting it and how does one expect to eat pomegranate in packed breakfast. PATHETIC is the word. I had to check out at 0400 on 26 Jan 24 (today) since I had bad experience I specially requested Mr Bharat that I want just four bread slices nicely toasted with butter nothing else. I checked before leaving. It was again one and half bread slices cut in three warmed not toasted cold had butter kept separately and same fruits as day before. Packing was poorest I’ve ever seen, even street food vendors do better packing. SO I HAD TO LEAVE THE BREAKFAST. Mr Bharat did not even bother to get two toasts organised. Pathetic. Even after specific instructions one can’t do small thing then you better close the hotel. My first and last stay in this useless place.

Hotel Fortune Landmark in Ahmedabad unfortunately, it fell well below my expectations. From the moment I walked into the lobby, I could sense an air of neglect.

The room I was assigned to was far from satisfactory. The furnishings were outdated, and the overall cleanliness left much to be desired. The carpets looked like they hadn't been cleaned in ages, and there was a musty odor that lingered throughout the room. The bed linens were worn out, and I had concerns about their hygiene.

Hotel Fortune Landmark was a disappointment. The lack of upkeep, and outdated facilities made for an unpleasant experience. I would strongly advise against considering this hotel if you're looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay in Ahmedabad.

Keep it up.!

After stay Review:
Generally, I do not leave any hotel reviews unless the experience is extremely disappointing OR exceptionally fabulous.
At hotel fortune landmark , our stay was a delightful experience.
The staff went above and beyond to please the guests and we were taken care of very well. The accommodation manager (VP) Mr Rahul Ghag arranged a pleasant surprise of a Room upgrade for us with chocolates, cookies, nuts and some snacks waiting for us in the room. Ms. Manisha from the reception has an extremely charming and professional attitude towards guests and she helped us with late check-in during our 5 night stay here. My missus was feeling sick and Ms. Manisha promptly arranged for a hot water bag for her which was a great gesture.

The restaurant manager at zodiac Mr Nagendra (from Mysore) is a fantastic personality as he initiates warm and  cordial conversations with guests to make them feel at home. Even small requests like coffee style is handled by him personally while Ms Remi arranged for Poha, khandvi and customised coffee for us on a few occasions. Not to forget Mr Aman at the breakfast buffet as he was very polite but attentive to our needs. The food is top notch quality and the selection of buffet items are versatile and interesting.

Mr. Kamlesh tiwari(From Uttarakhand) At Earthen Owen arranged for a beautiful anniversary cake with flower arrangement for us and reserved a special table overseeing the Sabarmati river from the top floor of the hotel. Chef negi ram prepared sumptuous finger licking food for us and the fresh Rabdi is to die for. Our personal wait staff Mr. Rahul Looked after us zealously and provided us with a round of complimentary mocktails.

The staff like Mr. Mithilesh from earthen Owen and porter Mr. VAJERAM are the soul of this hotel who have been working here for 20+ years and given their life and blood to this warm hotel experience.

Overall the staff is exceptionally helpful and informative. And they have an impressive zeal to serve you.
All this is possible with the personal attention of the GM Mr. Anil Tripathi
Hotel Location is great, and tariff is extreme value for money
Lastly, I would suggest a quick refresh of the carpets in the corridors that would improve the outlook of the property manifolds.

Original Review: After reading postive reviews, We are delighted to stay 5 nights in your luxury hotel from 12 August 2023 onwards. We are coming on a personal visit from Australia for our wedding anniversary on 14th August and we wish our stay would be as pleasant and fantastic as most other guests who have left extremely positive ratings for you. We will be looking forward to meet your GM Mr. Anil and VP Mr. Rohit And we are excited to dine in your restaurants where chef Nathu and Dalveer Singh are serving amazingly scrumptious VEGETARIAN and finger licking dum ka Khana meals. The best thing that attracted us towards your property, is your consistent and warm service quality , cleanliness, and location of the hotel that we could read from all your reviews.  See you guys soon!!  for an amazing experience as this is the first time that we are coming to explore Ahmedabad!!

It has been asked to embellish the room and same has been agreed upon from your end but when confirmation call was made,it was told that it is not prepared and can not be prepared now, when request was made for upgrade it was told that if it is available hotel will be happy to provide the same. We reached at hotel around 1:30 am on 1st jan, 2023 in our marriage outfits. When we again request for upgrade we were told that hotel is packed however hardly 2 to 3 cars were parked outside. We were given room no 417.When we reached in the room, ceiling light was blinking. When contacted on reception your maintenance guy came in. He checked and talked on a phone about this for a while and voila solution was provided that TURN OFF THE SWITCH AND IT WON'T BLINK. When we asked what other options are we were told he needed to get on a bed and change it, at that time also no replacement of the room was suggested/provided. As it was 2:00 am and that too after being tired from all such rituals we decided to "KEEP THE SWITCH OFF" resentfully. Not expected such pathetic experience from one of the prestigious hotels.

the Earthen Oven restaurant at Fortune Landmark is a must-visit for anyone looking for a delicious and authentic dining experience. The restaurant has a warm and inviting atmosphere that perfectly complements the food. The menu features a wide range of North Indian dishes cooked in a traditional earthen oven, which gives the food a unique and rich flavor.

In addition to the food, the service provided by Mithilesh Jha Ji is truly exceptional. He is attentive, friendly, and always willing to go above and beyond to ensure that his customers have an enjoyable experience. His knowledge of the menu is extensive, and he is more than happy to provide recommendations and answer any questions you may have.

The location is good, being that the Sabarmati river front is a 2-3 minutes walk.

The food is fine.
Breakfast is nothing spectacular but it doesn't disappoint either, all the basic dishes are available.
However, a few one's like French toast, bacon and omelette, need some serious improvement. The sambar was really good and so were all the bakery items.

Dinner was very good with the non- vegetarian starters being the highlight.
They serve fresh water fish which is extremely delicious and well cooked. The chicken is tender and of very good quality.

The rooms are of a decent size for 2 adults.
There is no bath, just a shower, but it is very satisfying.
The staff is prompt and polite.
We were given a box of chocolates twice which was a nice surprise!

The sight-seeing spots aren't very close by but the taxi services are good so no issues with that.
All in all, it was a good deal
We went there for a buffet dinner.  food was great but I feel it was blend for my taste, because i like spicy food. My husband felt the same. Service was very good.

Fantastic service from top to bottom all the staff were extremely pleasant and helpful the food was fantastic by far the best hotel experience me and the family had during our visit to india. Thank you all for making our stay a memorable one

Great hotel, well behaved, courteous, caring and friendly staff. They will take care of your needs no matter when and what. Right from picking up your luggage, offering welcome drink, taking care of your on arrival comfort, helping you select the correct rooms, to assisting you in breakfast and cleaning up, you will find quality all through. The rooms, the interiors, toiletries, cleanliness, all are great. And most important they are always there to listen for the feedback without any denial mode. True hospitality!!!!

Well the rooms are nice , food quality served was good too. The served dishes in the room was very well quantity wise too. Which generally in the 4* 5* hotels is an issue. Breakfast had a good variety as well. Rates wise also it is worthy. Overall I don’t find anything where I deduct a star. So rating it as full.

Wisited last week stay was excellent staff is so prompt in service reception staff is very friendly they try to help out in every aspect welcomes with a smile. My special thanks to Mr. Khan from housekeeping and Mahak madam from reception. They were so helpful during my entire stay.
Kudos to entire team.

Nice Hotel, Specially Earthen Oven Food
Cababs are very Tasty, Roof top View is awesome.

We stayed in the hotel from 30th Dec to 2nd Jan. The cleanliness of the hotel was very dissapointing. The linen of the room was filthy and not dry-cleaned properly. When we asked to change, it took them 1 hour to sort it out. This made me wonder what a struggle it was to get clean linen. There was no soap in my bathroom when we checked into the room.

This is not really expected from the 5-star hotel.

The food spread was good and delicious.
Personal attention was given to all the guests

We were a little disappointed since it was my Dad's 100th Birthday and there was no special decoration to add to the grandeur. This should have been done voluntarily by the hotel

Overall it was nice

I booked 2 rooms for my parents their stay was extremely great. They mentioned a lot about hotel after they visited. Food was really flavoursome. Entire team was helpful to them for their entire stay special mention for Mr Rahul and Ms Mahak from reception they were so calm , friendly , and sweet towards them. My mother liked the tart offered by Ms. Mahak. Thank you guys for making their stay memorable. I strongly recommend the hotel to everyone visiting Ahmedabad.

Good place, not big and grand enough for a 5 star rating. But service is excellent. They have very good food. Lots of options. Biryani, Dimsums, Thai curry was awesome and finger linking good. Breakfast spread was decent, dosas were good too. Complimentary fruits provided in room was cherry on the icing.

Located on walking distance from sabarmati river front , room was clean and comfortable but there is no balcony and view from room is not remarkable.
Staff were welcoming well behaved and friendly.
Food: I had breakfast spread which was included in stay.
It was really nice with ample amount of choice.
WiFi provided was really good.
Overall staying here was nice experience.

As this is one of the ITC hotels, the services and food quality is awesome.
Very well behaved and supportive staff, starting from gate keeper to a manager.

A Perfect Stay at Fortune Landmark Hotel in Ahmedabad!

I recently had the pleasure of staying at the Fortune Landmark Hotel in Ahmedabad, and I can confidently say that it was an exceptional experience from start to finish. Every aspect of my stay exceeded my expectations, and I highly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting Ahmedabad.

From the moment I arrived, the staff greeted me warmly and made me feel instantly welcome. The check-in process was seamless, and the staff was attentive, efficient, and professional throughout my stay. Their commitment to exceptional service truly stood out.

The rooms at Fortune Landmark Hotel are spacious, elegantly decorated, and immaculately clean. My room offered a stunning view of the city, and the amenities provided were top-notch. The bed was incredibly comfortable, ensuring a restful night's sleep, and the bathroom was well-appointed with modern fixtures and luxurious toiletries.

One of the highlights of my stay was the exceptional dining experience. The hotel offers a variety of dining options, each serving delicious cuisine. The breakfast buffet was extensive, featuring a wide range of options to cater to different tastes. The quality of the food was outstanding, and the service was prompt and attentive.

The hotel's facilities are also worth mentioning. The fitness center is well-equipped with modern equipment, allowing guests to maintain their workout routines. The rooftop swimming pool provided a refreshing escape from the bustling city, offering breathtaking views of Ahmedabad. Additionally, the business center and meeting rooms are well-designed and equipped, making it an ideal choice for business travelers.

What truly sets Fortune Landmark Hotel apart is the exceptional level of service provided by the staff. They consistently went above and beyond to ensure my comfort and satisfaction, anticipating my needs and offering personalized assistance whenever required. Their warm hospitality and attention to detail truly made my stay memorable.

The hotel's location is another advantage. It is centrally located, making it convenient to explore the city's attractions and business districts. Additionally, the hotel provides easy access to transportation, ensuring hassle-free travel throughout Ahmedabad.

In conclusion, my stay at Fortune Landmark Hotel in Ahmedabad was nothing short of perfect. The combination of excellent service, luxurious accommodations, delectable dining, and convenient location make it an outstanding choice for both business and leisure travelers. I cannot recommend this hotel enough and look forward to returning in the future.

It's been the go-to place whenever am in ahmedabad. Comfortable, hygienic and luxurious.

The rooms are way too spacious. They have designed the rooms to give them a suite look. All amenities in place. The biggest pull for me is their enormous breakfast spread. I always end up over eating 😀

The check-in  and check out process are smooth. Welcome drink, late night at check-in was a surprise!

Definitely a very good hotel in Ahmedabad, if it is not the best.
Rooms were well maintained
You will not get here any  extravaganza of jacuzzi bathtubs or herbal spa. But what they have given is given properly. Neat and clean room, bathroom. You ask for something it is delivered. One thing i advised them is to keep the towels at a upper place as waste water splashes may fall in towels in the under basin counter which doesn't feels hygienic.
Yes the best part of the hotel was the complimentary breakfast which was probably one of the best I can remember. Location is very good as everything was well within reach.
Restaurants were expensive, but they told that all restaurants in that area are expensive. I will definitely stay in here if I happen to visit Ahmedabad again provided they don't keep the towels under the basin counter near the water closet/ commode.

Excellent! Loved it. Would love to visit it again. Enjoyed the buffet breakfast which was elaborate. Waiting to try the lunch/ dinner buffet menu.
Courteous staff and awesome service.
It's really a nice hotel to stay. Food is of nice quality. Service is nice . Quiet decent hotel to spend .

Recently the Hotel had been renovated. Food is good at the coffee shop. Staff is also very courteous. Would definitely recommend to business guests as well as Families opting for dinner. The Food served at the Banquets on the first floors is also very good. I would definitely recommend it in terms of food amongst the top hotels of this city.

One of the best hotels that sets high standards of hospitality. The staff was highly professional and did not hesitate in going out of the way for guest comfort. The rooms were neat and clean. The best aspect I found was the food. Excellent breakfast. I highly recommend this hotel for travellers, business and family categories. Always a pleasure to visit again.

Decent Hotel with a little dated rooms but the Food and service amply making up for it. This is my second stay with them and they do not disappoint from service point of view at all.
The courtesy and warmth by the servers at Zodiac is  outstanding which amply complements the food.
The only downside is the non maintenance of finer details like some parts of door and washroom need a little touch up and the shower zone doesn't have any shelf to put soap or shampoos.
Rest all well. Would surely suggest friends to try it out once. Atleast for the ambience at Wind and water.

Decent hotel and decent food. The rooms could be far bette than what they are. There is not theme to the rooms. It’s as if old hotel rooms have been partially upgraded to modern styling. So it’s a mix mash up.
The time taken by the room service needs some serious looking at. Quality and presentation of food was good.

The Hotel Has A Great view

Food Is the best and is been awarded for the best fine dining restaurants

Rooms are luxury

Fast and reliable service

Helpful and friendly staff

Good hospitality. Staff have a smiling look and always greet.  Couple of our requirements were attended to very quickly.  Wish the exaust in the restroom (attached to the room) is more effective. Spread in the morning breakfast was good and tasty too. Overall we were satisfied.

From booking to our stay was excellent. All the staff was very much friendly at anytime. Even late night they served us with smile. I thanks to all the staff. My special thanks to Mr. Rahul Gharg , Front office Manager who helped us at every stage. Thanks again.
Dr. Jitendra Shah . My room no was “612”,  dt 31/8 to 4/9.

Visited for a weekend trip. Really enjoyed the stay everything was up to the mark from room, staff and the breakfast was so delicious had a variety of options to eat both veg and non veg. They also have 2 restaurants one which is on the ground floor is open 24×7 and one on the top floor. Do try both of them. The food is really great the best in ahmedabad. So overall the stay was fantastic and would really look forward to visit again.

I habe stayed here last month and found the rooms were quite Exquisite and had a comfortable stay with them. Their Restaurant Earthen oven is quite impressive and have one f the best Ghazal singers.

They have a pretty good Wi-Fi facilities as compared to other hotels comp wi-fi.

As a cabin crew , I get opportunities to visit places and stay in the best hotels around the world. I would like to say this hotel has been one of the beautiful memories I have ever experienced in terms of services they had provided.

From the cab driver to the man at the gate who greets everyone with a huge smile, the people at the reception ,the room service staff, the in-room dining staff etc. They all make their guests experience so special with warmth even in this pandemic .We try to provide the same service in the air with safety as their priority and these guys do it here on ground. Hope you guys keep up the good work and I would love to come to the hotel again .
Great hospitality at fortune landmark.Thanks a lot to N Prasad and his team for their great hospitality . The interior was nice . The food served was tasty . I will surely come nd visit next time 😊🫠

Aha.. What a hospitality.. Completely in love with ambience and food.

It's located in heart of Ahmedabad from where you can visit all tourist spots.

As far as food is concerned it's prepared with delicacy and taste awesome for all kind of people.

Though smaller than expected but as per standard.

This place never disappoint me. It always surprise me with great food, best service, pleasant atmosphere and mesmerized ambiance.

Went for morning breakfast and I would say it's the best place for it. Variety of food items, option of veg and non veg dinning, multicuisine. They also serve on your table apart from the buffet breakfast. Also the best part is it is suitable for vegan and people who are on diet.

Just one word to comprise my experience.. Wow...

This is a beautiful 5 star hotel and highly recommended for NRI's to make you feel at home.During our 14 days stay,the room was wonderful, clean, and perfect for long stay.They served with plenty of varieties in breakfast everyday.The staff at this property are all great! Special mentions  to Mahak at Reception,Vajeram & Lalji at concierge,Aman in Restaurant & M Khan & team for room service.They all go above and beyond to make your stay comfortable.Thank you so much.

Very pristine and beautifully maintained.. food is Delicious and lot of variety... The only red flag I observed about location, if you are bored of trying hotel food and wanted to explore something near by food joints than no options available... After 9 PM area deserted for food options

Very bad service at Earthen Oven Restaurant. After placing order of simple dish of Pulao, had to wait for more than 1 hour to be served. More than 30 minutes for serving desserts. We reached at 8 pm and got desserts at 10 35 pm. Never ever had to wait soooooo long to be served.
Old building but rooms are good.

Decent place to stay, staff is good mostly, they take a little bit of getting used to. Rooms are nice and clean. Bathrooms are clean and completely modern and functional. Food is simple and tasty. All in all a decent experience for 3 nights. Situated close to most things you need so the location is not bad either.
It was the best experience of all hotels in Ahmedabad. The view was OK, but the service and rooms were more than fabulous
We have visited Zodiac restaurant by fortune landmark and have lunch buffet which cost 1200 pp. Food wasn't meet expectations. Ambience were good. You should try other options than this restaurant.

I stayed with my daughters for a night. Loved the room, hotel staff's friendly service and amenities. They let us do an early check in without asking a single question. My daughters loved the stay. Will definitely stay here again. I have stayed at Novotel and Courtyard Marriott and I would put this hotel in the same category!!!

We had a very warm welcome and attention from the team , ms praneela, Mr Bharat , Vajeram ji ,and Conceirge Ashok ji s team.thank you for making our Singaporean guests feel at home.
Most recommended!!!

It was a very disappointing experience at Earthen Oven on 21st evening (December 2022). The service was lousy. Hardly enough staff for the service. It took almost 50 minutes to serve the main course after the soup & starter. All other guests also yelled. You should not have entertained more guests than you can manage. Even the rates were exorbitantly high. Diabetic patient like me had health issues due to gap of taking food so late after taking insulin. Would think twice to visit again.

We have stayed at this hotel multiple times and the well maintain of room and attention to detail remain. The staff is amazing the rooms have been comfortable an immaculate.breakfast offered is really excellent.cleanliness is next to godliness.

I stayed in newly built road view club room, but a wide column within the room is taking more place and making room uncomfortable. This hotel. is situated next to Mumbai Ahmedabad Highway so it is very much approachable but slight traffic Noise is inevitable.

Recently stayed here and conducted a 2-day workshop for Business Owners on 'How To Build A Talent Factory'. Loved the property. The rooms have good views, the food is nice, the banquets are fine! But the finest of all is their service. The entire team has been trained very well! Right from the bell boy and darban to the room service and house keeping boys.... everyone is well trained in hospitality. Loved the stay. Definitely recommended.

Excellent location, close to Sabarmati Ashram and Riverfront. Nice property with excellent food. Breakfast was awesome.... Prompt service.
Heartfelt thanks to all who made our stay memorable especially Ms Pranali who offered us a great room with excellent view during stay.

Located at a walkable distance from the Sabarmathi riverfront, this hotel provides excellent stay with value for money. This is a convenient place for travellers alighting at the airport. There are two main restaurants one exclusively North Indian. This is restaurant has awesome food great view at night! Breakfast buffet is also good. Rooms are spacious and well maintained. Overall a recommended place for business travellers.

Best 5* rated hotel in Ahmedabad. Fortune itself a popular brand name to serve you quality of services in respect of food, service and stay. It is best place to dine in. Room interior is very superb. Staff are well trained to deliver the best services to you.
Must to visit this Hotel

Hotel had great ambience and imstrumental music for good mood...it had good waiting area with central air conditioning for comfort. Also lighting was also good. It provided good service, the staff was communicative and provided info, water and food on request. The room in hotels was good with air conditioning and comfy sofa, bed and entertainment system...

Conveniently located in the heart of the city, Fortune Landmark is an upscale, contemporary business hotel in Ahmedabad. The hotel offers first class services and facilities, combining comfort of home with Fortune Hotels’ efficient service. Whether you are in town for business or leisure, Fortune Landmark will delight you with the best that Ahmedabad has to offer. A perfect amalgam of convenience, comfort and great value, the hotel is perfectly suited to service the needs of the discerning traveller

I love the the accomodation and the rooms beautiful sweat room and all other services i appreciate front office staff the all have good coordination and housekeeping. And the girl in front office miss. Malik. Thank you for helping me to find my lost luggage.
Good place, delicious food and service. Rooms are wonderful.

We had an excellent stay here. We were here for a night. Couldn’t wait to write here and thank the hotel. Very nice and clean rooms, good food, great staff and overall a good property. Each and every staff we interacted with was very helpful and accomodative. We arrived at the hotel much earlier then the expected check in time, and they were very kind to let us check in early. We were also allowed to delay our checkout time. But the main highlight of our stay was Ms. Dini at the Zodiac restaurant. I would like to take this opportunity to thank her once again for her 5 star hospitality. She was very approachable, courteous, helpful, friendly and always very happy to help. If the Hotel Manager is reading this, then please note that Ms. Dini definitely deserves an appreciation and a recognition as an employee. Thank you once again. Will look forward to our next stay there. Regards, Hanish.

I would say its the hospitality that matters.....rest all amenities are just the side menus. This place proved it.
Good and prompt response support staff.
Matchless cuisines... believe me...they were delightfully delicious.
With the super luxurious rooms.....
No wonder this fortune Landmark hotel made our one day stay a pretty unforgettable visit.

On my various visits to Ahmedabad, stayed at this nice property on most ocassions. Excellent location from my point of view. Service is also very good. The staff is exceptionally helpful and positive in their approach. Facilities in the rooms are of a high order. Buffet and breakfast have very good choices. All in all a very rewarding experience each time.

One of the finest hotels of Ahmedabad. And the behavior of all the staff is really good. And the food is really very mouth watering and rooms are also very neat and clean. I think it is even better than Hyatt which is right next to it. And it is also situated in a very prime location which is very easily access-able from the airport and railway station. And moreover they also provide pick up and drop facility. But there is only one staff who's behavior is really bad and arrogant her name is Parnila. She is the duty manager their. She really needs a good training.

It is a well maintained property. Rooms are spacious and equipped with all basic facilities. Staff here is very helpful and courteous. Free WiFi is good with reasonable speed. Pool and fitness center are there. Breakfast is lavish and includes items for different taste's. Value for money.
The waiters do not even bring sugar to the table alongwith the lukewarm kadak watery tea. The airconditioning is kept off even in current housefull meeting area and 35+ degree celcius.

Very Nice Property. super clean rooms. staff was very helpful. Hotels chief was personally meeting restaurant guests. while passing through our table he heard Jalabi word and in few second he came back with Hot Crispy tasty Jalebi. food was very tasty. Must Visit place. will stay same property whenever i ll be in Ahmedabad.

We stayed one day at here, the room was very well maintained. We ordered for room decoration and they decorated it awesome.
The morning breakfast was very good.
All the staff members were very friendly.

Visited in 2017. what can i say .. you guys made our dinner memorable with your unmatched hospitality, top notch service . Welcomed and served with smile. Amazing experience with fortune landmark.
We had our dinner at zodiac restaurant, great hospitality, very nice peoples are working in the restaurant.
Would like to mention for polite and well behaved staff for their hospitality and make is feel at home . Highly recommended, we will visit again at fortune landmark .Thank you

Overall very bright and clean atmosphere.

We have been visiting this hotel's restaurant for at least last six years. Great location, right on the main road, with valet parking is a boon. Inviting entrance and lobby. Very clean and spacious too.

As you enter the hotel the Restaurant Earthen Oven is just opposite to the Reception.

Though we have not ever stayed in this hotel but have dined many times in the restaurant. Reasonably good restaurant with many variety in the menu. However some times few items are not available, though rare.

Nice comfortable seating and very clean and specious atmosphere.

You really need to train your staff especially at the restaurant NOT to chase guests asking room number , pointed it out to the floor manager but in vain . It’s not a prison , there is appropriate time to ask if need be , not as soon as one enters or in the middle of the meal . This is very minimum & basic .

We had  booked Fortune Landmark at Ahemedabad for 2 nights during our onward journey to Bhuj, keeping in mind the brand Fortune and our past good experiences at Fortune properties.

The location is right in the heart of the city, about 10 mins away from the Airport, Railway station as well as the city markets around Law Garden area.  City attractions and shopping complexes lile the Alpha One Mall are in close vicinity too.

The Hotel lived up to its reputation, having offered to us great service right from reception desk to housekeeping, and restaurants to concierge.

The staff were courteous and attended to all our requests.  Restaurant manager Mr Kamlesh ensured that packed breakfast of sandwiches, fruits cake and juice was kept ready at 7 am on our early morning 7 am trip.

Reception executive Ritik graciously extended our checkout time at our request by a few hours, considering that the entire previous day we had spent travelling and were not in the Hotel premises. Staff Vaishali and Mahak were most helpful as well.

Excellent customer service. The food at both restaurants was delicious and warmly served by Pushpanjali.

Vazeram our Concierge handled our luggage with great  care.

All in all, its a great place to stay at Ahemedabad. Will surely book in the future when revisiting Ahemedabad.
Good rooms with amazing breakfast and all amenities . Good for a stay cation and also don't miss the breakfast . The room is nice and cozy but can be better

Very old property but it is very well maintained.
Rooms are pretty well & staff is very polite, humble & helpful.
The cafe has a great ambiance, it has indoor seating as well as outdoor pool side seating.
Food is very delicious & tasty.

Highest quality of service and hospitality. The glorious standard of ITC service continues gallantly.Food quality and service was impeccable. The overall service standard a sheer delight to.
My sincere thanks to Mr. Suresh Kannan - Executive Chef and Mr.Kamlesh
I would highly recommend this hotel to anyone looking for best stay and hospitality.

Well maintained and spacious rooms..Friendly and helpful staff..quick and prompt service..Scrumptious breakfast..lunch n dinner spread ws damn good..food was really outstanding..Its in the heart of the city..Had a lovely stay.. Keep up the good work.. 👍

Quick efficient service, comfortable rooms, good food. Well located.
Facilities in rooms are also good.
Entrance becomes crowded in evenings with cars lined up waiting for valet parking.
Front office can be made more  efficient. Address given while check in was not entered even though visiting card was given.
Before leaving room for check out, I had requested for a print out of my boarding pass. This was not given and in confusion reg address entry, this was missed.
Other than these, the stay was very comfortable.
Thanks.

Rooms are newly furnished and decor is excellent. Coffee shop is under renovation. Quick response by front office staff and smile on face. Breakfast is also good and ready to serve you hot preparation. Most of the area is yet under renovation. Over all good experience

The dinner at the Fortune was excellent. Rahul made sure I ate well.

The property is ageing well.  The room is well maintained.  Carpets were clean and the room smells fresh.

Winds and water is a outdoor cafe in the premises of this hotel. It has been recently revamped creating some great ambiance with water as its theme. Large part of the sitting is on a toughened see through glass with water underneath and fishes swimming. The ambiance is perfect for a date and even good with friends and family. The menu has veg as well as non-veg items.

Waffles with some great exotic twist is the highlight of the menu. All items quite pricy as its a "5 star" restaurant. They don't have a mocktails menu which is bit disappointing. Although they would give a superb mojito if you request.

A wonderful stay experience. Right from the moment of welcome drinks and checkin.
The breakfast buffet is one of the most elaborate breakfast buffet I have ever had and was equally high on taste as well. Rooms are cosy. Front desk is very helpful.

I stayed at Fortune Landmark for a week and i must say it was an awesome stay. Great hospitality, good team and supportive staff. Already booked my room hence check in was quick. Room was equipped with everything that you need. Spacious room with good view outside. The food was awesome. Adequate variety to choose from, great prep and equally great service. My special compliments to Head Chef Mr Khanna and the dessert chef. Gym was a little let down as it was a makeshift arrangement. Overall a very satisfying experience. Will definitely stay again in my next visit.

Good for a business travel. Not so much for a leisure travel. Rooms are little damp. Minimal toiletries. Was only one coffee mug in a double room. Had to ask several times to get another. The hotel has a very worn-out look. AC was not working well. Room was too hot at the middle of the night. We had to manipulate it everytime manually and no remote. Hence it was tiring to get up from bed and change the settings in the panel.

One of best restaurant in Ahmedabad..

Parking also available

Food was great and 😋..

Jain food available..

Prices was average.

Taste was super super..

Family restaurant..

Table was some about 10 only because it is hotel restaurant..

Must go once...

FL's roof top restaurant (Earthen oven) is really wonderful place to enjoy ur food with ur loved once peacefully. Good quality of food and service. :)

Even their pool side restaurant is also good but could be better with menu. Good utilization of space. However in summer, you'll feel the need of AC ;)

Nice and clean, 5 star stay.
Courteous staff and very prompt service.
Has been a high class hotel since a long time in Ahmedabad on Ashram road. Restaurants are also very good in this hotel and nearby.

My experience was mixed. Not so great. Hotel is good. Amenities are good. Only problem i faced was with room cleaning staff. They changed cover of the blanket with a wet cover and hence it was uncomfortable and cold, and that particular staff was aware of that. That i was not expecting from such a high end hotel.

Once good, now out of their depth. Their food quality was not great this time and it seems they are under staffed.
Too bad, another place lost its edge.

Hospitality can be better.. Don't understand why they miss some basics like no newspaper. Don't take feedback on reception but call in room to ask ?(someone could be sleeping or in office call ). Food is ok. Cutlery was delayed. Why receptionist cant smile. Why second key to hotel can't be given.

We are here for the 36th National Games 2022..
Our team's accommodations is here only started from 30th Sep night may be till 11oct'22..
Rooms are good and well maintained with all luxurious facilities that a 5-a-star hotel has,
Lights can be more modified as now very simple, portraits/painting inside the rooms can be more attractive..
Food is tasty and hygiene, staff is very much humble and cooperative..
Service is good but sometime delays, may be because of rushing hours but it's ok.. 👌🏼👌🏼

Thank u hotel staffs, wishing for the same services and facilities on rest days.. 🙂🙂

With Regard,
Odisha Football Team.. ❤❤⚽⚽🙂🙂
class experience n services from day 1 its open we love to often  visit  and also good place in ahmedabad  food is always delicious  ( I am pure veg)

I was in town for an exam , and was very hungry after it was over. Fortune lamdmark was right opposite to my exam center. Went over and asked if they were serving lunch already , they said buffet will take.time Ala' carte is available. So i ordered myself a pizza and a pasta. The pizza was perfect , chicken and mushroom loved it. Pasta was kinda ok i guess.
Awesome ambience and very courteous staff.

Our stay was excellent because of the beautiful ambience, mouth watering food and bestest hospitality by all the staff members espl, Kyn, Purnima, Sanjita, eshan, Vivek, lalji, Jyoti, Sudhandshu. I recommend everyone whosoever coming to ahemdabad, must visit this place. Food by chef Suresh Khanna n Dalbeer is outstanding and delicious.
Ambiance and service of all the staff members are excellent and awesome. It was great experience. The food of wind and water was so delicious. Thank you fortune landmark hotel and team.
It's a good place to stay a bit old property,needs maintenance. Food is fairly nice.

Hotel food and dining staff are very good but room service is very very very worse.
I stayed two days thr both day it was literally like I was bagging for water. रात को पानी मांगा सुबह तक नहीं दिया, सुबह फिर मांगा 2 घंटे तक नहीं दिया फिर रिसेप्शन पर कंप्लेन की तो पानी मिला।
So restaurant and desk staff is too good but not room service.
The stay was excellent, thanks to the courteous staff at the hotel. Food was top notch, thanks to Chef Suresh Khanna and his polite staff made the experience even better.

It is a wonderful hotel in Ahmedabad of Welcome group. I happened to stay here few times. Ambience is good. The rooms are spacious. On Higher floor front side, you get the view of riverfront. Atrium is elegant. Breakfast spread is large. The food is awesome. They have very good staff. Always attentive but not intrusive. Overall experience very good

I am regular at this very good hotel parcel service is very good food is very tasty very fresh very happy G M Anil Ji very humble takes care of its guest and V P  Rohit ji certainly sees hygiene and Customer service is at it's best  location also very good. Earthen oven its signature restaurants gives great Dum ka khana Chef Dalveer Chef Nathu Singh ang Moriya  great Earthen oven great G M Anil Ji takes personal care
I'm sure landmark can add Indian multi regional cuisine as weekly specials...

Courteous staff , cleanliness and Hygiene standards are good.
Food is amazing and you have lots of variety available.

Would again like to mention that staffs are very friendly and professional .

Best wishes.

An absolute cool dinner special place. Well decorated with a fantastic view towards River Sabarmati. The live musical idea like background music is also very attractive and happening idea. The food was also very tasty. Our host Shubhambhai is quite good at his work including other staff while maintaining hygiene and safety during this COVID time. Would love to visit again.

Exceptional breakfast, One of the best hotels with very good hospitality, Food is delicious,  super luxurious rooms, Very nice ambience,  top class cleanliness, Highly recommend...outstanding  service... Staff are very cooperative... Everything was very good, wonderful experience...
